This behavioral divergence creates a rigorous testbed: a faithful explainer must report distinct reasoning pathways for each model. Our findings reveal that widely used methods fail to distinguish between models relying on genuine spatial-relational reasoning and those exploiting cross-modal shortcuts, highlighting a critical gap in capturing true cross-modal synergy and misrepresenting how multimodal models actually make decisions.

AI.tldr: GridVQA-X是首个专门评估跨模态可解释性的诊断框架，通过合成逻辑生成数学保证的唯一解释，揭示现有方法无法区分真实空间关系推理和跨模态捷径，暴露了当前多模态可解释性方法的严重缺陷。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型的发展，其预测需要向相关利益方提供可解释性。然而，可解释性领域未能跟上多模态发展的步伐。当前多模态可解释性方法缺乏能够区分真实跨模态推理（如空间组合）和浅层跨模态捷径（如词袋属性匹配）的评估协议。现有方法是否真正捕捉到了协同交互，还是仅仅在模型作为简单特征检测器时产生幻觉推理，这仍然未知。
AI.method: 提出了GridVQA-X框架，这是首个专门评估跨模态可解释性的诊断框架。与自然数据集不同，GridVQA-X利用封闭世界合成逻辑生成具有数学保证的唯一解释。在此受控环境中，使用相同架构训练成对的真实模型：M_pure学习稳健的空间关系推理，M_spur在结构上被迫依赖跨模态捷径。这种行为差异创建了严格的测试平台：一个忠实的解释器必须为每个模型报告不同的推理路径。
AI.result: 研究发现，广泛使用的方法无法区分依赖真实空间关系推理的模型和利用跨模态捷径的模型，这突显了在捕捉真实跨模态协同作用方面的关键差距，并错误地表示了多模态模型实际如何做出决策。
AI.conclusion: GridVQA-X框架揭示了当前多模态可解释性方法的严重缺陷，它们无法区分模型是否真正进行跨模态推理，还是仅仅依赖捷径。这为开发更可靠的多模态可解释性方法提供了重要的诊断工具和基准。

title: MimicIK: Real-Time Generative Inverse Kinematics from Teleoperation with FK Consistency
summary: Inverse kinematics (IK) remains a critical bottleneck for real-time robot manipulation. Classical numerical solvers achieve high geometric precision but often suffer from discontinuous branch switching and unstable behavior near kinematic singularities during closed-loop deployment. Meanwhile, learned IK approaches frequently struggle to balance spatial accuracy, motion smoothness, and real-time efficiency, particularly when trained on noisy human teleoperation data. We present \textbf{MimicIK}, a real-time generative inverse kinematics framework that learns smooth and robust joint-space motion priors from teleoperation demonstrations through conditional flow matching. Given the current joint configuration and a target end-effector pose, MimicIK predicts continuous delta-joint commands using an efficient two-step iterative refinement process based on a Minimal Iterative Policy (MIP) backbone. To enforce physical consistency, we further introduce an FK consistency loss, a differentiable forward-kinematics regularization that penalizes task-space deviations from the target pose during training. We evaluate MimicIK on a real-world 6-DOF robot dataset containing 8,848 teleoperation demonstrations. MimicIK achieves a mean position error of 4.65 mm, a 10 mm success rate of 92.01\%, and a trajectory spike rate of only 7.99\%. Compared with a UNet diffusion baseline, our method improves both spatial accuracy and motion smoothness while reducing inference latency from 21.66 ms to 6.74 ms. Furthermore, unlike deterministic MLP baselines that catastrophically diverge under out-of-distribution deployment, MimicIK remains stable near singular configurations and enables robust 20 Hz real-time control on deployment hardware.

AI.tldr: MimicIK是一个基于条件流匹配的实时生成式逆运动学框架，从遥操作演示中学习平滑的关节空间运动先验，通过两步迭代细化实现高精度、低延迟的机器人控制。
AI.motivation: 传统数值IK求解器在闭环部署时存在不连续的支路切换和奇异点附近不稳定问题，而学习型IK方法难以在空间精度、运动平滑性和实时效率之间取得平衡，特别是在噪声遥操作数据上训练时。
AI.method: 基于条件流匹配学习遥操作演示中的平滑关节空间运动先验；使用最小迭代策略（MIP）骨干进行高效的两步迭代细化；引入FK一致性损失作为可微分前向运动学正则化，惩罚任务空间与目标姿态的偏差。
AI.result: 在包含8,848次演示的真实6-DOF机器人数据集上，MimicIK达到4.65mm的平均位置误差，10mm成功率为92.01%，轨迹尖峰率仅7.99%；相比UNet扩散基线，在提高空间精度和运动平滑性的同时，将推理延迟从21.66ms降至6.74ms；在奇异配置附近保持稳定，支持20Hz实时控制。
AI.conclusion: MimicIK通过学习平滑运动先验和引入FK一致性正则化，解决了传统IK求解器在奇异点附近不稳定和学习型IK方法精度、平滑性、实时性难以平衡的问题，实现了高精度、平滑且实时的机器人逆运动学控制。

title: Rational Sparse Autoencoder
comment: Accepted to the Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop at ICML 2026
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are standard tools for mechanistic interpretability, but current SAE families are constrained by fixed encoder nonlinearities such as ReLU, JumpReLU, and TopK. This hard-codes a particular sparsity mechanism into the model and can distort the reconstruction-versus-sparsity trade-off. We introduce the Rational Sparse Autoencoder (RSAE), which replaces the fixed encoder activation with a trainable rational function. Rational activations are flexible enough to uniformly approximate the activation primitives used by existing SAE families on compact domains (for TopK, the thresholded gate obtained after a separating top-k threshold is supplied), while also providing a richer function class for adapting to the observed pre-activation geometry. We realise this idea through a two-stage pipeline: an initialisation procedure that copies the pre-trained baseline SAE weights, plugs in rational coefficients obtained by the relaxed Remez exchange on synthetic data, and calibrates the scale parameters along with the rational coefficients; followed by a fine-tuning step under the standard sparsity-regularised reconstruction objective. Empirically, on residual-stream activations of three open-weight language models and across all three baseline activation families, the RSAE strictly improves on it after the fine-tuning step, both on reconstruction-side metrics and on downstream-behaviour metrics, without sacrificing feature-level interpretability under sparse probing. These gains are consistent across host language models, across baseline activation families, and across the full range of baseline sparsity we tested, while the upgrade itself adds only a handful of scalar parameters per autoencoder and runs in minutes on a single consumer GPU.

AI.tldr: RSAE（Rational Sparse Autoencoder）通过可训练的有理函数替换传统SAE中的固定编码器激活函数，统一了现有SAE激活函数族，在保持特征可解释性的同时，在重建精度和稀疏性权衡上实现了严格改进。
AI.motivation: 当前稀疏自编码器（SAE）受限于固定的编码器非线性激活函数（如ReLU、JumpReLU、TopK），这些硬编码的特定稀疏机制会扭曲重建与稀疏性之间的权衡关系，限制了模型的适应能力。
AI.method: RSAE采用两阶段流程：1）初始化阶段：复制预训练基线SAE权重，通过松弛Remez交换在合成数据上获得有理系数，并与有理系数一起校准尺度参数；2）微调阶段：在标准稀疏正则化重建目标下进行微调。
AI.result: 在三个开源语言模型的残差流激活上，跨所有三个基线激活函数族，RSAE在微调后严格改进了基线性能，包括重建侧指标和下游行为指标，同时保持了稀疏探测下的特征级可解释性。这些改进在不同宿主语言模型、不同基线激活函数族以及测试的所有基线稀疏度范围内都保持一致。
AI.conclusion: RSAE通过可训练有理激活函数提供了一种灵活统一的稀疏自编码器框架，能够适应观察到的预激活几何结构，仅需少量额外参数和单消费级GPU几分钟的运行时间，即可在保持特征可解释性的同时显著提升性能。

title: HorusEye: Language as Dynamic Attention for Emergency Visual Analysis
summary: We introduce HorusEye, Language as Dynamic Attention for Emergency Visual Analysis. Our investigation followed five stages. The first one is benchmarking RefCOCO-Degraded, a dataset of 15,244 images (3,811 base images x 4 conditions: Clean, Fog, Smoke and Thermal) with systematic visual degradation. Through four research questions, we evaluate multiple VLMs (Gemini, Qwen2-VL, BLIP-2, LLaVA, Kosmos-2) across visual grounding the second stage, language feedback recovery the third one, health VQA tasks the fourth, and hallucination analysis the final stage. Our key finding is that language feedback effectiveness is model-dependent: Gemini achieves +47.3% improvement in thermal conditions through iterative language feedback, while Qwen2-VL shows -5.1% degradation under the same protocol. We also identify the 'Thermal Paradox' where cropping strategies that improve RGB performance catastrophically fail in thermal imagery. Furthermore, BLIP-2 uniquely hallucinates more under degradation, making it unsuitable for emergency deployment

AI.tldr: HorusEye提出语言作为动态注意力机制用于应急视觉分析，通过五个阶段研究评估多个视觉语言模型在视觉接地、语言反馈恢复、健康VQA和幻觉分析任务上的表现，发现语言反馈效果模型依赖，并识别了热成像中的"热成像悖论"现象。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是开发用于应急场景的视觉分析系统，通过语言作为动态注意力机制来应对视觉质量下降的挑战，特别是在雾、烟、热成像等恶劣条件下的应急响应需求。
AI.method: 方法包括五个阶段：1) 构建RefCOCO-Degraded数据集（15,244张图像，4种条件）；2) 评估多个VLM的视觉接地能力；3) 语言反馈恢复研究；4) 健康VQA任务评估；5) 幻觉分析。使用迭代语言反馈协议评估模型性能。
AI.result: 关键发现：语言反馈效果因模型而异（Gemini在热成像条件下提升47.3%，Qwen2-VL下降5.1%）；识别"热成像悖论"（提升RGB性能的裁剪策略在热成像中完全失败）；BLIP-2在视觉质量下降时产生更多幻觉，不适合应急部署。
AI.conclusion: 结论：语言反馈在应急视觉分析中具有潜力但效果模型依赖，热成像需要专门策略，某些模型在视觉质量下降时会产生更多幻觉，应急场景的VLM选择需要谨慎评估。

title: Task-Aware Environment Augmentation for Reliable Navigation via Shielded Conditional Diffusion
summary:
Reliable trajectory planning under partial observability depends not only on computing a feasible geometric path, but also on whether the robot receives informative observations while executing that trajectory. Existing approaches usually keep the environment fixed and adapt the robot through belief-space planning, active localization, or added sensing, often incurring costly uncertainty propagation and brittle behavior in observation-poor regions. We flip this perspective and address the largely open problem of \emph{task-aware environment augmentation}: given a mapped environment, a planned task trajectory, and a small budget of visual fiducial markers, where should the environment be augmented so that the planned trajectory can be executed reliably under uncertainty? Our key observation is that useful marker layouts are defined by the localization support they provide along the task trajectory: a small number of well-timed observations can be sufficient to prevent uncertainty from accumulating in regions where state-estimation error would otherwise compromise control. Building on this observation, we present \tbp{SCoDA}, $\textbf{S}$hielded $\textbf{Co}$nditional $\textbf{D}$iffusion for Environment $\textbf{A}$ugmentation. \tbp{SCoDA} learns a conditional distribution over high-performing fiducial layouts from data, using the environment, planned trajectory, disturbance context, and desired execution profile as conditioning. Its shielded sampler reasons over where along the planned execution pose corrections should occur, and steers this distribution toward task-relevant, finite-budget augmentations. Across simulated benchmarks and hardware deployments, we show that \tbp{SCoDA} improves trajectory execution reliability and completion time over strong baselines.
  Code, models and dataset available at: \hyperlink{scoda-diffusion.github.io}{https://scoda-diffusion.github.io/}

AI.tldr: SCoDA是一个用于任务感知环境增强的屏蔽条件扩散方法，通过在有遮挡的环境中战略性地部署少量视觉标记，提高机器人轨迹执行的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测环境下，机器人轨迹规划的可靠性不仅取决于几何路径的可行性，还取决于执行过程中能否获得信息丰富的观测。现有方法通常保持环境固定，通过信念空间规划、主动定位或增加传感来适应机器人，但这种方法往往需要昂贵的传播不确定度，且在观测贫乏区域表现脆弱。
AI.method: 提出SCoDA（屏蔽条件扩散环境增强）方法，学习条件分布以生成高性能的视觉标记布局。该方法使用环境、规划轨迹、干扰上下文和期望执行配置文件作为条件输入，通过屏蔽采样器分析轨迹执行过程中姿态校正应在何处发生，并将分布引导至任务相关、有限预算的增强方案。
AI.result: 在模拟基准测试和硬件部署中，SCoDA相比强基线方法显著提高了轨迹执行的可靠性和完成时间。
AI.conclusion: 通过战略性部署少量视觉标记来增强环境，可以有效提高机器人在部分可观测环境下的轨迹执行可靠性，SCoDA方法为任务感知环境增强这一开放问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Unlocking Latent Dimensions: Exploring Representations of Large-Scale X-ray Scattering Data using Variational Autoencoders
summary: Scientific user facilities generate X-ray scattering data faster than traditional workflows can process them. We address this challenge across two settings, offline dataset exploration and live on-the-fly analysis. We train a domain-specific attention-based Convolutional Variational Autoencoder (C-VAE) on 1.5 million X-ray scattering images to learn low-dimensional representations capturing structural variation across diverse experimental conditions. The learned latent space reveals well-organized clusters and smooth trajectories reflecting experimental progression. It further supports controlled synthetic scattering image generation across diverse structural states. When deployed without retraining, the model organizes time-resolved film formation experiments at two synchrotron facilities into interpretable latent structures. Benchmarking against DINOv3 (ViT-7B), a general-purpose vision foundation model, demonstrates that domain-specific training yields more interpretable latent organization for scattering data. Both workflows are integrated within Latent Space Explorer, a component of the MLExchange platform, supporting interactive structural exploration across archived datasets and live experiments.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对X射线散射数据处理瓶颈，开发了基于注意力机制的卷积变分自编码器（C-VAE），用于离线数据集探索和实时分析，并通过Latent Space Explorer工具集成到MLExchange平台。
AI.motivation: 科学用户设施产生的X射线散射数据速度超过了传统工作流程的处理能力，需要解决离线数据集探索和实时分析两个场景下的数据处理瓶颈。
AI.method: 训练了一个基于注意力机制的领域特定卷积变分自编码器（C-VAE），使用150万张X射线散射图像学习低维表示，捕捉不同实验条件下的结构变化。
AI.result: 学习到的潜在空间显示出组织良好的聚类和反映实验进展的平滑轨迹，支持跨不同结构状态的可控合成散射图像生成。模型在两个同步辐射设施的薄膜形成实验中表现出可解释的潜在结构组织，优于通用视觉基础模型DINOv3（ViT-7B）。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定训练为散射数据提供了更可解释的潜在空间组织，该工作流程已集成到Latent Space Explorer工具中，支持跨存档数据集和实时实验的交互式结构探索。

title: Style-CCL: Content-Preserving Style Transfer via Curriculum Continual Learning
comment: code and models of QwenStyle are released at https://github.com/witcherofresearch/Qwen-Image-Style-Transfer/ and https://github.com/Tele-AI/TeleStyle/
summary: Content-Preserving Style transfer, given content and style references, remains challenging for Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) due to entangled content and style features. With a reverse triplet synthesis pipeline to build a million-scale training set and a dual-branch Style-Content DiT (SC-DiT) that decouples style and content via separate ROPE embeddings and causal masking, we observe that such a one-stage training paradigm on mixed style categories causes semantic styles to dominate, hindering texture style learning, and harming content preservation. To address these issues, we propose Style-CCL, a Multi-Stage Curriculum Continual Learning framework that trains SC-DiT from semantic (easy) to texture (hard) styles, and from clean to synthetic data, with Random Memory Rehearsal across stages to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Style-CCL achieves state-of-the-art performance in three core metrics: style similarity, content consistency, and aesthetic quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Style-CCL框架，通过多阶段课程持续学习方法，解决Diffusion Transformers在内容保持风格迁移中语义风格主导、纹理风格学习困难的问题，实现风格相似度、内容一致性和美学质量的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于Diffusion Transformers的内容保持风格迁移面临挑战，因为内容和风格特征纠缠在一起。单阶段训练在混合风格类别上会导致语义风格主导，阻碍纹理风格学习，并损害内容保持。
AI.method: 提出Style-CCL多阶段课程持续学习框架：1）使用反向三元组合成管道构建百万级训练集；2）设计双分支Style-Content DiT (SC-DiT)，通过分离的ROPE嵌入和因果掩码解耦风格和内容；3）采用从语义（易）到纹理（难）风格、从干净到合成数据的多阶段课程训练；4）使用随机记忆排练避免阶段间的灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Style-CCL在三个核心指标上达到最先进性能：风格相似度、内容一致性和美学质量。
AI.conclusion: Style-CCL框架通过多阶段课程持续学习有效解决了DiT在内容保持风格迁移中的挑战，实现了语义和纹理风格的平衡学习，显著提升了风格迁移的质量。

title: Seam-to-Graph Reconstruction for Garment Configuration Alignment
summary: Seams encode rich structural information about garments but are frequently partially observable in robotic manipulation scenarios. To robustly leverage seam information, we propose a Seam-to-Graph network based on graph neural networks and attention mechanisms. This network maps unstructured seam observations to a topology-encoded structural skeleton graph for real-time garment state estimation. Using this skeleton-graph-based state estimation, we design a deformation-aware, hierarchical visual servoing controller for garment configuration alignment. We implement this controller on a bimanual robot system to load a garment onto a screen printing platen and to align it to the desired configuration precisely. Real-robot experiments demonstrate that the robot using the proposed method not only achieves human-level alignment accuracy with reduced variance in alignment error but is also robust to different garments. These results demonstrate that the use of seam information is effective for garment manipulation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图神经网络和注意力机制的Seam-to-Graph网络，将部分可观测的接缝信息转换为拓扑编码的结构骨架图，实现服装状态实时估计，并设计变形感知的层次视觉伺服控制器，用于服装配置对齐。
AI.motivation: 接缝蕴含丰富的服装结构信息，但在机器人操作场景中经常只能部分观测。为了鲁棒地利用接缝信息，需要开发能够处理部分观测的接缝信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出Seam-to-Graph网络，基于图神经网络和注意力机制，将无结构的接缝观测映射到拓扑编码的结构骨架图，用于实时服装状态估计。基于此骨架图状态估计，设计变形感知的层次视觉伺服控制器进行服装配置对齐。
AI.result: 在双臂机器人系统上实现控制器，用于将服装加载到丝网印刷板上并精确对齐到期望配置。真实机器人实验表明，该方法不仅达到了人类水平的对齐精度，减少了对齐误差的方差，而且对不同服装具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 使用接缝信息对服装操作是有效的，提出的方法能够实现高精度、鲁棒的服装配置对齐。

title: How Should World Models Be Evaluated? A Decision-Making-Centric Position
summary:
World models have rapidly become one of the central abstractions in modern AI. Yet the term now refers to several different objects: action-conditioned environment models, latent imagination models, future-video predictors, interactive neural simulators, latent predictive representations, and synthetic-data engines. Evaluation has broadened with the term. Recent papers measure video realism, perceptual similarity, instruction following, physical plausibility, policy ranking, executability, planning success, and downstream policy improvement. The result is not only metric diversity but also a recurring problem of claim/evidence mismatch: papers frequently make a stronger claim about what their model is useful for than their evaluation can actually establish.
  This paper surveys the recent literature and argues that the central question is use-dependent. When a model is presented as a world model for embodied decision-making, a more decisive issue is not whether it generates visually compelling videos, but whether it supports reliable counterfactual reasoning, policy evaluation, planning, and policy optimization under intervention, policy-induced distribution shift, and long-horizon rollout. We organize the literature using an L0--L7 ladder that ranges from visual plausibility to policy optimization utility. In our interpretation, L0--L3 are most naturally read as diagnostics of generated artifacts, L4 is often the first genuinely interventional test, and L5--L7 provide the most direct evidence of decision usefulness. Based on this diagnosis, we propose a decision-making-centric evaluation framework and a benchmark protocol that foreground counterfactual action fidelity, closed-loop rollout validity, reward/value prediction, policy-ranking agreement, optimization lift, model exploitability, and uncertainty calibration.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了当前世界模型研究中的术语混淆和评估标准不统一问题，提出了基于决策效用的L0-L7评估阶梯框架，强调世界模型应支持可靠的反事实推理和策略优化。
AI.motivation: 当前世界模型研究存在术语定义混乱（环境模型、想象模型、视频预测器等）和评估标准多样化（视频真实性、感知相似性、指令跟随等）的问题，导致论文主张与证据不匹配。需要建立以决策效用为核心的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出L0-L7评估阶梯：L0-L3关注生成质量（视觉合理性等），L4是首个真正的干预性测试，L5-L7直接评估决策效用。基于此提出决策中心化评估框架和基准协议，强调反事实行动保真度、闭环推演有效性、奖励/价值预测等指标。
AI.result: 建立了系统化的世界模型评估分类框架，明确了从生成质量到决策效用的渐进式评估标准，为解决当前研究中的主张/证据不匹配问题提供了理论工具。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型的核心价值在于支持决策任务。评估应聚焦反事实推理能力和策略优化效用，而非仅关注生成质量。提出的L0-L7阶梯框架为未来研究提供了更严谨的评估标准。

title: MMLongEmbed: Benchmarking Multimodal Embedding Models in Long-Context Scenarios
summary: Recent advancements have significantly expanded the theoretical context windows of Multimodal Embedding Models (MEMs). However, larger context windows do not necessarily translate into effective comprehension and representation of long-context multimodal inputs, which remains a critical bottleneck for real-world deployment. To address the lack of systematic evaluation in this setting, we introduce MMLongEmbed, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating MEMs in long-context scenarios. MMLongEmbed comprises four retrieval tasks spanning multiple context-length ranges, covering text, document, and video modalities. Through extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art models, we find that current architectures rely heavily on superficial feature matching and struggle to capture deep semantic and structural dependencies. We further observe that performance degradation varies systematically with context length and key information placement. Moreover, models exhibit substantially different robustness to redundant contextual information across modalities. For reproducibility, the benchmark and code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: MMLongEmbed是首个用于评估多模态嵌入模型在长上下文场景下的综合基准，包含跨文本、文档和视频模态的四个检索任务，发现现有模型依赖表层特征匹配且难以捕捉深层语义和结构依赖。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态嵌入模型的理论上下文窗口已显著扩展，但更大的上下文窗口并不一定转化为对长上下文多模态输入的有效理解和表示，这成为实际部署的关键瓶颈。目前缺乏对此场景的系统性评估。
AI.method: 引入MMLongEmbed基准，包含四个检索任务，覆盖多个上下文长度范围，涵盖文本、文档和视频模态。对最先进模型进行广泛评估。
AI.result: 当前架构严重依赖表层特征匹配，难以捕捉深层语义和结构依赖。性能下降随上下文长度和关键信息位置系统性变化。不同模态对冗余上下文信息的鲁棒性存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出了首个用于评估多模态嵌入模型在长上下文场景下的综合基准MMLongEmbed，揭示了现有模型的局限性，为未来模型开发提供了重要指导。基准和代码已公开以确保可复现性。

title: Rethinking Implicit Spatial Representation in Visuomotor Policy Learning
summary: Generative model-based imitation learning has become a widely adopted paradigm for robotic manipulation, where policy performance depends critically on the conditioned visual representations. Although spatial softmax-based representations have been adopted in prior visuomotor policies, their effectiveness and underlying mechanisms remain insufficiently understood. This work rethinks the use of spatial softmax pooling: do such implicit spatial representations provide effective and stable visual features for robotic manipulation? Through systematic studies of different pooling methods in visual encoders, we find that this pooling operation produces compact and stable spatial representations, which outperform feature-value representations, despite using substantially fewer dimensions. Complementary saliency analysis further suggests that these spatial representations guide the encoder to focus more consistently on task-relevant regions. However, this advantage is limited by a representation bottleneck in current visual encoders: repeated downsampling operations weaken fine-grained spatial information before the action-generation module can use it, especially under low-resolution observations. Motivated by these findings, we propose PRISM, a visual encoder that preserves multiscale implicit spatial information through top-down cross-attention fusion. Experiments across multiple tasks and policy backbones show consistent improvements. In particular, on the low-resolution, high-precision ToolHang task, PRISM shows clear gains, improving the average success rate from 5.0% to 13.4% while increasing parameters by only 15.4%. These results support the use of multiscale implicit spatial representations as an effective and efficient design principle for robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 该论文重新思考了空间softmax池化在机器人操作中的使用，发现其能产生紧凑稳定的空间表示，但受限于当前视觉编码器的表示瓶颈，因此提出了PRISM编码器来保留多尺度隐式空间信息，在多个任务上取得一致改进。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于生成模型的模仿学习已成为机器人操作的广泛采用范式，且空间softmax表示已被用于先前的视觉运动策略中，但其有效性和底层机制仍未得到充分理解。本研究旨在重新思考空间softmax池化的作用，探究这种隐式空间表示是否为机器人操作提供有效稳定的视觉特征。
AI.method: 通过对视觉编码器中不同池化方法的系统研究，发现空间softmax池化产生紧凑稳定的空间表示。针对当前视觉编码器中存在的表示瓶颈（重复下采样操作削弱细粒度空间信息），提出了PRISM视觉编码器，通过自上而下的交叉注意力融合来保留多尺度隐式空间信息。
AI.result: 空间softmax表示优于特征值表示，尽管使用更少的维度。在低分辨率、高精度的ToolHang任务上，PRISM将平均成功率从5.0%提升到13.4%，而参数仅增加15.4%。在多个任务和策略骨干网络上的实验显示了一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持使用多尺度隐式空间表示作为机器人操作的有效且高效的设计原则。空间softmax池化产生的紧凑稳定表示能更一致地关注任务相关区域，而PRISM编码器通过保留多尺度信息克服了当前视觉编码器的表示瓶颈。

title: Transformers Learn the Mestre-Nagao Heuristic
summary: We train a two-layer transformer encoder to classify rational elliptic curves $E/\mathbb{Q}$ of conductor $\leq 10000$ as either rank 0 or rank 1 from the first 128 normalized Frobenius traces. We achieve >99% accuracy on both classes, and accuracy is essentially unchanged on test curves with no isogeny or quadratic-twist relative in the training set. We then apply techniques from mechanistic interpretability such as attention analysis, linear probing, activation patching, logit attribution, and neuron-level circuit analysis to reverse-engineer the algorithm the (centroid in function space) model learned. We find that a sparse circuit of 20 out of 512 layer-1 MLP neurons is sufficient for rank prediction under a linear probe with an AUROC of 0.992 at plateau, implementing a push-pull detector architecture of rank-0 and rank-1 detectors with a one-sided readout. However, we notice that the model has sub-optimal readout problems indicating a mismatch in rank-order between the readout pathway and the discriminative circuit. Critically, the learned input weights of the top discriminating neuron match the Mestre-Nagao sum heuristic weights $\log(p)/(p\cdot \log{B})$ with a Spearman coefficient $r = 0.997$ and Pearson coefficient $r = 0.952$: the model has learnt a result from analytic number theory from the Frobenius trace data alone. We additionally find that all 50 independently trained models concentrate CLS attention on prime positions at 2-50$\times$ the rate of composite positions. The CLS embedding encodes $\log{L(E,1)}$ with $R^2 = 0.962\pm 0.011$ across the 50 models (after controlling for the conductor). Activation patching analysis reveals that attention weights are dissociated from causal information flow. Additionally, the 50 solutions from training are near-identical in function space (with pairwise agreement $>$98.8%) despite large weight space barriers.

AI.tldr: 使用两层Transformer编码器从128个归一化Frobenius迹中分类有理椭圆曲线的秩（0或1），准确率>99%。通过可解释性技术发现模型学习了Mestre-Nagao和启发式权重，CLS嵌入编码了log L(E,1)，50个独立训练的模型在函数空间几乎相同。
AI.motivation: 研究神经网络能否从椭圆曲线的Frobenius迹数据中学习到数论结构，特别是秩分类问题，并通过可解释性技术理解模型学习到的算法。
AI.method: 使用两层Transformer编码器，输入为前128个归一化Frobenius迹，输出为秩0或1分类。应用注意力分析、线性探测、激活修补、logit归因和神经元级电路分析等可解释性技术。
AI.result: 在导体≤10000的有理椭圆曲线上达到>99%的准确率；发现20个MLP神经元组成的稀疏电路实现秩预测；模型学习的输入权重与Mestre-Nagao和启发式权重高度相关（Spearman r=0.997）；CLS嵌入编码log L(E,1)（R²=0.962）；50个独立训练的模型在函数空间几乎相同（一致性>98.8%）。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络能够从Frobenius迹数据中学习到数论结构，包括Mestre-Nagao启发式方法；模型学习到的算法具有可解释的稀疏电路结构；多个独立训练收敛到几乎相同的函数，表明存在强归纳偏置；可解释性技术能有效揭示神经网络学习到的数学规律。

title: Is My Vision-Language Data in Your AI? Membership Inference Test (MINT) Demo 2
comment: IEEE Conf. on Computers, Software, and Applications (COMPSAC), 2026
summary: We present the Membership Inference Test (MINT) Demo 2, a framework designed to improve transparency in machine learning training processes. MINT is a technique for experimentally determining whether specific data were used during machine learning model training. We establish the theoretical framework and propose multiple architectures for MINT depending on the amount of information known about the models that are being audited. Experimental results using a popular face recognition model, 4 state-of-the-art LLMs, and multiple, diverse, and large-scale public image and text databases achieve promising accuracy levels in the detection of training data of up to 90%. Building on these results, we introduce a comprehensive web platform1 that expands these capabilities to image and text modalities. The platform integrates a diverse technological stack, including MINT, aMINT, and gMINT, allowing users to audit a wide range of models. This demonstrator aims to promote AI transparency and provides a practical tool to foster compliance with emerging AI regulations.

AI.tldr: MINT Demo 2 是一个机器学习训练过程透明度提升框架，通过实验方法检测特定数据是否被用于模型训练，支持多种模型审计场景，准确率可达90%，并提供了包含多种技术的Web平台。
AI.motivation: 该研究的动机是提高机器学习训练过程的透明度，促进AI系统的可解释性，并帮助满足新兴AI法规的合规要求。当前AI模型训练数据使用缺乏透明度，需要工具来验证数据使用情况。
AI.method: 提出MINT（Membership Inference Test）框架，根据被审计模型的信息量设计多种架构。使用人脸识别模型、4个最先进的LLMs以及大规模公共图像和文本数据库进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，在检测训练数据方面达到了高达90%的准确率。基于这些结果开发了一个全面的Web平台，集成了MINT、aMINT和gMINT等技术，支持图像和文本模态的模型审计。
AI.conclusion: MINT Demo 2框架为促进AI透明性提供了实用工具，能够帮助满足新兴AI法规要求，并通过Web平台使这些能力更易于访问和使用。

title: Co-Creating Buildable and Open Social Robot Study Companions with University Students
comment: Accepted for 18th International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR + ART 2026), London, UK | 1-4 July 2026
summary: Open-source social robots offer accessibility, repairability, and student empowerment, yet the build itself often presents a barrier. Existing platforms either ship pre-assembled, foreclosing hands-on learning, or expose students to unfamiliar fasteners, opaque wiring, and inaccessible service points that erode engagement. Whether targeted mechanical redesign can lower this barrier whilst maintaining structural integrity remains untested. Here we show that Design for Assembly (DfA) and Design for Disassembly (DfD) interventions reshape how a build feels before they shorten how long it takes. Working with university students in Guyana and Estonia, we applied the Double Diamond framework to co-create the Robot Study Companion (RSC) v4.1: mapping pain points, then redesigning its chassis around twist-lock fasteners, snap-fit joints, and tool-free service latches. Across two studies with developers and first-time builders, system usability climbed from Poor to Excellent (SUS 59.4 to 89.4), perceived workload trended downward (NASA-TLX 4.29 to 4.00), and mean assembly time trended downward (21.4 to 13.7 minutes, with juniors' learning effect), whilst orientation cues and navigation continuity for first-time builders emerged as the next documentation frontier. Perceived workload, not completion time, appears to govern whether students take up open hardware.

AI.tldr: 开源社交机器人通过可组装性设计显著提升用户体验，系统可用性从"差"提升到"优秀"，感知工作负荷降低，但文档指引仍是未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有开源社交机器人平台要么预组装，剥夺了动手学习机会；要么使用不熟悉的紧固件、不透明的布线和难以接近的维修点，降低了学生参与度。需要研究通过针对性机械重新设计能否降低组装障碍同时保持结构完整性。
AI.method: 采用双钻框架，与主亚那和爱沙尼亚的大学生合作，共同创建机器人学习伴侣(RSC) v4.1：首先识别痛点，然后重新设计底盘，采用扭锁紧固件、卡扣接头和无工具维修闩锁。通过两个研究（开发者和首次建造者）进行评估。
AI.result: 系统可用性从"差"显著提升到"优秀"（SUS评分从59.4到89.4）；感知工作负荷呈下降趋势（NASA-TLX从4.29到4.00）；平均组装时间呈下降趋势（21.4到13.7分钟，初级建造者有学习效应）。方向指引和导航连续性成为首次建造者文档的新挑战。
AI.conclusion: 可组装性和可拆卸性设计改变了建造体验，感知工作负荷（而非完成时间）似乎是决定学生是否接受开源硬件的主要因素。文档中的方向指引和导航连续性是未来需要改进的关键领域。

title: Temporal Difference Learning for Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models are typically trained with objectives that focus on local denoising targets at individual time steps (or adjacent pairs), which do not enforce consistency between predictions along the denoising trajectory. This lack of cross-time consistency can degrade performance, especially for few-step samplers. We introduce a temporal difference (TD) objective that penalizes inconsistency of the model's multi-step progress along the denoising path. By reformulating the diffusion process as a Markov reward process and casting denoising as a policy evaluation problem in reinforcement learning, we derive a unified TD approach that applies to both discrete- and continuous-time diffusion formulations. We further propose a principled sample-based reweighting method that stabilizes training. Empirically, we show that using our TD training can significantly improve sample quality measured by FID, with stronger advantages when the number of sampling steps is small, highlighting its practical utility under low-computation-budget scenarios. We provide ablation studies to justify our design choices, including pairwise loss reweighting, regularization weight, and one-step stride. Overall, our TD approach can be a general drop-in that enforces cross-time consistency and improves generation quality across different diffusion generative models.

AI.tldr: 通过引入时间差分（TD）目标来惩罚去噪轨迹中的不一致性，将扩散过程重新表述为马尔可夫奖励过程，从而提升扩散模型在少步采样下的生成质量
AI.motivation: 传统的扩散模型训练目标只关注单个时间步（或相邻对）的局部去噪目标，没有强制去噪轨迹中预测的一致性，这种跨时间不一致性会降低性能，特别是在少步采样器中表现更差
AI.method: 将扩散过程重新表述为马尔可夫奖励过程，将去噪视为强化学习中的策略评估问题，提出时间差分（TD）目标来惩罚模型在多步去噪路径中的不一致性，并设计了一种基于样本的重新加权方法以稳定训练
AI.result: 使用TD训练可以显著提高FID测量的样本质量，在采样步数较少时优势更明显，突出了其在低计算预算场景下的实用价值
AI.conclusion: TD方法可以作为一个通用的即插即用组件，强制跨时间一致性，提高不同扩散生成模型的生成质量，特别是在少步采样场景下具有实际应用价值

title: Automated 3D Kinematic Monitoring for Circadian Activity and Anomaly Detection in Juvenile Fish
summary: Precision aquaculture faces a "phenotyping bottleneck" in tracking high-resolution behavioral traits, as conventional methods cannot quantify instantaneous three-dimensional (3D) physical exertion. To address this, we present a high-throughput 3D behavioral phenotyping framework integrating deep learning object detection with binocular stereo vision for real-time monitoring of juvenile tilapia in high-density environments. The system automates non-contact body length estimation and reconstructs 3D swimming trajectories from absolute spatial coordinates. By eliminating 2D perspective distortions, this approach precisely quantifies 3D velocity and acceleration, marking the first estimation of true physical swimming speeds in free-roaming juveniles. Results show the framework successfully establishes circadian locomotor baselines, serving as an early warning system for physiological stress and providing an objective metric for fish vitality.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个结合深度学习目标检测与双目立体视觉的高通量3D行为表型框架，用于实时监测高密度环境下的幼年罗非鱼，首次实现了自由游动鱼类真实游泳速度的精确量化
AI.motivation: 精准水产养殖面临"表型瓶颈"，传统方法无法量化瞬时三维物理活动，需要解决高分辨率行为特征追踪的问题
AI.method: 整合深度学习目标检测与双目立体视觉，实现非接触式体长估计和基于绝对空间坐标的3D游泳轨迹重建，消除2D透视畸变
AI.result: 成功建立了昼夜运动基线，可作为生理应激的早期预警系统，为鱼类活力提供客观指标，首次精确量化自由游动幼鱼的3D速度和加速度
AI.conclusion: 该框架突破了精准水产养殖的表型瓶颈，为鱼类行为监测和健康评估提供了创新的3D量化方法

title: Driving, Fast or Slow? Neuro-Symbolic Guidance for Motion Prediction in Multi-Modal Ground Mobility
summary: Accurate and interpretable motion prediction for heterogeneous traffic spaces, including pedestrians, bicycles, cars, and trucks, is essential for safe autonomous navigation. Nevertheless, state-of-the-art approaches remain predominantly black-box, lacking explicit encoding of the regulatory and behavioral constraints of real-world mobility. We propose Trajectory Compliance-Shaping (TraCS), a neuro-symbolic framework that augments existing black-box motion prediction backbones with interpretable and probabilistic first-order logic. To do so, TraCS employs an agentic code-generation pipeline to bridge the gap between natural-language descriptions of traffic regulations and probabilistic motion prediction. Furthermore, TraCS employs a reactive data-streaming inference engine that maintains and efficiently updates compliance landscapes as scenes evolve. To prevent TraCS from overconfidently steering the backbone's predictions in the wrong direction, we propose a neural confidence rating learned as a context-aware attenuation of the compliance signal. We demonstrate on the Argoverse 2 benchmark how TraCS consistently improves state-of-the-art prediction backbones, showing that probabilistic and symbolic compliance reasoning is a broadly applicable and computationally efficient complement to purely neural motion predictors.

AI.tldr: TraCS是一个神经符号框架，通过将交通法规的自然语言描述转化为概率逻辑约束，增强现有黑盒运动预测模型的解释性和合规性。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的运动预测方法主要是黑盒模型，缺乏对现实世界交通法规和行为约束的显式编码，这限制了预测的准确性和可解释性，对自动驾驶安全导航至关重要。
AI.method: TraCS采用神经符号框架，包含：1）代理式代码生成管道，将交通法规的自然语言描述转化为概率一阶逻辑；2）反应式数据流推理引擎，动态维护和更新合规性景观；3）神经置信度评级，通过上下文感知衰减防止过度自信的错误引导。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 2基准测试中，TraCS持续改进了最先进的预测骨干模型，表明概率和符号合规性推理是对纯神经运动预测器的广泛适用且计算高效的补充。
AI.conclusion: TraCS框架成功地将符号逻辑约束与神经预测模型相结合，为异构交通空间中的运动预测提供了既准确又可解释的解决方案，同时保持了计算效率。

title: Physics-conforming Latent Twins
summary: Surrogate models are central to scientific machine learning, where they enable fast prediction, simulation, inference, and control for complex physical systems. For time-dependent problems, however, accurate interpolation of training trajectories is not sufficient: reliable surrogates should also respect the conservation laws, invariants, admissibility conditions, and dissipative structures that give those trajectories physical meaning. We introduce Physics-conforming Latent Twins, a framework for learning latent surrogate solution operators whose dynamics satisfy selected physical principles by design. The method builds on the Latent Twin formulation by jointly learning an encoder, a decoder, and a latent flow map between arbitrary time-indexed states, while constraining the latent dynamics to preserve or dissipate prescribed structural quantities. We develop a constraint-transfer viewpoint that connects physical structure in the original state space with compatible constraints in latent space, and prove structure-preservation bounds showing how latent enforcement improves control of physical defects after decoding. We also derive algebraic conditions for latent flow maps that preserve linear and quadratic invariants or enforce dissipative inequalities. Numerical experiments on representative ODE and PDE benchmarks demonstrate improved constraint satisfaction, structural fidelity, and qualitative long-time behavior while maintaining accurate surrogate prediction.

AI.tldr: 提出Physics-conforming Latent Twins框架，通过约束潜在空间动力学来保证物理结构，提高代理模型对守恒律、耗散结构等物理原理的遵从性
AI.motivation: 传统代理模型在时间依赖问题中仅能准确插值训练轨迹，但无法保证物理原理（守恒律、不变量、可容许条件、耗散结构）的满足，这限制了其在实际物理系统模拟中的可靠性
AI.method: 基于Latent Twin框架，联合学习编码器、解码器和潜在流映射，同时约束潜在动力学以保持或耗散指定的结构量；提出约束转移视角，将原始状态空间的物理结构与潜在空间的兼容约束相连接
AI.result: 理论证明结构保持界限，显示潜在空间约束能改善解码后物理缺陷的控制；推导了保持线性和二次不变量或强制耗散不等式的潜在流映射代数条件；数值实验在ODE和PDE基准上展示了改进的约束满足、结构保真度和长期定性行为
AI.conclusion: Physics-conforming Latent Twins框架能够学习既准确又物理一致的潜在代理解算子，在保持预测精度的同时显著改善对物理结构的遵从性

title: X-Tokenizer: A Multimodal Action Tokenizer for Vision-Language-Action Pretraining
summary: Modern Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models must bridge pretrained vision-language reasoning and precise continuous robot control. Existing action tokenizers discretize actions primarily for reconstruction, producing codes that preserve motion geometry but provide only weak semantic supervision to the backbone. We therefore formulate action tokenization not as mere compression, but as semantic interface learning between multimodal reasoning and executable control. To this end, we introduce X-Tokenizer, a lightweight encoder-Semantic Residual Quantization (SRQ)-decoder architecture that provides a shared action interface across diverse robotic arm embodiments. Its key component, SRQ, imposes an asymmetric structure on residual vector quantization: the first level is trained with Masked Action Modeling (MAM) to form a discrete action language that captures coarse motion intent, while deeper levels remain reconstruction-oriented residuals that preserve fine-grained details. To further align action tokens with multimodal semantics, X-Tokenizer is pretrained with contrastive alignment to the representation space of a pretrained foundation model and with next-frame vision-language feature prediction. Pretrained on 2.4M trajectories (2.0B action frames), a single frozen X-Tokenizer plugs into a mixed discrete-continuous VLA as a representation-shaping supervision signal. X-Tokenizer achieves top real-world aggregate and strong RoboTwin 2.0 simulation results. Outperforming FAST in multimodal grounding (+13.5%) and long-horizon tasks (+8.25), it shows that action tokenizers serve as semantic interfaces for VLA pretraining beyond mere action compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了X-Tokenizer，一种轻量级编码器-语义残差量化-解码器架构，用于视觉-语言-动作模型中的动作标记化。该方法将动作标记化视为多模态推理与可执行控制之间的语义接口学习，而非简单的压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有的动作标记器主要为重构目的离散化动作，产生的编码虽然保留了运动几何信息，但只为主干网络提供弱语义监督。作者认为动作标记化不应仅仅是压缩，而应作为多模态推理与精确连续机器人控制之间的语义接口学习。
AI.method: 提出X-Tokenizer架构，包含编码器-语义残差量化-解码器。核心组件语义残差量化采用非对称结构：第一层通过掩码动作建模训练形成离散动作语言捕捉粗粒度运动意图，更深层保持重构导向的残差以保留细粒度细节。通过对比对齐和下一帧视觉语言特征预测进行预训练。
AI.result: 在240万轨迹（20亿动作帧）上预训练后，X-Tokenizer在真实世界和RoboTwin 2.0模拟中取得最佳聚合结果。在多模态基础任务上比FAST提升13.5%，在长时程任务上提升8.25%，表明动作标记器可作为超越单纯动作压缩的语义接口。
AI.conclusion: 动作标记器应被视为视觉-语言-动作模型预训练中的语义接口，而不仅仅是动作压缩工具。X-Tokenizer通过语义残差量化实现了多模态推理与精确连续控制之间的有效连接。

title: OSDAG: Online Scheduling for Efficient Multi-Robot Collaboration
summary: Coordinating heterogeneous multi-robot systems (MRS) for complex, long-horizon tasks requires both flexible high-level reasoning and efficient low-level scheduling. Existing LLM-based approaches address the reasoning side but introduce two critical bottlenecks: (1) repeated LLM inference during execution, which inflates latency with agent count, and (2) offline, pre-committed scheduling, which forces robots to idle while waiting for sequentially ordered predecessors even when independent work is available. This paper presents OSDAG, a novel framework that integrates LLM-based task reasoning with Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) representation and constraint-aware online scheduling. The LLM is invoked once to decompose a natural-language instruction into a dependency-annotated task graph, and a lightweight online scheduler then allocates ready tasks to idle agents in real time. The DAG representation encodes both precedence and resource constraints, ensuring correctness while exposing all available parallelism. Experiments across five benchmark scenarios demonstrate that OSDAG achieves 5-15x faster reasoning time compared to dialogue-based methods, reduces makespan by up to 38% over sequential baselines, and maintains competitive success rates. Both simulation and real-world experiments on dual-arm manipulation tasks validate the effectiveness and practicality of the proposed approach for efficient multi-robot coordination. The website and resources are available at http://thanhnguyencanh.github.io/LLM_DAG4MultiRobot

AI.tldr: OSDAG是一个将LLM任务推理与DAG表示和在线调度相结合的多机器人系统协调框架，通过一次性LLM推理生成任务依赖图，实现实时调度，显著提升推理速度和执行效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多机器人协调方法存在两个关键瓶颈：1）执行过程中重复的LLM推理导致延迟随机器人数量增加而增加；2）离线的预提交调度迫使机器人等待顺序执行的前置任务，即使有独立工作可用。需要一种能同时提供灵活高层推理和高效低层调度的解决方案。
AI.method: OSDAG框架集成LLM任务推理与有向无环图（DAG）表示和约束感知的在线调度。LLM仅被调用一次，将自然语言指令分解为带依赖注释的任务图，然后轻量级在线调度器实时将就绪任务分配给空闲机器人。DAG表示编码了先序约束和资源约束，确保正确性同时暴露所有可用并行性。
AI.result: 在五个基准场景中的实验表明：与基于对话的方法相比，OSDAG实现了5-15倍的推理速度提升；相比顺序基线，makespan减少了高达38%；同时保持了有竞争力的成功率。双臂操作任务的仿真和真实世界实验验证了该方法的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: OSDAG通过将一次性LLM推理与DAG表示和在线调度相结合，有效解决了多机器人系统中LLM重复推理和离线调度的瓶颈问题，实现了高效的多机器人协调，在推理速度和执行效率方面均有显著提升。

title: Size Doesn't Matter: Cosine-Scored Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) detect features via inner product, so a feature's activation scales with both its directional alignment and the input's norm. Under BatchTopK, high-norm tokens inflate all pre-activations simultaneously, claiming dictionary slots regardless of content alignment. This matters because sublayer normalization has already discarded the magnitude the score measures, so the encoder detects a quantity the model does not read. We replace the score with a learned blend of cosine similarity and input magnitude, letting the optimizer choose how much norm to use; a per-feature extension lets each feature decide independently. In both regimes, training is free to recover inner product but never does, with no feature ever choosing more than half-magnitude dependence. At matched reconstruction, the cosine encoder learns features that align with human-recognizable concepts far more often than standard, filling dictionary slots that inner product wastes on norm detectors. Loss reweighting that equalizes gradients barely closes the gap, confirming forward-pass score geometry as the lever. The advantage is not universal across tasks or depths, but we believe cosine scoring should be the default for dictionary learning on normalized representations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出用余弦相似度替代内积作为稀疏自编码器的激活函数，解决了输入范数对特征检测的干扰问题，在归一化表示上获得了更好的人类可解释特征。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏自编码器使用内积检测特征时，特征激活同时受方向对齐和输入范数影响。在BatchTopK下，高范数token会同时膨胀所有预激活，占据字典槽位而不管内容对齐，但子层归一化已经丢弃了模型实际读取的范数信息，导致编码器检测的是模型不读取的量。
AI.method: 提出用余弦相似度和输入范数的可学习混合替代内积作为评分函数，让优化器自主选择使用多少范数信息；进一步扩展到每个特征独立决策的版本。在两种设置下，训练都可以恢复内积但从未选择这样做，所有特征都选择不超过一半的范数依赖。
AI.result: 在匹配重构质量下，余弦编码器学习到的特征比标准方法更频繁地对齐人类可识别的概念，填补了内积浪费在范数检测器上的字典槽位。即使通过损失重新加权平衡梯度也仅能略微缩小差距，确认前向传播评分几何是关键杠杆。优势并非在所有任务和深度上普遍存在，但在归一化表示上效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 余弦评分应成为在归一化表示上进行字典学习的默认方法，因为它能避免范数干扰，学习到更具语义意义的人类可解释特征。

title: Beyond Self-Attention: Sub-Quadratic Vision Transformers for Fast Image Captioning
summary: Image captioning is a challenging and significant task that aims to generate coherent and semantically meaningful textual descriptions for given images. To accomplish this task, it requires a deep understanding of visual content along with the ability to express that understanding in natural language. Despite remarkable progress with transformer-based architectures, existing approaches often suffer from limitations, such as a lack of rich local feature representations and the high computational cost of quadratic self-attention. The proposed model focuses on improving computational efficiency by restructuring the vision transformer architecture. In designing this approach, the standard self-attention mechanism in Vision Transformers is replaced with a probabilistic transformer approach based on a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM), a soft-clustering technique. Instead of computing pairwise attention among all image patches, the model groups similar patches into a fixed number of clusters using an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm. This clustering-based mechanism reduces the computational complexity from quadratic O(n^2) to linear O(nK), where K << n. The autoregressive GPT-based decoder is used for caption generation. The model is evaluated on the Flickr 30K dataset, demonstrating competitive and significant improvement over existing works.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于高斯混合模型（GMM）的概率Transformer方法用于图像描述生成，将标准自注意力机制替换为聚类机制，将计算复杂度从二次方降低到线性，在Flickr 30K数据集上取得了竞争性结果。
AI.motivation: 当前基于Transformer的图像描述方法存在两个主要问题：1）缺乏丰富的局部特征表示；2）二次自注意力计算成本高。需要一种既能保持性能又能提高计算效率的方法。
AI.method: 使用基于高斯混合模型（GMM）的概率Transformer方法，通过期望最大化（EM）算法将相似图像块聚类到固定数量的簇中，替代标准自注意力机制。使用自回归GPT解码器生成描述。
AI.result: 在Flickr 30K数据集上评估，模型表现出竞争性并显著优于现有工作，计算复杂度从O(n²)降低到O(nK)，其中K远小于n。
AI.conclusion: 提出的GMM-based概率Transformer方法有效提高了图像描述任务的计算效率，同时保持了描述质量，为大规模视觉语言任务提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: Acting While Understanding: Asynchronous Semantic-Action Decoupling for Real-Time Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong task understanding and generalization in robotic manipulation, yet the high computational cost of full-model inference limits their deployment in low-latency, high-frequency closed-loop control. We propose an asynchronous semantic-action decoupling framework that separates semantic understanding from action generation along the internal semantic-action interface of existing VLAs, without redesigning the vision-language backbone or introducing an external planner. A low-frequency understanding module asynchronously updates reusable semantic conditions, while a high-frequency action module continuously outputs control actions without repeatedly invoking the full model. To mitigate the temporal mismatch between stale semantics and the current execution state, we further introduce historical action conditioning and time-misalignment training, which provide short-horizon execution context and improve feedback control robustness under stale semantic conditions. Experiments on LIBERO with $π_{0.5}$ and UniVLA, together with real-robot deployment using UniVLA, show that the proposed framework achieves up to 35.6 Hz server-side action-module inference throughput and offers a low-intrusion path to high-frequency closed-loop control without running full VLA inference at control rate.

AI.tldr: 提出异步语义-动作解耦框架，将VLA模型的语义理解与动作生成分离，实现高频闭环控制而无需全模型推理
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型在机器人操作中表现出色，但全模型推理计算成本高，限制了在低延迟、高频闭环控制中的部署
AI.method: 1) 将VLA模型分解为低频理解模块和高频动作模块；2) 引入历史动作条件化和时间错位训练来缓解过时语义与当前执行状态的不匹配；3) 无需重新设计视觉-语言骨干或引入外部规划器
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，使用π₀.₅和UniVLA模型，服务器端动作模块推理吞吐量达到35.6Hz，并在真实机器人上成功部署
AI.conclusion: 该框架为高频闭环控制提供了一条低侵入路径，无需以控制速率运行完整的VLA推理，显著提高了系统响应频率

title: Machine Learning and the Random Walk Puzzle: Forecasting the CAD/USD Exchange Rate with Expanding Window Evaluation and SHAP Interpretability
summary: This study examines whether machine learning (ML) models can outperform the naive random walk benchmark in forecasting the monthly USD/CAD exchange rate. Using daily data from the Bank of Canada spanning January 2017 to May 2026, resampled into 113 monthly observations, five ML models are evaluated: linear regression, random forest, gradient boosting, XGBoost, and AdaBoost. These models are benchmarked against the naive random walk model and exponential smoothing with Holt-Winters seasonality (ETS). All models are evaluated using an expanding-window framework to maintain strict out-of-sample integrity, and forecast-accuracy differences are assessed using the Diebold-Mariano (DM) test. Structural break detection identifies four significant breakpoints in the series, corresponding to the escalation of the US-China trade war in 2018, the COVID-19 economic recovery in 2020, the peak of the Bank of Canada rate-hiking cycle in 2022, and the start of the Bank of Canada rate-cutting cycle in 2024. SHAP, or Shapley Additive Explanations, analysis is applied to interpret the drivers of the best-performing ML model. The results show that the naive random walk model remains a formidable benchmark. Linear regression is the only model that statistically outperforms the naive random walk model, with a DM statistic of 3.0585 and a p value of 0.0071, whereas the ML ensemble models show only marginal differences. Random Forest with an expanding-window framework achieves the lowest MAPE of 1.17 percent among all models except the random walk. SHAP analysis confirms that short-term lags, particularly lag1 and lag2, and recent rolling means dominate predictions, consistent with the near-random-walk behavior of exchange rates.

AI.tldr: 机器学习模型在预测美元/加元汇率时，线性回归是唯一能显著超越随机游走基准的模型，而集成学习模型表现相近。随机森林在扩展窗口框架下获得最低MAPE（1.17%），SHAP分析显示短期滞后项主导预测，符合汇率近似随机游走的特性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是检验机器学习模型能否在预测月度美元/加元汇率时超越简单的随机游走基准。随机游走模型长期以来是汇率预测的强基准，研究旨在评估更复杂的机器学习方法是否能在实际预测性能上带来显著改进。
AI.method: 使用加拿大银行2017年1月至2026年5月的日度数据，重采样为113个月度观测值。评估五种机器学习模型：线性回归、随机森林、梯度提升、XGBoost和AdaBoost，以随机游走模型和Holt-Winters季节指数平滑为基准。采用扩展窗口框架确保严格样本外预测，使用Diebold-Mariano检验评估预测准确性差异。通过结构断点检测识别四个关键时期，并应用SHAP分析解释最佳机器学习模型的驱动因素。
AI.result: 随机游走模型仍然是强大的基准。只有线性回归模型在统计上显著优于随机游走模型（DM统计量3.0585，p值0.0071），而机器学习集成模型仅显示边际差异。随机森林在扩展窗口框架下获得除随机游走外所有模型中的最低MAPE（1.17%）。SHAP分析确认短期滞后项（特别是lag1和lag2）和近期滚动均值主导预测，这与汇率的近似随机游走行为一致。
AI.conclusion: 尽管机器学习模型在某些指标上表现良好，但随机游走模型仍然是汇率预测的强基准。线性回归是唯一统计显著超越随机游走的模型，而更复杂的集成学习方法并未带来显著优势。研究强调了在汇率预测中保持简单基准的重要性，并确认了汇率序列的近似随机游走特性。

title: Sub-Semantic Image Segmentation
summary: Images can be segmented based on visual cues (i.e., texture segmentation) or into objects (i.e., semantic segmentation). We propose a new category of sub-semantic image segmentation that blurs the line between the two. In sub-semantic image segmentation, language is not used to name whole objects. Instead, it is used to partition an image into stable appearance patterns that can be described by language. To do that, we couple a general-purpose vision-language model to SAM 3, a promptable segmentation backbone whose native text pathway can ground rich descriptions into masks. Simple coupling fails for a number of reasons that we identify in the paper, and we overcome them by introducing DETECTURE that resolves three concrete failure modes -- language leakage between texture regions, prompt competition inside the segmentation backbone, and semantic distortion at the language-to-mask interface. Since there is no dataset of sub-semantic image segmentation, we introduce one, termed TextureADE. The new dataset is derived from the ADE20K dataset using a system we designed. We compare DETECTURE to a number of baselines and find that it achieves the strongest performance on several datasets using different metrics. Code is available at https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab/TextureDetecture.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的"亚语义图像分割"方法，介于纹理分割和语义分割之间，使用语言描述图像中的稳定外观模式而非完整对象。
AI.motivation: 现有图像分割方法要么基于视觉线索（纹理分割），要么基于完整对象（语义分割）。作者希望提出一种介于两者之间的新分割类别，使用语言描述图像中的稳定外观模式，而不是命名整个对象。
AI.method: 提出DETECTURE方法，将通用视觉语言模型与SAM 3（可提示分割骨干网络）结合。通过解决三个具体故障模式：纹理区域间的语言泄漏、分割骨干网络内的提示竞争、语言到掩码接口的语义失真，实现了有效的亚语义图像分割。
AI.result: 创建了TextureADE数据集（基于ADE20K数据集），用于评估亚语义图像分割。DETECTURE在多个数据集和不同指标上表现优于多个基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 成功提出了亚语义图像分割这一新概念，并开发了有效的DETECTURE方法，在纹理和语义分割之间架起了桥梁，填补了图像分割领域的一个重要空白。

title: Covariance-Regulated Recursive Koopman Learning for Nonlinear Systems with Uncertain Time-Varying Dynamics
summary: Offline models for autonomous robots often fail under time-varying dynamics outside their training distribution. Koopman operator theory offers a linear representation of nonlinear dynamics via lifting, but its transition to real-time recursive estimation may suffer numerical vulnerabilities: covariance windup under low excitation when using exponential forgetting, and vanishing gain without forgetting. This paper introduces a Covariance-Regulated Recursive Koopman Learning (CR-RKL) framework with two complementary strategies--error dead-zone gating and constant-trace normalization--each independently capable of preventing covariance explosion and parameter freezing, with the latter additionally preserving the geometric structure of uncertainty. Validated on a non-holonomic differential-drive robot with wheel slip and Stribeck friction and on a 26-gram butterfly-inspired flapping-wing micro aerial vehicle, CR-RKL achieves numerically stable and accurate online modeling, and when embedded in model predictive control, it maintains reliable tracking performance under uncertain, time-varying dynamics.

AI.tldr: CR-RKL框架通过误差死区门控和恒定迹归一化策略，防止协方差爆炸和参数冻结，实现数值稳定的在线Koopman学习，提升机器人时变动力学下的建模与控制性能。
AI.motivation: 离线模型在时变动力学下容易失效，Koopman算子理论虽然能线性化非线性系统，但在实时递归估计中可能面临数值稳定性问题：使用指数遗忘时低激励下的协方差膨胀，以及无遗忘时的增益消失。
AI.method: 提出协方差调节递归Koopman学习(CR-RKL)框架，包含两种互补策略：1) 误差死区门控；2) 恒定迹归一化。两种策略都能独立防止协方差爆炸和参数冻结，后者还能保持不确定性的几何结构。
AI.result: 在带有轮滑移和Stribeck摩擦的非完整差速驱动机器人，以及26克蝴蝶仿生扑翼微型飞行器上验证，CR-RKL实现了数值稳定且准确的在线建模。当嵌入模型预测控制时，在不确定的时变动力学下保持了可靠的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: CR-RKL框架解决了Koopman在线学习的数值稳定性问题，为机器人在时变动力学下的实时建模和控制提供了鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Phase-Localized Curation Does Not Help: A Negative Result on Per-Phase Metric Selection for Demonstration Filtering
summary: Manipulation demonstrations have temporal phase structure, and a natural hypothesis is that demonstration-curation metrics should be applied within phases rather than globally. The idea is to segment each trajectory into phases, score each phase with the metric that is locally most informative, and then aggregate. This follows directly from prior work showing that a single global metric can be the best detector of a defect and yet the worst curator of the resulting policy. We test the per-phase hypothesis on three contact-rich LIBERO pick-and-place tasks with a controlled early-release structural defect, comparing phase-gated curation against the same metrics applied uniformly and against a strong single global metric. Across all three tasks and five random seeds per condition, phase-gated curation is never the best curation strategy, and it is the worst of the three on two of the three tasks (Task 1: 86.0 vs. 92.0 for global; Task 3: 22.7 vs. 48.0 for uniform). We trace the failure to a concrete mechanism. When the defect signal is concentrated in a single phase, rank-aggregating across phases dilutes that signal with uninformative scores from defect-free phases, selecting a worse demonstration subset than simply applying the defect-informative metric everywhere. We further show that the per-phase metric selection does not transfer across tasks, since no phase shares a winning metric between any two tasks, so the selection cannot be reused and must be re-derived per task from a noisy sweep. These results bound a plausible and previously untested method, and they argue that practitioners should prefer identifying a single defect-informative metric over decomposing curation by phase. We release the full pipeline, all metric implementations, and per-seed results.

AI.tldr: 该研究测试了"按阶段门控筛选"的假设，即按演示轨迹的时间阶段结构分别应用筛选指标，结果发现这种方法不如在整个轨迹上统一应用单一指标有效，甚至在三个接触丰富的拾取放置任务中有两个表现最差。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于操作演示具有时间阶段结构的观察，以及一个合理的假设：演示筛选指标应该在每个阶段内分别应用，而不是全局应用。这种想法基于先前工作，表明单一全局指标可能是检测缺陷的最佳指标，但却是筛选结果策略的最差指标。
AI.method: 研究在三个接触丰富的LIBERO拾取放置任务上测试了"按阶段筛选"假设，使用了受控的早期释放结构缺陷。比较了三种方法：1) 按阶段门控筛选（将轨迹分段，在每个阶段应用最信息丰富的指标，然后聚合）；2) 统一应用相同指标；3) 强单一全局指标。每个条件使用五个随机种子。
AI.result: 在所有三个任务中，按阶段门控筛选从未成为最佳筛选策略。在三个任务中的两个任务上，它是最差的策略（任务1：86.0 vs. 92.0 全局指标；任务3：22.7 vs. 48.0 统一指标）。研究发现当缺陷信号集中在单个阶段时，跨阶段的排名聚合会稀释该信号，因为缺陷自由阶段提供了非信息性分数，导致选择了比简单应用缺陷信息指标更差的演示子集。
AI.conclusion: 研究结论表明按阶段门控筛选方法效果不佳，因为跨阶段聚合会稀释缺陷信号，且阶段间的最优指标选择不具可转移性。实践者应优先识别单一缺陷信息指标，而不是按阶段分解筛选。研究为这一先前未测试的方法设定了界限，并发布了完整的流程、所有指标实现和每个种子的结果。

title: Where Does Texture Evidence Live in SAM? Features, Proposal Masks, and Texture Segmentation
comment: 26 pages, 13 figures, 20 tables. Code available at https://github.com/Scientific-Computing-Lab/ArchiTexture
summary: Texture segmentation stresses foundation segmentation because meaningful regions are defined by material or repeated appearance rather than object identity. Segment Anything Models (SAMs) often fail by default on such texture-defined partitions, but this failure is ambiguous: the texture evidence may be absent, missing from the proposal bank, or present but selected or assembled incorrectly by an object-centric readout. We ask what texture-relevant evidence is already preserved in frozen SAM before adaptation. We study two frozen evidence spaces: multiscale features, probed with a minimal clustering readout, and the automatic proposal bank, treated as evidence for a supervised consolidation readout. SAM is frozen throughout; we do not fine-tune the backbone or retrain the proposal generator. Across RWTD, STLD, an ADE20K-selected refined-crop complement, and a ControlNet-stitched PTD bridge archive, frozen SAM is not a texture segmenter by default, but its failures are not simple texture blindness. Coarse frozen features preserve texture organization, and proposal banks often contain texture-aligned masks or fragments. Natural scenes more often require assembly and commitment over fragments, while cleaner synthetic cases more often reduce to selecting an already coherent proposal. Default mask failure should therefore be decomposed into representation evidence, proposal-bank support, readout mismatch, and commitment failure.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了SAM模型在纹理分割上的失败原因，发现冻结的SAM并非纹理盲，其多尺度特征保留了纹理信息，建议库中也包含纹理对齐的掩码片段，失败原因在于读取机制不匹配而非特征缺失。
AI.motivation: 纹理分割对基础分割模型提出了挑战，因为纹理区域由材质或重复外观而非物体身份定义。SAM模型在纹理定义的分割上经常失败，但失败原因不明确：可能是纹理证据缺失、未包含在建议库中，或存在但被面向对象的读取机制错误选择/组装。
AI.method: 研究冻结SAM中的两种证据空间：1) 多尺度特征，通过最小化聚类读取进行探测；2) 自动建议库，作为监督整合读取的证据。SAM保持完全冻结，不微调骨干网络或重新训练建议生成器。在RWTD、STLD、ADE20K精选精炼裁剪补集和ControlNet缝合的PTD桥接存档等多个数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: 冻结SAM默认不是纹理分割器，但其失败并非简单的纹理盲。粗粒度冻结特征保留了纹理组织结构，建议库通常包含纹理对齐的掩码或片段。自然场景更多需要片段组装和决策，而干净的合成案例更多只需选择已有的连贯建议。
AI.conclusion: 默认掩码失败应分解为表征证据、建议库支持、读取不匹配和决策失败四个因素。SAM模型在纹理分割上的失败主要是读取机制不匹配而非特征表示能力不足，这为改进纹理感知分割提供了新方向。

title: SimWeaver: Zero-Shot RGB Sim-to-Real for Deformable Manipulation
summary: RGB sim-to-real for deformable manipulation has remained largely unsolved without real-world fine-tuning. We present SimWeaver, which trains zero-shot RGB VLA policies on 200 simulated demonstrations per task, reaching above 80% per-task and 91% average real-world success across 5 diverse deformable tasks including plastic-bag manipulation, without teleoperation or per-task calibration. SimWeaver combines a reliable measurement-backed simulator (SimWeaver-Sim) with an extensible asset framework supporting single-image generation(SimWeaver-Asset), a deterministic topology-aware trajectory synthesizer (SimWeaver-Syn), and a sim-to-real protocol with ISP-aware photometric augmentation (SimWeaver-Real). On silk grasping, the sim-trained policy reaches 100% under visual distribution shifts where real-data baselines drop to 9-70%, at two orders of magnitude lower per-trajectory cost. We will release SimWeaver and a representative asset subset. Project page: https://simweaver.github.io/

AI.tldr: SimWeaver：无需真实世界微调，通过200个模拟演示训练零样本RGB视觉语言策略，在5个变形物体操作任务中实现91%平均成功率
AI.motivation: 变形物体操作的RGB模拟到真实转换问题尚未解决，传统方法需要真实世界微调，这既昂贵又耗时
AI.method: 结合可靠测量支持的模拟器(SimWeaver-Sim)、可扩展资产框架(SimWeaver-Asset)、确定性拓扑感知轨迹合成器(SimWeaver-Syn)以及ISP感知光度增强的模拟到真实协议(SimWeaver-Real)
AI.result: 在塑料袋操作等5个变形任务中达到80%以上单任务成功率和91%平均真实世界成功率；在丝绸抓取任务中，在视觉分布偏移下达到100%成功率，而真实数据基线降至9-70%
AI.conclusion: SimWeaver为变形物体操作提供了有效的零样本模拟到真实转换解决方案，成本比真实数据方法低两个数量级，具有实际应用价值

title: TriAdReview: Triangular Adversarial Review Architecture for Multi-Model Technical Document Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for technical document generation, yet single-model outputs often suffer from over-engineering, security blind spots, and incomplete coverage. We propose TriAdReview, a triangular adversarial review architecture that employs two independent reviewer models (engineering and boundary perspectives) and a triangular judging mechanism to iteratively improve a generator model's output. We evaluate TriAdReview across five benchmark tasks - architecture design, code generation, proposal review, security audit, and requirements analysis - using three configurations: single model (baseline), dual model (single review), and triple model (full system). Results across 75 experiments (n=5 per cell) show that the triple model configuration achieves a 10.1% overall improvement over the single model baseline (26.2 vs. 23.8 out of 50; p<0.05, paired t-test), with particularly strong gains on security audit (+27.6%), code generation (+20.8%), and architecture design (+15.6%). A second scorer (mimo-v2.5-pro) confirms the direction with a smaller effect (+2.7%), suggesting moderate inter-rater agreement. However, the system shows a -7.5% degradation on requirements analysis, revealing that adversarial review architectures have a structural bias toward simplification that is counterproductive for completeness-oriented tasks. We analyze this boundary condition through a task-type framework and demonstrate that reviewer prompt adaptation partially mitigates the issue. Our findings provide the first empirical characterization of when multi-model adversarial review helps versus harms, with implications for the design of collaborative AI systems.

AI.tldr: TriAdReview 是一种三角对抗评审架构，通过两个独立的评审模型（工程和边界视角）和三角判断机制迭代改进生成模型的输出，在多数技术文档生成任务中表现优于单模型基线。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在技术文档生成中存在过度工程化、安全盲点和覆盖不完整等问题，需要多模型协作机制来提升输出质量。
AI.method: 提出TriAdReview架构，使用两个独立的评审模型（工程视角和边界视角）和一个三角判断机制，对生成模型的输出进行迭代改进。
AI.result: 在三模型配置下，整体性能比单模型基线提升10.1%，在安全审计、代码生成和架构设计任务中表现突出，但在需求分析任务中下降7.5%，揭示了对抗评审架构存在简化偏向的问题。
AI.conclusion: 多模型对抗评审在某些任务中有效，但在完整性导向的任务中可能有害，需要根据任务类型调整评审机制，为协作AI系统设计提供了实证依据。

title: Divide-and-Denoise: A Game-Theoretic Method for Fairly Composing Diffusion Models
summary: The abundance of pre-trained diffusion models provides an opportunity for composition. Combining several models, however, runs the risk of one model dominating or models disagreeing with each other. Here, we propose Divide-and-Denoise, a method for coordinating multiple pre-trained diffusion models during sampling. Much like managing a specialized workforce, our method creates a fair but efficient division of labor across models. Central to our method is the notion of an allocation which defines the responsibility of each model to every region of the noisy sample. At every timestep, we then denoise by (i) updating the allocation by solving a fair division game, where we divide the sample into regions that maximize total utility under fairness constraints, and (ii) aligning the models with this allocation, where we guide each model to denoise within its assigned region. This leads to a new composite denoising process that evolves in tandem with a division process. We evaluate Divide-and-Denoise on conditional image generation. Across several quality metrics, including the GenEval benchmark, our method outperforms baselines and resolves common failures including missing objects and mismatched attributes. Experiments show that Divide-and-Denoise utilizes each model's expertise without neglecting any other model.

AI.tldr: Divide-and-Denoise是一种协调多个预训练扩散模型进行组合采样的方法，通过公平分配机制将样本区域分配给不同模型，实现高效协作的图像生成。
AI.motivation: 预训练扩散模型丰富，但组合多个模型时存在一个模型主导或模型间冲突的问题，需要协调机制来有效利用各模型专长。
AI.method: 提出分配机制，将噪声样本区域分配给不同模型；每步：(1)通过公平分配游戏更新分配，在公平约束下最大化总效用；(2)引导模型在其分配区域内去噪，形成组合去噪与分配协同进化的过程。
AI.result: 在条件图像生成任务中，该方法在多个质量指标（包括GenEval基准）上优于基线，解决了常见失败如缺失对象和属性不匹配问题，能有效利用各模型专长而不忽略任何模型。
AI.conclusion: Divide-and-Denoise通过公平分配机制协调多个预训练扩散模型，实现了高效协作的图像生成，解决了模型组合中的主导和冲突问题。

title: A Hybrid Model-Based and Model-Free Framework for Active Multi-View Viewpoint Optimization in Sonar Target Recognition
summary: This paper presents a hybrid model-based and model-free framework for active multi-view target recognition using forward-looking sonar. A convolutional neural network (CNN) provides data-driven observation likelihoods, while Radon-based orientation estimation enables viewpoint-aware sensing without requiring angle annotations. During training, an information-gain-based reward guides a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent to learn a belief-aware viewpoint selection policy offline. At deployment, the learned policy performs real-time viewpoint selection using only CNN-based belief updates, eliminating the need for computationally expensive online POMDP tree search. Experiments on a marine-debris forward-looking sonar dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves competitive recognition accuracy while reducing sensing steps and motion cost compared to model-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于模型与无模型混合的主动多视角目标识别框架，用于前视声纳系统。结合CNN提供数据驱动的观测似然，利用Radon变换进行方向估计实现视角感知，通过PPO学习信念感知的视角选择策略，在部署时无需在线POMDP树搜索，减少计算成本。
AI.motivation: 解决主动多视角目标识别中传统基于模型的POMDP方法计算成本高、在线搜索效率低的问题，同时克服无模型方法需要大量标注数据（特别是角度标注）的局限性。
AI.method: 混合模型：1) CNN提供数据驱动的观测似然；2) Radon变换进行方向估计实现视角感知，无需角度标注；3) 训练阶段使用信息增益奖励指导PPO智能体学习信念感知的视角选择策略；4) 部署时仅使用CNN信念更新进行实时视角选择，避免在线POMDP树搜索。
AI.result: 在海洋垃圾前视声纳数据集上的实验表明，该方法在保持竞争力的识别准确率的同时，相比基于模型的基线方法减少了感知步骤和运动成本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合框架通过结合模型和无模型方法的优势，实现了高效、实时的主动多视角目标识别，在减少计算成本和运动成本的同时保持了识别性能。

title: An Integrable Token Mixing Layer from the Generalized Yang Baxter Equation
summary: The YB Mixer is a sequence token mixing layer derived from free fermion and generalized Yang Baxter structures. It applies a core principle from integrable systems where a local algebraic constraint guarantees global computational stability. By using the Ising exchange algebra the mixer creates a free fermionic structure that acts as an exactly norm preserving orthogonal map. This algebra also produces commuting transfer matrices which allow inference to be order free and adaptable to any variable budget. To ensure the model can generalize to longer sequence lengths it uses a spectral circulant generator. This generator maintains the crucial orthogonal and commuting properties of the system. The result is a highly stable and mathematically grounded architecture for sequence processing.

AI.tldr: YB Mixer是一种基于自由费米子和广义杨-巴克斯特结构的序列token混合层，利用可积系统的局部代数约束保证全局计算稳定性。
AI.motivation: 开发一种数学上严格、高度稳定的序列处理架构，能够处理任意长度序列，并保持推理的顺序无关性和可变计算预算适应性。
AI.method: 使用Ising交换代数创建自由费米子结构作为精确保范正交映射，通过交换代数产生可交换的转移矩阵，并采用谱循环生成器来维持系统的正交性和可交换性。
AI.result: 构建了一个高度稳定且数学基础坚实的序列处理架构，具有精确保范性、推理顺序无关性、可变计算预算适应性，并能泛化到更长序列长度。
AI.conclusion: YB Mixer通过将可积系统原理应用于深度学习架构设计，成功创建了一个数学上优雅且实用的序列处理层，为稳定和可扩展的序列建模提供了新思路。

title: Spatial Priors via Space Filling Curves for Small and Limited Data Vision Transformers
summary: Though Vision Transformers (ViTs) have become the dominant backbone in many computer vision tasks, due to permutation equivariance, their attention mechanism lacks explicit spatial inductive biases. This become particularly important in two settings: when model capacity is small or training data is limited. Inspired by the attention masking strategies in Linear Transformers and the scanning patterns of Vision SSMs, we introduce VIOLIN, a lightweight masked attention mechanism that encodes spatial structure within attention via Space Filling Curves (SFCs) with less than 0.0015% extra parameters and negligible computational overhead. VIOLIN scans the image using multiple SFCs to construct curve-specific decay masks, which are then combined and multiplied with the attention matrix. Across a wide range of evaluations, VIOLIN consistently improves performance. In limited data regimes such as fine-tuning on VTAB-1K, it boosts accuracy across all task groups and by up to 8.7% on the tasks where spatial information is essential. It can be combined with parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods such as LoRA to further increase the performance. Beyond fine-tuning, VIOLIN improves various small scale ViT architectures (e.g., DeiT, DINO) during pretraining on ImageNet-1K. Additionally, on pixel-level CIFAR-100 training, a task that is highly dependent on location information, VIOLIN increases accuracy by up to 7.2%. Overall, VIOLIN provides a computationally efficient yet effective way to inject spatial inductive bias into ViTs, especially benefiting small models and limited data settings.

AI.tldr: VIOLIN是一种轻量级掩码注意力机制，利用空间填充曲线将空间结构编码到Vision Transformer中，在参数和计算开销极小的情况下显著提升性能，特别是在小模型和有限数据场景下。
AI.motivation: Vision Transformers由于置换等变性，其注意力机制缺乏显式的空间归纳偏置，这在模型容量小或训练数据有限时尤为重要。
AI.method: 引入VIOLIN：使用空间填充曲线扫描图像，构建曲线特定的衰减掩码，然后与注意力矩阵结合，通过掩码注意力机制编码空间结构。
AI.result: 在有限数据场景（如VTAB-1K微调）中，在所有任务组上提升准确率，在空间信息关键的任务上提升高达8.7%；在像素级CIFAR-100训练中提升高达7.2%；与LoRA等参数高效微调方法结合可进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: VIOLIN为ViTs提供了一种计算高效且有效的方式来注入空间归纳偏置，特别有利于小模型和有限数据设置。

title: A Corridor-Scale CARLA-VISSIM Co-Simulation Framework for Multi-Intersection Urban Traffic
summary: This paper presents an implemented CARLA-VISSIM co-simulation framework for an urban corridor comprising approximately fifteen connected intersections centered on Martin Luther King Jr. Boulevard in Chattanooga, Tennessee. The system integrates CARLA 0.10.0 Unreal Engine 5 with PTV VISSIM 2026 through a bidirectional, step-synchronized interface that couples VISSIM's microscopic vehicle, pedestrian, and signal-controller logic with CARLA's high-fidelity 3D rendering. A LiDAR-derived elevation model and RoadRunner-based High Definition (HD) map provide terrain-accurate road geometry deployed consistently across both simulators. The framework incorporates explicit actor ownership, mirrored lifecycle management, coordinate reconciliation, and a latest-state-per-actor update policy, enabling stable interaction between VISSIM-controlled traffic and a CARLA-controlled ego vehicle. A corridor-scale case study demonstrates consistent traffic-signal mirroring, synchronized vehicle-pedestrian interactions, and stable mixed-authority operation under peak loads of approximately 100 vehicles and 100 pedestrians. The deployment captures the interaction of the five signalized intersections along MLK Street and their connecting upstream and downstream intersections, revealing synchronization challenges unique to multi-intersection corridors. Results indicate that this MLK-centered corridor provides an effective testbed for verifying cross-simulator consistency and that the proposed architecture supports reliable, perception-ready co-simulation for corridor-level traffic studies.

AI.tldr: 该论文实现了一个CARLA-VISSIM协同仿真框架，用于田纳西州查塔努加市马丁·路德·金大道沿线约15个交叉口的城市走廊，通过双向步进同步接口整合了两种仿真器，支持稳定的混合权限操作。
AI.motivation: 为多交叉口走廊级交通研究提供一个可靠的、感知就绪的协同仿真平台，解决跨仿真器一致性和同步挑战。
AI.method: 开发CARLA 0.10.0与PTV VISSIM 2026的双向步进同步接口，集成VISSIM微观交通逻辑与CARLA高保真3D渲染；使用LiDAR高程模型和RoadRunner HD地图确保地形准确；实现显式参与者所有权、镜像生命周期管理、坐标协调和最新状态更新策略。
AI.result: 框架成功部署于包含约100辆车和100名行人的峰值负载场景，展示了稳定的交通信号镜像、同步的车-人交互以及混合权限操作；揭示了多交叉口走廊特有的同步挑战。
AI.conclusion: 马丁·路德·金大道走廊为验证跨仿真器一致性提供了有效测试平台，所提出的架构支持可靠的、感知就绪的协同仿真，适用于走廊级交通研究。

title: High-Dimensional Random Projection for Activation Steering in Language Models
summary: Activation steering has emerged as a key methodology for controlling the behavior of large language models (LLMs). Existing difference-in-means based methods, however, are fundamentally limited: they capture only mean differences between class activations and fail to recover discriminative signals that naturally exist in the nonlinear feature subspace under the superposition hypothesis. Motivated by that, we propose High-Dimensional Random-projection for Activation Steering (HiDRA), a training-free approach that integrates seamlessly with existing activation steering methods. By performing activation addition in the projected high-dimensional space, HiDRA can provably capture a better discriminative structure beyond the reach of linear methods. Experiments across diverse LLM families and benchmarks demonstrate that HiDRA consistently outperforms baseline counterparts, achieving stronger behavioral control without significant computational overhead.

AI.tldr: HiDRA是一种无需训练的高维随机投影激活引导方法，能更好地捕捉非线性特征子空间中的判别信号，在多个LLM家族和基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于均值差异的激活引导方法存在根本限制：它们只能捕捉类别激活的均值差异，无法恢复在叠加假设下非线性特征子空间中自然存在的判别信号。
AI.method: 提出HiDRA（高维随机投影激活引导），这是一种无需训练的方法，可与现有激活引导方法无缝集成。通过在投影的高维空间中进行激活加法，HiDRA能够理论上捕捉到线性方法无法达到的更好判别结构。
AI.result: 在多个LLM家族和基准测试上的实验表明，HiDRA始终优于基线方法，实现了更强的行为控制，且没有显著的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: HiDRA通过高维随机投影有效解决了现有激活引导方法的局限性，能够更好地利用非线性特征子空间中的判别信号，为LLM行为控制提供了更强大的工具。

title: Disentangling Hallucinations: Orthogonal Semantic Projection for Robust Interpretability
comment: 41 pages in total. 5 figures, and 2 tables in the main paper; 10 figures and 17 tables in the appendix
summary: As Vision-Language Models are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, the trustworthiness of their explanations becomes crucial. Explainable AI (XAI) methods for Vision-Language Models often suffer from semantic hallucination, where attribution maps highlight prominent image regions even when prompted with incorrect text descriptions (e.g., highlighting a dog when prompted ``cat''). Although this problem is widespread, a formal mathematical analysis of XAI methods and CLIP embeddings is largely missing in the literature. We demonstrate that this phenomenon is not specific to a single architecture but is a fundamental consequence of Linear Semantic Leakage in high-dimensional embedding spaces. We propose a unified theoretical framework, Linear Semantic Attribution (LSA), which generalizes across discriminative methods. We introduce OSP, a geometric intervention that utilizes the residual property of OMP to disentangle unique semantic signals from shared concepts. We prove theoretically and demonstrate empirically that OSP minimizes hallucination by orthogonalizing the query vector against distractor concepts, rendering the attribution model blind to shared features while preserving fidelity for correct prompts. Our code is available at: https://github.com/emirhanbilgic/Orthogonal-Semantic-Projection

AI.tldr: 该论文提出线性语义归因框架，揭示视觉语言模型解释中的语义幻觉问题源于高维嵌入空间的线性语义泄漏，并提出正交语义投影方法通过正交化查询向量来最小化幻觉。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型在安全关键应用中的部署，其解释的可信度变得至关重要。现有的可解释AI方法存在语义幻觉问题，即归因图会突出显示显著图像区域，即使提示文本描述错误。虽然该问题普遍存在，但文献中缺乏对XAI方法和CLIP嵌入的正式数学分析。
AI.method: 提出统一的理论框架——线性语义归因，该框架推广了判别性方法。引入正交语义投影作为几何干预，利用OMP的残差特性从共享概念中解耦独特的语义信号。通过理论证明和实证验证，正交语义投影通过正交化查询向量来对抗干扰概念，最小化幻觉。
AI.result: 理论证明和实证验证表明，正交语义投影通过正交化查询向量来对抗干扰概念，最小化语义幻觉，同时保持对正确提示的保真度。
AI.conclusion: 语义幻觉是视觉语言模型解释中的基本问题，源于高维嵌入空间的线性语义泄漏。正交语义投影提供了一种有效的几何干预方法，通过正交化查询向量来最小化幻觉，提高解释的可信度。

title: A Bilateral Teleoperation Framework for Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Dexterous teleoperation requires precise arm-hand coordination, low-latency feedback, and robust interaction in real-world contact-rich environments. This paper presents a modular bilateral teleoperation framework that integrates operator-side input interfaces with a robot-side dexterous hand and compliant robotic arm in a unified control architecture. The system supports position-based hand retargeting, differential arm control, multi-scale haptic feedback, and shared control for stable manipulation. We validate the framework through a real-world dexterous manipulation task, highlighting coordinated arm-hand control and contact-aware interaction. Beyond feasibility, we identify key design insights related to cross-embodiment mismatch, haptic feedback granularity, and shared control. The proposed platform provides a practical teleoperation system and a foundation for collecting high-quality demonstrations for future learning-from-demonstration research.

AI.tldr: 模块化双边遥操作框架实现精确的臂-手协调操作，支持多模态反馈和共享控制
AI.motivation: 灵巧遥操作需要精确的臂-手协调、低延迟反馈和现实接触环境中的鲁棒交互，现有系统在这些方面存在不足
AI.method: 提出模块化双边遥操作框架，集成操作者侧输入接口与机器人侧灵巧手和柔性机械臂，支持位置式手部重定向、差分臂控制、多尺度触觉反馈和共享控制
AI.result: 通过真实世界灵巧操作任务验证了框架的有效性，展示了协调臂-手控制和接触感知交互能力，并识别了跨具身不匹配、触觉反馈粒度和共享控制等关键设计见解
AI.conclusion: 该平台不仅提供了实用的遥操作系统，还为未来从演示学习研究收集高质量演示数据奠定了基础

title: Diversity-Driven Offline Multi-Objective Optimization via Nested Pareto Set Learning
comment: 32 pages, 7 figures, accepted by ICML 2026. Project: https://github.com/YaolinWen/DOMOO
summary: Multi-objective optimization (MOO) has emerged as a powerful approach to solving complex optimization problems involving multiple objectives. In many practical scenarios, function evaluations are unavailable or prohibitively expensive, necessitating optimization solely based on a fixed offline dataset. In this setting, known as offline MOO, the goal is to find out the Pareto set without access to the true objective functions. This setting suffers from the out-of-distribution (OOD) issue, where the surrogate model is not accurate for unseen designs. Due to the OOD issue, surrogate errors may cause the optimizer to select solutions that do not lie on the true Pareto front and are biased toward its extremes. To address this, this paper proposes Diversity-driven Offline Multi-Objective Optimization (DOMOO), which aims to find out a diverse and high-quality set of solutions. First, DOMOO incorporates an accumulative risk control module that estimates the potential risk of candidate solutions and alleviates the OOD issue between the training data and the generated solutions. In addition, a nested Pareto set learning (PSL) strategy is proposed to jointly learn preference and PSL parameters, then optimize them, enabling adaptation to diverse Pareto front geometries. To further enhance solution quality, we design a diversity-driven selection strategy that extracts a representative and well-distributed set of final solutions. To achieve this diversity-driven selection strategy, we propose $\text{IGD}_\text{offline}$, a tailored indicator for the offline setting that considers both diversity and convergence, and avoids the bias of hypervolume indicator. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that DOMOO achieves the best average rank across tasks in both convergence and diversity among the compared methods.

AI.tldr: DOMOO提出了一种基于离线数据集的多目标优化方法，通过累积风险控制模块缓解分布外问题，采用嵌套帕累托集学习策略适应不同帕累托前沿几何形状，并设计多样性驱动的选择策略来获得高质量解集。
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，许多场景无法进行函数评估或评估成本过高，需要基于固定离线数据集进行优化。离线多目标优化面临分布外问题，导致代理模型对未见设计的预测不准确，从而使优化器选择偏离真实帕累托前沿的极端解。
AI.method: 1. 累积风险控制模块：估计候选解的潜在风险，缓解训练数据与生成解之间的分布外问题；2. 嵌套帕累托集学习策略：联合学习偏好和帕累托集学习参数并进行优化，适应不同的帕累托前沿几何形状；3. 多样性驱动选择策略：提取具有代表性且分布良好的最终解集；4. 提出IGD_offline指标：专门为离线设置设计的指标，同时考虑多样性和收敛性，避免超体积指标的偏差。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试上的广泛实验表明，DOMOO在收敛性和多样性方面的平均排名均优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: DOMOO通过结合风险控制、嵌套帕累托集学习和多样性驱动选择策略，有效解决了离线多目标优化中的分布外问题，能够获得高质量且分布良好的解集，在收敛性和多样性方面均表现优异。

title: Temporally Consistent and Controllable Video Generation of 2D Cine CMR via Latent Space Motion Modeling
summary: Cine cardiac magnetic resonance is the gold standard for assessing cardiac function, but the scarcity of public datasets limits the development of advanced data-driven models. To address this limitation, we propose a generative method for synthesizing temporally coherent and anatomically consistent cardiac sequences. Our text-to-video framework decouples cardiac spatial structure from temporal motion. First, a fine-tuned diffusion model synthesizes an initial frame from a clinical text prompt, controlling anatomical features. Then, a latent flow model conditioned on a cardiac phase embedding generates the complete cardiac motion, ensuring spatial consistency and temporal control. Our model generates anatomically and pathologically diverse sequences with high temporal coherence and strong fidelity to input prompts, achieving a FID of 31.68 for image realism and a CLIP score of 31.04 for text-image alignment. These experimental results highlight its potential to produce high-fidelity, on-demand medical data, offering a scalable solution to data scarcity.

AI.tldr: 提出一种生成心脏磁共振视频的文本到视频框架，通过解耦空间结构与时间运动，生成解剖学一致且时间相干的心脏序列
AI.motivation: 心脏电影磁共振是评估心功能的金标准，但公开数据集稀缺限制了数据驱动模型的发展，需要解决数据不足问题
AI.method: 文本到视频框架：首先用微调扩散模型从临床文本提示合成初始帧控制解剖特征，然后用基于心脏相位嵌入的潜在流模型生成完整心脏运动
AI.result: 模型生成解剖和病理多样化的序列，具有高时间一致性和强提示保真度，FID为31.68（图像真实度），CLIP分数为31.04（文本图像对齐）
AI.conclusion: 该方法能生成高保真、按需医疗数据，为数据稀缺问题提供可扩展解决方案，具有临床应用潜力

title: Learning Context-Aware Neural ODE Dynamics for Adaptive Robotic Control
summary: Robotic systems deployed in uncertain and dynamically changing environments often face variations in contact conditions, aerodynamic effects, and external disturbances that challenge reliable control. To remain effective under model-based control, these systems require dynamics models that can adapt to such changes, especially when direct access to complete environmental information is limited. To enable adaptability and facilitate integration with model predictive control, we propose a context-aware dynamics model based on neural ordinary differential equations, which infers environmental factors from state-action histories using a two-phase training procedure. We validate the approach across diverse robotic platforms, including a quadrotor in simulation, as well as a Sphero BOLT robot and a Fanuc manipulator in real-world experiments.
