The results demonstrate that our method effectively adapts to temporally and spatially varying environmental changes across different tasks. Videos are available at https://youtu.be/PY0sNyF2rqE , and the source code is available at https://github.com/syyu410-yu/context-aware-neural-ode-control.git .

AI.tldr: 提出基于神经ODE的上下文感知动力学模型，通过状态-动作历史推断环境因素，实现模型预测控制的自适应能力，在多种机器人平台上验证有效性
AI.motivation: 机器人系统在不确定和动态变化环境中面临接触条件变化、气动效应和外部干扰等挑战，需要能够适应这些变化的动力学模型，特别是在无法直接获取完整环境信息的情况下
AI.method: 基于神经普通微分方程（neural ODEs）构建上下文感知动力学模型，通过状态-动作历史推断环境因素，采用两阶段训练过程，便于与模型预测控制集成
AI.result: 在多种机器人平台上验证：模拟四旋翼无人机、真实世界的Sphero BOLT机器人和发那科机械臂，结果表明该方法能有效适应时间和空间上变化的环境变化
AI.conclusion: 提出的上下文感知动力学模型能够有效适应动态变化环境，提高机器人系统在不确定条件下的控制可靠性，代码已开源

title: Beyond Accuracy: Measuring Bias Acknowledgment in Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for Responsible AI Evaluation
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Trustworthy AI for Good
summary: Reasoning models are increasingly used in settings where the final answer is not the only object of review: educational tools may show students intermediate steps, decision-support systems may require human oversight, and audit workflows may inspect traces for misleading or biased input. In such settings, two responses can receive the same final-answer score while differing in whether the trace explicitly flags injected biasing content. Accuracy-only evaluation collapses these cases. We study this gap as a measurement blind spot for responsible evaluation and introduce a minimal trace-level diagnostic with two axes: \emph{susceptibility} (whether the bias breaks a previously correct answer) and \emph{acknowledgment} (whether the trace contains a rubric-defined surface reference to the injected content). Across thousands of biased GSM8K trials, GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet~4 have similar susceptibility rates ($1.3\%$ vs.\ $1.2\%$) but substantially different acknowledgment rates ($13.0\%$ vs.\ $75.0\%$) under the same rubric.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究推理模型在存在偏见内容时的评估问题，发现仅关注最终答案准确性的评估存在盲点，提出通过可追溯性诊断来测量模型对偏见内容的敏感性和承认度
AI.motivation: 在需要审查中间步骤的应用场景（如教育工具、决策支持系统、审计工作流）中，仅评估最终答案准确性存在局限：两个回答可能得到相同最终分数，但一个可能明确标记了注入的偏见内容而另一个没有
AI.method: 提出最小化可追溯性诊断框架，包含两个维度：敏感性（偏见是否破坏先前正确的答案）和承认度（可追溯记录是否包含对注入内容的表面参考）。在数千个带有偏见的GSM8K试验中测试GPT-4o和Claude Sonnet 4
AI.result: GPT-4o和Claude Sonnet 4在敏感性方面表现相似（1.3% vs. 1.2%），但在承认度方面差异显著（13.0% vs. 75.0%），表明仅凭最终答案评估会掩盖模型在识别偏见内容方面的差异
AI.conclusion: 仅基于准确性的评估存在盲点，需要可追溯性层面的诊断来全面评估推理模型在负责任使用场景中的表现。不同模型在识别和承认偏见内容方面存在显著差异，这对负责任AI评估具有重要意义

title: GeoRoPE: Ground-Aware Rotary Adaptation for Remote Sensing Foundation Models
summary: Remote-sensing foundation models (RSFMs) benefit from pretraining on imagery from multiple sensors and ground sampling distances (GSDs), but such exposure alone does not resolve scale mismatch during downstream adaptation. A fixed token-grid offset can correspond to different ground distances across sensors, making grid-based positional priors physically inconsistent. Meanwhile, heterogeneous spatial granularity means that compact urban regions and homogeneous landscapes may require different positional sensitivities even under the same GSD. Therefore, we propose {GeoRoPE}, a ground-aware, RoPE-compatible, and parameter-efficient spatial adaptation method for RSFMs. GeoRoPE recalibrates token-level positional interactions from two complementary aspects. First, \textit{Geo-Coordinate Calibration (GCC)} rescales raw token-grid offsets according to the ground distance represented by one token-grid step, producing geo-calibrated relative coordinates across GSDs. Second, \textit{Geo-Frequency Calibration (GFC)} adjusts the native RoPE frequency with a relation-specific factor, enabling position sensitive adaptation to scene-dependent spatial granularity. GeoRoPE is injected into pretrained RSFMs through a lightweight adapter, preserving the frozen spatial prior while adding geo-aware positional corrections. Experiments across multiple RSFMs, sensors, resolutions, and downstream tasks demonstrate that GeoRoPE improves cross-resolution robustness and scale-sensitive representation learning.

AI.tldr: GeoRoPE是一种用于遥感基础模型的空间适应方法，通过地理坐标校准和地理频率校准来调整位置编码，以解决多传感器、多分辨率场景中的尺度不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 遥感基础模型虽然在多传感器、多地面采样距离的影像上进行预训练，但仍无法解决下游任务中的尺度不匹配问题。固定的token网格偏移在不同传感器下对应不同的地面距离，使得基于网格的位置先验在物理上不一致。同时，异质的空间粒度意味着紧凑城区和均质景观即使在相同地面采样距离下也需要不同的位置敏感性。
AI.method: 提出GeoRoPE方法，包含两个互补的校准机制：1) 地理坐标校准(GCC)：根据一个token网格步长所代表的地面距离重新缩放原始token网格偏移，生成跨不同地面采样距离的地理校准相对坐标；2) 地理频率校准(GFC)：通过关系特定因子调整原生RoPE频率，实现对场景依赖空间粒度的位置敏感适应。GeoRoPE通过轻量级适配器注入预训练的遥感基础模型，保持冻结的空间先验同时添加地理感知的位置校正。
AI.result: 在多个遥感基础模型、传感器、分辨率和下游任务上的实验表明，GeoRoPE能够提升跨分辨率鲁棒性和尺度敏感表示学习能力。
AI.conclusion: GeoRoPE通过地理感知的位置编码校准机制，有效解决了遥感基础模型在跨传感器、多分辨率场景中的尺度不匹配问题，提高了模型在下游任务中的适应性和性能。

title: FARM: Find Anything using Relational Spatial Memory
summary: Robots operating in homes, warehouses, and other object-rich environments need memory systems that can find specific object instances on demand. Object-level memory alone is often insufficient: scenes contain many plausibly matching objects, and users refer to the target through relations to landmarks and surrounding objects (e.g. ``the tall lamp below the dartboard and to the left of the poster''), demanding a relational spatial memory that supports retrieval through semantic, appearance, and spatial predicates over objects. To achieve this, we present FARM (Find Anything using Relational Spatial Memory), which builds, in real time at 5-10 Hz, a compact, open-vocabulary, object-level memory with geometry, visual-language descriptors, and viewpoint evidence. At query time, FARM uses VLMs to parse the query and score visual evidence, while grounding spatial constraints explicitly through object symbols and relational predicates. This structured use of VLMs enables more accurate and robust retrieval than end-to-end reasoning over frame histories or scene-graph context. In experiments on 44k language queries spanning 67 indoor and outdoor scenes, ranging from 15 to 15,000 m^2, FARM improves Recall@5 and Recall@10 over prior methods by 164% and 224%, and a final VLM reranking stage improves Accuracy@1 by 35%, while running in real time. We further demonstrate closed-loop deployment on a quadrupedal robot using onboard sensors and compute.

AI.tldr: FARM是一个实时关系空间记忆系统，能够通过语义、外观和空间关系查询在复杂环境中定位特定物体实例。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要能够根据物体与地标和周围物体的关系（如"飞镖板下方、海报左侧的高台灯"）来定位特定物体实例，而现有的物体级记忆系统无法满足这种基于关系查询的需求。
AI.method: FARM实时构建紧凑的开放词汇物体级记忆，包含几何、视觉语言描述符和视角证据。查询时使用视觉语言模型解析查询并评分视觉证据，同时通过物体符号和关系谓词显式地处理空间约束。
AI.result: 在44k个语言查询的实验中，涵盖67个室内外场景，FARM的Recall@5和Recall@10比先前方法分别提高了164%和224%，经过VLM重排后Accuracy@1提高了35%，同时在5-10Hz下实时运行。
AI.conclusion: FARM展示了结构化使用视觉语言模型进行关系空间记忆的有效性，相比端到端推理方法，能够实现更准确、鲁棒的物体检索，并已成功部署在四足机器人上使用机载传感器和计算。

title: Contextual Bandits for Maximizing Stimulated Word-of-Mouth Rewards
comment: Presented at the AAAI 2025 Workshop on Bridging the Gap Between AI Planning and Reinforcement Learning (PRL)
summary: Stimulated word-of-mouth is a strategy that promotes information sharing through prompts or incentives. Optimizing stimulated word-of-mouth through social networks requires identifying and targeting connected users who are most susceptible to spillover, a phenomenon where the influence of recommendations extends beyond the immediate audience to impact their connected users. The probability of spillover varies across individuals, and their connections, leading to heterogeneity. Understanding and accurately estimating the spillover probabilities among users in social networks is crucial for improving the effectiveness of stimulated word-of-mouth. To address this, we present a novel contextual multi-armed bandit framework that learns individual spillover probabilities and ranks connected users to maximize rewards from stimulated word-of-mouth. Experiments on real-world network datasets demonstrate that accounting for spillover heterogeneity enhances the targeting precision of top-$k$ connected users, boosting rewards and outperforming baseline methods that do not learn individual spillover effects.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于上下文多臂老虎机的新框架，用于学习和利用社交网络中用户间的溢出效应异质性，以优化激励口碑传播中的目标用户选择。
AI.motivation: 在社交网络中，激励口碑传播的溢出效应存在个体差异，准确估计用户间的溢出概率对于提高激励口碑传播效果至关重要。现有方法往往忽视这种异质性，导致目标用户选择不够精准。
AI.method: 提出一个新颖的上下文多臂老虎机框架，该框架能够学习个体溢出概率，并根据这些概率对连接用户进行排名，以最大化激励口碑传播的奖励。
AI.result: 在真实网络数据集上的实验表明，考虑溢出效应异质性能够提高top-k连接用户的目标精度，增加奖励，并且优于不学习个体溢出效应的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习和利用社交网络中用户间的溢出效应异质性，可以显著提高激励口碑传播的效果，提出的上下文多臂老虎机框架为此提供了一种有效的解决方案。

title: Scribby: A Multi-Level LLM Framework for Semantic Video Analysis
summary:
As video content continues to expand across educational platforms, recorded lectures, and live-streamed entertainment, the need for efficient and structured analysis of long-form footage has increased \cite{1}. Although many existing AI programs provide high-level video summaries based on AI-generated transcripts \cite{2,3,4,5}, these approaches are often limited to coarse overviews and lack detailed analysis of a video's structure, thematic progression, and semantic relationships, all of which are required for comprehensive video analysis.
  This paper proposes an LLM-based video summarization framework that balances macro-level comprehension with micro-level semantic analysis \cite{6,12,13}. The first stage of the process indexes the video at a micro level by (1) analyzing the full transcript, (2) analyzing individual transcript sentences, and (3) grouping these sentences by semantic similarity using an LLM as a judge \cite{6,13}. Contextual continuity is retained during sentence-level processing by incorporating both the global transcript analysis and adjacent sentence information into each evaluation prompt.
  This framework establishes a foundation for video analysis tools that visualize semantic chunking and semantic matching through relevance-based heatmaps. Limitations and future expansions of the framework are also discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于LLM的视频摘要框架，通过微观语义分析和宏观理解相结合的方式，实现对长视频内容的结构化分析，包括语义分块和相关性热图可视化。
AI.motivation: 随着视频内容在教育平台、录播课程和直播娱乐中的快速增长，对长视频内容进行高效结构化分析的需求日益增加。现有AI视频摘要方法通常基于AI生成的字幕提供粗略概览，但缺乏对视频结构、主题演进和语义关系的详细分析。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段LLM视频摘要框架：第一阶段在微观层面索引视频，通过(1)分析完整字幕，(2)分析单个句子，(3)使用LLM作为判断器按语义相似性分组句子。在句子级处理时保留上下文连续性，将全局字幕分析和相邻句子信息融入评估提示中。
AI.result: 该框架为视频分析工具奠定了基础，能够通过基于相关性的热图可视化语义分块和语义匹配。论文还讨论了框架的局限性和未来扩展方向。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LLM视频摘要框架在宏观理解和微观语义分析之间取得平衡，为需要全面视频分析的应用提供了更结构化的方法，解决了现有方法缺乏细节分析的问题。

title: FD-SLAM: Fast Dense Radar-Inertial SLAM with Frequency-Domain Loop Closure and Pose Graph Optimization
summary: Radar SLAM is attractive for autonomous ground vehicles operating in visually degraded environments, however, scanning radars are noisy, have low scanning rates, and their measurements are challenging to match reliably over long trajectories. This paper presents FD-SLAM, a fast dense radar-inertial SLAM system that extends dense radar-inertial odometry with frequency-domain loop closure and pose graph optimization. The proposed method preserves an image-like structure of scanning radar measurements by using a compact frequency-domain polar descriptor for loop-candidate retrieval and a multi-stage verification pipeline based on temporal filtering, phase-correlation screening, scan-alignment similarity, and geometric consistency checks. Verified loop closures are added as non-sequential constraints in an SE(2) pose graph together with radar-inertial odometry factors. FD-SLAM is evaluated on a publicly available dataset using standard KITTI evaluation metrics. The results show that FD-SLAM improves FD-RIO baseline, achieves competitive performance against current state-of-the-art radar SLAM methods, and provides favorable rotational accuracy across multiple evaluated driving trajectories. Runtime analysis further indicates that the radar-inertial front-end operates above the radar sampling rate on a CPU-only setup, while loop closure detection and graph optimization remain suitable for parallel background execution.

AI.tldr: FD-SLAM：一种快速密集雷达惯性SLAM系统，通过频域闭环检测和位姿图优化，在视觉退化环境中实现鲁棒的自主车辆定位与建图
AI.motivation: 针对扫描雷达在视觉退化环境中应用时存在的噪声大、扫描率低、长轨迹匹配困难等问题，需要开发鲁棒的雷达SLAM系统
AI.method: 扩展密集雷达惯性里程计，引入频域闭环检测和位姿图优化；使用紧凑的频域极坐标描述子进行闭环候选检索，采用多阶段验证管道（时间滤波、相位相关筛选、扫描对齐相似性、几何一致性检查）；在SE(2)位姿图中添加非顺序约束
AI.result: 在公开数据集上使用KITTI评估指标，FD-SLAM优于FD-RIO基线，与当前最先进的雷达SLAM方法竞争，在多个评估驾驶轨迹上提供优越的旋转精度；雷达惯性前端在仅CPU设置下运行速度超过雷达采样率，闭环检测和图优化适合并行后台执行
AI.conclusion: FD-SLAM系统在视觉退化环境中为自主地面车辆提供了有效的雷达惯性SLAM解决方案，通过频域闭环检测和优化实现了鲁棒的定位性能

title: False Sense of Safety in Selective Signal Classification: Auditing Bound Tightness and Exchangeability for Risk Control
summary: Selective prediction with distribution-free risk control promises that, with confidence 1-delta over the calibration draw, the error rate of accepted inputs stays below a user budget alpha. We audit this promise on signal-domain detectors -- machine anomalous-sound detection (ASD) and AI-generated-image forensics -- for four calibration rules: uncertified empirical thresholding (NAIVE) and certified Hoeffding, Clopper-Pearson (CP), and betting (WSR) upper confidence bounds. We report three findings. (i) NAIVE thresholding, common in practice, exceeds its declared budget in 49-73% of synthetic trials (n=200 calibration points) and in up to 68% of real-data splits: a false sense of safety rather than a broken theorem, since the rule never had a certificate. (ii) Tightness matters: CP and WSR certify substantial coverage where Hoeffding certifies none, with zero observed budget overruns under exchangeable splits. (iii) Under grouped deployment (unseen machine types or generators), certified rules overrun in 9-30% of trials -- far above delta -- showing the failure lies in the broken exchangeability premise, not in the bounds; a conservative per-group threshold restores validity at a severe coverage cost.

AI.tldr: 该论文对选择性预测中的分布无关风险控制进行了实证审计，发现在实际应用中，未经认证的阈值设定方法（NAIVE）经常超出声明的错误预算，而经过认证的方法（如Clopper-Pearson和投注方法）在可交换性假设下表现良好，但在分组部署时仍会超出预算，揭示了可交换性假设的失效问题。
AI.motivation: 选择性预测中的分布无关风险控制方法声称能以1-δ的置信度保证接受输入的误差率低于用户预算α。然而，这些理论保证在实际应用中的有效性尚未得到充分验证，特别是在信号领域检测器（如异常声音检测和AI生成图像取证）中。论文旨在审计这些方法在实际应用中的表现，揭示理论保证与实际性能之间的差距。
AI.method: 研究在信号领域检测器（机器异常声音检测和AI生成图像取证）上审计了四种校准规则：未经认证的经验阈值设定（NAIVE）以及经过认证的Hoeffding、Clopper-Pearson（CP）和投注（WSR）上置信界方法。通过合成试验（n=200校准点）和真实数据分割来评估这些方法的性能，特别关注了在分组部署（未见过的机器类型或生成器）情况下的表现。
AI.result: 1. NAIVE阈值设定在实际应用中经常超出其声明的预算：在49-73%的合成试验和高达68%的真实数据分割中超出预算。2. 紧致性很重要：CP和WSR方法能够证明显著覆盖范围，而Hoeffding方法无法证明任何覆盖，在可交换性分割下观察到零预算超支。3. 在分组部署下，经过认证的规则在9-30%的试验中超出预算，远高于δ值，表明问题在于可交换性假设的失效而非界限本身；保守的每组阈值设定可以恢复有效性，但代价是严重的覆盖范围损失。
AI.conclusion: 选择性预测中的分布无关风险控制方法在实际应用中存在显著问题：未经认证的方法（如NAIVE）无法提供可靠保证；经过认证的方法在可交换性假设下表现良好，但该假设在分组部署时经常失效。实际应用需要谨慎考虑数据分布假设的有效性，并可能需要采用更保守的阈值设定策略，尽管这会牺牲覆盖范围。

title: Avoiding Exponential Blow-Up in Distributive Lattice Submodular Minimization
summary: Submodular function minimization has gained a lot of interest in recent years. They are highly applicable in the area of Computer Vision and Machine Learning. Often such applications require to work with submodular functions defined on distributive lattice. Current best way of dealing with it is using a transformation which extrapolates the submodular function for the respective boolean lattice. It makes optimization system too inefficient due to enlargement of the working space. Quantitatively, the expanded space has additional exponential (in set size) number of elements. We propose a generic framework for dealing with distributive lattice which only works within distributive lattice. Our framework allows one to use already established submodular function minimization algorithms for boolean lattice. In our experiment, we show the huge improvement in terms of running time over tranditional methods for handling distributive lattice.

AI.tldr: 提出一个处理分配格上子模函数最小化的通用框架，避免传统方法需要将分配格转换为布尔格带来的指数级空间扩展问题。
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉和机器学习中经常需要在分配格上处理子模函数，但现有方法需要将分配格转换为布尔格，导致工作空间指数级扩大，系统效率低下。
AI.method: 提出一个直接在分配格上工作的通用框架，允许使用已有的布尔格子模函数最小化算法，避免空间扩展问题。
AI.result: 实验显示相比处理分配格的传统方法，运行时间有巨大改进。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为分配格子模函数最小化提供了更高效直接的解决方案，避免了传统方法的空间扩展问题。

title: Understanding and Modeling Perceived Cognitive and Physical Strain Dynamics for Planning-Oriented Human-Robot Collaboration in Prefabricated Construction
summary: Human-robot collaboration (HRC) in prefabricated construction requires planning approaches that consider not only productivity but also time-dependent worker states during repeated work and rest. Existing planning models often rely on simplified assumptions about fatigue, workload, or recovery, with limited domain-specific empirical evidence on how perceived strain evolves. This study develops an empirically grounded, planning-oriented approach to characterize perceived strain accumulation and recovery in prefabricated construction HRC. A controlled repeated work-rest experiment assessed perceived cognitive and physical strain using the Rating Scale for Mental Effort and Borg's Rating of Perceived Exertion. Linear and exponential functional forms were evaluated, followed by mixed-effects modeling to examine collaborative conditions, session effects, and inter-individual variability. Results indicate that cognitive strain accumulation is best represented by a linear mixed-effects model, whereas rest-phase recovery follows nonlinear decay. The resulting planning-oriented models may inform future human-state-aware task allocation and scheduling research.

AI.tldr: 基于实证的预制建筑人机协作规划模型，通过线性混合效应模型描述认知疲劳积累，非线性衰减模型描述休息恢复，为考虑工人状态的调度优化提供依据。
AI.motivation: 预制建筑中人机协作需要规划方法考虑工人随时间变化的疲劳状态，但现有模型对疲劳、工作负荷和恢复的假设过于简化，缺乏领域特定的实证依据。
AI.method: 通过受控的重复工作-休息实验，使用RSME和Borg量表评估认知和体力疲劳；评估线性和指数函数形式，采用混合效应模型分析协作条件、会话效应和个体差异。
AI.result: 认知疲劳积累最适合用线性混合效应模型表示，而休息阶段的恢复遵循非线性衰减模式，为规划导向的疲劳模型提供了实证基础。
AI.conclusion: 建立了基于实证的规划导向疲劳模型，可为未来考虑人类状态的任务分配和调度研究提供依据，促进人机协作中更人性化的规划方法。

title: Semantic Reasoning in Medicine: The Role of Knowledge Graphs Across Five Key Domains
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) have emerged as a promising solution for integrating and reasoning over complex biomedical and clinical data in healthcare. By representing structured relationships among entities such as diseases, drugs, symptoms, and patient records, KGs provide a semantic backbone for decision-making, prediction, recommendation, and personalized care. Recent advances have demonstrated their utility across diverse medical applications--including clinical decision support systems, disease and treatment outcome prediction, health recommender systems, precision medicine, and medical question answering--where KGs often enhance interpretability, semantic coherence, and patient-specific reasoning. In parallel, a growing body of work focuses on medical KG generation itself, proposing frameworks that construct graphs from EHRs, clinical narratives, biomedical literature, and web resources using ontologies, semantic web technologies, deep-learning-based information extraction, and hybrid neuro-symbolic pipelines. Despite this progress, significant challenges remain, including limited and fragmented knowledge coverage, difficulties in aligning heterogeneous data sources, the fragility of current reasoning and representation-learning methods on dense multi-relational graphs, and unresolved issues related to privacy, bias, and accountability. This survey reviews and categorizes current research on KGs in medicine along both application-oriented and methodology-oriented dimensions, discusses their benefits and technical foundations, and outlines key limitations and open research directions. By analyzing trends, architectures, and evaluation practices, this work aims to guide future developments in KG-driven medical AI systems and support their safe and effective integration into healthcare environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了知识图谱在医疗领域的应用、构建方法、当前挑战与未来研究方向，为医疗AI系统的发展提供指导。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱在医疗领域展现出整合和推理复杂生物医学与临床数据的潜力，但目前面临知识覆盖不足、数据异构对齐困难、推理方法脆弱等挑战，需要系统性的综述来指导未来发展。
AI.method: 采用综述性研究方法，从应用导向和方法论导向两个维度对医疗知识图谱研究进行分类，分析趋势、架构和评估实践。
AI.result: 系统梳理了知识图谱在临床决策支持、疾病预测、健康推荐、精准医疗、医学问答等医疗应用中的效用，以及从电子病历、临床叙述、生物医学文献等数据源构建知识图谱的技术框架。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱为医疗AI系统提供了语义基础和推理能力，但仍需解决知识覆盖率、数据融合、推理鲁棒性、隐私保护等关键挑战，未来研究应关注安全有效的医疗知识图谱系统集成。

title: Momentum-Guided Semantic Forecasting (MoFore) for Self-Supervised Video Representation Learning
summary:
Self-supervised video representation learning has recently advanced through contrastive learning, masked reconstruction, and predictive representation learning. Reconstruction-based approaches such as MAE and VideoMAE learn representations by recovering masked visual content \cite{he2022mae,tong2022videomae}, while contrastive methods such as CLIP learn semantically meaningful embedding spaces through representation alignment \cite{radford2021clip}.
  In this work, we introduce a Momentum-Guided Semantic Forecasting framework (MoFore) for self-supervised video representation learning. Instead of optimizing for pixel-level reconstruction or task-specific semantic alignment, the proposed method learns temporally predictive video representations by forecasting future latent embeddings from temporally distant context clips. To improve robustness across temporal scales, we further introduce randomized temporal-gap forecasting during training. The framework combines predictive latent forecasting with contrastive regularization to encourage temporal consistency while preventing representation collapse.
  Experiments on the UCF101 dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework learns temporally consistent and semantically meaningful video representations without using action labels during training. Quantitative analysis shows strong temporal stability and emergent category-level structure in the learned embedding space, while qualitative retrieval experiments reveal motion-aware organization across related activities. Overall, the results suggest that long-range latent forecasting provides an effective and computationally efficient approach for self-supervised video representation learning without relying on reconstruction-based objectives.

AI.tldr: MoFore提出了一种动量引导的语义预测框架，通过预测未来潜在嵌入来学习时间一致的视频表示，结合预测性潜在预测与对比正则化，避免表示坍塌，在无动作标签的情况下实现有效的自监督视频表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督视频表示学习方法主要分为基于重建的方法（如MAE、VideoMAE）和基于对比的方法（如CLIP）。前者专注于像素级重建，后者关注语义对齐。本文提出一种新方法，旨在学习时间预测性视频表示，通过预测未来潜在嵌入来捕捉时间一致性，同时避免表示坍塌。
AI.method: 提出动量引导的语义预测框架（MoFore），通过从时间上较远的上下文片段预测未来潜在嵌入来学习时间预测性视频表示。引入随机时间间隔预测以提高跨时间尺度的鲁棒性。框架结合预测性潜在预测与对比正则化，既鼓励时间一致性，又防止表示坍塌。
AI.result: 在UCF101数据集上的实验表明，该方法在无动作标签训练的情况下学习到时间一致且语义有意义的视频表示。定量分析显示学习到的嵌入空间具有强时间稳定性和涌现的类别级结构，定性检索实验揭示跨相关活动的运动感知组织。
AI.conclusion: 长距离潜在预测为自监督视频表示学习提供了一种有效且计算高效的方法，无需依赖基于重建的目标。该方法学习到的时间一致表示在语义组织和运动感知方面表现出色。

title: Reinforcement Learning-Guided Retrieval with Soft Fusion for Robust Multimodal Imitation Learning under Missing Modalities
summary: Robotic systems perceive the world through multiple input modalities -- including visual camera streams and natural language instructions -- and must select appropriate actions based on these signals. However, assuming the permanent availability of all input devices is unrealistic, as sensors may fail, become occluded, or drop out entirely during deployment. Robust handling of such missing-modality scenarios is therefore essential for real-world robot operation. This paper introduces RL4IL, a reinforcement learning guided method for imitation learning that selects the most suitable action for a given observation by identifying the most relevant expert demonstrations from a training library. A reinforcement learning policy, trained via Proximal Policy Optimisation over Breadth-First Search candidate sets, ranks candidate demonstrations and a soft cross-attention fusion head aggregates their action signals to produce the final prediction. When a modality is missing at inference time, a dedicated per-modality RL retrieval policy identifies donor demonstrations from the training library, and a soft imputation head reconstructs the missing embedding via cross-attention over the top-ranked donors -- without requiring any retraining of the system. Experiments on three LIBERO benchmark suites demonstrate that RL4IL substantially outperforms state-of-the-art imitation learning methods under sensor dropout conditions, while requiring no policy network training. The code can be found at https://github.com/h-ismkhan/Reinforcement-Learning-via-kNN-for-Robotic-Learning-with-Missing-Camera

AI.tldr: RL4IL：一种通过强化学习引导的模仿学习方法，在传感器缺失时从专家演示库中检索最相关演示，通过交叉注意力融合生成动作预测，无需重新训练系统。
AI.motivation: 机器人系统依赖多种输入模态（如视觉和语言指令），但实际部署中传感器可能失效或被遮挡。现有方法假设所有模态始终可用，无法处理模态缺失情况，这限制了机器人在现实世界中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出RL4IL方法：1）使用强化学习策略（PPO训练）从训练库中检索最相关的专家演示；2）通过软交叉注意力融合头聚合候选演示的动作信号生成最终预测；3）模态缺失时，专用模态检索策略识别捐赠演示，软插补头通过交叉注意力重建缺失嵌入，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在三个LIBERO基准测试套件上的实验表明，RL4IL在传感器丢失条件下显著优于最先进的模仿学习方法，且不需要训练策略网络。
AI.conclusion: RL4IL通过强化学习引导的演示检索和软注意力融合，实现了对模态缺失的鲁棒处理，为现实世界机器人操作提供了实用的解决方案。

title: PolyKV: Heterogeneous Retention and Allocation for KV Cache Compression
summary: KV cache compression is essential for reducing the memory cost of long-context large language model inference. Existing approaches, however, typically apply a single compression policy and a uniform cache budget across all transformer layers. This uniform design ignores the fact that different layers can play different roles during prefill and decoding, and may therefore require different eviction strategies and cache capacities. We present PolyKV, a layer-wise KV cache optimization framework that considers design space with method selection and budget allocation. PolyKV routes each layer to a suitable KV compression policy based on layer-level signals, while assigning non-uniform budgets under a fixed total budget. This formulation enables heterogeneous compositions of existing KV cache methods. Experiments on LLaMA-3.1-8B and Qwen3-8B show that, under the same 512-token average KV budget, PolyKV recovers 54.5% and 25.7% of the LongBench performance gap between the strongest single-policy baseline and FullKV, respectively. Across 128-1024 budget sweep, PolyKV consistently improves over the strongest baseline by 1.7%-6.4%, corresponding to 40.0%-54.5% recovery of the FullKV gap.

AI.tldr: PolyKV：一种层感知的KV缓存压缩框架，通过为不同Transformer层分配不同的压缩策略和缓存预算，提升长上下文LLM推理效率
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存压缩方法通常对所有Transformer层采用统一的压缩策略和缓存预算，忽略了不同层在预填充和解码阶段可能扮演不同角色，需要不同的驱逐策略和缓存容量
AI.method: PolyKV是一个层级KV缓存优化框架，包含方法选择和预算分配两个维度。它基于层级信号为每层路由到合适的KV压缩策略，并在固定总预算下分配非均匀预算，实现现有KV缓存方法的异构组合
AI.result: 在LLaMA-3.1-8B和Qwen3-8B上的实验显示，在相同512令牌平均KV预算下，PolyKV分别恢复了最强单策略基线与FullKV之间LongBench性能差距的54.5%和25.7%。在128-1024预算范围内，PolyKV始终比最强基线提升1.7%-6.4%，对应恢复FullKV差距的40.0%-54.5%
AI.conclusion: PolyKV证明了层感知的KV缓存压缩设计的重要性，通过异构组合现有压缩方法并分配非均匀预算，能显著提升长上下文LLM推理性能，为KV缓存优化提供了新的设计思路

title: XMedFusion: A Knowledge-Guided Multimodal Perception and Reasoning Framework for Autonomous Medical Systems
comment: Accepted at the 2026 International Conference on Robotics and Automation in Industry (ICRAI)
summary: Autonomous medical and robotic systems increasingly rely on intelligent perception and reasoning capabilities to interpret visual data and support clinical decision making. Radiology report generation represents a critical component of such automated diagnostic workflows, yet existing end-to-end multimodal models often suffer from weak visual grounding, resulting in unreliable interpretations and omission of subtle clinical findings. This paper presents XMedFusion, a modular AI framework designed as an intelligent perception and reasoning module for autonomous medical systems. The proposed framework decomposes visual information into coordinated functional components that emulate expert-driven analysis, including a visual perception agent that extracts image-grounded evidence, a knowledge graph construction agent that structures clinically relevant findings, and a retrieval-guided drafting process that ensures a consistent reporting structure. A synthesis agent iteratively integrates visual and structured evidence through reasoning-driven verification to produce reliable and interpretable diagnostic outputs. Experimental evaluation on a public chest radiograph dataset demonstrates significant improvements over baseline vision-language models, achieving gains from 0.0493 to 0.3359 in BLEU-1, 0.0863 to 0.2440 in ROUGE-L, and 0.0829 to 0.1708 in METEOR, along with substantial improvements in semantic evaluation metrics such as Consistency (2.38 to 7.80) and Accuracy (2.34 to 6.93). The results highlight the effectiveness of structured multi-agent perception and reasoning for enhancing robustness, transparency, and automation in intelligent medical imaging systems, enabling integration into autonomous healthcare and robotic diagnostic workflows.

AI.tldr: XMedFusion是一个模块化AI框架，通过多智能体感知和推理机制提升放射学报告生成的可靠性和可解释性，在自动医疗系统中实现更稳健的诊断输出。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端多模态模型在放射学报告生成中存在视觉基础薄弱的问题，导致不可靠的解释和遗漏细微临床发现，需要更可靠、可解释的自动化诊断系统。
AI.method: 提出模块化AI框架，包含视觉感知代理提取图像证据、知识图谱构建代理结构化临床发现、检索引导的起草过程确保报告结构一致，以及合成代理通过推理驱动验证整合证据。
AI.result: 在公共胸部X光数据集上，相比基线视觉语言模型，BLEU-1提升0.0493-0.3359，ROUGE-L提升0.0863-0.2440，METEOR提升0.0829-0.1708，语义评估指标一致性(2.38→7.80)和准确性(2.34→6.93)显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 结构化多智能体感知和推理能有效增强智能医学成像系统的鲁棒性、透明度和自动化水平，适用于自主医疗和机器人诊断工作流集成。

title: Transferring Contact, Not Just Motion: Compliant Grasping Across Dexterous Hands
summary: Dexterous grasping depends on contact regulation, not motion alone. Stable manipulation requires fingers to maintain appropriate object loading as contacts slip, deform, or become visually occluded. Existing cross-embodiment dexterous policies unify motion through retargeted hand poses or latent actions, but force feedback remains tied to each hand's sensing and actuation, limiting transfer. This work introduces a cross-embodiment force-position interface for contact-aware manipulation across heterogeneous dexterous hands. Motion intent is represented in a shared hand-pose latent, while each hand's effort signal is calibrated through system identification into physical joint torque in N.m. These torques are mapped to fingertip forces and compact per-finger load descriptors, giving the policy comparable observations of where the hand should move and how the object is loaded. Using this interface, a flow-matching visuomotor policy is trained on vision, proprioception, and calibrated contact, with structured visual masking that encourages reliance on force under grasp-relevant occlusion. The same calibrated signal drives a hybrid force-position controller for demonstration collection and execution, keeping force targets consistent across training and deployment. Experiments across structurally different hands show that calibrated contact feedback enables transferable compliant grasping, with learned primitives reusable in long-horizon manipulation pipelines.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种跨具身力-位置接口，用于异构灵巧手之间的接触感知操作，通过系统识别将力信号校准为物理关节扭矩，使策略能够获得可比较的接触观测，实现可转移的顺从抓取。
AI.motivation: 现有跨具身灵巧策略通过重定向手部姿势或潜在动作统一运动，但力反馈仍受限于每只手的传感和执行机构，限制了策略在不同手型间的转移能力。需要一种能够处理异构灵巧手之间接触感知操作的统一接口。
AI.method: 提出跨具身力-位置接口：1) 运动意图通过共享手部姿势潜在空间表示；2) 每只手的力信号通过系统识别校准为物理关节扭矩(N·m)；3) 将扭矩映射到指尖力和紧凑的每指负载描述符；4) 使用流匹配视觉运动策略，结合视觉、本体感觉和校准接触信号；5) 采用结构化视觉掩码鼓励在抓取相关遮挡下依赖力反馈；6) 相同校准信号驱动混合力-位置控制器用于演示收集和执行。
AI.result: 在结构不同的手上进行实验表明，校准接触反馈能够实现可转移的顺从抓取，学习到的基元可在长时程操作流程中重复使用，证明了跨异构灵巧手的接触感知操作能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过力信号校准和系统识别，实现了跨异构灵巧手的接触感知操作，解决了现有方法中力反馈难以转移的问题，为灵巧操作提供了统一的力-位置接口框架。

title: Towards a Unified Generative Model for Scarce Time Series with Domain Experts
summary: Synthesizing realistic time series with generative models has wide-ranging applications in real-world scenarios. Despite recent progress, most existing methods are trained under the assumption of abundant training data, which substantially limits their effectiveness in data-scarce settings. In this paper, we propose TimeMoDE, a novel framework that integrates Diffusion Transformers with Mixture-of-Experts to exploit both domain adaptability and diffusion-stage awareness for time series generation under data scarcity. It is pre-trained on a large-scale collection of multi-domain datasets to extract domain-agnostic temporal representations and domain-specific information benefiting generalization during fine-tuning. We propose Domain Prompts to condition expert assignment for indistinguishable noised tokens, mitigating the limitations of capturing inter-dataset relationships. Moreover, we incorporate diffusion timestep signals to equip the experts with awareness of time series degradation variations, facilitating adaptive calibrate to stage-dependent denoising requirements. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TimeMoDE outperforms existing methods under diverse low-data settings. It establishes an innovative paradigm for advanced time series few-shot generation.

AI.tldr: TimeMoDE：一个结合扩散变换器和专家混合的框架，用于数据稀缺情况下的时间序列生成，通过预训练提取领域无关的时序表示和领域特定信息，并引入领域提示和扩散时间步信号来提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型大多假设有充足的训练数据，在数据稀缺场景下效果受限。需要开发能够在少量数据下有效生成真实时间序列的方法。
AI.method: 提出TimeMoDE框架，结合扩散变换器和专家混合机制。在大规模多领域数据集上预训练，提取领域无关的时序表示和领域特定信息。引入领域提示来指导专家分配，解决难以区分的噪声标记问题。加入扩散时间步信号，使专家能够感知时间序列退化变化，适应不同去噪阶段的需求。
AI.result: 在多种低数据设置下，TimeMoDE优于现有方法，为先进的时间序列少样本生成建立了创新范式。
AI.conclusion: TimeMoDE通过整合领域适应性和扩散阶段感知，有效解决了数据稀缺下的时间序列生成问题，为少样本时间序列生成提供了新思路。

title: An Empirical Analysis of Optimization Dynamics and Sparsity Boundaries in Large-Scale Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
summary: Pedestrian Attribute Recognition (PAR) is critical for video surveillance, enabling forensic search and re-identification systems. Extreme class imbalance remains a fundamental obstacle when merging PETA and PA-100K into a 109,000-image composite corpus, where minority attributes have positive sample fractions below 1%. This causes standard BCE optimization to suppress rare traits, a phenomenon we term the majority negative class cheating trap. We present a systematic ablation of Multi-Label Focal Loss hyperparameters (alpha and gamma) on a ResNet-18 backbone. A calibrated configuration (alpha=0.50, gamma=2.0) achieves a Macro F1-score of 62.32%, matching BCE baseline while preserving superior hard-example mining and convergence dynamics. Our approach uses pure loss-function engineering with zero computational overhead for edge deployment. We identify the Sparsity Wall, a hard boundary where positive sample fractions below 0.1% make global loss reweighting ineffective, requiring instance-level intervention.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对行人属性识别中的极端类别不平衡问题，提出了使用多标签Focal Loss的优化方案，在109,000张图像的复合数据集上取得了与BCE基线相当的62.32%宏F1分数，同时保持了更好的困难样本挖掘和收敛动态。
AI.motivation: 行人属性识别在视频监控中至关重要，但当合并PETA和PA-100K数据集形成109,000张图像的复合语料库时，极端类别不平衡成为主要障碍，少数属性正样本比例低于1%。这导致标准二元交叉熵优化抑制了罕见特征，作者称之为"多数负类欺骗陷阱"。
AI.method: 在ResNet-18骨干网络上系统性地消融研究了多标签Focal Loss的超参数（alpha和gamma）。使用纯损失函数工程方法，无需额外计算开销，适合边缘部署。通过校准配置（alpha=0.50, gamma=2.0）来优化模型。
AI.result: 校准配置达到了62.32%的宏F1分数，与BCE基线性能相当，同时保持了更好的困难样本挖掘能力和收敛动态。作者还识别了"稀疏墙"现象，即当正样本比例低于0.1%时，全局损失重新加权变得无效，需要实例级干预。
AI.conclusion: 多标签Focal Loss在行人属性识别中能有效应对极端类别不平衡问题，通过适当的超参数配置可以实现与基线相当的性能，同时保持更好的训练特性。但存在"稀疏墙"限制，当数据过于稀疏时需要更精细的干预方法。

title: Robots as Tokens: Unified Diffusion Transformer for Coordinated Multi-Robot Trajectory Generation
summary: The success of generative models in language and visual generation has inspired extensive applications to generative robot planning. However, most existing works either focus on single-robot planning, or generate multi-robot trajectories in a sequential manner with iterative post-processing to resolve inter-robot conflicts. In this work, we investigate whether coordinated multi-robot trajectories, as a special spatiotemporal distribution, can be learned and generated with a generative model in a feed-forward manner. We propose Robots as Tokens (Roken), a unified diffusion transformer that directly generates multi-robot trajectories that satisfy both (individual) safety and (global) connectivity constraints. The core design of Roken is to represent each robot as a discrete token, allowing them to naturally interact with each other through self-attention, and cross-attend to map tokens for environment layouts. We further introduce several auxiliary tasks based on Bayes' theorem to provide multi-scale spatial-temporal supervision for efficient learning of the conditional distribution. In training, Roken absorbs diverse expert trajectories from different team sizes. During inference, Roken behaves as a versatile multi-robot planner that can handle single-robot planning, coordinated multi-robot trajectory generation, and conditional trajectory generation by fixing some robot tokens as conditions. Experiments in diverse cluttered environments show that Roken can generate coordinated multi-robot trajectories to perform connectivity-constrained goal navigation tasks with high success rates, outperforming the baseline method used to generate the training dataset. Roken also demonstrates good scalability after training with mixed team sizes, and shows generalization to unseen or partially observed environments, verifying its potential to learn from diverse data and perform versatile tasks.

AI.tldr: Roken是一个基于扩散变换器的多机器人轨迹生成模型，将每个机器人表示为离散token，通过自注意力机制实现机器人间的自然交互，能够前馈式生成满足安全性和连通性约束的协调多机器人轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式机器人规划方法大多专注于单机器人规划，或者通过顺序生成和迭代后处理来解决多机器人冲突。本文旨在探索能否通过生成模型以前馈方式学习和生成协调的多机器人轨迹，作为特殊的时空分布。
AI.method: 提出Robots as Tokens (Roken)模型，将每个机器人表示为离散token，通过自注意力机制实现机器人间交互，通过交叉注意力关注地图token以感知环境布局。引入基于贝叶斯定理的辅助任务，提供多尺度时空监督以高效学习条件分布。
AI.result: 在复杂环境中，Roken能够以高成功率生成协调的多机器人轨迹，完成连通性约束的目标导航任务，性能优于用于生成训练数据的基线方法。模型在训练后表现出良好的可扩展性，并能泛化到未见或部分观测的环境。
AI.conclusion: Roken作为一个统一的多机器人规划器，能够处理单机器人规划、协调多机器人轨迹生成和条件轨迹生成等多种任务，验证了从多样化数据中学习并执行多功能任务的潜力。

title: StarOR: Synergizing Tree Search and Test-Time Reinforcement Learning for Optimization Modeling
summary: Optimization modeling is inherently hierarchical, requiring a precise sequence of symbolic commitments. Traditional learning-based automated optimization modeling methods improve modeling policies through large-scale annotated or curated training data, but are costly to adapt to new problem distributions. Meanwhile, one-shot generation remains brittle in hierarchical modeling, where early symbolic errors can propagate into invalid formulations. Test-time scaling offers a promising alternative by enabling structural exploration with additional instance-level computation; however, existing search-based methods typically rely on a fixed policy, causing repeated rollouts to inherit similar modeling biases and providing limited credit assignment for intermediate decisions. To address these limitations, we propose StarOR, a synergistic search-and-adaptation framework that couples MCTS with Test-Time Reinforcement Learning for optimization modeling. StarOR decomposes the modeling process into four stages and updates a transient LoRA adapter via GRPO at each non-terminal node. By using MCTS-generated siblings as local comparison sets, StarOR transforms search-time exploration into instance-specific policy refinement. Moreover, an unsupervised multi-faceted reward system provides fine-grained feedback for intermediate formulation decisions without ground-truth labels. Experiments across five optimization benchmarks show that StarOR achieves state-of-the-art performance even with a 4B backbone, outperforming existing methods and the frontier LLMs.

AI.tldr: StarOR：一个结合MCTS与测试时强化学习的优化建模框架，通过搜索与适应协同解决传统方法在层次化建模中的局限性，无需标注数据即可实现实例级策略优化。
AI.motivation: 传统基于学习的优化建模方法需要大量标注数据，难以适应新问题分布；而一次性生成方法在层次化建模中容易因早期符号错误传播导致无效公式。现有测试时扩展方法依赖固定策略，导致重复搜索继承相同偏差且难以对中间决策进行信用分配。
AI.method: StarOR将建模过程分解为四个阶段，结合MCTS与测试时强化学习(GRPO)。在每个非终端节点通过瞬态LoRA适配器进行策略更新，利用MCTS生成的兄弟节点作为局部比较集，将搜索时探索转化为实例特定的策略优化。采用无监督多维度奖励系统为中间公式决策提供细粒度反馈。
AI.result: 在五个优化基准测试中，StarOR仅使用4B参数骨干网络就实现了最先进的性能，超越了现有方法和前沿LLMs。
AI.conclusion: StarOR通过协同搜索与适应框架，有效解决了优化建模中的层次化挑战，实现了无需标注数据的实例级策略优化，在多个基准上表现优异。

title: ScoutVLA: UAV-Centric Active Perception via a Dual-Expert VLA Model for Open-World Embodied Question Answering
summary: Aerial Embodied Question Answering (EQA) requires Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) to actively perceive the environment and answer natural language questions. Existing outdoor EQA systems usually stop once the target enters the UAV's field of view, leaving the fine-grained viewpoint adjustment needed for evidence-seeking questions largely unresolved. To address this issue, we introduce FG-EQA, a fine-grained active perception EQA benchmark with more than 40K simulated trajectories and 1K real-world trajectories. Drawing inspiration from the ``waggle dance'' of scout bees, which iteratively adjust their flight paths to verify target information, we propose ScoutVLA, an evidence-driven Vision-Language-Action model for outdoor EQA. To emulate this active exploration behavior, ScoutVLA features a decoupled dual-expert architecture: a vision-language expert infers the semantic intent to identify missing evidence, while an independent action expert employs high-DoF flow matching to generate continuous viewpoint-refinement trajectories. To balance the competing demands of continuous control and semantic reasoning, we devise a decoupled training strategy with a knowledge insulation mechanism that prevents the action gradients from erasing the model's multimodal reasoning ability. Extensive simulated experiments and a qualitative real-world field study both verify the superiority of ScoutVLA over the state-of-the-art baselines, demonstrating a 10.48$\boldsymbol{\times}$ higher average strict success rate and a 7.72$\boldsymbol{\times}$ higher average QA correctness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FG-EQA基准和ScoutVLA模型，用于解决无人机在户外环境中进行细粒度主动感知和问答的问题，通过模拟蜜蜂的摇摆舞行为实现连续视点调整。
AI.motivation: 现有户外EQA系统通常在目标进入视野后就停止，无法解决需要细粒度视点调整的证据搜索问题。需要一种能够主动探索环境、连续调整视点以获取足够证据的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出ScoutVLA模型，采用解耦的双专家架构：视觉语言专家推断语义意图识别缺失证据，独立动作专家使用高自由度流匹配生成连续视点优化轨迹。采用解耦训练策略和知识隔离机制，防止动作梯度损害多模态推理能力。
AI.result: 在模拟实验中，ScoutVLA相比现有基线方法，平均严格成功率提高了10.48倍，平均问答正确率提高了7.72倍。真实世界实地研究也验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: FG-EQA基准和ScoutVLA模型有效解决了户外EQA中的细粒度主动感知问题，通过模拟蜜蜂的摇摆舞行为实现了连续视点调整，显著提升了无人机在复杂户外环境中的问答性能。

title: SAPS: Shared Autonomy for Policy Steering by Blending Teleoperation with a Pretrained VLA
summary: Recent advancements in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated impressive generalist capabilities in robot manipulation, yet these policies can be brittle under out-of-distribution spatial and semantic perturbations. While human teleoperation offers reliable recovery, it can demand high cognitive load and precise manual control, and existing policy steering methods often require auxiliary models or sampler modifications. In this work, we introduce Shared Autonomy for Policy Steering (SAPS), a framework that blends real-time human teleoperation commands with pretrained policy actions at the action level. SAPS requires no policy retraining, auxiliary dynamics models, or architectural modifications. We propose and evaluate three arbitration strategies to balance human and VLA policy control, including a dynamic Cosine-similarity arbitration strategy that computes the geometric agreement between human and policy actions. Across evaluations in simulation (LIBERO, LIBERO-PRO, CALVIN) and on real-world robot hardware, SAPS improves task success rates over autonomous execution by up to 82% in both simulation and the real world. Furthermore, our approach drastically reduces human intervention compared to pure teleoperation, while simultaneously achieving faster task completion times than both autonomous execution and pure teleoperation. These results demonstrate that action-level shared autonomy is a practical, model-agnostic approach for reliably deploying generalist robot policies in real-world contexts involving a human operator,with promising applications in assistive teleoperation and scalable data collection.

AI.tldr: SAPS框架通过动作级混合人类遥操作与预训练策略动作，无需重新训练或修改架构，显著提升任务成功率并减少人工干预。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型在机器人操作中表现出色，但在空间和语义扰动下较为脆弱。人类遥操作虽可靠但认知负荷高，现有策略引导方法常需辅助模型或采样器修改。
AI.method: 提出SAPS框架，在动作级别混合实时人类遥操作命令与预训练策略动作。无需策略重训练、辅助动力学模型或架构修改。提出三种仲裁策略（包括动态余弦相似度仲裁）来平衡人类与VLA策略控制。
AI.result: 在仿真（LIBERO、LIBERO-PRO、CALVIN）和真实机器人硬件上，SAPS将任务成功率比自主执行提升高达82%。相比纯遥操作大幅减少人类干预，同时任务完成时间快于自主执行和纯遥操作。
AI.conclusion: 动作级共享自治是一种实用、模型无关的方法，可在有操作员参与的真实世界场景中可靠部署通用机器人策略，在辅助遥操作和可扩展数据收集中具有应用前景。

title: Controlled Dynamics Attractor Transformer
summary: Transformer architectures have dramatically advanced representation learning and inference in deep models through self-attention mechanisms. In parallel,associative memory (AM) frameworks map representations onto energy landscapes, offering interpretable retrieval mechanisms. However, their continuous-time inference dynamics lack the biological plausibility of classical Continuous Attractor Neural Networks (CANNs). To bridge this gap, we propose Controlled Dynamics Attractor Transformer (CDAT), which couples a mixture von Mises-Fisher (Mo-vMF) attention energy with a Hopfield refinement energy, while augmenting energy descent with a CANN-inspired excitation-inhibition modulation. CDAT instantiates a topology-constrained dynamical system whose couplings encode relational structure among tokens, thereby linking attractor-style dynamics to modern energy-based attention. We further provide a constructive dissipation analysis to formally establish their controlled inference dynamics. Benefiting from these robust and structured dynamics, CDAT achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks in graph anomaly detection and graph classification.

AI.tldr: 提出CDAT模型，将自注意力机制与联想记忆框架结合，通过受CANNs启发的兴奋-抑制调制，在连续时间动力学中实现拓扑约束的吸引子动态，在图表异常检测和分类任务中取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer的自注意力机制与联想记忆框架存在不足：联想记忆的连续时间推理动态缺乏经典连续吸引子神经网络（CANNs）的生物合理性。需要弥合这一差距，将吸引子式动态与现代基于能量的注意力机制联系起来。
AI.method: 提出CDAT模型，将混合von Mises-Fisher注意力能量与Hopfield细化能量耦合，同时通过CANNs启发的兴奋-抑制调制增强能量下降。该模型实现了一个拓扑约束的动力学系统，其耦合编码了token之间的关系结构。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，CDAT在图异常检测和图分类任务上实现了最先进的性能。通过构造性耗散分析，正式建立了其受控推理动态。
AI.conclusion: CDAT成功地将吸引子式动态与现代基于能量的注意力机制联系起来，通过拓扑约束的动力学系统和受CANNs启发的调制机制，实现了强大的推理能力，在多个图任务中表现出色。

title: Double-Helix Vision (DH-V2): A Geometry-Based Visual Sampler for Bandwidth-Constrained Perception
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. Code and benchmarks: https://github.com/JackJ-C/double-helix-vision-tool
summary: We present Double-Helix Vision (DH), a geometry-based visual sampler that compresses 2D images into compact 1D signals using paired golden-ratio-inspired spiral trajectories. Rather than processing every pixel uniformly, DH employs two phase-shifted helices (Alpha and Beta, offset by 180 degrees) to sample the image with biologically-inspired foveation: high density at the center, sparse coverage at the periphery. At 4K resolution, DH achieves a 1,433x compression ratio (99.93% reduction) while preserving the geometric structure of the scene. The full perception pipeline -- including spatial mapping, temporal collision detection, and intra-frame structural disparity estimation -- runs in 0.52 ms at 1080p on CPU-only hardware, with no neural network dependencies. On CIFAR-10 at extreme sampling budgets (K=128 points per helix), DH achieves a +6.03% accuracy gain over uniform random sampling. A JSON-serializable Robotics API is provided, delivering sub-millisecond spatial perception reports in 2.7 KB packets. Code and benchmarks are available under the MIT License.

AI.tldr: Double-Helix Vision (DH) 是一种基于几何的视觉采样器，使用双螺旋轨迹将2D图像压缩成紧凑的1D信号，实现高压缩比和快速处理，无需神经网络依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉处理需要处理所有像素，计算量大且效率低。DH旨在通过生物启发的中心高密度、边缘稀疏的采样方式，实现高效的空间感知，同时保持场景的几何结构。
AI.method: 使用两个相位偏移180度的螺旋（Alpha和Beta），基于黄金比例设计采样轨迹。采用中心密集、边缘稀疏的生物启发式采样策略，包括空间映射、时间碰撞检测和帧内结构差异估计等完整感知流程。
AI.result: 在4K分辨率下实现1,433倍压缩比（99.93%减少）；1080p分辨率下CPU-only硬件上0.52ms处理时间；CIFAR-10上在极端采样预算（K=128点/螺旋）下比均匀随机采样准确率提升6.03%；提供2.7KB数据包的JSON序列化机器人API。
AI.conclusion: DH提供了一种高效、轻量级的视觉感知解决方案，实现了极高的压缩比和亚毫秒级处理速度，适用于资源受限的机器人应用，无需神经网络依赖。

title: Perfect Demo Makes Poor Teacher: Learning Robust Alignment from Critical Motion Segments
summary: Expert demonstrations are widely assumed to be the gold standard for robot imitation learning. Yet for fine-grained manipulation such as insertion, stacking, and alignment, we uncover a counterintuitive failure mode: fluent demonstrations can be poor teachers. A skilled teleoperator compresses the decisive moments of alignment and recovery into a brief temporal window, leaving the policy flooded with redundant free-space motion and starved of supervision exactly where precision determines success. We address this bottleneck at two levels. At the data level, slowing down near alignment and resampling critical segments both help, yet the gain comes mainly from broadening the coverage of recovery states the policy must learn, not from reweighting frames it already has. Such data-side fixes, however, leave the policy's per-frame view untouched: a single image still maps directly to an action, and the local motion that governs correction stays implicit. We therefore turn to the representation level and introduce STAIR (\textbf{S}patio-\textbf{T}emporal feature \textbf{A}s an \textbf{I}nterface for \textbf{R}obot learning), a compact dynamic feature that bridges the vision-language model and the action expert, distilling the short-horizon motion already recorded in each trajectory into dense, motion-aware supervision. Trained on fluent data alone, STAIR recovers most of the deliberate-demonstration gain ($50.0$ to $62.2\%$ overall, approaching the $64.4\%$ of deliberate demonstrations). These results call for a more pedagogical view of robot data, optimized for machine learnability rather than human efficiency alone.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现流畅的专家演示在精细操作任务中效果不佳，因为关键的对齐和恢复动作被压缩在短暂时间窗口内。作者提出STAIR方法，通过时空特征桥接视觉语言模型和动作专家，将轨迹中的短时程运动转化为密集的运动感知监督，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统上认为专家演示是机器人模仿学习的黄金标准，但在精细操作任务（如插入、堆叠、对齐）中，流畅的演示反而效果不佳。这是因为熟练的遥操作者将关键的对齐和恢复动作压缩在短暂时间窗口内，导致策略被冗余的自由空间运动淹没，而在决定成功与否的关键时刻缺乏监督。
AI.method: 论文从两个层面解决问题：1) 数据层面：在接近对齐时放慢速度，并对关键片段进行重采样；2) 表示层面：提出STAIR（时空特征作为机器人学习接口），这是一种紧凑的动态特征，桥接视觉语言模型和动作专家，将每个轨迹中已记录的短时程运动提炼为密集的运动感知监督。
AI.result: 在仅使用流畅数据训练的情况下，STAIR恢复了大部分刻意演示的增益（整体从50.0%提升到62.2%，接近刻意演示的64.4%）。这表明STAIR方法显著提升了在精细操作任务中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，机器人数据应该采用更具教学意义的视角，不仅要考虑人类效率，还要优化机器学习能力。STAIR方法通过提取运动感知特征，有效解决了流畅演示中的监督瓶颈问题。

title: Can Neural Networks Achieve Optimal Computational-statistical Tradeoff? An Analysis on Single-Index Model
summary: In this work, we tackle the following question: Can neural networks trained with gradient-based methods achieve the optimal computational-statistical tradeoff in learning Gaussian single-index models? Prior research has shown that any polynomial-time algorithm under the statistical query (SQ) framework requires $Ω(d^{s^\star/2}\lor d)$ samples, where $s^\star$ is the generative exponent representing the intrinsic difficulty of learning the underlying model. However, it remains unknown whether neural networks can achieve this sample complexity. Inspired by prior techniques such as label transformation and landscape smoothing for learning single-index models, we propose a unified gradient-based algorithm for training a two-layer neural network in polynomial time. Our method is adaptable to a variety of loss and activation functions, covering a broad class of existing approaches. We show that our algorithm learns a feature representation that strongly aligns with the unknown signal $θ^\star$, with sample complexity $\widetilde{O} (d^{s^\star/2} \lor d)$, matching the SQ lower bound up to a polylogarithmic factor for all generative exponents $s^\star\geq 1$. Furthermore, we extend our approach to the setting where $θ^\star$ is $k$-sparse for $k = o(\sqrt{d})$ by introducing a novel weight perturbation technique that leverages the sparsity structure. We derive a corresponding SQ lower bound of order $\widetildeΩ(k^{s^\star})$, matched by our method up to a polylogarithmic factor. Our framework, especially the weight perturbation technique, is of independent interest, and suggests potential gradient-based solutions to other problems such as sparse tensor PCA.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于梯度的神经网络训练算法，用于学习高斯单指数模型，实现了最优的计算-统计权衡，匹配了统计查询框架的下界。
AI.motivation: 之前的研究表明，在统计查询框架下，任何多项式时间算法学习高斯单指数模型需要Ω(d^{s*/2}∨d)个样本，但神经网络是否能达到这一样本复杂度尚不清楚。本文旨在探索神经网络通过梯度方法能否达到最优的计算-统计权衡。
AI.method: 提出了一种统一的基于梯度的算法来训练两层神经网络，结合标签变换和景观平滑技术。算法适应多种损失和激活函数，并通过新颖的权重扰动技术扩展到稀疏信号设置。
AI.result: 算法学习到的特征表示与未知信号θ*强对齐，样本复杂度为Õ(d^{s*/2}∨d)，匹配了统计查询下界（相差对数多项式因子）。对于k-稀疏信号(k=o(√d))，算法达到Õ(k^{s*})样本复杂度，同样匹配下界。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络通过梯度方法可以学习高斯单指数模型并达到最优的计算-统计权衡。权重扰动技术具有独立价值，可能为稀疏张量PCA等其他问题提供梯度解决方案。

title: JoyAI-VL-Interaction: Real-Time Vision-Language Interaction Intelligence
summary: Many moments in the real world do not wait for a user to ask. A fire starts on a security monitor, an expression flickers across a video call, or a product a viewer wants flashes by in a livestream. Yet today's large models remain mostly turn-based by design: they answer only when addressed, and even video-call apps that appear interactive still operate as question-answer systems, reacting only when polled or prompted. We argue for a different paradigm: a model that is present in the world like a person. It continuously watches what is happening now, decides on its own whether to speak or stay silent, interacts in real time, and delegates to a background model when the problem is hard. To advance interaction models and their adoption across domains, we make two fully open-sourced contributions. First, we release JoyAI-VL-Interaction, an 8B-scale, vision-first VL-interaction model. The model makes the response decision internally, choosing each second to stay silent, respond, or delegate to a background model, and it excels at vision-triggered responsiveness and time awareness. We pair it with a transferable training recipe, from which capabilities we never trained for emerge, such as guiding a shopper through changing app screens or improvising a lecture from a slide deck. Second, we release a complete, deployable system built around that model. The system streams any ongoing video into the model, making it genuinely present in the world. All other components are pluggable, including ASR/TTS modules, memory, visualization UI, and a background brain that can connect to any API or agent. Across six real-world scenarios, human raters prefer JoyAI-VL-Interaction over the in-app video-call assistants of Doubao and Gemini by a wide margin. To our knowledge, this is the first open, vision-driven interaction model released together with its training recipe, data, and complete deployable system.

AI.tldr: JoyAI-VL-Interaction是一个8B规模的视觉优先交互模型，能够持续观察环境、自主决定何时响应或保持沉默，并支持实时交互和任务委派，代表了从传统问答系统向主动感知交互范式的转变。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中许多时刻（如监控中的火灾、视频通话中的表情变化、直播中的商品闪现）需要即时响应，而现有大模型多为轮询式设计，只在被提问时才响应。作者主张建立像人一样"在场"的模型，能够持续观察、自主决策、实时交互。
AI.method: 开发了8B规模的视觉优先VL交互模型，模型内部每秒自主决定保持沉默、响应或委派给后台模型。采用可迁移的训练配方，即使未专门训练也能涌现新能力。构建完整可部署系统，支持视频流输入、可插拔组件（ASR/TTS、记忆、UI、后台大脑等）。
AI.result: 在六个真实场景中，人类评估者明显更偏好JoyAI-VL-Interaction，优于豆包和Gemini的视频通话助手。模型展现出视觉触发的响应能力和时间意识，并能处理未专门训练的任务（如引导购物应用、即兴演讲）。
AI.conclusion: 这是第一个开源的视觉驱动交互模型，包含训练配方、数据和完整可部署系统，实现了从被动问答到主动在场交互的范式转变，为跨领域应用提供了新可能。

title: Pixels to Proofs: Probabilistically-Safe Latent World Model Control via Parallel Conformal Robust MPC
summary: We present SLS^2, a framework for safe feedback motion planning from pixels using robust model predictive control (MPC) in learned latent world models. Our approach trains an action-conditioned joint-embedding world model with compact Markovian latent states, enabling efficient gradient-based trajectory optimization through learned latent dynamics. To enforce safety for the true system despite imperfect latent predictions, we inform a GPU-accelerated system level synthesis (SLS) robust MPC scheme with conformal prediction to obtain calibrated latent error bounds and robust latent-space constraint sets. We further learn and conformalize a latent constraint checker, allowing the SLS planner to impose probabilistic safety constraints during closed-loop execution. We evaluate our method on vision-based control tasks, where it improves both goal-reaching performance and safety over latent world-model and safe-planning baselines.

AI.tldr: SLS^2：基于像素的安全反馈运动规划框架，通过学习潜在世界模型中的鲁棒模型预测控制实现安全视觉控制
AI.motivation: 现有方法在基于像素的视觉控制中难以同时保证安全性和性能，特别是在潜在世界模型预测不准确的情况下。需要一种能够处理学习动态模型不确定性的安全规划方法。
AI.method: 训练动作条件联合嵌入世界模型学习紧凑马尔可夫潜在状态；通过保形预测获得校准的潜在误差边界和鲁棒潜在空间约束集；学习并保形化潜在约束检查器；采用GPU加速的系统级合成鲁棒MPC方案进行轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在视觉控制任务中，相比潜在世界模型和安全规划基线方法，SLS^2在目标到达性能和安全性方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: SLS^2框架成功结合了学习潜在世界模型和鲁棒MPC，通过保形预测处理模型不确定性，实现了基于像素的安全反馈运动规划。

title: Edu-Theater: A Data-Efficient Agent Framework for Scalable Learner Behavior Simulation through Staging Roll-Call
comment: LLM Agent, Educational Data Mining, Data Synthesis, Human Simulation
summary: Large-scale learner-task interaction data are crucial for intelligent educational systems but are costly to collect and constrained by privacy and learner engagement. Learner simulators play a critical role in simulating scalable learner behavior without the need for continuous involvement of real learners. However, existing methods are predominantly \textbf{individual-centric}, pairing a simulator with each learner to iteratively infer latent knowledge states from dense interaction histories, which is both data- and computation-intensive, and fragile in cold-start scenarios. We propose a \textbf{cohort-aware roll-call simulation paradigm} that first constructs cohort-level proficiency priors and refines individual learner states through a small number of targeted diagnostic queries. Based on this paradigm, we introduce \textbf{Edu-Theater}, an LLM-powered agent system that performs cohort-aware learner simulation via a teacher agent and retrospective roll-call probing over learner logs. Edu-Theater enables scalable future behavior simulation without the need for dense per-learner histories. Experiments on two real-world datasets demonstrate that Edu-Theater achieves higher simulation accuracy with significantly fewer LLM calls, producing synthetic data that enhances downstream applications such as adaptive testing.

AI.tldr: 提出Edu-Theater系统，采用队列感知点名模拟范式，通过LLM驱动的教师代理进行学习者模拟，减少对密集历史交互数据的需求
AI.motivation: 大规模学习者-任务交互数据收集成本高、受隐私和学习者参与度限制，现有个体中心模拟方法数据计算密集且在冷启动场景下脆弱
AI.method: 提出队列感知点名模拟范式：先构建队列水平熟练度先验，再通过少量针对性诊断查询精炼个体状态；实现Edu-Theater系统，使用LLM驱动的教师代理进行队列感知学习者模拟和回顾性点名探测
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上实验表明，Edu-Theater以显著更少的LLM调用实现了更高的模拟准确性，生成的合成数据能增强下游应用如自适应测试
AI.conclusion: Edu-Theater提供了一种可扩展的学习者模拟方法，减少了对密集个体历史数据的需求，为智能教育系统提供了更高效的数据生成方案

title: FactCheck: Feasibility-aware Long-term Action Anticipation with Multi-agent Collaboration
summary: Long-term action anticipation (LTA) aims to predict an ordered sequence of future verb-noun actions from a partially observed video. While this task serves as the foundation for embodied intelligence, anticipating physically feasible long-term actions remains a critical challenge. Existing methods, which operate in an open-loop manner, often hallucinate non-existent objects, violate object affordances, or disregard object states, as they lack explicit mechanisms to verify action feasibility against the physical environment. To address this, we propose FactCheck, a novel multi-agent collaboration framework that improves feasibility through a closed-loop "Observe-Plan-Verify" mechanism. FactCheck decomposes the complex LTA task into specialized roles: an Observer that recognizes historical actions from video observations and constructs a dual-form structured memory, comprising a History Action Abstract that captures high-level human intentions and environmental status, and a History Action Graph that encodes object states and temporal dependencies; a Planner that generates draft future actions conditioned on both low-level historical actions and high-level History Action Abstract; and a Verifier that rigorously validates the draft against the History Action Graph and refines infeasible actions. Extensive experiments on the EPIC-Kitchens-55 and EGTEA Gaze+ benchmarks demonstrate that FactCheck consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Our work establishes a new paradigm for feasibility-aware long-term action anticipation, effectively closing the loop of action recognition, action prediction and action verification.

AI.tldr: FactCheck提出了一种多智能体协作框架，通过"观察-规划-验证"的闭环机制改进长时动作预测的可行性，避免幻觉动作和违反物体可用性等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有长时动作预测方法以开环方式运行，容易产生不存在的物体幻觉、违反物体可用性或忽视物体状态，缺乏验证动作在物理环境中可行性的机制。
AI.method: FactCheck将复杂任务分解为三个专门角色：观察者从视频中识别历史动作并构建双形式结构化记忆（历史动作摘要和动作图）；规划器基于低级历史动作和高级摘要生成草稿未来动作；验证器严格验证草稿动作并修正不可行动作。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchens-55和EGTEA Gaze+基准上的实验表明，FactCheck持续优于最先进方法，为可行性感知的长时动作预测建立了新范式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过闭环机制有效连接了动作识别、动作预测和动作验证，建立了可行性感知的长时动作预测新范式。

title: Retrieve, Don't Retrain: Extending Vision Language Action Models to New Tasks at Test Time
summary: Extending a vision-language-action (VLA) policy to a new task typically requires task-specific teleoperated demonstrations and per-task fine-tuning, making adaptation costly in both data collection and compute. In this paper, we show that this target-side per-task adaptation cost can be replaced by retrieval. Our retrieval-augmented policy is trained once on paired demonstrations from the target embodiment (query) and a cheaper embodiment (pool, e.g., human-hand video), then frozen. New tasks are added at deployment by appending pool-side demonstrations to a retrieval pool. The frozen policy conditions on retrieved trajectories at every control step, so new tasks are absorbed by indexing data rather than updating parameters. Fine-tuning is needed only to take on a new, unseen embodiment, not for each new task. We show that retrieval improves policies beyond a specific backbone, including standard VLA policies, but its effect is especially pronounced in Cosmos Policy, a video-generation-based world-action model (WAM). In this setting, retrieval supplies coarse task progression, while the WAM's future-image objective provides an additional visual consistency signal that strengthens the retrieval-conditioned actions. On PushT, we study how retrieval provides a reusable high-level motion prior for cross-embodiment generalization to unseen goal angles, while on RoboTwin 2.0 our method outperforms cross-embodiment baselines on unseen tasks, and we additionally demonstrate the method on a real robot.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种检索增强的视觉-语言-动作策略，通过检索替代针对每个新任务的微调，降低了跨任务和跨具身的适应成本
AI.motivation: 传统VLA策略扩展到新任务需要任务特定的遥操作演示和逐任务微调，导致数据收集和计算成本高昂。本文旨在通过检索机制替代这种目标侧逐任务适应成本
AI.method: 提出检索增强策略：1）在目标具身（查询）和廉价具身（池，如人手视频）的配对演示上训练一次后冻结；2）部署时通过向检索池添加池侧演示来添加新任务；3）冻结策略在每个控制步骤条件于检索到的轨迹，通过索引数据而非更新参数吸收新任务；4）仅在面对新未见具身时才需要微调
AI.result: 检索提升了包括标准VLA策略在内的多种骨干网络性能，在基于视频生成的世界-动作模型Cosmos Policy中效果尤为显著。在PushT上，检索为未见目标角度提供了可重用高级运动先验；在RoboTwin 2.0上，该方法在未见任务上优于跨具身基线，并在真实机器人上得到验证
AI.conclusion: 检索机制能够有效替代传统VLA策略的逐任务微调，显著降低跨任务和跨具身适应的成本，同时保持或提升策略性能，为机器人学习提供了更高效的数据利用方式

title: EnvShip-Bench: An Environment-Enhanced Benchmark for Short-Term Vessel Trajectory Prediction
summary: Vessel trajectory prediction is important for intelligent shipping, maritime surveillance, and navigation safety. However, existing public maritime AIS resources are often limited by inconsistent forecasting protocols, uneven data quality, and the lack of benchmark-ready contextual annotations, which hinder fair comparison and context-aware modeling. To address this gap, we present EnvShip-Bench, a unified benchmark for short-term vessel trajectory prediction built from large-scale raw AIS data from the Danish Maritime Authority (DMA) and NOAA through a common processing pipeline. EnvShip-Bench adopts a standardized forecasting protocol with 10 minutes of observation, 10 minutes of prediction, and 20-second sampling in vessel-centric local metric coordinates. Beyond the large-scale core benchmark, it provides a quality-first compact subset for efficient and reproducible experimentation, together with synchronized environmental and nearby-vessel context extensions. As a result, EnvShip-Bench supports trajectory-only, environment-aware, and interaction-aware forecasting under a unified evaluation framework. Extensive benchmark statistics and analysis demonstrate that EnvShip-Bench offers a standardized, extensible, and context-aware foundation for maritime trajectory forecasting research.

AI.tldr: EnvShip-Bench是一个用于船舶轨迹预测的统一基准，基于丹麦海事局和NOAA的大规模原始AIS数据构建，提供标准化预测协议、质量优先子集和环境感知扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有公共海事AIS资源存在预测协议不一致、数据质量不均、缺乏基准化标注等问题，阻碍了公平比较和上下文感知建模。
AI.method: 从丹麦海事局和NOAA获取大规模原始AIS数据，通过统一处理流程构建基准，采用标准化预测协议（10分钟观测+10分钟预测，20秒采样，船体中心局部坐标），提供质量优先的紧凑子集和同步的环境及附近船舶上下文扩展。
AI.result: EnvShip-Bench为海事轨迹预测研究提供了标准化、可扩展和上下文感知的基础，支持仅轨迹、环境感知和交互感知三种预测模式，并提供了全面的基准统计和分析。
AI.conclusion: EnvShip-Bench填补了船舶轨迹预测领域的基准空白，为研究人员提供了一个统一的评估框架，有助于推动该领域的发展。

title: YTClickbait21K: Human-Annotated Multimodal Dataset for YouTube Clickbait Detection Across Diverse Channels and Content Categories
summary: Clickbait content on video-sharing platforms poses a significant challenge to information reliability, yet progress in automated detection has been constrained by the lack of large-scale, high-quality multimodal datasets. We present YTClickbait21K, a human-annotated YouTube clickbait dataset comprising 21,238 videos collected from 40 channels across 29 countries, covering diverse content categories such as news, entertainment, education, and gaming. Each sample includes structured metadata (title, description, engagement statistics) along with associated thumbnail images, enabling comprehensive multimodal analysis. To ensure annotation quality, every video was independently labeled by three annotators using a standardized decision framework that incorporates textual, visual, and cross-modal consistency cues, with final labels determined through majority voting. The dataset exhibits substantial inter-annotator agreement (k=0.65), confirming reliable labeling despite the inherent subjectivity of clickbait detection. By combining scale, annotation rigor, and multimodal richness, this dataset provides a robust benchmark for developing and evaluating machine learning models, facilitating research in cross-modal semantic understanding, and advancing automated content moderation systems.

AI.tldr: 构建了YTClickbait21K数据集，包含21,238个YouTube视频，涵盖多模态特征，用于点击诱饵检测研究
AI.motivation: 视频分享平台上的点击诱饵内容对信息可靠性构成重大挑战，但自动化检测进展受到缺乏大规模、高质量多模态数据集的限制
AI.method: 从40个频道收集21,238个YouTube视频，涵盖29个国家，包含新闻、娱乐、教育、游戏等类别。每个样本包含结构化元数据（标题、描述、参与度统计）和相关缩略图。每个视频由三名标注员使用标准化决策框架独立标注，结合文本、视觉和跨模态一致性线索，通过多数投票确定最终标签
AI.result: 数据集表现出显著的标注者间一致性（k=0.65），确认了尽管点击诱饵检测存在主观性，但标注是可靠的。该数据集结合了规模、标注严谨性和多模态丰富性
AI.conclusion: YTClickbait21K数据集为开发和评估机器学习模型提供了稳健的基准，促进了跨模态语义理解研究，并推动了自动化内容审核系统的发展

title: TO-SoFiT: Topology Optimization of Hydraulic Soft Fish Tail Design for programmable undulating locomotion
comment: Accepted for publication at the Advances in Robotics (AIR), 2025, IIT Jodhpur
summary: Soft robots leverage compliant materials to generate motion through controlled elastic deformation, making them ideal for delicate tasks such as underwater exploration and biomimetic marine systems. Although hydraulic/pneumatic actuation remains pivotal for such systems, the lack of systematic design frameworks has hindered the development of robots capable of complex 3D motion, such as fish-like swimming. This work introduces a topology optimization method to automate the design of a hydraulic soft fish tail, explicitly addressing the design-dependent coupling between fluidic actuation and structural deformation. We use a Darcy law-based model augmented with a drainage term to simulate spatially varying hydraulic pressure loads, translating these into consistent nodal forces via finite element analysis. The employed robust multi-criteria optimization formulation balances deformation efficiency, fluid-structure interaction, geometric manufacturability, and required stiffness for optimizing a bioinspired soft fish tail for 3D swimming kinematics. The optimized tail topology is incorporated into a pneumatic network actuator and computationally validated under various hydraulic loads, achieving tunable undulatory amplitudes and multiaxis bending for depth adjustment. The optimized 2D tail outperforms its rectangular counterpart. By cascading optimized tail segments, we demonstrate programmable swimming patterns in soft robotic fish tails at different hydraulic loads. This work advances the systematic codesign of hydraulic actuators and soft structures, offering a pathway to automate underwater robots with optimized design and vertebrate-like agility in confined aquatic environments. Our implementations and simulations are publicly available at 'https://github.com/PrabhatIn/TO-SoFiT'.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于拓扑优化的液压驱动软体鱼类尾巴设计方法，通过流体-结构耦合模拟和多目标优化，实现了可编程的3D游泳运动。
AI.motivation: 虽然液压/气动驱动在软体机器人中很重要，但缺乏系统化设计框架，阻碍了实现复杂3D运动（如鱼类游泳）的机器人发展。需要解决流体驱动与结构变形之间的设计依赖耦合问题。
AI.method: 采用基于达西定律的模型，增加排水项模拟空间变化的液压载荷，通过有限元分析转化为节点力。使用鲁棒的多准则优化框架，平衡变形效率、流固耦合、几何可制造性和所需刚度，优化仿生软体鱼尾设计。
AI.result: 优化的2D尾拓扑结构优于矩形对应物，通过级联优化尾段实现了不同液压载荷下的可编程游泳模式。计算验证显示可调节的波动幅度和多轴弯曲，用于深度调整。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推进了液压执行器和软体结构的系统协同设计，为自动化设计具有优化设计和脊椎动物般敏捷性的水下机器人提供了途径。

title: M-CTX: Exact and Scalable Spatial Context Retrieval for Trajectory Analytics
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures, 12 tables. Submitted to ICDE 2027
summary: Modern trajectory predictors increasingly condition on external spatial context, such as map geometry, signed distance fields (SDFs), and nearby moving agents. While this context improves prediction quality, constructing it for every training anchor has become a hidden systems bottleneck. In a representative maritime AIS pipeline, spatial context construction requires roughly 17 CPU-days for a 5.48M-anchor corpus, dominating the cost of the downstream predictor. We present M-CTX, an exact and scalable spatial context-retrieval framework for trajectory analytics. M-CTX recasts context construction as an ingest-once, query-many spatial database workload and replaces three brute-force stages -- OSM range retrieval, SDF computation, and moving-vessel neighbour lookup -- with composable, index-backed operators. Its learned range-index backend, BR-LZ, provides recall-complete MBR-overlap range retrieval and reduces candidate amplification by 1.1x--2.7x relative to global-expansion one-curve baselines. Across four maritime regions, eight baseline systems, synthetic workloads with up to 40M spatial features, and 10^7-record AIS streams, M-CTX reproduces the reference context exactly. On the 5.48M-anchor corpus, it reduces context construction from about 17 CPU-days to 1.8 hours, a measured 226x end-to-end speed-up. An optional storage mode further compresses SDF context by 64x with only a 0.04 m ADE change. These results establish exact spatial context retrieval as a first-class database problem in modern trajectory analytics. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/mark000071/M-CTX-Traj.

AI.tldr: M-CTX是一个可扩展的空间上下文检索框架，将轨迹分析中的上下文构建从17个CPU天减少到1.8小时，实现226倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现代轨迹预测器依赖外部空间上下文（如地图几何、SDF、附近移动代理），但为每个训练锚点构建上下文已成为系统瓶颈。在典型的海事AIS管道中，空间上下文构建需要约17个CPU天，主导了下游预测器的成本。
AI.method: M-CTX将上下文构建重构为"一次摄入、多次查询"的空间数据库工作负载，用可组合的索引支持操作符替换三个暴力阶段：OSM范围检索、SDF计算和移动船舶邻居查找。其学习范围索引后端BR-LZ提供召回完整的MBR重叠范围检索。
AI.result: 在四个海事区域、八个基线系统、高达4000万个空间特征的合成工作负载和10^7条记录的AIS流上，M-CTX精确复制了参考上下文。在548万个锚点语料库上，将上下文构建从约17个CPU天减少到1.8小时，实现226倍端到端加速。可选存储模式进一步将SDF上下文压缩64倍，仅带来0.04米ADE变化。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果表明精确的空间上下文检索是现代轨迹分析中一个重要的数据库问题。M-CTX框架有效解决了上下文构建瓶颈，大幅提升了轨迹分析系统的效率。

title: Variational Deep Unfolding with Mamba-Based Nonlocal Modeling for Underwater Image Enhancement
summary: Underwater imaging plays a crucial role in ocean engineering, although captured data often suffer from poor visibility and color distortion. To address these challenges, we propose a model-based deep unfolding network for underwater image enhancement that integrates variational modeling into a learnable architecture. The framework is guided by a variational formulation based on a dehazing decomposition, incorporating a multiplicative residual component to absorb remaining artifacts and a nonlocal gradient-type constraint to preserve structural details and enhance edge sharpness. We provide a theoretical analysis establishing the existence of solution for the associated minimization problem. The proposed unfolding method incorporates Mamba layers to efficiently capture self-similarities in the scene. In addition, we introduce a proximal trajectory loss that enforces consistency between the unfolding stages and the iterations of an ideal restoration regularizer. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed unfolding approach achieves improved visual quality and competitive quantitative performance compared with recent state-of-the-art methods. The source code will be available at https://github.com/MIA-UIB/Variational-Unfolding-Mamba-Underwater-Enhancement .

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于模型展开的深度学习网络，将变分建模集成到可学习架构中，用于水下图像增强，通过Mamba层捕获自相似性，并使用近端轨迹损失确保一致性。
AI.motivation: 水下成像在海洋工程中至关重要，但捕获的数据通常存在能见度差和颜色失真的问题，需要有效的水下图像增强方法来解决这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于变分展开的网络，将变分建模集成到可学习架构中，采用去雾分解的变分公式，包含乘法残差分量吸收剩余伪影，以及非局部梯度型约束保持结构细节和增强边缘锐度。使用Mamba层高效捕获场景自相似性，并引入近端轨迹损失确保展开阶段与理想恢复正则化迭代之间的一致性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的展开方法相比最近的最先进方法，实现了改进的视觉质量和有竞争力的定量性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种有效的基于变分展开的水下图像增强方法，通过理论分析和实验验证了其有效性，源代码将在GitHub上公开。

title: PO-PDDL: Learning Symbolic POMDPs from Visual Demonstrations for Robot Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Real-world robot task planning must operate under both stochastic action execution and partial observability, yet constructing Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) models for real robotics domains remains difficult and labor-intensive. We introduce PO-PDDL, a symbolic formulation of POMDPs that preserves the relational structure and LLM-friendly syntax of the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), while explicitly modeling partial observability, stochasticity, and beliefs. Building on this formulation, we propose a demonstration-driven pipeline for learning PO-PDDL models. The proposed method reconstructs latent symbolic state trajectories from real-robot execution videos, identifies partial observability via inconsistencies between inferred states and visual observations, and learns stochastic transition and observation models accordingly. The resulting PO-PDDL domains are reusable across tasks and enable online belief-space planning under both perception and execution uncertainty. Experiments on real-world long-horizon manipulation tasks show that our method consistently outperforms existing PDDL and POMDP model-learning approaches, achieving robust task planning under uncertainty with significantly lower planning cost.

AI.tldr: PO-PDDL：一种基于符号的POMDP表述，结合LLM友好的PDDL语法，通过演示驱动的方法从真实机器人视频中学习部分可观测、随机性的模型，实现高效的在线信念空间规划
AI.motivation: 现实机器人任务规划需要在随机动作执行和部分可观测性下操作，但为真实机器人领域构建POMDP模型仍然困难且劳动密集，需要一种更易构建和使用的模型表述方法
AI.method: 提出PO-PDDL符号化表述，保持PDDL的关系结构和LLM友好语法，同时显式建模部分可观测性、随机性和信念。基于此提出演示驱动流水线：从真实机器人执行视频重建潜在符号状态轨迹，通过推断状态与视觉观察的不一致性识别部分可观测性，并学习随机转移和观察模型
AI.result: 在真实世界长视野操作任务实验中，该方法持续优于现有的PDDL和POMDP模型学习方法，在不确定性下实现鲁棒的任务规划，且规划成本显著降低
AI.conclusion: PO-PDDL提供了可重用的跨任务领域模型，支持在感知和执行不确定性下进行在线信念空间规划，为解决现实机器人任务规划中的不确定性问题提供了有效框架

title: Exploring Starts Are Not Enough: Counterexamples and a Fix for Monte Carlo Exploring Starts
summary: The asymptotic behaviour of Monte Carlo Exploring Starts (MCES) is a long-standing open question in reinforcement learning, even in the tabular setting. We investigated the convergence properties of tabular MCES by constructing examples in which the algorithm converges to suboptimal solutions. This paper presents new counterexamples for both initial-visit and first-visit MCES and gives a convergence-restoring modification for the initial-visit case. We show that stable suboptimal solutions may exist for initial-visit MCES with sample-average updates even when greedy actions are updated more often than non-greedy actions on average. However, by scaling learning rates inversely to update frequencies on a state-by-state basis, convergence to optimality is guaranteed. Unlike previous uniformisation methods, this modification is applicable to large-scale problems that require approximating the estimated value function. We then extend the example to show that sample-average first-visit MCES may also converge to suboptimal solutions. This largely settles a fundamental open problem and shows that exploring starts alone do not guarantee convergence to optimality. More broadly, these results highlight that convergence depends critically on the relative size and frequency of updates applied to different actions, making the choice of learning rates and the balance between exploration and exploitation central to the analysis of MCES and the implementation of scalable Monte Carlo control methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过构造反例证明，即使在表格设置下，蒙特卡洛探索开始（MCES）算法也可能收敛到次优解，并提出了针对初始访问情况的收敛性修正方法。
AI.motivation: 研究蒙特卡洛探索开始（MCES）算法的渐近行为是强化学习中长期存在的开放性问题，即使在表格设置下也尚未解决。本文旨在探究MCES的收敛性质，特别是它是否总能收敛到最优解。
AI.method: 通过构造反例来证明初始访问和首次访问MCES都可能收敛到次优解。针对初始访问MCES，提出了基于状态逐个缩放学习率的修正方法，确保收敛到最优性。
AI.result: 发现初始访问MCES即使在贪婪动作比非贪婪动作更新更频繁的情况下，仍可能存在稳定的次优解。首次访问MCES同样可能收敛到次优解。提出的修正方法能保证初始访问MCES收敛到最优性。
AI.conclusion: 探索开始本身不能保证收敛到最优性，收敛性关键取决于不同动作更新的大小和频率的相对关系。学习率的选择以及探索与利用的平衡对MCES分析和可扩展蒙特卡洛控制方法的实现至关重要。

title: Last But Not Least: Boundary Attention CalibratiON for Multimodal KV Cache Compression
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong vision-language reasoning, but long visual contexts enlarge the KV cache and increase decoding latency. Existing compression methods rely on observation window attention for stable token-importance estimation, yet this aggregation can dilute sparse visual evidence and discard answer-critical tokens under aggressive compression. Therefore, we identify last-query attention as a complementary source for recovering such evidence, but its answer-irrelevant signals can mislead retention. We propose BACON, a plug-and-play method that calibrates observation window attention with last-query evidence and suppresses isolated noise via intra-layer coherence and inter-layer persistence. Across diverse benchmarks, models, budgets, and compression methods, BACON improves multimodal KV compression by 7.5% on average under the most aggressive budget, with gains up to 30.9%.

AI.tldr: BACON是一种用于多模态大语言模型KV缓存的即插即用压缩方法，通过校准观察窗口注意力与最后查询证据，在激进压缩下保持答案关键标记，平均提升压缩效果7.5%。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在处理长视觉上下文时，KV缓存会显著增加解码延迟。现有压缩方法依赖观察窗口注意力进行标记重要性估计，但这种聚合会稀释稀疏视觉证据，在激进压缩下可能丢弃答案关键标记。
AI.method: 提出BACON方法：1) 使用最后查询注意力作为补充证据来源来恢复稀疏视觉证据；2) 通过层内一致性和层间持续性抑制孤立噪声；3) 校准观察窗口注意力与最后查询证据。
AI.result: 在多样化基准测试、模型、预算和压缩方法中，BACON在最激进的压缩预算下平均提升多模态KV压缩效果7.5%，最高提升达30.9%。
AI.conclusion: BACON通过有效结合观察窗口注意力和最后查询证据，解决了多模态KV压缩中稀疏视觉证据丢失的问题，显著提升了压缩效果和推理效率。

title: Learning New Tasks via Reusable Skills: Skill-Compositional Experts for Embodied Continual Learning
summary: Embodied Continual Learning (ECL) aims to enable robots to continually acquire new manipulation tasks while retaining previously learned behaviors under closed-loop control. Compared with conventional continual learning, ECL suffers from more severe catastrophic forgetting. Feature drift accumulated under closed-loop control progressively propagates through sequential decision-making, leading to degradation of previously learned behaviors. A key challenge in ECL lies in structured skill reuse across continually evolving tasks, since existing methods primarily focus on skill learning without explicitly organizing them for coherent task execution. To address this issue, we propose SCE, a Skill-Compositional Experts framework for ECL. SCE builds a skill base via Compositional Skill Grounding (CSG), which decomposes task demonstrations into reusable skills. Based on this, Dual Execution-and-Transition Experts (DETE) enable new task learning through skill composition, where one branch ensures skill execution and the other supports transitions between skills for coherent behavior. Experiments on LIBERO benchmarks and real-world manipulation tasks demonstrate that SCE consistently improves retention and overall task performance. Further feature drift analyses and ablation studies verify the effectiveness of our method. Project website: https://eqcy.github.io/sce/.

AI.tldr: SCE框架通过技能组合专家系统解决具身持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，利用可重用技能库和双专家机制实现新任务学习和技能间平稳过渡。
AI.motivation: 具身持续学习（ECL）面临比传统持续学习更严重的灾难性遗忘问题，特征漂移在闭环控制中累积传播，导致先前学习的行为退化。现有方法主要关注技能学习，缺乏对技能的组织以实现连贯任务执行。
