AI.method: 提出SCE（Skill-Compositional Experts）框架：1）通过组合技能基础（CSG）将任务演示分解为可重用技能；2）双执行-过渡专家（DETE）机制，一个分支确保技能执行，另一个支持技能间过渡以实现连贯行为。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准测试和真实世界操作任务上的实验表明，SCE持续提高了任务保留率和整体性能。特征漂移分析和消融研究验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SCE通过结构化技能重用和双专家机制，有效解决了ECL中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现了更好的任务保留和性能表现。

title: AI for Social Good: An Investigation of the Causal Relationship Between Environmental Regulations and Their Effects on Air Pollution in London, UK
summary: Air pollution regulation is central to urban public health governance, but estimating its effects is difficult because policies are implemented non-randomly and pollution trajectories are shaped by meteorology, socioeconomic change, temporal trends, and overlapping interventions. This study develops an uncertainty-aware Bayesian deep learning framework to estimate the aggregate effect of air pollution regulations on PM$_{2.5}$ concentrations in London from 2010 to 2020. The framework integrates daily PM$_{2.5}$ observations from Inner London monitoring stations, meteorological covariates, annual socioeconomic indicators, month-of-year and day-of-week indicators, and daily regulation status data for 32 policy measures. A Bayesian LSTM captures temporal dependencies in environmental and socioeconomic covariates, Bayesian embedding layers represent temporal and regulation status inputs, and a regulation status prediction branch supports propensity score-based adjustment for non-random policy implementation. Regulatory effects are estimated by comparing observed PM$_{2.5}$ concentrations with counterfactual predictions under a hypothetical no-regulation scenario, with uncertainty summarized across repeated Bayesian training runs and bootstrap resampling. Results show that London's regulations were associated with an average PM$_{2.5}$ reduction of 1.88 $μ$g/m$^3$, a relative reduction of 12.35%, with a 95% confidence interval of 1.64-2.12 $μ$g/m$^3$. Estimated effects were limited before 2013, became clearer from 2013 to 2017, and were strongest in 2018 and 2019. The findings suggest that sustained and cumulative regulatory interventions contributed to measurable improvements in London's air quality. This study demonstrates how uncertainty-aware causal AI can support environmental accountability, public health protection, and evidence-based governance for environmental decision-making.

AI.tldr: 使用贝叶斯深度学习框架评估伦敦空气污染法规对PM2.5的因果效应，发现2010-2020年间法规平均降低PM2.5 1.88 μg/m³（相对减少12.35%），效果在2018-2019年最强
AI.motivation: 空气污染法规对公共健康至关重要，但评估其效果面临挑战：政策实施非随机、污染受气象、社会经济变化、时间趋势和多重干预措施影响。需要开发因果推断方法准确估计法规的净效应
AI.method: 开发不确定性感知的贝叶斯深度学习框架，整合伦敦内城PM2.5监测数据、气象协变量、社会经济指标、时间指标和32项政策措施的每日状态数据。使用贝叶斯LSTM捕捉时空依赖，贝叶斯嵌入层处理时间和政策状态，通过政策状态预测分支进行倾向得分调整。通过比较观测PM2.5与无法规反事实预测来估计效应，通过贝叶斯训练重复和自助抽样量化不确定性
AI.result: 伦敦法规平均降低PM2.5浓度1.88 μg/m³（相对减少12.35%），95%置信区间为1.64-2.12 μg/m³。效应在2013年前有限，2013-2017年逐渐明显，2018-2019年最强。表明持续累积的法规干预对空气质量改善有可测量贡献
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知的因果人工智能方法能够支持环境责任评估、公共健康保护和基于证据的环境决策治理，为评估复杂城市环境政策提供了可靠框架

title: The Vision Encoder as a Privacy Boundary: Visual-Token Side Channels in Encoder-Free Vision-Language Models
summary: A vision encoder compresses image pixels into semantic embeddings, implicitly acting as a privacy boundary by preserving semantic content while attenuating pixel-local detail required for exact text recovery. Encoder-free vision-language models (VLMs) remove this boundary by routing image patches directly into the language-model token stream, thereby exposing an architectural privacy attack surface: intermediate visual tokens become a pre-output side channel. Under a token-access adversary, decoders invert visual-token streams from two encoder-free VLMs, Gemma4 and Fuyu, recovering recognizable image structure and readable held-out access codes, whereas matched encoder-based controls localize target regions but recover no exact strings. Within-model ablations show that the operative factor is spatial sampling fidelity of the visual-token grid, especially character-direction sampling density, rather than token or value count. The leakage is not limited to exported tokens: Gemma4 layer-0 key-value cache tensors are directly invertible, placing the side channel within KV caches commonly persisted by production serving stacks for decoding efficiency. The attack survives clutter, realistic document degradation, and zero-shot transfer to public document images, and it resists value-level defenses such as additive noise and quantization. Effective mitigation must therefore reduce spatial sampling, making removal of the vision encoder a first-class privacy decision in VLM deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文发现无视觉编码器的视觉语言模型（VLMs）存在隐私漏洞：视觉令牌流可作为侧信道被解码器反演，恢复图像结构和文本内容，而带编码器的模型则能有效保护隐私。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉编码器通过压缩图像像素为语义嵌入，隐含地作为隐私边界。无视觉编码器的VLMs直接将图像块路由到语言模型的令牌流中，暴露了中间视觉令牌作为预输出侧信道，这可能带来严重的隐私风险。
AI.method: 研究采用令牌访问攻击者模型，对两个无视觉编码器的VLM（Gemma4和Fuyu）进行解码器反演攻击，将视觉令牌流恢复为可识别的图像结构。同时进行组内消融实验，分析空间采样保真度、字符方向采样密度等关键因素。还测试了KV缓存反演、抗干扰能力、零样本迁移等场景。
AI.result: 解码器成功从无视觉编码器的VLMs恢复出可识别的图像结构和可读的访问代码，而带编码器的对照组仅能定位目标区域但无法恢复确切字符串。关键因素是视觉令牌网格的空间采样保真度，特别是字符方向采样密度。攻击在杂波、现实文档退化、零样本迁移等条件下依然有效，且抵抗值级防御如加性噪声和量化。
AI.conclusion: 移除视觉编码器在VLM部署中应被视为一级隐私决策。有效的缓解措施必须减少空间采样，而不仅仅是值级防御。视觉编码器在保护隐私方面具有重要作用，其移除会显著增加隐私风险。

title: Can Causal Models Enhance Robot Navigation? Online Causal Adaptation for Real-Robot Navigation
comment: Accepted for publication at the 35th IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
summary: Causality in robotics aims to produce more interpretable and flexible robot behaviours by enabling robots to predict the consequences of their actions; however, deploying causal models with existing systems (e.g., navigation) operating in real environments remains understudied. This paper addresses the challenging problem of transferring causal models in real-robot experiments for a navigation scenario. We study this problem in two ways: (i) using the causal model as an offline evaluation module that predicts the competence of recorded real-robot navigation trajectories and relates it to quantitative navigation performance, and (ii) using the causal model as an online adaptation module that intervenes when the predicted competence of the default navigation is low. We validate our approach in a physical service robot that patrols around corridors. We show that the predicted competence correlates positively with path efficiency, and negatively with path irregularities (suboptimal behaviour). The model predictions also show strong agreement with human annotations (Cohen's kappa value of 0.88). In online experiments, the proposed method improves navigation performance in complex scenarios such as cornering and obstacle avoidance, yielding higher predicted competence and better navigation metrics than the default navigation baseline. In simpler scenarios, where the baseline already performs near-optimally, the causal adaptation provides limited benefit. These results indicate that causal models are particularly effective in enhancing navigation under increased task complexity. Overall, our results demonstrate that causal models developed for behavioural interpretation can be successfully integrated into real-robot navigation systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究将因果模型应用于真实机器人导航系统，通过离线评估和在线适应两种方式提升导航性能，特别是在复杂场景下效果显著。
AI.motivation: 虽然因果模型在机器人学中能产生更可解释和灵活的行为，但在真实环境中与现有系统（如导航系统）的集成应用研究不足。本研究旨在解决因果模型在真实机器人导航场景中的迁移应用挑战。
AI.method: 采用两种方式：1) 将因果模型作为离线评估模块，预测记录的真实机器人导航轨迹的能力，并将其与定量导航性能相关联；2) 将因果模型作为在线适应模块，在默认导航预测能力较低时进行干预。在物理服务机器人走廊巡逻场景中验证。
AI.result: 预测能力与路径效率正相关，与路径不规则性（次优行为）负相关。模型预测与人工标注高度一致（Cohen's kappa值为0.88）。在线实验中，在转弯和避障等复杂场景下，该方法比默认导航基线表现更好；在简单场景中，基线已接近最优，因果适应收益有限。
AI.conclusion: 因果模型在任务复杂度增加时特别有效，能够显著增强导航性能。研究证明为行为解释开发的因果模型可以成功集成到真实机器人导航系统中。

title: Trust-Region Diffusion Policies for Massively Parallel On-Policy RL
summary: Reinforcement learning with massively parallel simulations has become a standard framework for developing robust, deployable policies; however, most existing approaches still rely on simple Gaussian policy parameterizations. Diffusion models provide a more expressive policy class and have shown strong performance on challenging control problems, yet most diffusion-based RL methods are designed for offline or off-policy training. In this work, we ask whether diffusion policies can be trained effectively in the massively parallel, on-policy regime. To this end, we introduce Trust-region Diffusion Policies (TruDi), which enables diffusion policies for on-policy RL with massively parallel simulations. This setting is particularly challenging because the data distribution changes quickly across updates, making stable training with complex policies difficult. TruDi addresses this by integrating a trust-region optimization rule to enforce a KL-divergence constraint over the entire diffusion trajectory. Empirically, we evaluate TruDi on a diverse set of 4 massively parallel RL benchmarks comprising a total of 73 tasks. Across these tasks, TruDi consistently outperforms or is on-par with strong baselines on standard tasks and achieves clear gains on more challenging humanoid control tasks, establishing a strong new baseline for massively parallel on-policy RL.

AI.tldr: TruDi将扩散模型与大规模并行在线强化学习结合，通过信任域优化约束扩散轨迹的KL散度，在73个任务中表现优异，特别是在复杂人形控制任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 当前大规模并行强化学习框架主要使用简单的高斯策略参数化，而扩散模型虽然表达能力更强且已在离线/离线策略学习中表现优异，但尚未有效应用于大规模并行在线策略学习。本文旨在探索扩散策略能否在这一更具挑战性的在线学习环境中有效训练。
AI.method: 提出TruDi（信任域扩散策略），将扩散策略集成到大规模并行在线强化学习中。核心创新是通过信任域优化规则在整个扩散轨迹上施加KL散度约束，以应对在线学习数据分布快速变化带来的训练不稳定问题。
AI.result: 在4个大规模并行强化学习基准的73个任务上评估TruDi。结果显示，TruDi在标准任务上优于或与强基线相当，在更具挑战性的人形控制任务上取得明显优势，为大规模并行在线强化学习建立了新的强基线。
AI.conclusion: 扩散策略能够成功应用于大规模并行在线强化学习，TruDi通过信任域优化解决了复杂策略在快速变化数据分布下的训练稳定性问题，为强化学习中的策略表示提供了更强大的选择。

title: Vision-Encoder Behavioral Fingerprints of Image-to-Image Generative Models: A Training-Paradigm-Driven Taxonomy of Six Commercial APIs
summary: We study six production image-to-image AI systems (gpt-image-1, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image, Flux Kontext, SDXL img2img, SD3 img2img, and Qwen Image Edit) under a content-adaptive sub-JND adversarial perturbation pipeline, scoring all outputs by frozen DINOv2 ViT-B/14 token distances against clean references. Across a 3,588-call corpus spanning COCO photographs, CelebA-HQ portraits, and AI-generated inputs, the six systems partition into two image-invariant behavioral bands on a 2D (patch_mean, ssim_clean) plane: edit-trained models (Flux Kontext, Qwen Edit, Gemini) cluster in a tight band, while T2I-base models adapted at sampling time (SDXL, SD3, gpt-image-1) cluster in a drift band.

AI.tldr: 研究六种图像生成AI系统在内容自适应子JND对抗扰动下的行为，通过冻结DINOv2 ViT-B/14 token距离评估输出质量，发现系统分为编辑训练模型和T2I基础模型两个行为带
AI.motivation: 研究不同图像生成AI系统在对抗扰动下的鲁棒性和行为差异，理解编辑训练模型与基于文本到图像基础模型在采样时适应策略的差异
AI.method: 采用内容自适应子JND对抗扰动管道，对六种系统进行3588次调用测试，使用COCO照片、CelebA-HQ肖像和AI生成图像作为输入，通过冻结DINOv2 ViT-B/14 token距离与干净参考图像对比来评分
AI.result: 六种系统在2D（patch_mean, ssim_clean）平面上分为两个图像不变的行为带：编辑训练模型（Flux Kontext、Qwen Edit、Gemini）聚集在紧密带，而T2I基础采样时适应模型（SDXL、SD3、gpt-image-1）聚集在漂移带
AI.conclusion: 编辑训练模型在对抗扰动下表现更稳定和一致，而基于T2I基础模型在采样时适应的系统表现出更大的输出漂移，揭示了不同模型架构和训练策略对鲁棒性的影响

title: LaWAM: Latent World Action Models for Efficient Dynamics-Aware Robot Policies
summary: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) leverage large-scale vision-language pretraining for semantic robot control, but often lack explicit foresight into how robot actions change the scene. World-Action Models (WAMs) address this limitation by conditioning policies on predicted futures, yet existing approaches typically rely on computationally expensive video generation with substantial pixel-level redundancy. We present LaWAM, a Latent World Action Model that exposes predictive dynamics to robot policies through compact latent visual subgoals instead of reconstructed future video. At the core of LaWAM is a latent-action-conditioned Latent World Model (LaWM). We obtain LaWM by training a latent action model in the latent space of a pretrained vision foundation model and repurposing its forward decoder to predict future observation features for scene evolution. LaWAM then conditions action generation on these predicted latent visual subgoals to enable dynamics-aware robot control. LaWAM achieves state-of-the-art or competitive success rates (SRs) across LIBERO (98.6% SR), RoboTwin (91.22% SR), and real-world manipulation tasks while retaining low-latency inference. LaWAM runs in 187 ms per action-chunk prediction and achieves up to 24x lower wall-clock latency than pixel-space WAMs.

AI.tldr: LaWAM是一种潜在世界行动模型，通过紧凑的潜在视觉子目标而非重建的未来视频，将预测动态暴露给机器人策略，实现低延迟的语义机器人控制。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-行动模型缺乏对机器人行动如何改变场景的明确预见性，而世界行动模型通常依赖计算昂贵的视频生成，存在像素级冗余问题。
AI.method: 提出LaWAM模型，核心是潜在行动条件化的潜在世界模型（LaWM）。在预训练视觉基础模型的潜在空间中训练潜在行动模型，并重新利用其前向解码器预测未来观测特征，然后基于预测的潜在视觉子目标生成行动。
AI.result: 在LIBERO（98.6%成功率）、RoboTwin（91.22%成功率）和真实世界操作任务中达到最先进或竞争性性能，每个行动块预测仅需187毫秒，比像素空间WAMs降低高达24倍延迟。
AI.conclusion: LaWAM通过潜在视觉子目标有效实现了动态感知的机器人控制，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了计算延迟，为语义机器人控制提供了高效解决方案。

title: When to use what Schatten-$p$ norm in deep learning?
summary: Schatten-$\infty$ based optimizers such as Muon have shown promising empirical performance, but there remains seemingly conflicting observations regarding whether they are beneficial. We resolve this conflict by showing that the conclusion is regime dependent. Even when the objective is smooth in the Schatten-$\infty$ geometry, smaller Schatten-$p$ geometries can be optimal, specifically in the low-dimensional regime, which we show includes Chinchilla scaling. This conclusion follows from a new noise-robust acceleration result for the SODA framework for $p>2$. The same analysis explains why Muon-like methods do not require warmup, why they naturally favor large batches, and yields a batch size scaling rule for arbitrary $p$.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过分析Schatten-∞优化器（如Muon）的冲突观察，发现其性能取决于几何结构：在低维情况下，较小的Schatten-p几何更优，这包括Chinchilla缩放。研究通过SODA框架的新噪声鲁棒加速结果解释了Muon类方法不需要预热、偏好大批量训练的原因，并给出了任意p的批量大小缩放规则。
AI.motivation: Schatten-∞优化器（如Muon）在经验上表现出良好性能，但存在关于其是否真正有益的相互冲突的观察。本文旨在解决这一冲突，揭示其性能取决于具体应用场景。
AI.method: 通过分析不同Schatten-p几何结构下的优化性能，特别关注低维情况。提出了SODA框架在p>2时的噪声鲁棒加速结果，并以此解释Muon类方法的特性。
AI.result: 发现结论是场景依赖的：即使目标函数在Schatten-∞几何中是平滑的，在低维情况下（包括Chinchilla缩放）较小的Schatten-p几何可能更优。该分析解释了Muon类方法不需要预热、自然偏好大批量训练的原因，并推导出任意p的批量大小缩放规则。
AI.conclusion: Schatten-∞优化器的性能取决于具体应用场景，在低维情况下较小的Schatten-p几何结构可能更优。该研究为理解这类优化器的行为提供了理论框架，并给出了实用的批量大小缩放规则。

title: Efficient Reinforcement for Visual-Textual Thinking with Discrete Diffusion Model
summary: RL-based post-training has been widely adopted to enable interleaved visual and textual reasoning in unified multimodal models capable of both text and image generation. However, most existing approaches are built upon autoregressive (AR) unified models, which require full image regeneration during visual reasoning. In this work, we demonstrate that multimodal discrete diffusion models are effective alternatives to AR models for reinforcement learning in interleaved reasoning, owing to their ability to perform efficient visual rollouts via localized visual editing rather than full image-token regeneration. This reduces rollout computation during GRPO by 26.9\% compared to AR baselines, with minimal performance drop. Despite the improved efficiency, we find that joint reward assignment, which employs a shared reward signal across modalities, introduces cross-modal interference between unrelated image and text token sequences during RL updates. To address this issue, we propose factorized reward assignment, a strategy that assigns rewards independently to text and vision segments. With factorized reward assignment, our RL approach achieves an 11.2% improvement over joint reward assignment and a 38.04% improvement over the base model.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于多模态离散扩散模型的RL后训练方法，通过局部视觉编辑而非完整图像重生成来提升视觉推理效率，并引入因子化奖励分配策略来解决跨模态干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于自回归统一模型的RL后训练方法在视觉推理时需要完整重生成图像，计算成本高。多模态离散扩散模型能够通过局部视觉编辑实现更高效的视觉推理，但存在跨模态干扰问题。
AI.method: 1) 采用多模态离散扩散模型替代自回归模型进行RL训练，利用其局部视觉编辑能力减少计算开销；2) 提出因子化奖励分配策略，为文本和视觉片段独立分配奖励，避免跨模态干扰。
AI.result: 1) 相比自回归基线，GRPO中的rollout计算减少26.9%，性能下降极小；2) 因子化奖励分配相比联合奖励分配提升11.2%，相比基础模型提升38.04%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态离散扩散模型是自回归模型的有效替代方案，通过局部视觉编辑显著提升RL训练效率。因子化奖励分配策略有效解决了跨模态干扰问题，显著提升了模型性能。

title: FlashNav: Ultra-Fast Policy Training for Robot Navigation within 20 Seconds
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has shown strong potential for robot navigation, but its practical deployment is still limited by the long wall-clock cost of policy training. This paper presents FlashNav, a GPU-first framework for ultra-fast range-based robot navigation training. To the best of our knowledge, FlashNav is the first DRL-based robot navigation framework that reaches seconds-level policy training, with the fastest deployable policy trained in less than 20 seconds. The key idea is to align simulation with the navigation MDP: FlashNav preserves the essential components for velocity-level navigation, including occupancy geometry, range sensing, goal-conditioned control, robot motion dynamics, collision handling, termination, and reset, while removing unnecessary rendering and high-fidelity physical details from the training loop. Built on a batched bitmap simulator and a fully GPU-resident training pipeline with our FastDSAC learner, FlashNav generates massive parallel navigation transitions entirely on GPU. Experiments on TurtleBot2 and Unitree Go2 show that FlashNav achieves a 100\% success-rate below 20 seconds on an RTX 5090 and remains within tens of seconds across desktop GPUs. The learned policies further transfer to physical wheeled and legged robots in static and dynamic indoor scenes, demonstrating that DRL-based navigation can be trained at seconds-level speed while preserving deployable obstacle-avoidance behavior.

AI.tldr: FlashNav：首个实现秒级训练的基于深度强化学习的机器人导航框架，通过GPU优先设计和简化仿真，在RTX 5090上20秒内完成训练，并在真实轮式和足式机器人上成功部署。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度强化学习的机器人导航面临训练时间过长的问题，限制了实际部署。现有方法通常需要数小时甚至数天的训练时间，这阻碍了DRL在机器人导航中的广泛应用。
AI.method: FlashNav采用GPU优先设计，通过简化仿真系统，仅保留速度级导航所需的核心组件（占用几何、距离感知、目标条件控制、机器人运动动力学、碰撞处理等），去除渲染和高保真物理细节。基于批处理位图模拟器和完全GPU驻留的训练流水线，配合FastDSAC学习器，在GPU上生成大规模并行导航转换。
AI.result: 在TurtleBot2和Unitree Go2上的实验表明，FlashNav在RTX 5090上20秒内达到100%成功率，在桌面GPU上保持在数十秒内完成训练。学习到的策略能够成功迁移到真实轮式和足式机器人，在静态和动态室内场景中表现出可部署的避障行为。
AI.conclusion: FlashNav证明了基于深度强化学习的机器人导航可以在秒级速度下完成训练，同时保持可部署的避障能力，为DRL在机器人导航中的实际应用开辟了新途径。

title: RECTOR: Masked Region-Channel-Temporal Modeling for Affective and Cognitive Representation Learning
summary: Affective and cognitive disorders manifest as distributed, time-varying brain network dynamics across regions, channels, and time, challenging robust representation learning from EEG/sEEG for clinical diagnosis. We propose RECTOR (Masked Region-Channel-Temporal Modeling), an end-to-end self-supervised framework that unifies joint region-channel-temporal representation learning beyond fixed anatomical priors. At its core, RECTOR-SA is a hierarchical, block-sparse self-attention induced by Adaptive Functional Partitioning that evolves region structures from static anatomical definitions to adaptive functional regions. The self-supervision is driven by Masked Topology and Representation Learning, which jointly optimizes three complementary objectives: Masked Predictive Modeling, Topological Structure Modeling, and Cross-View Consistency. Across diverse benchmarks, RECTOR sets a new state-of-the-art in EEG emotion recognition and sEEG task-engagement classification. Crucially, its strong robustness to missing channels and cross-montage generalization underscores its potential for large-scale pre-training on heterogeneous EEG/sEEG, providing interpretable insights at both region and channel levels.

AI.tldr: RECTOR是一个端到端自监督框架，通过掩码区域-通道-时间建模统一学习脑电信号中的联合表示，在情感识别和任务参与分类中达到SOTA，对缺失通道和跨导联泛化具有强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 情感和认知障碍表现为跨区域、通道和时间的分布式、时变脑网络动态，这给从EEG/sEEG中学习稳健表示用于临床诊断带来了挑战。现有方法受限于固定的解剖先验，难以捕捉动态功能区域。
AI.method: 提出RECTOR框架，核心是RECTOR-SA：基于自适应功能分区的分层块稀疏自注意力，将区域结构从静态解剖定义演化为自适应功能区域。自监督通过掩码拓扑和表示学习联合优化三个互补目标：掩码预测建模、拓扑结构建模和跨视图一致性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，RECTOR在EEG情感识别和sEEG任务参与分类中达到了新的最先进水平。对通道缺失和跨导联泛化表现出强鲁棒性，为大规模异构EEG/sEEG预训练提供了潜力。
AI.conclusion: RECTOR为脑电信号表示学习提供了统一的自监督框架，超越了固定解剖先验的限制，在区域和通道层面都提供了可解释的洞察，有望推动临床脑电分析的发展。

title: Position: The Systemic Lack of Agency in Visual Reasoning
summary: This paper argues that a systemic lack of Agency constrains the implicit reasoning capabilities of current Vision-Language Models (VLMs). Implicit reasoning refers to the ability to autonomously discover and utilize hidden visual evidence to bridge information gaps, rather than merely relying on explicitly specified targets. This capacity underlies human visual understanding and everyday reasoning. We argue that this limitation arises from a tendency to approach visual reasoning primarily as passive semantic retrieval, rather than as active, situated reasoning that depends on autonomous visual exploration. As a result, most existing benchmarks primarily assess Passive Capacity, leaving this aspect of reasoning largely unmeasured. To address this gap, we introduce the Visual Implicit Reasoning Diagnosing Benchmark (V-IRD), which targets this missing quadrant by requiring models to derive answers strictly through autonomous visual analysis. Our results show that, despite strong retrieval abilities, prominent VLMs struggle to utilize reference objects and to attend to visual evidence that requires self-directed inquiry. Simply put, strong semantic recognition does not equate to active visual exploration, revealing a critical gap in current VLMs. More information can be found at https://haoychen.github.io/Implicit-Reasoning/

AI.tldr: 该论文指出当前视觉语言模型因缺乏自主性而限制了其隐式推理能力，并提出了V-IRD基准来诊断这一缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型主要将视觉推理视为被动的语义检索，而非主动的情境推理，导致模型缺乏自主发现和利用隐藏视觉证据的隐式推理能力，而这是人类视觉理解的核心。
AI.method: 提出视觉隐式推理诊断基准(V-IRD)，要求模型必须通过自主视觉分析来推导答案，而非依赖明确指定的目标，以此来评估模型的主动探索能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，尽管现有VLMs具有很强的检索能力，但在使用参考对象和关注需要自主探究的视觉证据方面表现不佳，显示强大的语义识别不等于主动视觉探索。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs在隐式推理能力上存在关键缺陷，需要从被动语义检索转向主动情境推理，V-IRD基准为诊断这一缺陷提供了有效工具。

title: LoComposition: Terrain-Adaptive Energy-Efficient Quadruped Locomotion without Gait Priors
summary: Learning-based quadrupedal locomotion typically relies on complex reward formulations that entangle task specification, operational limits, gait preference, and terrain adaptation within a single optimization objective. We instead treat these functions through distinct mechanisms: rewards for task specification, constraints for operational limits, energy minimization for gait preference, and exteroceptive perception for adapting energy use to terrain difficulty. We show that these components jointly enable efficient, terrain-adaptive locomotion, and that removing each component exposes a distinct failure mode. Our formulation removes explicit gait priors (including air-time, contact-count, and foot-clearance targets) in favor of emergent behavior. Compared to a conventional complex-reward baseline, our formulation achieves comparable terrain traversal while reducing cost of transport by 56% and operational-limit violations by 96%. The resulting policies transfer zero-shot to a physical Unitree Go2 using LiDAR-based elevation mapping. Project website with videos: https://tinyurl.com/locomposition.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的四足机器人学习方法，将传统复杂的奖励函数分解为四个独立机制：任务奖励、操作约束、能量最小化和地形感知，实现了更高效、自适应地形的运动控制。
AI.motivation: 传统基于学习的四足运动控制通常依赖复杂的奖励函数，将任务规范、操作限制、步态偏好和地形适应等多个目标纠缠在一起。这种设计不够清晰，可能影响学习效率和性能。
AI.method: 采用分解式方法：1) 奖励只用于任务规范；2) 约束用于操作限制；3) 能量最小化用于步态偏好；4) 外感受感知用于根据地形难度调整能量使用。该方法移除了显式的步态先验（如空中时间、接触次数、足部抬高等目标），让行为自然涌现。
AI.result: 与传统复杂奖励基线相比：1) 实现相当的地形穿越能力；2) 运输成本降低56%；3) 操作限制违规减少96%。该方法还成功零样本迁移到物理Unitree Go2机器人，使用基于LiDAR的高程地图。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解奖励函数为四个独立机制，能够实现更高效、自适应地形的四足运动控制，每个组件都对应特定的功能，移除任一组件都会导致特定的失败模式。该方法为机器人学习提供了更清晰、模块化的框架。

title: Rethinking Structural Anomaly Detection: From Decision Boundaries to Projection Operators
summary: Most existing anomaly detection methods rely on estimating a probability density or learning an enclosing decision boundary, implicitly assuming that normal data occupies a region of non-zero volume in the ambient space. In contrast, structural anomaly detection considers data that lies near a low-dimensional manifold, creating a mismatch between the inductive bias of existing methods and the structure of the data, often resulting in degraded performance. To address this mismatch, we introduce a geometric perspective. Specifically, we learn a projection operator onto the manifold of normal samples and define a sample as anomalous if it is altered by this projection. This formulation naturally integrates the inductive bias of manifold-supported data and reframes anomaly detection in terms of a projection residual, thereby resolving issues arising from modeling degenerate distributions. Notably, it provides a unifying interpretation of reconstruction-based methods by explaining their success and failure in terms of projection quality. In particular, it explains the strong generalization ability of projection-aligned models as a consequence of contraction behavior toward the manifold. Moreover, by decoupling anomaly detection from probabilistic modeling, it reduces the tendency to misclassify rare but normal samples, a widely recognized limitation of existing approaches. Empirically, we demonstrate that projection-aligned methods achieve strong performance, outperforming boundary-based methods while improving upon existing reconstruction-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于几何投影的异常检测方法，通过将数据投影到正常样本流形上，利用投影残差来定义异常，解决了传统方法在流形结构数据上的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法通常假设正常数据在环境空间中占据非零体积区域，但实际数据往往位于低维流形附近，这种不匹配导致方法性能下降。需要一种能够适应流形结构数据的方法。
AI.method: 提出几何投影方法：学习一个投影算子将数据投影到正常样本流形上，通过计算投影残差来定义异常。如果样本被投影显著改变，则判定为异常。这种方法将异常检测与概率建模解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明，投影对齐方法在异常检测任务中表现优异，优于基于边界的方法，并改进了现有的基于重构的方法。该方法能有效避免将稀有但正常的样本误分类为异常。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何投影的方法为异常检测提供了统一的理论框架，解释了基于重构方法的成功与失败原因，并展示了投影对齐模型由于向流形收缩而具有的强泛化能力。

title: HSQ-VLM: A Novel Spatially-Constrained Quadrant Segmentation VLM Model for Explainability in Diabetic Retinopathy
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is an aggressive retinal disease and a leading cause of global blindness, yet its clinical management is currently hindered by the black-box nature of diagnostic AI. While deep learning models achieve high classification accuracy, there is a critical lack of explainability methods capable of detailing the exact anatomical landmarks and lesion distributions that lead to a clinical decision for DR. Therefore, we propose HSQ-VLM, a novel quadrant segmentation pipeline on fundus images that utilizes a Landmark-Anchored Cartesian Cross-Attention mechanism to unify visual feature extraction with structured clinical reasoning. Unlike traditional methods that rely on arbitrary image partitioning, our pipeline implements 4-quadrant Topological Latent Partitioning (TLP) to dynamically align retinal features with a fovea-centered coordinate system. This allows the Vision-Language Model to generate natural language reports that quantify pathology with anatomical precision. On a dataset of 3,500 high-resolution fundus images, this innovative methodology achieved a lesion detection sensitivity of 99.6% for hemorrhages and 96.4% for microaneurysms, while demonstrating a significant reduction in boundary-ambiguity errors compared to standard segmentation baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出HSQ-VLM方法，通过四象限分割和视觉语言模型生成解剖学精确的糖尿病视网膜病变诊断报告，显著提高病变检测敏感度并减少边界模糊错误。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是导致全球失明的主要原因，但当前AI诊断方法缺乏可解释性，无法提供导致临床决策的具体解剖标志和病变分布信息。
AI.method: 提出HSQ-VLM四象限分割管道，采用地标锚定笛卡尔交叉注意力机制，结合拓扑潜在分区技术，将视网膜特征与以中央窝为中心的坐标系动态对齐。
AI.result: 在3,500张高分辨率眼底图像数据集上，出血检测灵敏度达99.6%，微动脉瘤检测灵敏度达96.4%，相比标准分割基线显著减少边界模糊错误。
AI.conclusion: HSQ-VLM通过解剖学精确的视觉语言模型报告，为糖尿病视网膜病变诊断提供了可解释的AI解决方案，有望改善临床管理。

title: VL2Spike: Spike-driven Distillation from VLMs for Low-Power Visual Perception in Embodied AI
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are brain-inspired, event-driven models that compute with sparse spikes, which enables highly efficient visual perception in resource-constrained embodied AI models. The emergence of Spiking-Transformer models with spike self-attention has substantially improved the learning capacity of pure SNNs. Although SNNs are energy efficient, their performance is still limited by the spike-based architecture and optimization challenges, as standard gradient descent rules cannot be directly applied. Recently, vision-language models (VLMs) have shown rich multi-modal knowledge representation capabilities for visual perception. Thus, it is promising to leverage VLMs for better Spikformer training. To this end, we present VL2Spike, a novel spike-based knowledge distillation (KD) framework that bridges multi-modal knowledge from VLMs with compact Spikformer models. This design enhances the learning capacity of Spikformer models while preserving their energy-efficiency merits, thereby offering a practical pathway toward low-power robotic perception. Our VL2Spike brings two key technical contributions. To align with spiking dynamics, we first propose spatial-temporal visual spike (SVS) distillation, which achieves (1) shared manifold alignment between VLM image features and spike tokens, and (2) warm-started temporal consistency on membrane potentials and spike rates. We then design a novel spike prototype-guided linguistic (SPL) distillation strategy that aligns Spikformer's class prototypes and logits with promptable VLM text embeddings. Extensive experiments show that VL2Spike achieves 6.81% gain across three static datasets with only 15.7% energy consumption. It also exhibits strong generalization capacity on robotic visual place recognition (VPR) with a gain of 6.63%, highlighting its potential for low-power perception in embodied AI.

AI.tldr: VL2Spike：一种新颖的脉冲知识蒸馏框架，通过将视觉语言模型的多模态知识迁移到脉冲Transformer模型中，在保持能量效率的同时显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNNs）虽然具有能量效率优势，但其性能受限于脉冲架构和优化挑战。视觉语言模型（VLMs）展现出丰富的多模态知识表示能力，因此利用VLMs来提升Spikformer模型的训练效果具有很大潜力。
AI.method: 提出VL2Spike框架，包含两个关键技术贡献：1）时空视觉脉冲（SVS）蒸馏，实现VLM图像特征与脉冲令牌的共享流形对齐，以及对膜电位和脉冲率的预热时间一致性；2）脉冲原型引导的语言（SPL）蒸馏策略，将Spikformer的类别原型和logits与可提示的VLM文本嵌入对齐。
AI.result: 在三个静态数据集上实现6.81%的性能提升，同时仅消耗15.7%的能量。在机器人视觉位置识别（VPR）任务上表现出强大的泛化能力，获得6.63%的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: VL2Spike通过知识蒸馏有效结合了VLMs的多模态知识表示能力和Spikformer的能量效率优势，为低功耗机器人感知提供了实用途径。

title: Hybrid NARX-LLM for Greenland Iceberg Discharge: Prompt-Driven Residual Correction
summary: Greenland iceberg discharge exhibits complex nonlinear dynamics with limited observability, challenging traditional predictive models. We present a Hybrid NARX-LLM framework that combines a nonlinear autoregressive model with exogenous inputs (NARX) and a large language model (LLM) for residual correction. We further propose a Physics-Informed Prompt (PIP) method that transforms unstructured physical knowledge into structured prompts for zero-shot in-context reasoning. The primary objective is to explore the corrective potential of this framework for modeling Greenland iceberg discharge, rather than merely optimizing predictive accuracy. The NARX component captures intrinsic temporal dependencies, while the LLM, guided by PIP, encodes glacier dynamics and environmental drivers and perceives key trend patterns to correct systematic prediction errors. This integration allows the model to reason about unmodeled factors and produce interpretable residuals, enhancing overall predictive accuracy. Applied to Greenland iceberg discharge time series, our approach addresses extreme events that are difficult to predict due to rare variations and nonstationary trends, a limitation often overlooked by traditional methods. By fusing structured time-series modeling with knowledge-driven foundation AI, the framework offers a scalable and interpretable pathway to bridge data-limited climate forecasting with physics-informed LLM reasoning. The code is available.

AI.tldr: 提出Hybrid NARX-LLM框架，结合非线性自回归外生模型和大语言模型，通过物理信息提示方法改进格陵兰冰山排放预测，重点在于误差修正而非单纯精度优化。
AI.motivation: 格陵兰冰山排放具有复杂的非线性动力学特性，传统预测模型观测能力有限，难以准确预测极端事件和罕见变化，需要融合物理知识和数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid NARX-LLM框架：NARX组件捕捉时间依赖性，LLM组件通过物理信息提示方法编码冰川动力学和环境驱动因素，进行零样本上下文推理以修正系统预测误差。
AI.result: 该框架能够处理传统方法常忽视的极端事件和罕见变化，提高预测准确性，产生可解释的残差，为数据有限的气候预测提供了可扩展的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合结构化时间序列建模和知识驱动的基础AI，该框架为连接数据有限的气候预测与物理信息LLM推理提供了可扩展且可解释的途径。

title: S23DR 2026: End-to-End 3D Wireframe Prediction via DETR-Style Set Prediction with Contrastive Denoising
summary: We present WireframeDETR, our submission to the Structured Semantic 3D Reconstruction (S23DR) 2026 Challenge, which requires predicting a 3D building wireframe from multi-view COLMAP point clouds. Our method applies DETR-style set prediction directly to 3D point clouds, producing wireframes as sets of edge coordinate pairs without any intermediate vertex detection stage. We introduce three technical contributions: (1) contrastive denoising training that stabilises noisy Hungarian matching in early epochs; (2) a multi-scale encoder that aggregates the last encoder layer outputs via learned scalar weights; and (3) progressive auxiliary loss weighting that concentrates gradient signal on the decoder layers that most benefit from it. Our model achieves a public test HSS of 0.575 (F1~=~0.664, IoU~=~0.516) and a best validation HSS of 0.534 on the cleaned val split.

AI.tldr: WireframeDETR：一种基于DETR风格集合预测的3D建筑线框重建方法，直接处理多视角点云，无需中间顶点检测阶段。
AI.motivation: 针对S23DR 2026挑战中从多视角COLMAP点云预测3D建筑线框的任务，需要直接处理点云并输出边缘坐标对，避免传统方法中复杂的中间检测阶段。
AI.method: 采用DETR式集合预测框架，直接将点云作为输入，输出边缘坐标对集合。引入三项关键技术：对比去噪训练稳定早期匈牙利匹配、多尺度编码器聚合最后编码层输出、渐进辅助损失权重聚焦梯度信号。
AI.result: 在公开测试集上获得HSS 0.575（F1~0.664，IoU~0.516），在验证集上获得最佳HSS 0.534。
AI.conclusion: WireframeDETR成功将DETR式集合预测应用于3D点云线框重建，通过三项创新技术提升了性能，为3D建筑重建提供了端到端的解决方案。

title: GeoTLM: Geometry-aware Tactile-Language Models for Contact Motion Orientation Reasoning of Dynamic Objects
summary: Modern tactile-language models (TLMs) have shown potential for robot learning tasks, such as material and texture recognition. However, for contact-rich scenarios, these TLMs struggle to understand the physical properties of dynamic objects, such as rotation and sliding directions. For instance, our preliminary experiments reveal that popular TLMs, such as Sparsh and AnyTouch2, exhibit weak performance on basic rotation direction reasoning from GelSight Mini tactile data. This surprising gap inspires us to explore a novel research question: Can we inject physically grounded geometric priors into TLMs to enable reliable contact orientation reasoning of dynamic object properties? To this end, we propose GeoTLM, a novel geometric representation-guided TLM for the perception of dynamic contact events. Our key idea is to preserve and structure tactile shear-field geometry before language-level reasoning, rather than forcing low-resolution tactile tokens into fragile closed-form physics operators. To achieve this, we propose a lightweight (only 14k parameters) yet novel Differentiable Geometric Representation (DGR). Specifically, DGR learns a contact-mask-guided representation in the shear field and aggregates it through an antisymmetric seven-region pooling design, motivated by the physical intuition that rotational contact produces antisymmetric deformation patterns. We conduct experiments on two representative tasks: rotation direction and sliding direction reasoning. Extensive experiments show that GeoTLM improves novel-object rotation accuracy by +14.6% and real-sensor sliding accuracy by +16.2% over the same backbone without the geometric encoder. Overall, our work paves a new way for physically grounded tactile-language reasoning, with strong potential for dynamic object understanding and contact-rich robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: GeoTLM是一个结合几何先验的触觉语言模型，通过轻量级可微分几何表示（DGR）提升动态物体接触属性（如旋转方向、滑动方向）的感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉语言模型在接触丰富的场景中难以理解动态物体的物理属性（如旋转和滑动方向），需要注入物理基础的几何先验来提升接触方向推理的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出GeoTLM模型，包含轻量级可微分几何表示（DGR），该表示学习剪切场的接触掩码引导表示，并通过反对称七区域池化设计进行聚合，以捕捉旋转接触产生的反对称变形模式。
AI.result: GeoTLM在旋转方向推理任务中提升新物体识别准确率+14.6%，在真实传感器滑动方向推理中提升准确率+16.2%，相比无几何编码器的相同骨干网络有显著改进。
AI.conclusion: GeoTLM为物理基础的触觉语言推理开辟了新途径，在动态物体理解和接触丰富的机器人操作方面具有强大潜力。

title: Discovering Lattice Reduction Strategies via Self-Play
summary: The Lenstra-Lenstra-Lovász (LLL) algorithm is a seminal contribution to computer science used for lattice basis reduction, yet its polynomial-time outputs produce bases that are far from optimal as the dimension grows. We show that deep reinforcement learning can discover strictly superior, generalizable reduction strategies by interacting with the primitive action space of LLL. We formulate lattice reduction as a single-player Markov Decision Process (MDP) and train a deep residual network using an AlphaZero-style self-play pipeline augmented with adaptive-horizon MCTS (Monte Carlo Tree Search), which couples multi-step network predictions with an entropy-gated expansion mechanism. The resulting policy, DeltaStar, is trained exclusively on small $8$-dimensional $q$-ary lattices and requires fewer primitive row operations than LLL. Crucially, it generalizes zero-shot to unseen moduli and higher dimensions up to $n=32$ without retraining.

AI.tldr: 使用深度强化学习训练出的DeltaStar策略在格基约化任务上表现优于经典LLL算法，能实现零样本泛化到更高维度和未见过的模数。
AI.motivation: 经典的LLL算法虽然是格基约化的开创性贡献，但随着维度增加，其输出结果远非最优。作者希望探索深度强化学习能否发现更优的、可泛化的约化策略。
AI.method: 将格基约化建模为单人马尔可夫决策过程，使用AlphaZero风格的自博弈流程训练深度残差网络，结合自适应视界的蒙特卡洛树搜索，通过熵门控扩展机制耦合多步网络预测。
AI.result: 训练出的DeltaStar策略在8维q-ary格上训练，比LLL需要更少的原始行操作，且能零样本泛化到未见过的模数和高达32维的更高维度。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习能够发现超越经典LLL算法的格基约化策略，这些策略具有优异的泛化能力，为格基约化问题提供了新的解决方案。

title: Multi-HMR 2: Multi-Person Camera-Centric Human Detection, Mesh Recovery and Tracking
summary: Most advances in human mesh recovery (HMR) have focused on pelvis-centered recovery, overlooking metric 3D localization and detection accuracy in the camera coordinate system - two key factors for real-world applications such as human-robot interaction and social scene understanding. Current evaluation protocols often ignore these aspects, emphasizing per-person, root-centered recovery rather than camera-space perception. As a result, existing approaches rely on fixed camera assumptions or handcrafted post-processing, limiting their robustness and practical deployment. We introduce Multi-HMR 2, a simple yet robust DETR-based framework for Multi-person Camera-centric Human detection, mesh Recovery, and tracking. Multi-HMR 2 predicts a scene-consistent camera together with human meshes, enabling metric 3D localization without ground-truth intrinsics. Moreover, by distilling image-based memory features from SAM2, Multi-HMR 2 extends to tracking, achieving consistent identity association without video supervision. Despite its conceptual simplicity - no handcrafted components, no video input, and no ground-truth cameras - Multi-HMR 2 achieves state-of-the-art pelvis-centered performance while substantially improving detection accuracy and metric 3D localization.

AI.tldr: Multi-HMR 2是一个基于DETR的多人物相机中心化人体检测、网格重建和追踪框架，通过预测场景一致的相机参数和人体网格，实现了无真实相机内参的度量3D定位，并在骨盆中心化重建性能上达到SOTA的同时显著提升了检测精度和3D定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的人体网格重建方法大多关注骨盆中心化重建，忽略了相机坐标系下的度量3D定位和检测精度这两个实际应用（如人机交互、社交场景理解）中的关键因素。当前评估协议也往往忽视这些方面，导致现有方法依赖固定相机假设或手工后处理，限制了其鲁棒性和实际部署能力。
AI.method: 提出了Multi-HMR 2框架：1) 基于DETR架构，同时预测场景一致的相机参数和人体网格；2) 从SAM2中蒸馏图像记忆特征，实现无视频监督的连续身份关联追踪；3) 无需手工组件、视频输入或真实相机参数。
AI.result: 在骨盆中心化重建性能上达到最先进水平，同时显著提高了检测精度和度量3D定位能力，实现了无真实相机内参的准确3D定位和一致的身份追踪。
AI.conclusion: Multi-HMR 2通过简单而鲁棒的框架解决了现有方法在相机中心化感知方面的不足，为实际应用场景提供了更准确和实用的多人物3D重建和追踪解决方案。

title: Identification of a Physics-Based Electrical Power Consumption Model for the Unitree G1 Humanoid Arm
summary: Accurate prediction of electrical power consumption is essential for energy-aware motion planning, battery management, and thermal monitoring in battery-powered humanoid robots. This letter presents a physics-based, linear-in-parameters model for the electrical power consumption of the seven-degree-of-freedom left arm of the Unitree~G1 humanoid robot. The proposed formulation combines actuator loss terms with a baseline-torque correction that captures changes in gravity-compensation load and enables accurate prediction of negative net power trajectories. Pairwise interaction terms are introduced to model power coupling during simultaneous multi-joint motion. Model parameters are identified from experimental data collected on a physical Unitree~G1 using onboard power measurements as the regression target. Across 897 trajectories covering single-joint and coordinated arm motions at multiple speed levels, the identified model achieves $R^2 = 0.933$ with an RMSE of 1.07 (W). Validation on 46 trajectories executed at previously unseen speeds yields $R^2 = 0.965$, demonstrating strong generalisation beyond the identification dataset. Analysis of the identified parameters reveals distinct power-consumption characteristics across the arm, with viscous friction dominating most joints (shoulder pitch and all three wrist joints), copper losses dominating shoulder yaw and the elbow, and shoulder roll uniquely dominated by Coulomb friction.

AI.tldr: 提出基于物理的线性参数模型，用于预测Unitree G1人形机器人七自由度左臂的电力消耗，结合执行器损耗项和基线扭矩修正，引入交互项建模多关节协同运动，实现高精度预测。
AI.motivation: 准确预测电力消耗对电池供电人形机器人的能量感知运动规划、电池管理和热监控至关重要，现有模型在预测负净功率轨迹和多关节协同运动方面存在不足。
AI.method: 建立基于物理的线性参数模型，结合执行器损耗项和基线扭矩修正捕捉重力补偿负载变化，引入成对交互项建模多关节协同运动时的功率耦合，利用物理Unitree G1的实测数据进行参数辨识。
AI.result: 在897条单关节和协调臂运动轨迹上，模型达到R²=0.933，RMSE=1.07W；在46条未见过速度的验证轨迹上达到R²=0.965，展示强泛化能力；参数分析揭示各关节不同的功耗特性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的物理模型能准确预测人形机器人手臂的电力消耗，具有强泛化能力，为能量感知运动规划和电池管理提供可靠工具，参数分析为机器人设计优化提供见解。

title: LatentGym: A Testbed For Cross-Task Experiential Learning With Controllable Latent Structure
summary: We envision continually learning agentic systems that become more useful over time: as they encounter sequences of related tasks, they should infer the hidden structure shared across those tasks and use it to improve future decisions. This cross-task experiential learning capability is pivotal in domains such as personalization and interactive assistance, but existing training/evaluation frameworks do not provide shared, controllable latent structures and cannot measure whether or why agents improve. We introduce LatentGym: a controllable suite in which each environment is organized around a ground-truth latent variable governing the structure across tasks. Our construction yields metrics that separate exploration (whether the agent's actions gather information about the latent) from exploitation (whether the agent uses what it has gathered). We demonstrate our suite on empirical studies addressing three questions: how and why frontier models fail to adapt across related tasks; whether post-training on related task sequences improves general cross-task adaptation, and where those gains come from; and how design choices such as inter-task feedback shape training dynamics and generalization. Together, these results establish a controlled foundation for studying how LLM agents learn from experience across tasks, and for designing agents that adapt more reliably in sequential, personalized, and interactive settings.

AI.tldr: LatentGym：一个可控的评估套件，用于研究LLM智能体在相关任务序列中如何学习和适应，通过分离探索与利用来量化跨任务学习能力。
AI.motivation: 当前训练/评估框架缺乏共享可控的潜在结构，无法衡量智能体在相关任务序列中是否以及为何改进。需要研究持续学习智能体系统如何从跨任务经验中学习隐藏结构。
AI.method: 提出LatentGym套件，其中每个环境围绕一个控制任务间结构的真实潜在变量组织。构建能分离探索（收集潜在信息）与利用（使用收集信息）的评估指标。
AI.result: 通过实证研究回答三个问题：前沿模型为何在相关任务间适应失败；在相关任务序列上进行后训练是否能改善跨任务适应能力；设计选择（如任务间反馈）如何影响训练动态和泛化。
AI.conclusion: LatentGym为研究LLM智能体如何从跨任务经验中学习提供了可控基础，有助于设计在序列化、个性化和交互式环境中更可靠适应的智能体系统。

title: An Ensemble Deep Learning Approach for Reliable and Scalable Lemon Leaf Disease Classification
comment: 5 pages, 12 figures, 3 Tables, Presented at 18th IEEE International Conference on Computational Intelligence and Communication Networks (CICN) 2026
summary: Early detection of plant diseases is crucial to plants and for the farmers. Plant diseases reduce fruit yield and quality, and plants are more susceptible to other stresses when they are infected. The lemon leaf disease dataset contains 1354 images. The dataset has 9 classes. Among the 9 classes only one class is for healthy leaf, and the other 8 classes are leaf diseases. The dataset was split into training (70%), testing (15%) and validation (15%) sets after comprehensive preprocessing. Two pretrained models (InceptionV3 and MobileNetV2) were applied and then combined these models using an ensemble technique to boost robustness. Ensemble models showed a promising performance of 99.27% accuracy. Adversarial Training is applied to improve models' ability and ensure reliable predictions under noisy data. Grad-CAM visualization highlights the important regions of leaf images that validate the model prediction with confidence level.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于集成学习和对抗训练的深度学习方法来检测柠檬叶病害，实现了99.27%的高准确率，并通过Grad-CAM可视化验证模型预测的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 早期检测植物病害对作物产量和质量至关重要，受感染植物更易受其他胁迫影响。柠檬叶病害数据集包含9类（1类健康叶，8类病害叶），需要高效准确的检测方法。
AI.method: 使用1354张图像的数据集，按70%/15%/15%划分训练/验证/测试集。采用两种预训练模型（InceptionV3和MobileNetV2），通过集成技术结合提升鲁棒性。应用对抗训练增强模型在噪声数据下的可靠性，使用Grad-CAM可视化关键区域。
AI.result: 集成模型实现了99.27%的高准确率。对抗训练提高了模型在噪声环境下的预测可靠性，Grad-CAM可视化有效验证了模型预测的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成学习方法在柠檬叶病害检测中表现出优异性能，对抗训练增强了模型鲁棒性，Grad-CAM提供了可解释性验证，为植物病害早期检测提供了有效解决方案。

title: Energy-Efficient Arm Reaching for a Humanoid Robot via Deep Reinforcement Learning with Identified Power Models
summary: Humanoid robots performing in-field manipulation tasks, such as robotic apple harvesting, face severe energy constraints that directly limit the number of reaching motions that can be executed per battery charge. This paper presents an end-to-end, energy-aware reinforcement learning framework for the 7-degree-of-freedom left arm of the Unitree~G1 humanoid robot, combining a physics-based, experimentally identified electrical power model with a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) policy trained in a Pinocchio-based rigid-body dynamics simulator. The RL policy operates on an incremental joint-position action space and is trained with a Hybrid Constellation Reward that combines a four-point end-effector constellation distance with a torque-norm energy proxy; after % $5\times10^6$ training it reaches a $69.9\%$ success rate over $1\,000$ random targets in kinematic simulation, at a mean energy of \SI{98.16}{\joule} on successful episodes. Finally, on the physical Unitree~G1, the policy is validated over three independent 10-target batches, achieving a mean energy of $71.5 \pm 48.3$\,J, an end-effector position error of $2.64 \pm 1.04$\,cm, and an orientation error of $6.92 \pm 1.33^\circ$ -- within the \SI{4}{\centi\metre}/$8.6^\circ$ training tolerance. These results constitute a first step toward energy-aware reinforcement-learning-based arm reaching for humanoid robots.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于人形机器人（Unitree G1）臂部控制的端到端能量感知强化学习框架，结合物理功率模型和SAC策略，在仿真中达到69.9%成功率，并在真实机器人上验证了能量效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在执行野外操作任务（如苹果采摘）时面临严重的能量约束，这直接限制了每次充电可执行的伸展动作数量。需要开发能量感知的控制方法以延长机器人工作时间。
AI.method: 采用端到端能量感知强化学习框架，结合实验识别的电气功率物理模型和基于Pinocchio刚体动力学仿真的Soft Actor-Critic策略。策略在增量关节位置动作空间上训练，使用混合星座奖励函数，结合四末端执行器星座距离和扭矩范数能量代理。
AI.result: 在仿真中经过500万次训练后，对1000个随机目标达到69.9%成功率，平均能量消耗98.16焦耳。在真实Unitree G1机器人上，三个独立10目标批次验证显示：平均能量71.5±48.3焦耳，末端执行器位置误差2.64±1.04厘米，方向误差6.92±1.33度，均在训练容差范围内。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为人形机器人能量感知强化学习臂部伸展控制迈出了第一步，展示了在真实机器人上实现能量效率和运动精度的可行性。

title: LLMs on Tabular Data with Limited Semantics: Evidence from Industrial Car Retrofit Prediction
summary: Industrial retrofit planning depends on structured operational data rather than free text: planners must estimate whether a newly registered prototype will require a retrofit, which retrofit package it will need, and how long the work will take. We study an industrial dataset linking a prototype-registration system (284,271 vehicles) with a retrofit-management system (48,716 cleaned visits), and compare strong tabular machine learning baselines with three LLM-based strategies on row-serialized inputs: embedding features (Amazon Titan), direct prompted classification (Claude Sonnet 4), and an ML+LLM stacking approach. Across binary occurrence prediction, 15-way retrofit-type classification, per-visit duration regression, and an aggregated monthly benchmark, classical tree ensembles remain the strongest standalone models. However, the LLM results reveal a consistent pattern: embeddings remain useful on tables (binary AUC = 0.982), direct prompting collapses once semantic signal is stripped by hashing (binary AUC = 0.500; multiclass weighted F1 = 0.018), and hybrid stacking yields the best manually built multiclass model (weighted F1 = 0.626). On the monthly benchmark, lag-based machine learning outperforms time-series foundation models, though Chronos-small remains competitive in zero-shot forecasting. The results suggest that on privacy-constrained industrial tables, LLMs are more effective as complementary components than as replacements for strong tabular baselines.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了表格机器学习与LLM在工业改造规划任务上的表现，发现传统树集成模型仍是最强的独立模型，LLM更适合作为补充组件而非替代方案。
AI.motivation: 工业改造规划依赖于结构化操作数据而非自由文本，需要准确预测新注册原型是否需要改造、需要哪种改造方案以及所需时间。研究旨在比较传统表格机器学习与LLM方法在此类任务上的效果。
AI.method: 使用包含284,271辆车辆的工业数据集，比较了传统表格机器学习基线（如树集成模型）与三种基于LLM的策略：嵌入特征（Amazon Titan）、直接提示分类（Claude Sonnet 4）以及ML+LLM堆叠方法。
AI.result: 传统树集成模型在二分类、15类改造类型分类、每次访问持续时间回归和月度基准测试中表现最佳。LLM嵌入特征在表格数据上仍有价值（二分类AUC=0.982），但直接提示在语义信号被哈希剥离后失效。混合堆叠方法构建了最佳的多类模型（加权F1=0.626）。
AI.conclusion: 在隐私受限的工业表格数据上，LLM更适合作为传统表格机器学习基线的补充组件，而非替代方案。基于滞后特征的机器学习在时间序列预测中优于时间序列基础模型。

title: Understanding Cross-Modal Contributions in Continual Vision-Language Models: A Theoretical Perspective
summary: Continual vision-language models are commonly addressed through sequential fine-tuning; however, although this paradigm enables adaptation to new environments (tasks), it inherently emphasizes the contribution of previously learned environments (tasks) at the expense of the stability required to preserve previously acquired knowledge. While existing approaches have adequately studied continual learning and catastrophic forgetting in vision-language models (VLMs), the theoretical understanding of modality-specific contributions across a sequence of environments remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we present a new theoretical perspective to understand the cross-modal (vision-language) contributions to consecutive environments. We empirically evaluate our theoretical findings on large VLMs and demonstrate their effectiveness in capturing environment-level cross-modal contributions. Our analysis provides deeper insights into continual VLMs, highlighting their contribution robustness to varying task orders and inter-task similarities, and their improved generalization performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的理论视角来理解连续环境中视觉-语言模型的跨模态贡献，并进行了实证评估，为持续视觉-语言模型提供了更深入的见解。
AI.motivation: 持续视觉-语言模型通常通过顺序微调来处理，但这种范式虽然能适应新任务，却会牺牲先前知识的稳定性。现有方法已充分研究了视觉-语言模型的持续学习和灾难性遗忘，但对跨模态贡献在连续环境中的理论理解仍很缺乏。
AI.method: 提出了一个新的理论视角来理解连续环境中跨模态（视觉-语言）的贡献，并在大型视觉-语言模型上进行了实证评估，验证了该理论在捕捉环境级跨模态贡献方面的有效性。
AI.result: 理论分析为持续视觉-语言模型提供了更深入的见解，突出了其对不同任务顺序和任务间相似性的贡献鲁棒性，以及改进的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解持续视觉-语言模型中跨模态贡献提供了新的理论框架，揭示了模型在连续学习环境中的稳定性和泛化特性。

title: ControlMap: Controllable High-Definition Map Generation for Traffic Scenario Simulation
summary:
Simulation is central to validating autonomous driving systems, yet current pipelines are limited by insufficient scenario diversity due to costly High Definition (HD) map creation. Scaling HD maps requires expensive data collection and manual processing. Moreover, existing generative models lack the fine-grained control necessary to target specific road topologies during generation.
  This paper presents a data-driven pipeline for controllable HD map generation using latent diffusion and ControlNet for spatial conditioning. To our knowledge, we are the first to inject spatial guidance signals into a diffusion model for HD map synthesis. Furthermore, our model supports adjustable conditioning strength through classifier-free guidance and city-level style transfer via city label conditioning. To complement existing metrics, we introduce two novel metrics to evaluate adherence to the control signal and similarity to ground-truth maps. Experiments demonstrate that our model generates realistic HD maps that faithfully follow input road topologies while accurately preserving city-specific details.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于潜在扩散和ControlNet的数据驱动可控高清地图生成管道，首次将空间引导信号注入扩散模型用于高清地图合成，支持通过无分类器引导调整条件强度，并通过城市标签条件实现城市级风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶系统验证的仿真流程受限于高清地图创建成本高昂导致场景多样性不足。扩展高清地图需要昂贵的数据收集和手动处理，且现有生成模型缺乏针对特定道路拓扑进行细粒度控制的能力。
AI.method: 采用基于潜在扩散和ControlNet的数据驱动管道，通过空间条件控制实现可控高清地图生成。首次将空间引导信号注入扩散模型，支持无分类器引导调整条件强度，并引入城市标签条件实现城市级风格迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能够生成真实的高清地图，忠实遵循输入道路拓扑，同时准确保留城市特定细节。为补充现有评估指标，引入了两个新指标来评估对控制信号的遵循程度和与真实地图的相似性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种可控高清地图生成的新方法，通过空间条件扩散模型实现了对道路拓扑的细粒度控制，解决了现有生成模型在控制精度和场景多样性方面的限制，为自动驾驶仿真提供了更丰富的场景生成能力。

title: Semantic DLM+: Improving Diffusion Language Models through Bias-variance Trade-off in Transition Kernel Design
summary: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have demonstrated strong scaling capacity as alternatives to autoregressive language models. However, their performance is highly sensitive to the choice of transition kernels, and poorly designed kernels can lead to issues like training instability, slow convergence, and biased sampling. In this paper, we study this sensitivity through a principled analysis of generalization error and identify three critical factors: asymptotic bias (difficulty in approximating the posterior distribution), exposure bias (error propagation during sampling), and optimization variance induced by kernel dispersion. We further compare different transition kernels: masking diffusion yields sparse and easier posterior-approximation targets, while uniform diffusion provides stronger sampling-side repair but induces harder approximation. Motivated by this trade-off, we revisit a previously overlooked variant, semantic DLM (SemDLM), where the transition kernel corrupts tokens to neighborhoods that are semantically similar. Our theory suggests that SemDLM can serve as a plausible middle ground by reducing the posterior approximation difficulty of uniform diffusion while retaining repair ability. However, we find that SemDLM suffers from a semantic basin problem, where sampling repeatedly stays within a semantic region and produces low-diversity text. To address this, we propose SemDLM+, which adds a global transition and a semantic-frequency penalty during sampling. Experiments on LM1B and OpenWebText show that SemDLM+ improves training dynamics and achieves competitive language modeling and generation quality with satisfactory diversity.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了扩散语言模型(DLMs)中过渡核选择的重要性，提出了语义DLM+方法来解决现有DLM的泛化误差问题，在语言建模和生成质量上取得了竞争性的表现。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型(DLMs)作为自回归语言模型的替代方案显示出强大的扩展能力，但其性能对过渡核的选择高度敏感，设计不当的核会导致训练不稳定、收敛缓慢和采样偏差等问题。本文旨在通过理论分析理解这些敏感性，并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 通过泛化误差的严格分析，识别了三个关键因素：渐近偏差、曝光偏差和核离散引起的优化方差。比较了不同过渡核（掩码扩散和均匀扩散）的优劣，重新研究了被忽视的语义DLM变体。针对语义DLM存在的语义盆地问题，提出了SemDLM+方法，在采样过程中添加全局过渡和语义频率惩罚。
AI.result: 在LM1B和OpenWebText数据集上的实验表明，SemDLM+改善了训练动态，在语言建模和生成质量方面取得了竞争性的表现，同时保持了令人满意的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 语义DLM+通过平衡后验近似难度和修复能力，解决了传统扩散语言模型的泛化误差问题，为DLMs提供了一种有效的改进方案，在保持语言生成质量的同时确保了多样性。

title: Improved Knowledge Distillation for Land-Use Image Classification
summary: In the present article, an improved Knowledge Distillation (KD) framework has been proposed for efficient compression of deep convolutional neural networks for land-use image classification task. Motivated by the need to achieve competitive classification accuracy while reducing computational complexity, a teacher-student learning paradigm is adopted in which a VGG16 network transfers knowledge to a lightweight MobileNetV2 model. The proposed framework integrates hard supervision from ground truth labels with a soft supervision strategy that combines Kullback-Leibler divergence and Cosine Similarity losses. Experiments conducted on three land-use datasets show that the proposed KD-based method yields improved performance, and achieves an accuracy of 99.04%, outperforming both baseline student training and single-loss distillation approaches, while retaining substantial model compression.

AI.tldr: 提出改进的知识蒸馏框架用于土地用途图像分类任务中的深度卷积神经网络压缩，结合硬监督和软监督策略提升性能。
AI.motivation: 需要在保持竞争力的分类准确率的同时，降低计算复杂度，实现高效的模型压缩。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生学习范式，VGG16网络向轻量级MobileNetV2模型传递知识。结合硬监督（真实标签）和软监督策略（KL散度和余弦相似度损失）。
AI.result: 在三个土地用途数据集上的实验表明，该方法达到99.04%的准确率，优于基线学生训练和单损失蒸馏方法，同时保持显著的模型压缩。
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进知识蒸馏框架有效提升了土地用途图像分类任务的性能，在保持高准确率的同时实现了模型压缩。

title: Friction Characterization of a Cable-Driven Differential Actuation System for Lower-Limb Exoskeletons
comment: Accepted for presentation IEEE RAS/EMBS 11th International Conference on Biomedical Robotics and Biomechatronics
summary: Lower-limb exoskeletons require actuation systems that can provide accurate joint torque control while preserving low mass and encumbrance. Conventional architectures often rely on independently actuated joints and joint-level torque sensors, increasing system complexity and weight. This paper presents a novel differential actuation architecture for hip-knee flexion/extension, enabling cooperative torque sharing between two motors via a linear differential mapping between motor and joint. To compensate for transmission losses, a model-based friction estimation strategy is developed and experimentally implemented, allowing accurate joint torque estimation without the need for torque sensors. The proposed solution is validated on a physical prototype, demonstrating the feasibility of sensorless torque estimation in a differentially actuated hip-knee module of a lower-limb exoskeleton.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于髋膝屈伸的新型差动驱动架构，通过线性差动映射实现两个电机间的协同扭矩分配，并开发基于模型的摩擦估计策略进行传感器无扭矩估计。
AI.motivation: 下肢外骨骼需要提供精确关节扭矩控制的同时保持低质量和低体积的驱动系统。传统架构通常依赖独立驱动关节和关节级扭矩传感器，增加了系统复杂性和重量。
AI.method: 提出新型髋膝屈伸差动驱动架构，通过线性差动映射实现两个电机间的协同扭矩分配。开发基于模型的摩擦估计算法补偿传动损失，无需扭矩传感器即可实现精确关节扭矩估计。
AI.result: 在物理原型上验证了所提方案，证明了在下肢外骨骼的差动驱动髋膝模块中实现无传感器扭矩估计的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 差动驱动架构结合模型摩擦估计策略能够实现精确的关节扭矩控制，同时减少系统复杂性和重量，为下肢外骨骼驱动系统提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

title: Probabilistic Signature Inversion: Learning Conditional Distributions from Truncated Signatures
summary: The signature transform is a principled feature map for continuous-time paths, valued for its uniqueness and universality. Recovering a path from its truncated signature is, however, structurally ill-posed because the truncated signature map is not injective. We therefore reframe truncated signature inversion as a probabilistic problem -- learning the conditional distribution of a path given its truncated signature -- and adopt a signature-conditioned flow matching model as a practical estimator. This probabilistic formulation elucidates the fundamental difficulty of inversion: Bayes reconstruction error quantifies the irreducible uncertainty remaining after conditioning on a statistic. We derive the Bayes-optimal error under linear statistics, obtaining a closed form for log-GBM and numerically tractable formulas for log-fBM and OU, yielding a concrete theoretical baseline for model validation. This baseline upper-bounds the Bayes error under truncated-signature conditioning, since truncated signatures provide richer information than linear statistics. Experiments show that empirical reconstruction errors under linear-statistics conditioning faithfully align with the theory-derived baseline, while errors decrease when the statistic is replaced with truncated signatures. Moreover, generated paths faithfully recover the conditioning signature while preserving key distributional and temporal structures, indicating that the estimator is well-calibrated to the target conditional distribution. Together, these results establish a well-posed probabilistic framework for truncated-signature inversion, with applicability demonstrated on real financial data beyond the parametric process families covered by theory.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将截断签名反演重新定义为概率问题，采用签名条件流匹配模型作为实用估计器，推导了线性统计下的贝叶斯最优误差作为理论基线，并通过实验验证了该方法在真实金融数据上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 签名变换是连续时间路径的特征映射，具有唯一性和普适性。然而，从截断签名恢复路径是结构上的不适定问题，因为截断签名映射不是单射。因此需要重新构建截断签名反演问题。
AI.method: 将截断签名反演重新定义为概率问题——学习给定截断签名的路径条件分布，并采用签名条件流匹配模型作为实用估计器。推导了线性统计下的贝叶斯最优误差，获得了log-GBM的闭式解和log-fBM、OU的数值可处理公式。
AI.result: 实验显示：在线性统计条件下的经验重建误差与理论推导的基线一致；使用截断签名时误差减小；生成的路径能忠实恢复条件签名，同时保留关键分布和时间结构，表明估计器对目标条件分布校准良好。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个适定的概率框架用于截断签名反演，在理论覆盖的参数过程族之外的现实金融数据上展示了应用性，为模型验证提供了具体的理论基线。

title: Deep Learning in Seismic Interpretation: Federated Advances in Salt Dome Segmentation
summary: Salt-dome delineation is a critical, high-impact task in subsurface geological interpretation, driving decisions in hydrocarbon exploration, reservoir modeling, and drilling safety. While convolutional encoder-decoder architectures have delivered significant improvements in automated salt segmentation, their widespread application is severely limited by data sovereignty concerns, dataset bias, and the scarcity of labeled seismic volumes. This paper introduces FedSaltNet, a Federated Learning (FL) framework explicitly engineered for robust, generalizable, and privacy preserving salt-dome segmentation. We couple a lightweight Small U-Net backbone, chosen for its efficiency and regularization properties with a novel Foreground-Weighted (FG-WEIGHTED) aggregation strategy designed to tackle domain-specific class imbalance. Through an extensive comparative study emulating non-IID conditions across four diverse seismic datasets (TGS, SEAM, F3, GBS), we demonstrate two critical findings: The FG-WEIGHTED algorithm effectively mitigates data heterogeneity, yielding a 4.0% relative improvement in Intersection over Union (IoU) over the best conventional FL method. The simple U-Net architecture proved essential, outperforming the higher capacity ResNet-18 U-Net variant by 166% in average IoU, underscoring the necessity of architectural simplicity in data-constrained federated environments. FedSaltNet provides a validated, high-performance solution that establishes the viability of federated deep learning for collaborative, next-generation subsurface interpretation.

AI.tldr: FedSaltNet是一个联邦学习框架，专门用于隐私保护的盐丘分割，通过轻量级U-Net架构和前加权聚合策略，在非独立同分布数据上实现比传统方法4.0%的IoU提升。
AI.motivation: 盐丘描绘是地下地质解释中的关键任务，但传统卷积编码器-解码器架构受限于数据主权问题、数据集偏差和标记地震数据稀缺，需要一种隐私保护且能处理数据异质性的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出FedSaltNet联邦学习框架，采用轻量级Small U-Net作为骨干网络，结合新颖的前加权聚合策略来处理领域特定的类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在四个不同地震数据集上模拟非独立同分布条件的实验表明：前加权聚合算法有效缓解数据异质性，相比最佳传统联邦学习方法获得4.0%的相对IoU提升；轻量级U-Net架构比高容量ResNet-18 U-Net变体在平均IoU上高出166%。
AI.conclusion: FedSaltNet提供了一个经过验证的高性能解决方案，证明了联邦深度学习在协作式下一代地下地质解释中的可行性，特别适用于数据受限的联邦学习环境。

title: $λ$-Reachability: Geometric-Horizon Safety Bellman Equations for Humanoid Safety
summary: We introduce $λ$-Reachability, a scalable approach to Hamilton--Jacobi safety analysis for high-dimensional robotic systems. Unlike prior discounted formulations that rely on fixed one-step Bellman updates, $λ$-Reachability employs a stochastic multi-step estimator of the safety value, using a geometrically distributed rollout horizon together with a randomly absorbed terminal. Conceptually analogous to TD($λ$), $λ$-Reachability interpolates between local self-consistency updates and long-horizon max-over-trajectory safety targets via an interpretable horizon-control parameter. Unlike TD($λ$), where the terminal value is always incorporated in learning targets, the terminal safety value in $λ$-Reachability is only used at a probability controlled by parameter $δ$. We formally show that for $δ<1$, the update induces a contraction mapping that allows temporal-difference learning; as $λ\to 1$, the estimator recovers the undiscounted reachability objective. We apply $λ$-Reachability to high-dimensional safety learning problems with both simulated and real humanoid robots under balance and collision avoidance constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that $λ$-Reachability significantly improves both safe-set boundary classification and safety margin estimation compared to single-step temporal-difference baselines.

AI.tldr: λ-Reachability是一种用于高维机器人系统Hamilton-Jacobi安全分析的可扩展方法，它使用随机多步估计器来平衡局部一致性更新和长时域安全目标，相比单步时序差分基线显著提升了安全边界分类和安全裕度估计。
AI.motivation: 现有的折扣化安全分析方法依赖于固定的单步Bellman更新，难以有效处理高维机器人系统的安全分析问题，需要一种能够平衡局部更新和长时域安全目标的可扩展方法。
AI.method: λ-Reachability采用随机多步安全值估计器，使用几何分布的滚动时域和随机吸收终端。该方法在局部自一致性更新和长时域最大轨迹安全目标之间插值，通过可解释的时域控制参数λ进行调节，并通过参数δ控制终端安全值的使用概率。
AI.result: 当δ<1时，更新诱导收缩映射，允许时序差分学习；当λ→1时，估计器恢复无折扣可达性目标。在平衡和碰撞避免约束下的高维人形机器人安全学习实验中，λ-Reachability相比单步时序差分基线显著提升了安全边界分类和安全裕度估计。
AI.conclusion: λ-Reachability为高维机器人系统提供了一种可扩展的Hamilton-Jacobi安全分析方法，能够有效平衡局部更新和长时域安全目标，在安全边界分类和安全裕度估计方面优于现有单步方法。

title: DiRecT: Safe Diffusion-Based Planning via Receding-Horizon Denoising
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for planning and control by learning multimodal distributions over actions and trajectories. Yet reliable inference-time safety enforcement remains a key barrier to their deployment in safety-critical tasks. Existing approaches typically project each denoising iterate onto the feasible set, even though constraints are defined only on the final clean trajectory. Enforcing feasibility on noisy intermediate samples can therefore overconstrain the sampling dynamics, substantially degrading sample quality. To address this limitation, we introduce DiRecT (Diffusion-based planning via Receding-horizon denoising with Terminal constraints), a training-free algorithm for constrained sampling from diffusion models via stochastic optimal control (SOC). DiRecT enforces constraints only on the final clean sample, avoiding unnecessary restrictions on the intermediate denoising dynamics. Inspired by model predictive control, we derive a principled receding-horizon surrogate for the otherwise intractable constrained SOC formulation, yielding an efficient algorithm that cleanly separates stochastic denoising from constraint satisfaction, progressively steering samples toward feasible final trajectories without distorting the learned diffusion dynamics. Furthermore, DiRecT is highly flexible: it can leverage off-the-shelf or domain-specific optimizers, incorporate priors over environment dynamics, and optimize additional soft rewards. Extensive experiments on safe planning benchmarks demonstrate that DiRecT substantially improves deployment safety and task performance over existing diffusion-based planning baselines.

AI.tldr: DiRecT提出了一种基于扩散模型的约束采样算法，通过随机最优控制仅对最终干净轨迹施加约束，避免对中间去噪过程的过度约束，显著提升安全规划性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型规划方法在推理时强制所有去噪迭代都满足约束条件，但约束实际上只针对最终干净轨迹。对噪声中间样本施加约束会过度约束采样动态，严重降低样本质量。
AI.method: DiRecT采用随机最优控制框架，仅对最终干净样本施加约束，避免对中间去噪动态的不必要限制。受模型预测控制启发，提出了可处理的滚动时域替代方案，将随机去噪与约束满足分离，逐步引导样本趋向可行最终轨迹。
AI.result: 在安全规划基准测试中，DiRecT相比现有基于扩散的规划基线，显著提升了部署安全性和任务性能。
AI.conclusion: DiRecT提供了一种训练自由的约束采样算法，能够灵活利用现成或领域特定的优化器，融入环境动态先验，并优化额外软奖励，为安全关键任务中的扩散模型规划提供了有效解决方案。

title: Mask Proposal Voting Based on Geodesic Framework for Robust Image Segmentation
summary: Despite great advances, finding accurate segmentation remains a challenging task, especially in scenarios with cluttered backgrounds, complex intensity variations and topology appearance. Minimal path models have exhibited their strong ability in addressing image segmentation tasks. However, the performance of minimal paths-based segmentation approaches is heavily influenced by model initialization, hence limiting their application scope in practice. In this work, we propose a novel mask proposal voting framework that overcomes the major drawback of classical approaches, allowing robust segmentation even in complicated scenarios. Firstly, we introduce an efficient method for constructing adaptive domain cuts as a constraint for initializing the region-based min-cut evolution, by which diverse and reliable mask proposal candidates can be generated, substantially increasing the possibility of accurately covering the objective region by these proposals. Secondly, we propose a new mask voting scheme to build a voting score map encoding the final segmentation information. In contrast to classical path voting methods, our model allows incorporating priors to assign different importance to each individual mask. As a consequence, the proposed segmentation model is capable of accurately delineating object boundaries under complex scenarios, and is insensitive to initialization. Experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art minimal path-based approaches in both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出基于掩码提议投票的新框架，克服传统最小路径方法对初始化的依赖，在复杂场景下实现鲁棒分割
AI.motivation: 传统最小路径分割方法性能严重依赖模型初始化，限制了实际应用范围，特别是在背景杂乱、强度变化复杂和拓扑外观复杂的场景中
AI.method: 1) 提出自适应域切割方法作为区域最小割演化的初始化约束，生成多样可靠的掩码提议候选；2) 设计新的掩码投票方案构建投票得分图，可结合先验为不同掩码分配不同重要性
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在准确性和鲁棒性上均优于最先进的最小路径方法，能够准确描绘复杂场景下的物体边界，且对初始化不敏感
AI.conclusion: 提出的掩码提议投票框架有效克服了传统最小路径方法对初始化的依赖问题，在复杂场景下实现了更鲁棒和准确的分割性能

title: Leveraging Deep Learning for Object and Position Recognition of Load Carriers for Autonomous Logistics Vehicles
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, IFAC World Congress2026, \c{opyright} 2026 the authors. This work has been accepted to IFAC for publication under a Creative Commons Licence CC-BY-NC-ND
summary:
This work explores the use of artificial intelligence in mobile robotics to achieve autonomous detection and pose estimation of load carriers for automated pickup. A deep neural network is designed to recognize predefined landmarks on the carrier from RGBD data; these landmarks are then used to compute the carrier's pose. The network operates directly on RGBD images to estimate landmark positions, which form the basis for determining the carrier's location. The approach is validated in extensive experiments and comprises both software and hardware implementations.
  A deep learning-based framework is presented to detect load carriers and estimate their pose for use with autonomous logistics vehicles. Our method uses a convolutional neural network to identify characteristic reference points on the carrier from RGBD input and computes its pose by combining these inferred landmarks with prior geometric knowledge. Experiments show that the resulting accuracy is sufficient for reliable load carrier detection in industrial environments, confirming the suitability of the method for autonomous intralogistics applications.

AI.tldr: 基于深度学习的移动机器人自主检测和姿态估计方法，用于自动化物流中的载具识别与定位
AI.motivation: 为实现自动化物流系统中自主车辆的载具自动拾取，需要可靠地检测载具并估计其姿态
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络直接从RGBD图像中识别载具上的预定义地标，利用这些地标结合几何先验知识计算载具姿态
AI.result: 实验验证表明该方法在工业环境中能达到足够的精度，适用于自主内部物流应用
AI.conclusion: 该基于深度学习的方法能够有效实现载具的自主检测和姿态估计，满足自动化物流系统的需求

title: Repeated Bilateral Trade: The Quest for Fairness
summary: We study repeated bilateral trade from a fairness perspective. At each round, a fresh seller-buyer pair arrives, and the platform posts a price before observing the traders' valuations. Trade occurs only if both agents accept the price. Rather than maximizing only the gain from trade, we consider platforms that seek balanced divisions of the generated surplus. We show that natural fairness desiderata lead to a one-parameter Rawls-to-Nash family of fair-gain objectives, obtained by aggregating the seller's and buyer's net gains through nonpositive Hölder means. Unlike the standard gain-from-trade objective and the Rawlsian fair-gain objective studied in prior work, our proposed objectives induce a new statistical structure in which expected rewards are recovered from threshold feedback through a two-dimensional singular-kernel integral identity. This leads to a nonstandard pure-exploration problem whose natural estimators are rectangular double sums with row-column dependence and singular weights. Assuming independent i.i.d. seller and buyer valuation sequences with arbitrary unknown marginals, we characterize the optimal learning rates for the whole Rawls-to-Nash family of fair-gain objectives, giving matching fixed-confidence sample-complexity and regret bounds up to polylogarithmic factors.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了重复双边交易中的公平性问题，提出了从Rawlsian到Nash的一系列公平收益目标，并分析了这些目标下的最优学习率和样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统双边交易平台主要关注交易收益最大化，但忽视了交易收益在买卖双方之间的公平分配。该研究旨在从公平性角度出发，考虑如何平衡买卖双方的利益分配。
AI.method: 提出了一个单参数Rawls-to-Nash公平收益目标族，通过非正Hölder均值聚合买卖双方的净收益。建立了基于阈值反馈的二维奇异核积分恒等式，将问题转化为具有行-列依赖性和奇异权重的矩形双和估计器的非标准纯探索问题。
AI.result: 在买卖双方估值序列独立同分布且边际分布未知的情况下，完整刻画了Rawls-to-Nash公平收益目标族的最优学习率，给出了匹配的固定置信度样本复杂度和遗憾界限（至多相差多对数因子）。
AI.conclusion: 自然公平性要求导出了新的统计结构和学习问题，该研究为此类问题提供了理论保证，填补了双边交易中公平性学习问题的理论空白。

title: FlexPooling with Simple Auxiliary Classifiers in Deep Networks
summary: In computer vision, the basic pipeline of most convolutional neural networks consists of multiple feature extraction layers, where the input signal is downsampled to a lower resolution in each subsequent layer. This downsampling process is commonly referred to as pooling, which is an essential operation in CNNs. Pooling improves robustness against transformations, reduces the number of trainable parameters, increases the receptive field, and lowers computation time. Since pooling is a lossy process but remains important for extracting high-level information from low-level representations, it is important to preserve the most prominent information from previous activations to improve network discriminability. Standard pooling is usually performed using dense pooling methods, such as max pooling or average pooling, or through strided convolutional kernels. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective adaptive pooling method, called FlexPooling, which generalizes average pooling by learning a weighted average over activations jointly with the rest of the network. We further show that attaching Simple Auxiliary Classifiers (SAC) to the CNN improves performance and demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method compared with standard pooling methods. Experiments on multiple popular image classification datasets show that FlexPooling consistently outperforms baseline networks, achieving approximately 1 to 3 percent improvement in accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出FlexPooling自适应池化方法，通过加权平均学习激活值，结合简单辅助分类器，在多个图像分类数据集上比标准池化方法提升1-3%准确率。
AI.motivation: 池化是CNN中重要的下采样操作，能提高模型鲁棒性、减少参数、扩大感受野并降低计算成本。但标准池化方法（如最大池化、平均池化）是固定且信息损失的过程，需要更好地保留前层激活的重要信息以提升网络判别能力。
AI.method: 提出FlexPooling自适应池化方法，将平均池化推广为可学习的加权平均，权重与网络其他部分联合学习。同时引入简单辅助分类器（SAC）进一步提升性能。
AI.result: 在多个流行图像分类数据集上的实验表明，FlexPooling始终优于基线网络，相比标准池化方法获得约1-3%的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: FlexPooling是一种简单有效的自适应池化方法，通过学习加权平均激活值来提升网络性能，结合辅助分类器能进一步改善分类准确率。

title: A Smart-Scheduled Hybrid (SSH) EKF-FGO State Estimation
comment: This work has been accepted for presentation/publication at the 2026 IEEE Canadian Conference on Electrical and Computer Engineering (CCECE). The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Reliable state estimation in robotics and control re quires balancing estimation accuracy against computational cost. While filtering-based methods such as the Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) provide efficient real-time updates, and optimisation based formulations using factor graphs improve global consistency, the role of optimisation scheduling is often treated implicitly rather than examined as an explicit design variable. This paper presents an experimental study that explicitly isolates optimisation scheduling using a Smart Scheduled Hybrid (SSH) EKF-FGO framework as a controlled testbed. By combining EKF-based state propagation with periodically invoked batch optimisation and holding solver structure and effort fixed, the main contribution of this work is the experimental characterisation of optimisation scheduling as an independent design variable governing the trade-off between intermediate estimation accuracy and computational cost. Simulation results in a planar SLAM environment show that scheduling strongly influences pre optimisation drift, transient error behaviour, and runtime. In particular, the results identify operating regimes in which most of the benefit of global optimisation can be retained at a fraction of the computational cost, highlighting optimisation scheduling as an under-explored yet critical consideration in hybrid state estimation systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实验研究明确将优化调度作为独立设计变量，展示了在混合EKF-FGO框架中，合理的优化调度可以以较低计算成本获得大部分全局优化的好处。
AI.motivation: 在机器人状态估计中，需要在估计精度和计算成本之间取得平衡。现有方法（如EKF和因子图优化）虽然各有优势，但优化调度通常被隐含处理，而非作为显式的设计变量进行研究。
AI.method: 提出了智能调度混合（SSH）EKF-FGO框架作为实验平台，结合EKF状态传播和周期性批量优化，保持求解器结构和计算量固定，明确隔离优化调度作为独立变量进行研究。
AI.result: 在平面SLAM环境中的仿真结果表明，优化调度强烈影响预优化漂移、瞬态误差行为和运行时间。结果识别了特定操作区间，在这些区间中，可以以较低计算成本保留大部分全局优化的好处。
AI.conclusion: 优化调度是混合状态估计系统中一个被忽视但至关重要的设计考虑因素，合理的调度策略能够在计算成本和估计精度之间实现更好的权衡。

title: Learning Earthquake Wave Arrival Time Picking from Labels with Inaccuracies
summary: Inaccurately labeled training data, or "label noise", poses a significant threat to the integrity of supervised machine learning models. This corruption directly degrades performance by teaching the model erroneous mappings between features and labels, which leads to poor generalization and reduced accuracy on properly labeled validation and test data. Current seismological applications mainly rely on large-scale training sets or data augmentation to reduce the label-noise impact, which can be labor-intensive and costly. Here, we introduce a Label Noise-Contrastive Robust Learning (LaNCoR) approach that can effectively handle noisy labels in seismic signal processing tasks, without requiring large-scale training datasets. In this approach, the input waveform feature and label representation distributions are aligned in the feature space to correct mislabeling and reduce its impact on the training process. We present LaNCoR's performance on the task of P-phase arrival-time picking of real microseismic data using two baseline models and training approaches. Our results indicate that LaNCoR can improve performance by up to 28.8% across performance metrics. This approach holds great promise for model training in seismology and geosciences.

AI.tldr: LaNCoR 是一种处理地震信号处理任务中标签噪声的新方法，无需大规模训练数据集，通过特征空间对齐来纠正错误标签，在P波到时拾取任务中性能提升达28.8%。
AI.motivation: 标签噪声会严重损害监督学习模型的性能，导致泛化能力差和准确性降低。目前地震学应用主要依赖大规模训练集或数据增强来减少标签噪声影响，但这些方法劳动密集且成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出标签噪声对比鲁棒学习（LaNCoR）方法，通过在特征空间中对齐输入波形特征和标签表示分布，来纠正错误标签并减少其对训练过程的影响。
AI.result: 在真实微震数据的P波到时拾取任务上，使用两个基线模型和训练方法进行测试，LaNCoR能在各项性能指标上提升高达28.8%的性能。
AI.conclusion: LaNCoR方法为地震学和地球科学中的模型训练提供了有前景的解决方案，能够有效处理标签噪声问题，无需依赖大规模训练数据集。

title: Learning Sparse Latent Predictive Foundation Model for Multimodal Neuroimaging
summary: Brain MRIs are routinely acquired as multiple complementary sequences with unique contrast weighting, including T1-weighed imaging (T1w) anatomic and fluid-sensitive T2-weighted (T2w) contrasts. However, methods for learning unified representations across the multitude of MRI contrast mechanisms at health-system scale are lacking. In this study, we introduce Neuro-JEPA, a sparse multimodal neuroimaging foundation model that combines a latent predictive objective with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture to encode brain MRI across core T1w, T2w, and fluid-suppressed FLAIR imaging (FLAIR). We further provide a systematic methodological study of architectural, masking, objective, and sparsity design choices beneficial for robust neuroimaging multimodal representation learning. Neuro-JEPA was pretrained on 1,551,862 scans from 428,647 studies after modality-specific preprocessing with data curation across three core structural brain MRI sequences. We evaluated the learned representations across clinical and research settings, including 25 tasks from three health systems: NYU Langone, NYU Long Island, and Massachusetts General Hospital, and 22 tasks from 12 public datasets, covering unimodal, multimodal and cross-domain evaluation configurations. Across these benchmarks, existing neuroimaging foundation models showed inconsistent gains over a simple convolutional neural network (CNN) baseline, whereas Neuro-JEPA achieved stronger and more consistent performance across all evaluated settings. These results establish a scalable methodological framework for multimodal neuroimaging representation learning and highlight the need for foundation model evaluation protocols that include simple baselines, clinically heterogeneous cohorts and controlled multimodal comparisons.

AI.tldr: Neuro-JEPA是一个稀疏多模态神经影像基础模型，通过潜在预测目标和专家混合架构，在健康系统规模上学习T1w、T2w和FLAIR MRI的统一表示，在多个临床和研究任务中表现优于现有方法。
