AI.motivation: 目前缺乏在健康系统规模上学习多种MRI对比机制统一表示的方法。脑MRI通常包含多种互补序列（如T1w、T2w、FLAIR），需要一种能够跨模态学习统一表示的基础模型。
AI.method: 提出Neuro-JEPA稀疏多模态神经影像基础模型，结合潜在预测目标和专家混合架构，对三种核心结构脑MRI序列进行编码。在1,551,862个扫描上预训练，系统研究了架构、掩码、目标和稀疏性设计选择。
AI.result: 在三个医疗系统的25个任务和12个公共数据集的22个任务上评估，现有神经影像基础模型相比简单CNN基线表现不一致，而Neuro-JEPA在所有评估设置中均获得更强且更一致的性能。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个可扩展的多模态神经影像表示学习方法框架，强调基础模型评估协议需要包含简单基线、临床异质性队列和受控多模态比较。

title: A Deployment Case Study in Robotic Apparel Automation: Digital Twin Integration, Interoperability, and Workforce Enablement
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, IEEE ICRA 2026 Workshop Paper
summary: Despite steady advances in flexible automation in sectors such as electronics and automotive manufacturing, apparel automation remains challenging because fabrics are deformable and difficult to manipulate with robots. This paper presents a deployment-oriented case study of a robotic sewing system for denim manufacturing, emphasizing the system-level integration required for practical adoption. At the engineering level, a digital thread module parses DXF production drawings into process parameters and executable robot trajectories, reducing manual programming effort and enabling rapid re-targeting across sewing operations. In parallel, a digital twin of the workcell is used during pre-deployment to validate reach and clearance, refine layout and sequencing, evaluate operator access, and assess cycle-time compatibility with upstream and downstream tasks, thereby reducing commissioning risk. At deployment, the system integrates a collaborative robot with conventional sewing equipment, welding, suction fixtures, and machine-level controllers through an interoperability layer. Runtime monitoring and verification, including seam monitoring, collision checking, and trajectory-level validation, improve robustness under environmental variability, while operator-facing training and guidance tools support setup, troubleshooting, and technology adoption. Two staged factory deployments on denim shorts, covering 2D pocket operations and 3D garment-shaping seams, show that digital-twin-based validation, digital-thread-driven task generation, interoperability, runtime verification, and operator training are important for scaling robotic apparel automation.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了一个面向部署的机器人缝纫系统案例研究，用于牛仔制造，重点强调了实际应用所需的系统级集成。通过数字线程模块、数字孪生、互操作性层、运行时监控和操作员培训等关键技术，实现了从2D口袋操作到3D服装成型缝纫的工厂部署。
AI.motivation: 服装自动化面临挑战，因为织物具有可变形性，难以用机器人操作。尽管电子和汽车制造等领域的柔性自动化稳步发展，但服装自动化仍然困难。本研究旨在通过系统级集成方法，推动机器人缝纫在实际生产中的采用。
AI.method: 采用多层次方法：1) 数字线程模块解析DXF生产图纸生成机器人轨迹；2) 数字孪生用于部署前验证工作单元；3) 互操作性层集成协作机器人、传统缝纫设备、焊接、吸力夹具和机器级控制器；4) 运行时监控包括接缝监测、碰撞检查和轨迹验证；5) 操作员培训和指导工具。
AI.result: 成功在牛仔短裤制造中进行了两个阶段的工厂部署：2D口袋操作和3D服装成型缝纫。结果表明，基于数字孪生的验证、数字线程驱动的任务生成、互操作性、运行时验证和操作员培训对扩展机器人服装自动化至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生验证、数字线程任务生成、系统互操作性、运行时监控和操作员培训是规模化机器人服装自动化的关键要素。该案例研究为实际部署提供了系统级集成框架，有助于推动服装制造业的自动化转型。

title: A Compositional Framework for Open-ended Intelligence
summary: Open-ended intelligence is the capacity to adapt to novel problems and environments that are substantially different from those in training. We formalize open-ended intelligence as the closure induced by a finite primitive set \(P\) and a set of composition operators \(C\). We characterize properties of the induced closure \(\mathcal{L}(P,C)\) that support unbounded compositional generation across families of tasks and worlds. A mathematics of open-ended intelligence requires two pillars: a minimal set of representational primitives (e.g., states, actions) and algorithmic primitives (e.g., nearest neighbor), together with composition motifs (e.g., recursion, sequencing) that reflect an acquired compositional grammar. The closure of these two pillars enables the generation of infinite adaptive responses across a wide range of settings. The mathematics supports complementary research agendas, including evaluation metrics for explanation and interpretability, as well as building architectures where compositional generalization is native. We propose next primitive prediction as a novel architectural objective, where the training objective encourages the acquisition of reusable algorithmic primitives and their compositional grammar, such that new solutions are generated through recombination. Curriculum learning and self-play enable lifelong learning and expansion of the closure by discovering reusable primitives and transition motifs across families of tasks and worlds. We ground the framework through case studies in physics, evolution, and neuroscience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种关于开放式智能的数学框架，将其定义为由有限原始集和组合运算符诱导的闭包，旨在实现跨任务和环境的无限组合生成能力。
AI.motivation: 传统AI系统在面对与训练环境显著不同的新问题时适应性有限，缺乏真正的开放式智能——即适应本质上新颖的问题和环境的能力。需要建立一种数学框架来形式化和理解开放式智能的本质特征。
AI.method: 提出基于闭包理论的数学框架：1）定义表示原始集（状态、动作）和算法原始集（最近邻等）；2）引入组合模式（递归、序列化等）作为组合语法；3）通过闭包运算获得无限组合生成能力；4）提出"下一个原始预测"作为新的架构目标，鼓励获取可重用算法原始和组合语法；5）利用课程学习和自我对弈实现终身学习。
AI.result: 该框架能够支持跨任务和世界的无限组合生成，为评估解释性和可解释性提供指标，并为构建原生支持组合泛化的架构提供理论基础。通过物理、进化和神经科学的案例研究验证了框架的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 开放式智能可以通过有限原始集和组合运算符的闭包来形式化，这一数学框架为理解智能的适应性、组合性和开放性提供了理论基础，并指导构建能够通过重组生成新解决方案的AI系统。

title: MVEB: Massive Video Embedding Benchmark
summary: We introduce the Massive Video Embedding Benchmark (MVEB), a 23-task benchmark for video embeddings spanning classification, zero-shot classification, clustering, pair classification, retrieval, and video-centric question answering. We evaluate 33 models and find that no single model dominates: MLLM-based embeddings lead on classification, clustering, pair classification, and QA; multimodal binding leads on retrieval and zero-shot classification; generative MLLMs without contrastive adaptation collapse on cross-modal tasks. Paired video-only vs. audio+video evaluations show that audio's contribution depends on dataset annotation provenance: audio helps when labels were produced from both modalities and hurts when they were produced from visuals alone, a six-point gap consistent across model families. MVEB is derived from MVEB+, a 184-task pool, and is designed to maintain task diversity while reducing evaluation cost. It integrates into the MTEB ecosystem for unified evaluation across text, image, audio, and video. We release MVEB and all 184 tasks along with code and a leaderboard at https://github.com/embeddings-benchmark/mteb.

AI.tldr: MVEB是一个包含23个任务的视频嵌入基准测试，评估33个模型发现：MLLM在分类、聚类、配对分类和QA任务上领先；多模态绑定在检索和零样本分类上领先；生成式MLLM在跨模态任务上表现不佳。音频对性能的影响取决于数据集标注来源。
AI.motivation: 构建统一的视频嵌入评估基准，解决现有基准任务覆盖不足、评估成本高的问题，促进跨模态嵌入模型的公平比较。
AI.method: 从184个任务的MVEB+池中选择23个任务构建MVEB，保持任务多样性同时降低评估成本。评估33个模型在分类、零样本分类、聚类、配对分类、检索和视频问答等任务上的表现。
AI.result: 没有单一模型在所有任务上占优：MLLM在分类、聚类、配对分类和QA上领先；多模态绑定在检索和零样本分类上领先；生成式MLLM在跨模态任务上表现差。音频的影响取决于标注来源：当标签来自双模态时音频有帮助，仅来自视觉时音频反而有害。
AI.conclusion: MVEB提供了全面的视频嵌入评估框架，揭示了不同模型架构的优缺点，音频的效用取决于标注数据来源。该基准已集成到MTEB生态系统中，促进跨文本、图像、音频和视频的统一评估。

title: Scaling Short-Term Memory of Visuomotor Policies for Long-Horizon Tasks
summary: Many robotic tasks require short-term memory, whether it's retrieving an object that's no longer visible or turning off an appliance after a set period. Yet, most visuomotor policies trained via imitation learning rely only on immediate sensory input without using past experiences to guide decisions. We present PRISM, a transformer-based architecture for visuomotor policies to effectively use short-term memory via two key components: (i) gated attention, which filters retrieved information to suppress irrelevant details, improving performance by reducing the spurious correlations between the history and current action prediction, (ii) a hierarchical architecture that first compresses local information into compact tokens and then integrates them to capture temporally extended dependencies, improving its compute and memory footprint. Together, these mechanisms enable us to scale short-term memory in visuomotor policies for up to two minutes. To systematically evaluate memory in visuomotor control, we introduce ReMemBench -- a benchmark of eight diverse household manipulation tasks spanning four categories of short-term memory -- designed to foster general memory mechanisms rather than siloed, task-specific solutions. PRISM consistently outperforms prior works, including recurrent architectures, transformers, and their variants -- achieving an absolute improvement of 5%--12% over the strongest baseline. On the RoboCasa and LIBERO benchmarks, it achieves absolute improvements of 11%--15% over its no-memory variant and fine-tuned Vision-Language-Action baselines such as GR00T-N1-3B and OpenVLA, despite not leveraging any large-scale pretraining. Together, PRISM and ReMemBench establish a foundation for developing and evaluating short-term memory-augmented visuomotor policies that scale to long-horizon tasks. Additional materials are available at https://shahrutav.github.io/short-term-memory

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个基于Transformer的视觉运动策略架构，通过门控注意力和分层结构有效利用短期记忆，在家庭操作任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 大多数通过模仿学习训练的视觉运动策略仅依赖即时感官输入，无法利用过去的经验指导决策。许多机器人任务需要短期记忆，比如检索不可见物体或定时关闭电器，因此需要开发能有效利用短期记忆的策略。
AI.method: PRISM采用基于Transformer的架构，包含两个关键组件：(1)门控注意力机制，过滤检索到的信息以抑制无关细节，减少历史与当前动作预测之间的虚假相关性；(2)分层架构，先将局部信息压缩为紧凑令牌，然后整合以捕获时间扩展依赖关系，提高计算和内存效率。
AI.result: PRISM在ReMemBench基准测试中始终优于先前工作（包括循环架构、Transformer及其变体），绝对提升5%-12%。在RoboCasa和LIBERO基准测试中，相比无记忆变体和微调的视觉-语言-动作基线（如GR00T-N1-3B和OpenVLA），获得11%-15%的绝对提升，且未利用任何大规模预训练。该架构可将短期记忆扩展到长达两分钟。
AI.conclusion: PRISM和ReMemBench为开发和评估短期记忆增强的视觉运动策略奠定了基础，使其能够扩展到长时域任务。该工作展示了通过门控注意力和分层架构有效利用短期记忆的可行性。

title: Constitutional Value Potentials: reading and steering internal priority margins in language models
summary: A constitution tells a language model what to value, but little tells us whether it does. Adherence is judged from outputs, and output evidence is most fragile on value conflicts, where what matters is not which value a model mentions but which one it is willing to sacrifice. We provide evidence that this arbitration can be read from activations in a structured margin readout. We introduce Constitutional Value Potentials (CVP). For each value we learn a scalar potential from the hidden state: an internal pressure to preserve that value, supervised not by the prompt but by an independent judge's verdict on which value the model's own response actually preserved. The signed difference of two potentials is a priority margin. A constitutional clause becomes the claim that a margin stays positive, and a single monitor score flags when it does not. The monitor predicts conflict violations with AUROC up to 0.95, beats a strong hidden-state probe, and generalizes to held-out synthetic conflicts across three Qwen2.5 scales. The signal appears as the answer begins, from the prompt tail and first response token. Read this early, the same signal reveals whether an adversarial priority hack has actually pushed the model toward a violation, rather than only whether the prompt looks adversarial. The same directions also support intervention tests: under selected steering settings, moving along a value direction shifts judged trade-offs in the intended direction. Together, these results suggest that some constitution-relevant priorities are accessible as activation-space margins, rather than only as output behavior.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了宪法价值潜力（CVP）方法，通过从隐藏状态学习标量潜力来量化语言模型对宪法价值的内部优先级，从而监测价值冲突时的决策行为。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要从语言模型的输出来判断其是否遵循宪法价值，但在价值冲突时，输出证据最脆弱。关键不是模型提到哪个价值，而是它愿意牺牲哪个价值。目前缺乏从模型内部激活状态直接读取这种价值仲裁的方法。
AI.method: 提出宪法价值潜力（CVP）方法：为每个价值从隐藏状态学习一个标量潜力，监督信号不是来自提示，而是来自独立法官对模型响应实际保留哪个价值的判断。两个潜力的符号差异构成优先级边界，当边界保持正值时表示宪法条款被遵守。
AI.result: CVP监测器在价值冲突违规预测上达到AUROC高达0.95，优于强隐藏状态探针，并在三个Qwen2.5规模上泛化到未见的合成冲突。信号在回答开始时即可从提示尾部和第一个响应token中读取。该方法还能检测对抗性优先级攻击是否实际导致违规，并支持干预测试：沿价值方向调整激活可以按预期方向改变价值权衡判断。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，与宪法相关的优先级可以作为激活空间的边界被访问，而不仅仅是作为输出行为。这意味着模型内部存在可读的价值优先级表示，为监测和干预语言模型的价值决策提供了新途径。

title: Towards Data-Efficient Cross-Device Generalization of Grad-Shafranov Equilibria via Transfer Learning Neural Operator
summary: Real-time reconstruction of magnetohydrodynamic equilibria is essential for plasma shaping, stability assessment and feedback control in magnetic confinement fusion. However, Grad-Shafranov equilibrium calculations remain largely device-specific and iterative, limiting their use in latency-constrained control settings. Existing neural approaches can accelerate individual equilibrium predictions, but they do not generally provide reusable models across changing plasma boundaries or tokamak geometries. Here we show that equilibrium reconstruction can be recast as a cross-device operator learning problem. We develop a domain-specific neural operator framework that maps geometry and profile parameters directly to the poloidal flux field, replacing repeated solve-on-demand computation with amortized operator inference. Using the analytically tractable Solov'ev family as a controlled Grad-Shafranov testbed, we generate equilibria across eight geometrically distinct tokamak-like configurations and benchmark five neural operator architectures under four transfer-learning strategies. Single-geometry pretraining gives poor transfer to unseen devices, whereas multi-geometry pretraining enables data-efficient adaptation. The Wavelet Neural Operator gives the strongest cross-geometry performance, reaching mean relative L2 errors below 4% with 100 labelled target equilibria and below 2% with full fine-tuning. The predicted magnetic fields satisfy the divergence-free constraint to numerical precision, and four architectures achieve millisecond or sub-millisecond inference. These results identify neural operator pretraining as a route towards reusable, real-time equilibrium inference across fusion device configurations.

AI.tldr: 该研究将磁流体平衡重建重新构建为跨设备算子学习问题，开发了特定领域神经算子框架，通过多几何预训练实现跨托卡马克配置的实时、可重用平衡推断。
AI.motivation: 实时磁流体平衡重建对聚变等离子体成形、稳定性评估和反馈控制至关重要。传统Grad-Shafranov平衡计算是设备特定且迭代的，限制了其在延迟敏感控制中的应用。现有神经方法只能加速单个平衡预测，无法提供跨变化等离子体边界或托卡马克几何的可重用模型。
AI.method: 将平衡重建重新构建为跨设备算子学习问题，开发了特定领域神经算子框架，将几何和剖面参数直接映射到极向通量场。使用Solov'ev家族作为可控Grad-Shafranov测试平台，在8个几何不同的托卡马克配置中生成平衡数据，并评估了5种神经算子架构和4种迁移学习策略。
AI.result: 多几何预训练实现了数据高效适应，而单几何预训练对未见设备的转移效果差。Wavelet神经算子表现最佳，在100个标记目标平衡下达到低于4%的平均相对L2误差，完全微调后低于2%。预测磁场满足无散度约束到数值精度，四种架构实现毫秒或亚毫秒级推断。
AI.conclusion: 神经算子预训练是实现跨聚变设备配置的可重用、实时平衡推断的有效途径，为聚变等离子体控制提供了更高效的计算框架。

title: Think Less, Act Early: Reinforced Latent Reasoning with Early Exit in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Existing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predominantly rely on explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to bridge perception and action. While effective, this paradigm suffers from high computational costs and error propagation in multi-step tasks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Variable Alignment VLA (AVA-VLA), a novel Latent Reasoning VLA framework that models reasoning as a sequence of unobservable latent variables, bypassing the need for explicit text generation. However, latent trajectories are inherently susceptible to noise interference and misalignment with downstream objectives. To address this, we introduce a Reinforcement Learning-based Denoising mechanism that treats latent state generation as a sequential decision process, optimizing reasoning trajectories via task-level rewards. Furthermore, we incorporate an Early-Exit Strategy that adaptively terminates reasoning based on state confidence, enabling a dynamic trade-off between depth and efficiency. Extensive experiments on embodied decision benchmarks demonstrate that AVA-VLA achieves a 6x inference speedup over explicit CoT methods while attaining a 98.3% average success rate on LIBERO, improving both efficiency and long-horizon stability over full-reasoning baselines.

AI.tldr: AVA-VLA提出了一种基于潜在推理的视觉-语言-动作模型，通过强化学习去噪和早退策略，在保持高性能的同时实现6倍推理加速
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖显式思维链推理，存在计算成本高和多步骤任务中错误传播的问题，需要更高效稳定的推理方法
AI.method: 提出AVA-VLA框架：1) 将推理建模为不可观测的潜在变量序列，避免显式文本生成；2) 引入强化学习去噪机制，将潜在状态生成视为序列决策过程；3) 采用早退策略，根据状态置信度自适应终止推理
AI.result: 在具身决策基准测试中，AVA-VLA相比显式CoT方法实现6倍推理加速，在LIBERO上达到98.3%平均成功率，在效率和长时程稳定性上均优于基线
AI.conclusion: AVA-VLA通过潜在推理、强化学习去噪和自适应早退策略，有效解决了显式CoT推理的效率问题，为VLA模型提供了更高效稳定的推理框架

title: V2P-Manip: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Monocular Human Videos
summary: Achieving autonomous robotic dexterous manipulation requires precise, human-like action sequences at scale. As a scalable supplement to costly teleoperation data, extracting trajectories with both visual fidelity and physical plausibility from monocular videos represents a promising frontier in embodied AI. To this end, we introduce V2P-Manip, an efficient framework designed to learn dexterous manipulation policies directly from human demonstration videos. We establish an efficient, integrated pipeline encompassing 3D asset acquisition, trajectory estimation, and dexterous policy learning. To bridge the gap between visual perception and physical constraints, we introduce a two-stage refinement process to enforce spatial alignment and physical consistency. Evaluations on the TACO and OakInk benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms previous methods in pose accuracy, adaptability to unstructured environments, and training efficiency. Ultimately, experimental results confirm an average success rate of over 75% across multiple synthetic manipulation tasks and validate the adaptability of the extracted manipulation priors across diverse dexterous hand embodiments.

AI.tldr: V2P-Manip框架从人类演示视频中学习灵巧操作策略，通过三维资产获取、轨迹估计和策略学习，实现视觉感知与物理约束的整合，显著提升姿态精度和环境适应性。
AI.motivation: 实现自主机器人灵巧操作需要大规模、精确的人类动作序列。作为昂贵遥操作数据的补充，从单目视频中提取视觉保真且物理合理的轨迹是具身AI的重要方向。
AI.method: 建立高效集成管道：三维资产获取、轨迹估计和灵巧策略学习。引入两阶段精炼过程，强制空间对齐和物理一致性，弥合视觉感知与物理约束的差距。
AI.result: 在TACO和OakInk基准测试中，方法在姿态精度、非结构化环境适应性和训练效率方面显著优于先前方法。在多个合成操作任务中平均成功率超过75%，验证了提取的操作先验在不同灵巧手具现中的适应性。
AI.conclusion: V2P-Manip框架成功从人类演示视频中学习灵巧操作策略，为大规模、低成本获取机器人操作数据提供了有效途径，推动了具身AI的发展。

title: Greedy Coordinate Diffusion: Effective and Semantically Coherent Adversarial Attacks via Diffusion Guidance
summary: Fine-tuning aligned language models on benign tasks (e.g. math tutoring) systematically breaks safety guardrails, even when training data contains no harmful content. While mechanistic approaches have shed light on where alignment resides in model weights, they do not by provide a general formal framework for deriving guarantees about when fine-tuning degrades it -- leaving the field without principled tools for predicting or preventing alignment collapse. We develop a local geometric framework through geometric analysis of parameter-space trajectories and apply it to understand the fragility of alignment in fine-tuning. While first-order analysis suggests orthogonal updates are safe, we prove this is illusory: the curvature of the fine-tuning loss induces second-order acceleration that can induce second-order drift into alignment-sensitive regions. We formalize a construct of our framework as the Alignment Instability Condition (AIC), three geometric properties that, when present, are sufficient to guarantee degradation. Our main result proves quartic onset of alignment degradation along gradient-flow trajectories, determined by how sharply alignment depends on specific parameters and how strongly tasks couple to these parameters. These findings yield formal sufficient conditions under which static first-order protection can fail under gradient descent. We further empirically validate the framework's foundations, showing that the Fisher Information Matrix provides a proxy for the degree of safety degradation across diverse fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现对齐语言模型在良性任务上微调会系统性破坏安全护栏，即使训练数据不包含有害内容。作者通过几何分析证明一阶正交更新并不安全，二阶曲率效应会导致对齐退化，并提出了对齐不稳定性条件(AIC)作为形式化框架。
AI.motivation: 当前对齐语言模型在良性任务微调时会意外破坏安全护栏，而现有机制性方法缺乏预测和防止对齐崩溃的形式化框架，需要建立理论工具来理解对齐在微调中的脆弱性。
AI.method: 开发局部几何框架，分析参数空间轨迹的几何特性。通过一阶和二阶分析研究微调损失曲率的影响，形式化提出对齐不稳定性条件(AIC)，并证明梯度流轨迹上对齐退化的四次方起始。
AI.result: 证明一阶正交更新并不安全，二阶曲率效应会导致对齐敏感区域的漂移。发现对齐退化程度由Fisher信息矩阵作为代理指标，形式化条件表明静态一阶保护在梯度下降下可能失效。
AI.conclusion: 建立了理解微调中对齐脆弱性的几何框架，揭示了二阶效应的重要性，提供了预测对齐退化的形式化工具，对安全微调实践具有重要指导意义。

title: Text-Driven Fusion for Infrared and Visible Images: Achieving Image Scene Adaptation on Hyperbolic Space
summary: Infrared and visible image fusion aims to integrate complementary modalities, while existing Euclidean methods impose rigid distance metrics that distort multi-modal interactions and parent-to-child semantic hierarchies. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a text-driven fusion framework empowered by hyperbolic manifold learning. During training, BLIP-extracted text prompts serve as topological anchors within the hyperbolic space, guiding vision-attribute alignment through hyperbolic embeddings that naturally accommodate varying semantic granularities. By exploiting the exponential volume growth dictated by the Poincaré ball's negative curvature, this approach seamlessly embeds hierarchical trees to encode coarse-to-fine semantics without metric saturation, while the vast peripheral space prevents texture distortion during cross-modal fusion. At inference, the fusion process autonomously adapts to input content using the learned text-attribute priors, completely eliminating the need for textual input. Experimental results show our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on benchmark datasets, with code available at https://github.com/Shaoyun2023/TEDFusion.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于双曲流形学习的文本驱动红外与可见光图像融合框架，通过双曲空间中的文本提示作为拓扑锚点，实现多模态层次语义融合，无需推理时文本输入。
AI.motivation: 现有欧几里得方法采用刚性的距离度量，会扭曲多模态交互和父子语义层次关系，限制了红外与可见光图像融合的效果。
AI.method: 使用双曲流形学习框架，在训练阶段通过BLIP提取的文本提示作为双曲空间中的拓扑锚点，引导视觉属性对齐；利用庞加莱球的负曲率实现指数体积增长，自然嵌入层次树结构编码从粗到细的语义，避免度量饱和和纹理失真。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在基准数据集上优于最先进的方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双曲流形学习框架能够有效解决多模态图像融合中的层次语义表示问题，实现无需推理时文本输入的自适应融合。

title: Training and Evaluating Diffusion Policies with Long Context Lengths
summary: Imitation learning has enabled highly-dexterous robotic manipulation from RGB observations. Policies trained with these methods, however, typically condition robot actions on only a short history of observations. These policies cannot solve tasks that require memory and can get stuck repeatedly executing the same failing motions. In this work, we first benchmark policy performance as context length is incrementally increased from short to long, across a spectrum of tasks with varying local stability and memory requirements, and in multiple data regimes. To our knowledge, this is the first study to investigate context length in imitation learning at this level of detail. Our results challenge prior claims: naively scaling context length is not as brittle as advertised in literature. With an appropriate conditioning method and denoising backbone (UNet+Cross-Attention), single-task policies achieve high success rates on many tasks in the usual data regime even with naive scaling. Next, we propose a training algorithm to jointly train policies at multiple context lengths, further reducing the sample complexity of long-context learning. Finally, we apply our findings to re-evaluate some previously proposed solutions to long-context imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了模仿学习中上下文长度的影响，发现通过适当的条件化方法和去噪主干网络，简单扩展上下文长度并不像文献中宣称的那样脆弱，并提出了一种多上下文长度联合训练算法来降低长上下文学习的样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 模仿学习中的策略通常只基于短期观察历史，无法解决需要记忆的任务，并且会陷入重复执行相同失败动作的困境。先前研究认为简单扩展上下文长度很脆弱，本研究旨在重新评估上下文长度在模仿学习中的作用。
AI.method: 1) 系统地将上下文长度从短到长递增进行基准测试，涵盖不同局部稳定性和记忆需求的任务；2) 使用UNet+Cross-Attention作为条件化方法和去噪主干；3) 提出多上下文长度联合训练算法，降低长上下文学习的样本复杂度。
AI.result: 研究发现，在适当条件化方法和去噪主干下，单任务策略在常规数据范围内即使简单扩展上下文长度也能在许多任务上实现高成功率。多上下文长度联合训练进一步降低了长上下文学习的样本复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 先前关于简单扩展上下文长度脆弱的说法需要重新评估，通过适当的方法，长上下文模仿学习是可行的。研究还重新评估了一些先前提出的长上下文模仿学习解决方案。

title: A Bifurcation Theory Framework for Gradient Descent on the Edge of Stability
summary: The Edge of Stability (EoS) phenomenon, where gradient descent operates with sharpness exceeding the classical convergence threshold yet the loss decreases over long timescales, is ubiquitous in modern deep learning but remains poorly understood in realistic settings. Prior rigorous analyses have been largely confined to scalar or low-dimensional losses with specific structural forms. In this work, we develop a bifurcation theory framework for gradient descent on the edge of stability that applies directly to overparameterized neural networks. By decomposing the training dynamics into components normal and tangent to the manifold of minimizers, we show that stable EoS training arises from a flip bifurcation in the normal direction, governed by the sign of the first Lyapunov coefficient, while the tangent dynamics drift toward regions of decreasing sharpness. Under mild spectral and geometric assumptions on the loss landscape, we prove convergence to the minimizing manifold when training at the EoS threshold. As a corollary, we recover and unify prior results: we show that the product-stability condition of Gan (2026) is an instance of our framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个分岔理论框架来分析过参数化神经网络在稳定性边缘（EoS）上的梯度下降训练，证明了稳定EoS训练源于法向的翻转分岔，而切向动态则漂移到锐度降低的区域。
AI.motivation: 稳定性边缘（EoS）现象在现代深度学习中普遍存在，但之前的研究主要局限于标量或低维损失函数，缺乏对过参数化神经网络在现实场景下的理论理解。
AI.method: 通过将训练动态分解为最小化流形上的法向和切向分量，开发了一个分岔理论框架，分析梯度下降在稳定性边缘的行为，并基于损失函数的谱和几何假设进行理论证明。
AI.result: 证明了在稳定性边缘阈值训练时会收敛到最小化流形，稳定EoS训练源于法向的翻转分岔，而切向动态会漂移到锐度降低的区域，并统一了先前的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解过参数化神经网络在稳定性边缘的训练提供了理论基础，将Gan（2026）的乘积稳定性条件纳入统一框架，深化了对现代深度学习训练动态的理解。

title: Physics-Driven Zero-Shot MRI Reconstruction with Non-local Image Priors
summary: Zero-Shot Self-Supervised Learning (ZS-SSL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for accelerated Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction, eliminating the reliance on fully-sampled external datasets. However, learning solely from a single under-sampled scan suffers from supervision scarcity and optimization instability, often leading to overfitting or artifacts. To address these challenges, we propose a robust physics-driven ZS-SSL framework that synergizes physical consistency with image-domain non-local priors. Our method introduces three core innovations: (1) a Coil Sensitivity Map (CSM)-Guided Dynamic Repository, which stabilizes the training trajectory by filtering physically inconsistent artifacts based on coil sensitivity constraints; (2) a SPIRiT-based regularization, which enforces k-space self-consistency via a learned correlation kernel and stochastic masking; (3) a Non-Local Self-Similarity (NSS) Pixel Bank, which leverages the high-fidelity reference established by the former modules to explicitly mine non-local anatomical similarities, thereby augmenting supervision in the image domain. Extensive experiments on the FastMRI dataset demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly under high acceleration factors, effectively bridging the gap between zero-shot learning and supervised methods. The code is available at https://github.com/Zolento/NS-SSL.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合物理一致性与图像域非局部先验的零样本自监督学习框架，用于加速MRI重建，无需外部全采样数据集，在FastMRI数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的零样本自监督学习（ZS-SSL）仅依赖单个欠采样扫描，存在监督稀缺和优化不稳定的问题，容易导致过拟合或伪影。需要一种更鲁棒的方法来结合物理约束与图像先验。
AI.method: 提出三个核心创新：1）线圈灵敏度图引导的动态存储库，基于线圈灵敏度约束过滤物理不一致的伪影；2）SPIRiT正则化，通过学习的相关核和随机掩码强制k空间自一致性；3）非局部自相似性像素库，利用前两个模块建立的高质量参考显式挖掘非局部解剖相似性。
AI.result: 在FastMRI数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法实现了最先进的性能，特别是在高加速因子下，有效缩小了零样本学习与监督方法之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 提出的物理驱动零样本自监督学习框架通过结合物理一致性与图像域非局部先验，解决了传统ZS-SSL的监督稀缺和优化不稳定问题，为加速MRI重建提供了一种无需外部数据集的鲁棒解决方案。

title: RHO: Your Coding Agent is Secretly a Roboticist
comment: 46 pages, 9 figures, 15 tables. Project page: https://rho-robotics.github.io
summary: Code-as-Policies (CaP) has shown that large language models (LLMs) can write code to solve robotics tasks by composing perception, planning, and control primitives. Recent CaP systems, however, rely on multi-turn code-generation loops at test time, which is often infeasible for real-time robot control. We introduce Robotics Harness Optimization (RHO), a novel paradigm in which tool-enabled coding agents, at training time, propose and search for interpretable, neurosymbolic multi-file policy repositories (Repositories-as-Policies) that compose these primitives rather than a single prompt, function, or file. RHO searches with reflective feedback from environment reward and execution rather than teleoperation demonstrations. It generalizes to perturbed pick-and-place settings like LIBERO-PRO, where OpenVLA scores 0.0% and $π_{0.5}$ averages 12.83%. Using the same low-level primitives, RHO reaches a 45.0% success rate, 2.5x higher than the strongest multi-turn agentic system, and 3.5x higher than $π_{0.5}$. On Robosuite, RHO sets a new state-of-the-art of 70.0%, exceeding the prior multi-turn record of 68.29% using single-turn execution with no corrective LLM code edits at deployment. When an LLM is used in the control loop, as on RAI's O3DE benchmark, RHO optimizes the deployed agent's multi-file harness of prompts, tools, and control code, improving held-out success from 23.5% to 44.3% with 20% less wall-clock time and 27% fewer tool calls.

AI.tldr: RHO（Robotics Harness Optimization）是一种新的训练时优化范式，它通过搜索可解释的神经符号多文件策略库来组合机器人基元，避免了测试时的多轮代码生成循环，实现了单次执行的高效机器人控制。
AI.motivation: 现有的Code-as-Policies系统依赖测试时的多轮代码生成循环，这在实时机器人控制中往往不可行。需要一种能够在训练时优化策略库，在部署时实现单次执行的方法。
AI.method: RHO在训练时让工具增强的编码智能体提出和搜索可解释的神经符号多文件策略库，这些库组合了感知、规划和控制的基元。通过环境奖励和执行的反馈进行搜索优化，而不是依赖遥操作演示。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-PRO上达到45.0%的成功率，比最强的多轮智能体系统高2.5倍，比π0.5高3.5倍。在Robosuite上达到70.0%的新SOTA，超过之前68.29%的多轮记录。在RAI的O3DE基准上，将保持成功率从23.5%提升到44.3%，同时减少20%的挂钟时间和27%的工具调用。
AI.conclusion: RHO通过训练时优化多文件策略库，实现了部署时的单次高效执行，显著提升了机器人任务的成功率，同时减少了计算开销，为实时机器人控制提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Distilling Drifting Transformers with Representation Autoencoders
summary: Representation Autoencoders (RAEs) have improved diffusion and flow models by semantically richer latent space owing to the strongly label-wise clustered DINO features in the pretrained encoders. Yet in the distillation stage, the severe anisotropy and large curvatures caused by the rich semantic representations would hinder the convergence and performance, making the trajectory-based distillation unstable. In this work, we argue that the RAE latent space is compatible with distillation via the newly proposed Drifting Models. We first quantitatively study the curvatures and isotropy statistics across different autoencoders, and theoretically reveal that Drifting Model itself is highly likely to fail on extremely scattered spaces like reconstruction-based VAEs. These motivate us to apply the drifting paradigm directly to representation autoencoders. Our proposed method, Drift-RAE, distills pretrained flow models in RAE latent spaces using Drifting, together with insightful modifications that improve training stability by thereotically aligning drifting fields with other frameworks. Regarding the experimental evidences, we achieve 1.77 FID on ImageNet 256 dataset using only 10k distillation steps, surpassing state-of-the-art RAE distillation methods and appearing comparative with the original Drifting Model without requiring an auxiliary MAE feature extractor. The code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: Drift-RAE方法将漂移模型应用于表示自编码器（RAE）的潜在空间，解决了RAE在蒸馏阶段因丰富语义表示导致的各向异性和大曲率问题，显著提升了训练稳定性和性能，在ImageNet 256数据集上仅用10k步达到1.77 FID。
AI.motivation: 表示自编码器（RAEs）通过预训练编码器中的DINO特征创建了语义更丰富的潜在空间，但蒸馏阶段严重的各向异性和大曲率阻碍了收敛和性能，使基于轨迹的蒸馏不稳定。本研究旨在解决RAE潜在空间与蒸馏的兼容性问题。
AI.method: 提出Drift-RAE方法：1）定量分析不同自编码器的曲率和各向同性统计；2）理论上揭示漂移模型在极端分散空间（如基于重建的VAEs）中的失败可能性；3）将漂移范式直接应用于表示自编码器；4）通过理论对齐漂移场与其他框架的改进来提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 256数据集上仅用10k蒸馏步数就达到了1.77 FID，超越了最先进的RAE蒸馏方法，且与原始漂移模型性能相当，无需辅助MAE特征提取器。
AI.conclusion: Drift-RAE成功将漂移模型应用于RAE潜在空间，解决了蒸馏稳定性问题，在保持RAE语义丰富优势的同时实现了高效蒸馏，为扩散和流模型在语义丰富潜在空间中的蒸馏提供了有效解决方案。

title: Learn Temporal Consistency For Robust Satellite Video Detector
summary: Satellite video object detection (SVOD) for oriented and fine-grained objects plays an important role in satellite applications. Most existing SVOD methods only focus on one or a few coarse-grained categories of moving objects and represent objects with horizontal bounding boxes. They have difficulty extracting complete, accurate, and consistent information about objects in whole satellite videos. In this paper, we propose a satellite video object detection framework based on Temporal Consistency Learning (TCL). TCL adeptly detects oriented and fine-grained objects by leveraging the rich temporal contexts within satellite videos. The framework integrates three key modules: temporal and fine-grained feature aggregation (TFA), structure encoding (SE), and temporal consistency constraint (TCC). TFA and TCC modules facilitate consistent representation learning across frames, while the SE module encodes both appearance and structural information for precise fine-grained recognition. Experimental results on the SAT-MTB benchmark dataset demonstrate TCL's superior performance, achieving a new state-of-the-art oriented and fine-grained detection accuracy of 47.7% mAP--a 4.8% improvement over the baseline. Furthermore, our TCL framework readily accommodates existing image-based detectors, leading to enhanced detection accuracies.

AI.tldr: TCL框架通过时间一致性学习提升卫星视频中定向细粒度目标检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有卫星视频目标检测方法主要关注粗粒度类别，使用水平边界框，难以从整个视频中提取完整、准确、一致的目标信息
AI.method: 提出基于时间一致性学习的框架，包含三个关键模块：时间和细粒度特征聚合、结构编码、时间一致性约束，利用卫星视频中的丰富时间上下文
AI.result: 在SAT-MTB基准数据集上达到47.7% mAP的新SOTA，比基线提升4.8%，且能兼容现有基于图像的检测器
AI.conclusion: TCL框架能有效检测卫星视频中的定向细粒度目标，通过利用时间上下文实现一致的特征学习和精确识别

title: HOLO-MPPI: Multi-Scenario Motion Planning via Hierarchical Policy Optimization
summary: Robots deployed in the real world must plan motions across diverse scenarios without per-scenario retuning. End-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) can generalize across scenarios but often becomes brittle under distribution shift, reward misspecification, and stochastic interactions. Model predictive path integral (MPPI) control enables strong real-time refinement without gradients, but its performance depends on a well-shaped sampling prior, while manually designing the priors does not scale to multi-scenario deployment. We present HOLO-MPPI (High-level Offline, Low-level Online MPPI), a multi-scenario motion planning framework that combines high-level policy learning with low-level stochastic optimal control. Offline, we learn a high-level policy that proposes scenario-robust plans in an abstract action space, with a learned world model for online rollout. Online, the policy serves as a data-driven prior generator that parameterizes MPPI's sampling distribution conditioned on the current observation and goal. MPPI then optimizes low-level control sequences around this prior in real time to adapt to local disturbances. We instantiate HOLO-MPPI in autonomous driving by designing an effective high-level action space and tailored model architectures. Our evaluation across diverse driving scenarios shows that HOLO-MPPI improves upon MPPI and end-to-end RL baselines while maintaining real-time control.

AI.tldr: HOLO-MPPI是一个结合高层策略学习和底层随机最优控制的多场景运动规划框架，通过离线学习高层策略生成场景鲁棒的规划，在线作为数据驱动的先验生成器参数化MPPI的采样分布，实现实时适应局部干扰。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的机器人需要在多样化场景中进行运动规划而无需针对每个场景重新调优。端到端强化学习可以泛化但面对分布偏移、奖励函数设计不当和随机交互时往往变得脆弱。MPPI控制能够进行实时优化但性能依赖于良好设计的采样先验，而手动设计先验无法扩展到多场景部署。
AI.method: HOLO-MPPI框架结合高层策略学习和底层随机最优控制。离线阶段学习高层策略，在抽象动作空间中提出场景鲁棒的规划，并使用学习的世界模型进行在线推演。在线阶段，该策略作为数据驱动的先验生成器，根据当前观测和目标参数化MPPI的采样分布。MPPI然后围绕这个先验实时优化底层控制序列以适应局部干扰。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶领域实例化HOLO-MPPI，设计了有效的高层动作空间和定制化的模型架构。在多样化驾驶场景中的评估显示，HOLO-MPPI相比MPPI和端到端RL基线有所改进，同时保持实时控制能力。
AI.conclusion: HOLO-MPPI通过结合高层离线策略学习和底层在线MPPI控制，实现了多场景运动规划，既保持了端到端RL的泛化能力，又具备MPPI的实时适应性和鲁棒性，解决了传统方法在分布偏移和手动先验设计方面的局限性。

title: A Decision-Theoretic View of Test-Time Training: When, How Far, and Which Directions to Adapt
summary: Test-time training (TTT) adapts a pretrained model to each prompt via parameter updates, improving accuracy under pretraining-to-test distribution shifts. Yet, its performance often suffers from instability and sensitivity to hyperparameters such as update steps and subspace. We explain this behavior through a decision-theoretic lens, treating TTT as implicit Bayesian inference in the kernel regime. Under a Gaussian process benchmark, we show that TTT reduces prediction error when updates are spectrally matched to the prompt's signal-to-noise ratio and aligned with query-relevant eigen-directions. This perspective underpins the following results: (1) we show when fixed update steps and subspaces fail under distribution shifts, motivating adaptive strategies; (2) we prove that selecting update steps via prompt evidence admits a PAC-Bayes guarantee against overfitting; and (3) we characterize the Bayes-optimal update subspace under a linear-Gaussian correction model, yielding a scoring rule for selecting Transformer blocks and heads. Our theory helps explain the empirical instability of TTT, taking a step toward principled guidance for when, how far, and which directions to adapt.

AI.tldr: 测试时训练通过隐式贝叶斯推断在核机制下解释，提出自适应更新步长和子空间选择的理论框架
AI.motivation: 测试时训练在分布偏移下能提升精度，但存在不稳定性和超参数敏感性问题，需要理论解释和指导
AI.method: 从决策理论视角将TTT视为核机制下的隐式贝叶斯推断，提出高斯过程基准下的理论分析框架
AI.result: 证明了：1）固定更新步长和子空间在分布偏移下失效；2）基于提示证据选择更新步长可获得PAC-Bayes保证；3）在线性高斯修正模型下推导出贝叶斯最优更新子空间
AI.conclusion: 该理论解释了TTT的实证不稳定性，为"何时适应、适应多远、适应哪些方向"提供了原则性指导

title: Multi-view feature High-order Fusion for Space Weak Object Detection and Segmentation
summary: Weak objects are common in images and videos of space applications. However, it is hard to learn proper representations from their limited appearance information. Inspired by multi-view learning, we develop simple multi-view attentions, treating their outputs as multi-view features. We also propose a multi-view feature high-order fusion method (MHF) to aggregate more accurate and richer features of weak objects. Our MHF extends the commonly used low-order feature fusion method to higher orders. It enhances the model's capacity to capture relevant and complementary information about weak objects. This is achieved by introducing high-order multi-view features perception and a recursive task-contribution gated selection of multi-view features. The new operation is highly flexible and customizable. It is compatible with various variants of multi-view feature representations. We conduct extensive experiments on two newly constructed space science datasets and an open, large-scale satellite video dataset. Our MHF serves as a plug-and-play module and significantly improves various vision transformers and convolution-based detection and segmentation models. We achieve all state-of-the-art accuracies on both tasks across three datasets. Our MHF can be a new basic module for visual modeling that effectively represents weak objects in terms of multi-view learning. The code will be available at https://github.com/Kingdroper/MHF.

AI.tldr: 提出多视图特征高阶融合方法(MHF)，通过高阶多视图特征感知和递归任务贡献门控选择，有效提升弱目标表示能力，在空间科学和卫星视频数据集上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 空间应用图像视频中的弱目标常见但难以从有限外观信息中学习合适表示，受多视图学习启发，需要开发能聚合更准确丰富特征的方法。
AI.method: 提出多视图特征高阶融合方法(MHF)：1)将简单多视图注意力输出作为多视图特征；2)引入高阶多视图特征感知；3)递归任务贡献门控选择多视图特征，扩展常用低阶特征融合到高阶。
AI.result: 在两个新构建的空间科学数据集和一个开放大规模卫星视频数据集上广泛实验，MHF作为即插即用模块显著改进各种视觉Transformer和卷积基检测分割模型，在两个任务上均实现SOTA准确率。
AI.conclusion: MHF是高度灵活可定制的视觉建模基础模块，能通过多视图学习有效表示弱目标，代码将开源。

title: Robots that Collaborate: Sequential Asymmetric Imitation for Learning Coupled Robot Policies
summary: Collaborative mobile manipulation requires robots to coordinate with a partially observed partner while physically interacting through shared objects. This is difficult because failures often arise not from poor local skills, but from mistimed waiting, yielding, pulling, releasing, or repositioning. We study this problem with two bimanual mobile manipulators coupled through rigid and deformable objects. We propose Sequential Asymmetric Imitation (SAI), a single-teleoperator curriculum for learning coupled multi-robot behaviors without synchronized dual-operator demonstrations or explicit inter-robot communication. SAI trains Robot A from unilateral demonstrations with a compliant human partner, trains Robot B against the deployed Robot A policy, and then refines Robot A using sparse interventions near coordination failures. This staged process exposes the policies to increasingly realistic partner behaviors, including delay, phase mismatch,insufficient yielding, and interaction conflict. Across real-world dual-robot manipulation tasks, SAI improves task success, phase synchronization, and partner-contingent yielding over independent imitation and curriculum-ablation baselines. These results suggest that physically coupled collaboration can be learned through the structure of the imitation curriculum, rather than through synchronized multi-operator demonstrations or explicit coordination mechanisms.Project page:http://cyc0429.github.io/sai-project-page/

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SAI（顺序非对称模仿）方法，通过单操作者演示的课程学习，让两个移动机械臂在没有同步双操作者演示或显式通信的情况下，学习通过刚性/柔性物体进行物理耦合协作
AI.motivation: 协作移动操作需要机器人与部分可观测的伙伴协调，同时通过共享物体进行物理交互。困难在于失败通常不是由于本地技能不足，而是由于时机不当的等待、让步、拉动、释放或重新定位。当前方法需要同步双操作者演示或显式协调机制，这在实际中难以实现。
AI.method: 提出SAI方法：1）使用顺从的人类伙伴进行单边演示训练机器人A；2）针对已部署的机器人A策略训练机器人B；3）使用稀疏干预在协调失败附近细化机器人A。这种分阶段过程让策略接触到越来越真实的伙伴行为，包括延迟、相位不匹配、让步不足和交互冲突。
AI.result: 在真实世界的双机器人操作任务中，SAI相比独立模仿和课程消融基线，提高了任务成功率、相位同步性和伙伴条件性让步。该方法在刚性物体（如托盘）和柔性物体（如床单）协作任务中都取得了成功。
AI.conclusion: 物理耦合协作可以通过模仿课程的结构来学习，而不需要同步的多操作者演示或显式协调机制。SAI方法为学习协作移动操作提供了一种实用且有效的方法。

title: Localizing Credit at the Divergence: Path-Conditioned Self-Distillation for LLM Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards assigns a single scalar to each rollout, leaving token-level credit assignment underspecified in long reasoning traces. On-policy self-distillation addresses this by letting the same model act as a teacher conditioned on privileged information, producing a dense per-token signal. But the common choice of a ground-truth answer is only an endpoint cue: on terse-answer tasks, the teacher falls silent at the intermediate positions where path-level guidance matters most. We propose Hindsight Self-Distillation (HSD), which conditions the teacher on a successful peer rollout drawn from the current training group. Such a peer is an exact sample from the success-conditioned policy, requiring no additional sampled rollouts. By providing a full successful continuation rather than only the final answer, the resulting credit signal concentrates at the divergence position between a failed rollout and a successful peer. Across Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-32B on math and code benchmarks, HSD obtains the best result against GRPO variants and on-policy distillation baselines, with the largest gains on terse-answer tasks such as AIME.

AI.tldr: HSD（后见之明自蒸馏）通过使用成功同伴的完整轨迹作为教师信号，解决了稀疏奖励下长推理轨迹中的信用分配问题，在数学和代码任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习中的稀疏奖励（每个轨迹一个标量）无法为长推理轨迹提供细粒度的信用分配。现有的基于真实答案的自蒸馏方法在简洁答案任务中，在中间推理步骤上缺乏指导信号。
AI.method: 提出后见之明自蒸馏（HSD），使用当前训练组中成功的同伴轨迹作为教师信号，而不是仅使用最终答案。这种方法不需要额外采样，直接利用成功条件下的策略样本提供完整的成功延续轨迹。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-32B模型上，HSD在数学和代码基准测试中优于GRPO变体和现有自蒸馏方法，特别是在AIME等简洁答案任务上取得了最大提升。
AI.conclusion: HSD通过利用成功同伴轨迹提供密集的每token指导信号，有效解决了长推理轨迹中的信用分配问题，在需要中间推理指导的任务上表现优异。

title: EyeMVP: OCT-Informed Fundus Representation Learning via Paired CFP--OCT Pretraining
summary: Color fundus photography (CFP) is the mainstay for large-scale retinal screening, yet its diagnostic capacity is constrained by the lack of depth-resolved structural information. Optical coherence tomography (OCT) provides cross-sectional retinal anatomy, but is less accessible in population-level screening. Here, we present EyeMVP, a cross-modal retinal foundation model that uses paired CFP--OCT pretraining to learn OCT-informed CFP representations. EyeMVP is pretrained on 674,893 strict same-eye same-day paired CFP--OCT image triples from 112,642 patients across eight hospitals in China. The model uses cross-modal masked reconstruction to enrich CFP representations with OCT-associated supervision, while requiring only CFP images at inference. To accommodate the non-aligned imaging geometry between en-face CFP and cross-sectional OCT, EyeMVP combines source-constrained cross-attention with CFP-derived structural masks. Across 16 downstream tasks, including classification, segmentation, few-shot adaptation, and cross-modal retrieval, EyeMVP outperforms representative retinal foundation models and shows consistent gains on tasks involving macular and optic nerve structure. For CFP-challenging macular diseases, EyeMVP achieves an AUROC of 0.948 for macular edema (vs.~0.852 for EyeCLIP) and 0.825 for myopic macular schisis. In an exploratory reader study, EyeMVP exceeds junior and intermediate ophthalmologist groups but does not reach senior ophthalmologist performance on macular edema, while showing numerically higher balanced accuracy than all reader groups on myopic macular schisis. These results suggest that pixel-level cross-modal reconstruction can enrich CFP representations with OCT-associated supervision, providing a practical route toward stronger CFP-based retinal analysis in screening settings.

AI.tldr: EyeMVP是一个跨模态视网膜基础模型，通过CFP-OCT配对预训练学习OCT增强的CFP表征，在多种下游任务中表现优异，特别在黄斑疾病诊断上显著提升性能
AI.motivation: 传统彩色眼底照相(CFP)缺乏深度结构信息，而光学相干断层扫描(OCT)虽能提供横断面解剖信息但在大规模筛查中可及性差。需要一种方法能够利用OCT的丰富信息来增强CFP的诊断能力
AI.method: 使用674,893个严格同眼同天的CFP-OCT图像三元组进行跨模态掩码重建预训练，结合源约束交叉注意力和CFP衍生的结构掩码来处理非对齐成像几何，仅在推理时需要CFP图像
AI.result: 在16个下游任务中优于代表性视网膜基础模型，黄斑水肿诊断AUROC达0.948（对比EyeCLIP的0.852），在探索性读者研究中超越初级和中级眼科医生，但未达到高级眼科医生水平
AI.conclusion: 像素级跨模态重建能够通过OCT相关监督丰富CFP表征，为筛查环境中基于CFP的更强视网膜分析提供实用途径

title: HATS: A Human-Agent Teleoperation System for Multi-Arm Data Collection
summary: Many real-world manipulation scenarios, such as handling complex collaborative tasks and dealing with large workspaces, require coordination of more than two robotic arms. Consequently, an effective multi-arm teleoperation system is required to collect demonstrations for training coordinated multi-arm manipulation policies. However, existing teleoperation frameworks mainly focus on single-operator or multi-operator setups, facing a practical trade-off between the cognitive load placed on a single operator and the coordination cost incurred by multiple operators. To address this problem, we introduce HATS, a human-agent teleoperation system that enables a single human operator, assisted by an MLLM-based agent, to collect data for multi-arm manipulation tasks. Our system decouples the control space: two primary arms are directly teleoperated by the human, while two assistive arms are controlled by a training-free agent that handles sub-tasks. In addition, the human operator can use voice commands to prevent collisions and correct assistive arm behaviors during execution. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that HATS achieves data collection efficiency and success rates comparable to expert dual-human teams. Moreover, downstream policy evaluations demonstrate the efficacy and quality of the data collected through HATS.

AI.tldr: HATS是一个人类-智能体遥操作系统，让单个操作员在MLLM智能体辅助下控制多机械臂收集数据，解决了单人多臂操作认知负担与多人协调成本之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中许多操作场景需要多机械臂协调，但现有遥操作系统要么是单操作员（认知负担重），要么是多操作员（协调成本高），需要一种折中方案来高效收集多机械臂操作数据。
AI.method: 系统将控制空间解耦：人类直接遥操作两个主要机械臂，而两个辅助机械臂由基于MLLM的无训练智能体控制，处理子任务。操作员还可通过语音指令防止碰撞和纠正辅助臂行为。
AI.result: HATS在数据收集效率和成功率上与专家双人团队相当。下游策略评估证明了通过HATS收集的数据的有效性和高质量。
AI.conclusion: HATS通过人类-智能体协作的遥操作方式，有效解决了多机械臂数据收集的挑战，为训练协调的多机械臂操作策略提供了高效的数据收集方案。

title: Is Code Better Than Language for Algorithmic Reasoning
summary: For tool-augmented language models, comparing natural-language reasoning with code-execution pipelines is difficult because the comparison changes both the intermediate representation and the execution mechanism. We separate these factors with an intermediate intervention: the model expresses its reasoning as executable code, and the language model simulates that code in context to produce an answer. On a 40-task verifiable algorithmic benchmark, deterministic code execution outperforms natural-language reasoning by +31.6pp. We observe that the intermediate intervention is not meaningfully different from natural-language reasoning (+0.15pp). These results suggest that, in our evaluated setting, changing the intermediate representation alone does not explain the tool-use advantage, providing evidence for the performance gains requiring reliable external execution. We formalize this intuition with a simple statistical decision-theoretic model that characterizes when execution dominates end-to-end risk in our disentangled trace-generation/execution regime. We validate our theory using a reconstruction intervention that leverages a proxy language model to infer natural-language reasoning traces from code representations, recovering performance comparable to the original natural-language reasoning pipeline. All experiments are at https://github.com/TerryTong-Git/ToolProj.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过将推理过程表达为可执行代码并由语言模型模拟执行，分离了中间表示和执行机制对工具增强语言模型性能的影响。研究发现确定性代码执行比自然语言推理性能提升31.6个百分点，而中间干预（代码表示）与自然语言推理差异很小（+0.15pp），表明工具使用优势主要来自可靠的外部执行而非中间表示。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是理解工具增强语言模型中，自然语言推理与代码执行管道性能差异的来源。传统比较难以区分中间表示和执行机制的影响，因此需要分离这两个因素来探究工具使用优势的真正原因。
AI.method: 采用中间干预方法：模型将推理表达为可执行代码，然后由语言模型在上下文中模拟执行该代码以产生答案。在40个可验证算法基准任务上进行实验，比较自然语言推理、代码表示和代码执行三种方法的性能。还通过重构干预使用代理语言模型从代码表示推断自然语言推理轨迹来验证理论。
AI.result: 确定性代码执行比自然语言推理性能提升31.6个百分点（pp）。中间干预（代码表示）与自然语言推理差异很小（+0.15pp）。重构干预能够从代码表示恢复出与原始自然语言推理管道相当的性能。这表明工具使用优势主要来自可靠的外部执行，而非中间表示本身。
AI.conclusion: 在评估的设置中，改变中间表示本身并不能解释工具使用的优势，性能提升需要可靠的外部执行。研究通过简单的统计决策理论模型形式化了这一直觉，表明在执行主导端到端风险的情况下，可靠的外部执行是关键因素。

title: Beyond Scalar Distances: Semantic Attribute Gradients from Frozen MLLMs for Visual Embeddings
summary: Vision encoders for retrieval are typically trained with class-label supervision: each training pair reduces to a scalar that uniformly pushes the embedding apart or pulls it together, as if every visual attribute either differed or matched. A multimodal large language model (MLLM), shown the same pair, can articulate those attributes and use them to predict whether the images share a class. We propose \textbf{SAGA}, a framework that turns this language-grounded, attribute-aware perception into a training signal for the encoder itself. Specifically, we use Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to reward the MLLM for correct predictions on the vision encoder's tokens. Since correct predictions require those tokens to expose the specific attributes that differ or match between the pair, the gradient pushes the encoder to encode them, replacing the uniform pair-level scalar with attribute-resolved supervision. An auxiliary attention-distillation loss anchors the encoder's embedding to tokens the MLLM attended to, and a standard metric-learning loss shapes the embedding geometry for nearest-neighbour retrieval. The MLLM is frozen throughout and discarded at inference, matching the deployment cost of a metric-learning baseline. SAGA improves Recall@1 by 3 to 6 points over state-of-the-art baselines on CUB-200-2011, Cars-196, FGVC-Aircraft, and iNaturalist Aves on zero-shot image retrieval.

AI.tldr: SAGA框架利用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的属性感知能力为视觉编码器提供细粒度监督，替代传统的类别标签监督，在零样本图像检索任务上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于类别标签的检索训练使用统一的标量监督（拉近或推远嵌入），忽略了图像对之间具体属性差异。MLLM能够识别和描述这些具体属性，但未被用于训练视觉编码器。
AI.method: 使用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)奖励MLLM基于视觉编码器token的正确预测，迫使编码器编码具体属性信息。同时使用注意力蒸馏损失将编码器嵌入锚定到MLLM关注的token，并配合标准度量学习损失。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、Cars-196、FGVC-Aircraft和iNaturalist Aves数据集上，SAGA将Recall@1提升了3-6个百分点，优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SAGA成功将MLLM的语言基础、属性感知能力转化为视觉编码器的训练信号，在保持推理成本不变的情况下，显著提升了零样本图像检索性能。

title: APEX: Adaptive Policy Execution for Precise Manipulation
summary: Modern imitation learning methods, including visuomotor and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies, typically output high-level action references that are executed by low-level controllers. However, the absence of higher-order reference signals, together with the policy's lack of awareness of the underlying low-level control dynamics during training, inevitably induces an execution gap. As a result, realized actions deviate systematically from policy-commanded ones, with a critical impact on precision-sensitive manipulation. Prior work either modifies the policy architecture or the low-level controller, both requiring intrusive changes to the pretrained policy or packaged controller. This raises a natural question: when the policy and controller are both treated as inaccessible black boxes, can we bridge the execution gap? We propose Adaptive Policy Execution (APEX), a plug-and-play framework inserted between the policy and the controller that reconstructs a dynamically feasible reference from policy outputs and adapts at test-time according to low-level state feedback, with a provable convergence guarantee. Extensive empirical studies show that APEX reduces controller-induced tracking error by 41.2% on demonstration replay and improves manipulation success by 4.8--25.8 percentage points across four visuomotor and VLA policy classes.

AI.tldr: APEX是一个在策略和控制器之间插入的即插即用框架，通过重构动态可行的参考信号并利用低级状态反馈进行自适应，来弥合模仿学习中的执行差距。
AI.motivation: 模仿学习策略输出高级动作参考，由低级控制器执行，但由于缺乏高阶参考信号且策略不了解底层控制动态，导致执行差距，使实际动作偏离策略命令，影响精密操作。
AI.method: 提出APEX框架，作为策略和控制器之间的中间层，从策略输出重构动态可行的参考信号，并根据低级状态反馈在测试时自适应调整，具有可证明的收敛保证。
AI.result: APEX将控制器引起的跟踪误差减少41.2%（在演示回放中），并在四种视觉运动和VLA策略类别上将操作成功率提高4.8-25.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: APEX能够在不修改预训练策略或控制器的情况下，有效弥合执行差距，提高模仿学习系统的精度和成功率。

title: MoECa: Aligning Feature Reuse with Expert Decomposition in Diffusion Transformers
summary: Diffusion Transformers with Mixture-of-Experts (DiT-MoE) improve model capacity under sparse activation, but diffusion inference is still bottlenecked by redundant computation across timesteps. Existing caching methods mainly operate at the token level, which becomes suboptimal in DiT-MoE because each token update is internally decomposed into multiple routed expert branches. Our analysis shows that cross-timestep redundancy in DiT-MoE is better characterized at the expert-branch level than at the whole-token level. Based on this observation, we propose MoECa, a fine-grained caching framework that performs branch-level feature reuse across timesteps. MoECa further introduces expert-aware adaptive control and synchronized cache updates across MoE and attention paths to maintain stable intermediate states. Experiments on multiple DiT-MoE models show that MoECa consistently achieves a better speed-quality trade-off than prior caching methods, with up to 2.83$\times$ inference speedup and minimal quality degradation.

AI.tldr: MoECa：针对DiT-MoE的细粒度专家分支级缓存框架，通过跨时间步的专家分支特征复用，显著提升推理速度
AI.motivation: DiT-MoE虽然通过稀疏激活提升了模型容量，但扩散推理仍受跨时间步冗余计算限制。现有token级缓存方法对DiT-MoE不理想，因为每个token更新被分解为多个路由的专家分支
AI.method: 提出MoECa框架，在专家分支级别进行跨时间步特征复用，引入专家感知自适应控制和MoE与注意力路径的同步缓存更新，以保持稳定的中间状态
AI.result: 在多个DiT-MoE模型上，MoECa相比现有缓存方法获得更好的速度-质量权衡，推理速度最高提升2.83倍，质量下降最小
AI.conclusion: MoECa通过细粒度的专家分支级缓存有效解决了DiT-MoE中的跨时间步冗余计算问题，为扩散模型的加速提供了新思路

title: MotionVLA: Vision-Language-Action Model for Humanoid Motion
summary: Generating realistic humanoid motion from scene images and text involves both low-frequency pose semantics and high-frequency physical dynamics. However, many existing methods tokenize motion with a single shared codebook, forcing heterogeneous motion signals into the same quantization space. Our frequency-domain analysis of human motion data reveals a clear mismatch between single-codebook quantization and motion statistics: five DCT coefficients capture 93% of joint-position energy but only 37% of joint-velocity energy, which can bias quantization toward pose statistics and under-represent high-frequency velocity components. A second challenge lies in adapting a standard autoregressive model to effectively model high-frequency physical signals in motion sequences. Therefore, we propose DSFT, a dual-stream frequency tokenizer that separates motion into Base and physical streams and compresses them independently with DCT truncation and BPE. Furthermore, we present MotionVLA, a Qwen3.5-based model that arranges Base and physical tokens in a unified sequence, where Phys tokens are predicted after Base tokens. Experiments on HumanML3D and MBench show that, despite using a lightweight 2B backbone, MotionVLA reduces the Diversity gap to real data by over 50% on HumanML3D and improves Motion-Condition Consistency by 3.8% on MBench, supporting frequency-aware dual-stream decoupling as an effective formulation for autoregressive motion generation. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/MotionVLA. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/MotionVLA.

AI.tldr: 提出DSFT双流频率分词器和MotionVLA模型，通过将运动分解为基频流和物理流分别处理，解决了单码本量化对高频速度分量表征不足的问题，在轻量级2B骨干网络下显著提升运动生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用单一共享码本对运动进行分词，将异质运动信号强制量化到同一空间。频率域分析显示单码本量化与运动统计不匹配：5个DCT系数仅能捕捉93%关节位置能量，但只能捕捉37%关节速度能量，导致量化偏向姿态统计而低估高频速度分量。
AI.method: 提出DSFT双流频率分词器，将运动分离为Base流（基频）和Physical流（物理），分别通过DCT截断和BPE进行独立压缩。然后提出基于Qwen3.5的MotionVLA模型，将两个流的token统一排列在序列中，其中Physical token在Base token之后预测。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D数据集上，Diversity gap相对真实数据减少了50%以上；在MBench数据集上，Motion-Condition Consistency提升了3.8%。尽管使用轻量级2B骨干网络，仍显著提升了运动生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 频率感知的双流解耦是自回归运动生成的有效公式，通过分离处理低频姿态语义和高频物理动力学，能够更好地建模运动序列中的高频物理信号。

title: Agile Fall Recovery for Quadrotors with Bidirectional Thrust via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Autonomous fall recovery is a critical capability for quadrotors operating in real-world environments, where collisions or failures may leave the vehicle resting on the ground in an arbitrary attitude. This problem is challenging because recovery must be achieved under limited onboard sensing, in constrained free space, with ground contact, and in the presence of unknown disturbances. In this letter, we present an RL-based framework for autonomous fall recovery of a quadrotor from arbitrary ground attitudes to stable hover using only lightweight onboard sensors. To address severe partial observability and intermittent sensor invalidity, we train a recurrent policy within an asymmetric actor--critic architecture, leveraging an Incremental Nonlinear Dynamic Inversion (INDI) controller to track the policy output. Combined with high-fidelity simulations of motor response and optical flow, the overall training framework significantly reduces the sim-to-real gap. Simulation ablation studies validate the importance of the main design choices, while real-world experiments demonstrate zero-shot transfer and robust recovery under different initial attitudes, wind disturbances, and additional payloads. These results demonstrate that agile quadrotor fall recovery can be achieved without explicit state estimation using only limited and unreliable onboard sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的四旋翼无人机自主倒地恢复框架，仅使用轻量级机载传感器就能从任意地面姿态恢复到稳定悬停。
AI.motivation: 四旋翼无人机在现实环境中可能因碰撞或故障以任意姿态倒在地上，需要自主恢复能力。该问题具有挑战性，因为恢复必须在有限的机载传感、受限自由空间、地面接触和未知干扰条件下完成。
AI.method: 采用基于强化学习的框架，使用非对称演员-评论家架构训练循环策略来处理严重部分可观测性和间歇性传感器失效，利用增量非线性动态反演(INDI)控制器跟踪策略输出。结合电机响应和光流的高保真仿真，显著减小仿真到现实的差距。
AI.result: 仿真消融研究验证了主要设计选择的重要性，真实世界实验展示了零样本迁移和在不同初始姿态、风干扰和额外负载下的鲁棒恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: 仅使用有限且不可靠的机载传感，无需显式状态估计，即可实现敏捷的四旋翼无人机倒地恢复，这为现实环境中的自主操作提供了重要能力。

title: Re-feeding Is Not Replaying: Measuring Replay Noise in Counterfactual Token-Credit Estimation
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures. Code, per-pivot data, logs, and registration: https://github.com/thaw-ai/thaw (benchmarks/, paper/refeed-drift/)
summary: Per-token counterfactual credit estimation asks which token in a language-model rollout caused the final answer to be right or wrong: cut the transcript at a pivot, substitute an alternative token, replay continuations, and compare outcomes. Published methods re-feed the transcript prefix as a fresh prompt, assuming this reproduces the state the model passed through during generation. We measure what that assumption costs on a stock inference engine, with a three-pass design: continuations resumed from the verified decode-time KV state, an identical second exact pass (a replica noise floor), and a re-feed pass. Across six configurations and three models (including a GRPO-trained checkpoint), at low-margin decision tokens, re-feeding changes the credit estimate at rates 14-28 percentage points above the replica floor (7-21pp under a treatment-independent conditioning; problem-clustered t = 2.9-6.4). Most changes are zero-boundary crossings of the quantized estimator rather than polarity reversals, and the perturbation is consistent with mean-zero, so averaged quantities are largely safe; but selection is not: a critical-token set chosen by thresholding $|\hat{A}_t|$ under re-feed overlaps the exact-resume selection at Jaccard 0.34-0.90, versus a 0.63-0.96 replica ceiling. A causal confirmation closes the loop: under vLLM's batch-invariant kernels all three passes are identical on every measured channel, with both disagreement rates exactly zero. Replica passes themselves disagree on 9-23% of eligible estimates: single-sample credit measurements at decision tokens are unreliable under any replay. Settings were fixed in advance; exact-pass cache hits in the second campaign are instrumented (100% hit rate, 3,434 pivots); total compute was under 10 USD. We recommend that counterfactual credit studies resume decoder state or use batch-invariant kernels, and report a replica floor.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在语言模型信用归因分析中，重新输入前缀（re-feed）的方法会显著改变信用估计结果，特别是在关键决策token处，变化率比精确复制基准高出14-28个百分点。建议研究应使用解码器状态恢复或批量不变内核，并报告复制基准。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是验证当前反事实信用估计方法中"重新输入前缀"假设的可靠性。已发表的方法假设重新输入前缀能复现生成时的模型状态，但这一假设的实际代价需要量化。
AI.method: 采用三阶段设计：1）从验证的解码时KV状态恢复继续生成；2）完全相同的第二次精确复制（作为基准噪声）；3）重新输入前缀方法。在六种配置和三个模型（包括GRPO训练检查点）上进行测试。
AI.result: 重新输入前缀在低边际决策token处改变信用估计的比率比精确复制基准高出14-28个百分点。大多数变化是量化估计器的零边界穿越而非极性反转。关键token集合的Jaccard相似度在重新输入前缀下为0.34-0.90，而精确复制基准为0.63-0.96。使用vLLM的批量不变内核时，所有三种方法完全一致。
AI.conclusion: 反事实信用研究应恢复解码器状态或使用批量不变内核，并报告复制基准。单样本信用测量在决策token处不可靠，需要谨慎处理。

title: HiRo: A Compact Four-Directional Hierarchical Reservoir Token-Mixer for Efficient Image Classification
summary: Recent image classification models must balance local feature modeling, cross-window interaction, and parameter efficiency. Many high-performing architectures rely on fully trainable token-mixers, which improve representation learning but increase parameter count, optimization complexity and computational cost. We propose a parameter-efficient image classification model called HiRo that integrates shifted-window partitioning with multi-directional hierarchical reservoir computing. Images are divided into non-overlapping patches (treated as tokens), linearly projected, normalized, and enriched with 2D sinusoidal positional encodings, then processed within local windows. Inside each window, tokens are scanned in four directions and passed through a two-stage slice-and-mix reservoir module. In the first stage, directional sequences are split into contiguous slices, each processed by its own fixed reservoir with a trainable closed-loop readout. The resulting slice outputs are summarized using the start, end, and mean representations, and then mixed by a second-stage fixed reservoir for each direction. The mixed slice representations are expanded back to the token level and fused with the first-stage outputs, after which the four directional outputs are realigned and averaged. Consecutive blocks alternate between regular and shifted windows to enable cross-window interaction, followed by layer normalization, a residual feed-forward network, and global pooling for classification. This design combines regular and shifted window partitioning with hierarchical multi-directional reservoirs to make an efficient local-to-cross-window token-mixing framework for image classification. Despite using under 1M trainable parameters and significantly lower memory and time than transformer-style baselines, HiRo also achieves 99.46%, 85.57%, and 59.10% accuracy on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, respectively.

AI.tldr: HiRo是一个参数高效的图像分类模型，通过结合移位窗口分区与多方向分层储备池计算，在保持高性能的同时显著减少了可训练参数数量。
AI.motivation: 当前高性能图像分类模型通常依赖完全可训练的token-mixer模块，这会增加参数数量、优化复杂度和计算成本。需要一种能够平衡局部特征建模、跨窗口交互和参数效率的解决方案。
AI.method: HiRo将图像分割为不重叠的patch，进行线性投影、归一化和位置编码后，在局部窗口内处理。每个窗口内，token按四个方向扫描，通过两阶段切片混合储备池模块：第一阶段将方向序列分割为连续切片，每个切片由固定储备池处理，具有可训练的闭环读出；第二阶段将切片输出汇总并混合。使用交替的常规和移位窗口实现跨窗口交互，最后通过层归一化、残差前馈网络和全局池化进行分类。
AI.result: HiRo使用不到100万可训练参数，显著降低了内存和时间消耗，在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上分别达到99.46%、85.57%和59.10%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: HiRo通过结合常规和移位窗口分区与分层多方向储备池，创建了一个高效的局部到跨窗口token-mixing框架，在保持高性能的同时实现了参数效率。

title: ADAPT: Analytical Disturbance-Aware Policy Training for Humanoid Locomotion
summary: Humanoids deployed in human-centered environments must handle force-interactive tasks, where external contacts introduce unexpected disturbances that disrupt locomotion accuracy and stability. Existing learning-based approaches rely on broad domain randomization, task-specific force objectives, or learning-based force estimators from motion history, each of which compromises accuracy, task transferability, or out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness. We present Analytical Disturbance-Aware Policy Training (ADAPT), a framework that equips humanoid policies with a physically grounded disturbance observer. The core of ADAPT is an analytical whole-body disturbance observer that estimates residual force/torque online with the accessible robot dynamics, without requiring force/torque sensors. Fed directly into the policy, the estimated disturbances give the humanoid an explicit, physics-derived sense of external force/torque that can generalize across diverse unseen scenes. Experiments on a Unitree G1 humanoid show that ADAPT achieves accurate disturbance prediction and stronger robustness than a proprioception-only baseline under torso perturbations, standing pushes, and asymmetric hand payloads, with improved velocity tracking even on OOD disturbances. Moreover, ADAPT enables penalizing inferred disturbances at lower-body joints to encourage lighter locomotion.

AI.tldr: ADAPT是一个为仿人机器人提供物理基础扰动观测器的框架，通过在线估计残余力/力矩来增强机器人在外力干扰下的鲁棒性和适应性，无需力/扭矩传感器。
AI.motivation: 仿人机器人在人机交互环境中需要处理力交互任务，外部接触会引入意外扰动，影响运动精度和稳定性。现有学习方法要么依赖广泛领域随机化，要么使用任务特定的力目标，要么从运动历史学习力估计器，这些方法在准确性、任务可迁移性或分布外鲁棒性方面存在不足。
AI.method: ADAPT框架为仿人机器人策略配备了一个物理基础的扰动观测器，核心是一个解析全身扰动观测器，通过可访问的机器人动力学在线估计残余力/力矩，无需力/扭矩传感器。估计的扰动直接输入到策略中，使机器人具有明确的、物理推导的外部力/力矩感知能力。
AI.result: 在Unitree G1仿人机器人上的实验表明，ADAPT实现了准确的扰动预测，在躯干扰动、站立推力、非对称手部负载等情况下比仅使用本体感觉的基线具有更强的鲁棒性，即使在分布外扰动下也提高了速度跟踪性能。此外，ADAPT可以通过惩罚推断的下肢关节扰动来鼓励更轻的步态。
AI.conclusion: ADAPT框架通过为仿人机器人策略配备物理基础的扰动观测器，显著提升了机器人在外力干扰下的鲁棒性和适应性，同时支持更轻的步态控制，具有很好的泛化能力。

title: Surprise-Guided MergeSort: Budget-Efficient Human-in-the-Loop Ranking via Adaptive Comparison Scheduling
summary: Pairwise comparison is the gold standard for subjective ranking tasks; however, exhaustive annotation requires a massive number of human comparisons ($O(n^2)$). While sorting-based methods have reduced this burden to $O(n\log n)$, they still require expensive human judgment for every single comparison. To further improve annotation efficiency, we propose leveraging a Vision-Language Model (VLM) not as an annotator replacement, but as a \emph{question prioritizer} to identify which comparisons genuinely require human judgment. The proposed \textbf{Surprise-Guided MergeSort (SGS)} framework achieves this through three integrated components: (1) a bottom-up MergeSort scheduler that structures comparisons and exploits transitivity, (2) a composite Surprise Scorer -- combining position-bias-cancelled VLM confidence, Elo gap, and vote entropy -- to quantify comparison ambiguity, and (3) an adaptive budget allocator that routes high-surprise pairs to humans while automating low-surprise pairs via transitivity inference. Validation was conducted on six diverse benchmarks spanning text similarity (STS-B, BIOSSES, SICKR-STS) and image quality assessment (KonIQ-10k, TID2013, LIVE Challenge). SGS effectively identified and skipped up to 535 non-informative comparisons per session. Consequently, it achieved Kendall's $τ{\times}100$ improvements of $+6$ to $+12$ over Active Elo under the same total budget. These results demonstrate that combining VLM-guided surprise metrics with algorithmic sorting provides a generally consistent accuracy-efficiency trade-off across diverse domains.

AI.tldr: SGS框架利用VLM作为问题优先级排序器，通过惊喜度评分识别需要人工判断的比较，结合归并排序和自适应预算分配，显著减少人工标注需求，在多个基准测试中提升了排序效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 成对比较是主观排序任务的黄金标准，但需要O(n²)次人工比较，成本高昂。现有的基于排序的方法将负担降至O(n log n)，但仍需对每次比较进行昂贵的人工判断。为了进一步提高标注效率，需要一种方法能智能识别哪些比较真正需要人工判断。
AI.method: 提出惊喜引导归并排序(SGS)框架，包含三个组件：1)自底向上的归并排序调度器，利用传递性结构化比较；2)复合惊喜评分器，结合位置偏差校正的VLM置信度、Elo差距和投票熵来量化比较模糊性；3)自适应预算分配器，将高惊喜度对分配给人类，通过传递性推理自动化低惊喜度对。
AI.result: 在六个多样化基准测试(文本相似性：STS-B、BIOSSES、SICKR-STS；图像质量评估：KonIQ-10k、TID2013、LIVE Challenge)中验证。SGS有效识别并跳过了每会话最多535个无信息比较。在相同总预算下，Kendall's τ×100相比主动Elo提升了+6到+12。
AI.conclusion: 将VLM引导的惊喜度指标与算法排序相结合，能在不同领域提供一致且高效的准确性与效率权衡，显著减少人工标注需求同时保持排序质量。

title: RefGC-SR$^2$: Reference-guided Generated Content Super-Resolution and Refinement
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The last two authors are co-corresponding authors. Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/RefGC-SR2/
summary: Reference-guided generation (e.g., object compositing, customization) has progressed rapidly, yet current pipelines share a fundamental limitation: the object-centric high-resolution reference image (HRRI) provided by users is downsampled to a fixed low-resolution (LR) before being fed into the model, so the fine-grained details are discarded before the output is even produced. In addition, the generation step then introduces its own artifacts (e.g., identity distortion) on top of this loss. Existing reference-guided generated content refinement (RefGCR) methods can correct some of these artifacts but still operate in the LR domain; reference-guided super-resolution (RefSR) methods recover resolution but assume natural-image degradations and ignore the artifact distribution of generative pipelines. To address both gaps in a single formulation, we introduce a new task: reference-guided generated content super-resolution-refinement (RefGC-SR$^2$), where the original HRRI is reused at the post-processing stage to recover lost details, refine generative artifacts, and upscale the output simultaneously. We construct the first real-world triplet data generation pipeline for this RefGC-SR$^2$ task, training a diptych-conditioned generator to synthesize paired low-quality anchors that public pretrained models cannot provide. We further present a frequency-aware diffusion transformer model for RefGC-SR$^2$ that selectively injects fine details from the HRRI while removing generative artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our RefGC-SR$^2$ model successfully (i) refines the object identity faithfully with respect to the reference, and (ii) recovers high-resolution details, so that the final result is significantly higher quality and practically more usable compared to existing RefGCR and RefSR baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出新任务RefGC-SR²，结合参考引导生成内容超分辨与精修，解决现有方法在低分辨率域操作或忽略生成伪影的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有参考引导生成方法存在两个根本限制：1) 高分辨率参考图像被降采样为固定低分辨率，丢失细节；2) 生成步骤引入自身伪影（如身份失真）。现有RefGCR方法在低分辨率域操作，RefSR方法假设自然图像退化且忽略生成管道的伪影分布。
AI.method: 1) 提出新任务RefGC-SR²，在后期处理阶段重用原始高分辨率参考图像同时恢复细节、精修生成伪影并上采样输出；2) 构建首个真实世界三元组数据生成管道，训练双联条件生成器合成配对的低质量锚点；3) 提出频率感知扩散变换器模型，选择性注入参考图像的精细细节同时去除生成伪影。
AI.result: 实验表明RefGC-SR²模型能：1) 忠实于参考图像精修对象身份；2) 恢复高分辨率细节，最终结果质量显著更高，实用性更强，优于现有RefGCR和RefSR基线。
AI.conclusion: RefGC-SR²任务通过结合参考引导生成内容超分辨与精修，有效解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了更高质量的生成内容恢复与精修。

title: Elastic ODYN: Differentiable Optimization for Infeasible Control and Learning in Robotics
summary: Robotic systems routinely encounter conflicting objectives, modeling errors, and degenerate contact conditions that render quadratic programs (QPs) infeasible. Yet most optimization solvers and differentiable QP layers assume feasibility, leading to numerical failures, unstable gradients, or solver breakdown when constraints cannot be simultaneously satisfied. We present Elastic ODYN, a primal--dual non-interior-point QP solver that handles infeasibility through smooth squared-$\ell_2$ elastic relaxations. The resulting formulation remains well posed under ill-conditioning and degeneracy, supports warm starting, and converges to closest-to-feasible solutions when no feasible point exists. A lightweight refinement stage recovers physically meaningful dual variables from the elastic solution. Building on this framework, we develop Elastic OdynLayer, a differentiable QP layer with stable gradients under infeasibility, and Elastic OdynSQP, an infeasibility-aware SQP method that resolves inconsistent subproblems and intrinsically infeasible optimal control tasks through selective constraint relaxation. We evaluate the framework on benchmark QPs, singular contact mechanics, differentiable parameter identification, and quadrupedal and humanoid trajectory optimization. Across all settings, Elastic ODYN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art elastic QP solvers in robustness, warm-start performance, and convergence reliability, enabling optimization, simulation, control, and learning beyond the feasibility assumptions of existing methods.

AI.tldr: Elastic ODYN 是一个处理不可行二次规划问题的原始-对偶非内点QP求解器，通过平滑的平方ℓ₂弹性松弛来处理约束不可行情况，确保在病态和退化条件下仍能保持良好数值行为，收敛到最接近可行的解。
AI.motivation: 机器人系统经常遇到目标冲突、建模错误和退化接触条件，导致二次规划(QP)不可行。现有大多数优化求解器和可微QP层都假设可行性，当约束无法同时满足时会导致数值失败、梯度不稳定或求解器崩溃。
AI.method: 提出Elastic ODYN，一种原始-对偶非内点QP求解器，通过平滑的平方ℓ₂弹性松弛处理不可行性。包含轻量级细化阶段从弹性解恢复物理有意义的对偶变量。基于此框架开发Elastic OdynLayer（可微QP层）和Elastic OdynSQP（不可行性感知SQP方法）。
AI.result: 在基准QP、奇异接触力学、可微参数识别、四足和双足机器人轨迹优化等任务中，Elastic ODYN在鲁棒性、热启动性能和收敛可靠性方面始终优于最先进的弹性QP求解器。
AI.conclusion: Elastic ODYN框架使优化、仿真、控制和学习能够超越现有方法的可行性假设限制，为机器人系统中常见的不可行QP问题提供了可靠解决方案。

title: Conflict-Aware Federated Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts
summary: The continuous scaling of large language models (LLMs) incurs prohibitive computational costs, making Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) a scalable alternative for efficient fine-tuning via sparse activation. While federated learning (FL) emerges as the paradigm for privacy-preserving collaborative optimization, integrating MoE into FL under data heterogeneity may trigger conflicting expert optimizations. Client-specific data distributions force same-indexed experts to optimize under inconsistent or even conflicting feature-label correlations. This mismatch induces destructive interference during aggregation, thus destabilizing the optimization trajectory and degrading model performance. To address this issue, we propose FC-MoE, a federated conflict-aware framework for MoE fine-tuning. It employs an importance aware weighting scheme to prioritize reliable local updates and utilizes gradient consensus projection to suppress conflicting updates, ensuring a stable global optimization path. Moreover, a local knowledge retention mechanism further preserves specialized client expertise by re-anchoring domain-specific residuals. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FC-MoE accelerates convergence and enhances both global and local model performance in non-IID federated environments.

AI.tldr: FC-MoE：一种用于非IID联邦学习环境的混合专家模型微调框架，通过重要性感知权重和梯度共识投影解决专家优化冲突问题，提升全局和局部模型性能。
AI.motivation: 在联邦学习中集成混合专家模型进行微调时，客户端数据异构性会导致相同索引的专家在不同客户端上学习不一致甚至冲突的特征-标签相关性，这种优化冲突在聚合时会产生破坏性干扰，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出FC-MoE框架：1）重要性感知加权方案，优先考虑可靠的本地更新；2）梯度共识投影，抑制冲突更新以确保稳定的全局优化路径；3）本地知识保留机制，通过重新锚定领域特定残差来保留专业化的客户端专业知识。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，FC-MoE在非IID联邦学习环境中能够加速收敛，并同时提升全局和局部模型性能。
AI.conclusion: FC-MoE有效解决了联邦学习中混合专家模型微调时的专家优化冲突问题，通过冲突感知的聚合机制确保了稳定的优化轨迹，在保护隐私的同时提升了模型性能。

title: DLWM: Diverse Latent World Models for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning
comment: Preprint. 9 pages main text, 15 pages total including appendix, 2 figures
summary: Reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have improved considerably in recent years. Existing approaches typically rely on explicit chain-of-thought or continuous latent-space trajectories to enhance multi-step reasoning. However, these methods generally assume that an input admits a single latent interpretation and unfold reasoning along a fixed path or under a uniform computation budget. In real-world multimodal settings, visual observations are often subject to occlusion, blur, viewpoint variation, or semantic ambiguity, giving rise to multiple plausible interpretations. A uniform reasoning strategy not only limits the model's ability to explore multiple hypotheses but also incurs high memory usage and rollout cost. We present DLWM (Diverse Latent World Models), a multimodal reasoning framework that combines latent-space reasoning with reinforcement learning. First, we construct a set of diverse latent world hypotheses in continuous latent space, each capturing a different plausible interpretation of the visual input, and unfold latent reasoning independently on each hypothesis. An orthogonality-based diversity regularizer explicitly prevents hypothesis collapse. Second, we formulate the latent reasoning process as a resource-constrained sequential decision problem and introduce a resource-aware reinforcement learning policy that adaptively allocates computation across hypotheses, dynamically deciding whether to expand, terminate, or merge reasoning paths, thereby substantially reducing memory footprint and improving rollout efficiency. Experiments on multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that DLWM outperforms existing methods by 2-5 points in accuracy while reducing memory usage by 24%.

AI.tldr: DLWM是一个多模态推理框架，通过构建多样化的潜在世界假设并结合强化学习，在多个可能的视觉解释上并行推理，自适应分配计算资源，提高准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型的推理方法通常假设输入只有单一潜在解释，并沿固定路径进行推理。但在真实多模态场景中，视觉观察常受遮挡、模糊、视角变化或语义模糊影响，存在多种可能解释。统一的推理策略不仅限制了模型探索多种假设的能力，还导致高内存使用和计算成本。
AI.method: 1) 在连续潜在空间中构建一组多样化的潜在世界假设，每个假设捕捉视觉输入的不同可能解释，并在每个假设上独立展开潜在推理，使用基于正交性的多样性正则化防止假设坍缩；2) 将潜在推理过程建模为资源受限的顺序决策问题，引入资源感知的强化学习策略，自适应地在假设间分配计算，动态决定扩展、终止或合并推理路径。
AI.result: 在多个多模态推理基准上的实验表明，DLWM比现有方法在准确性上提高了2-5个百分点，同时将内存使用减少了24%。
AI.conclusion: DLWM通过结合潜在空间推理和强化学习，能够有效处理多模态场景中的不确定性，在多个可能解释上并行推理，并自适应分配计算资源，显著提高了推理准确性和效率。

title: Automated Digital Twin Construction for Highway Scenarios Using LiDAR Point Clouds and OpenStreetMap
summary: Accurate road environment modeling is fundamental to the simulation and validation of automated driving systems. However, constructing road maps in standardized formats such as ASAM OpenDRIVE from real-world sensor data remains a time-consuming and costly process. Mobile mapping LiDAR captures accurate lane-level geometry but is confined to the driven corridor, while OpenStreetMap (OSM) provides broad road network topology but lacks geometric precision at the lane level. To address this, an automated workflow is proposed to fuse LiDAR point clouds with OSM data to generate georeferenced ASAM OpenDRIVE maps of highway environments, requiring minimal manual intervention. The pipeline reconstructs mainline roads from LiDAR-derived measurements and infers ramp geometry and topology from the OSM road graph, enabling complete highway interchange modeling without full sensor coverage. Experiments demonstrate a mean lateral RMSE of 0.740 m, and the generated maps are directly usable in mainstream simulation platforms including IPG CarMaker and Esmini. These results validate the effectiveness of combining measurement-derived geometry with map-derived topology for automated OpenDRIVE digital twin generation. The project code is available at https://github.com/ftgTUGraz/opendrive-digital-twin-generator

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种自动化工作流程，通过融合移动测绘LiDAR点云与OpenStreetMap数据，生成高速公路环境的ASAM OpenDRIVE数字孪生地图。
AI.motivation: 构建标准化格式（如ASAM OpenDRIVE）的道路地图通常耗时且成本高昂。LiDAR能提供精确的车道级几何信息但仅限于行驶走廊，而OSM提供广泛的道路网络拓扑但缺乏车道级几何精度。
AI.method: 提出自动化工作流程，融合LiDAR点云与OSM数据。从LiDAR测量重建主线道路，从OSM道路图推断匝道几何和拓扑，实现完整的高速公路立交建模，无需完整的传感器覆盖。
AI.result: 实验显示平均横向RMSE为0.740米，生成的地图可直接用于主流仿真平台（IPG CarMaker和Esmini）。验证了结合测量几何与地图拓扑进行自动化OpenDRIVE数字孪生生成的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合LiDAR几何精度与OSM拓扑广度，实现了自动化生成可直接用于仿真的ASAM OpenDRIVE数字孪生地图，项目代码已开源。

title: Formalizing and Mitigating Structural Distortion in LLM Attention for Zero-Shot Graph Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise for reasoning over Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs). However, applying LLMs to graphs requires linearizing their structure into sequences, introducing distortion rooted in the graph bandwidth problem. While this distortion has been shown to degrade performance, it is often attributed to prompt design or model scale, leaving the underlying mechanism unclear.
