To enhance efficiency, we introduce an asymmetric attention mask that enables joint training of both experts while allowing the action model to bypass explicit video generation during inference. This design ensures training-inference consistency and significantly reduces computational costs without compromising planning performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on the NAVSIM navhard and navtest benchmarks and the CityWalker navigation benchmark, validating both the generalizability and efficiency across diverse tasks. Real-robot deployments further confirm the practical feasibility of our approach.

AI.tldr: Metis是一个解耦视频生成和动作预测的世界动作模型框架，通过专家混合架构和不对称注意力掩码提升效率，在多个导航基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉-语言-动作模型或视频生成模型的世界动作模型存在两个关键限制：(1)测试时预测未来观测导致高推理延迟，(2)视频和动作建模紧密耦合导致表示不匹配和泛化能力下降。
AI.method: 提出Metis端到端框架，采用专家混合Transformer架构，为视频生成和动作预测分别设置专用专家。引入不对称注意力掩码，在训练时联合训练两个专家，在推理时动作模型可绕过显式视频生成。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM navhard、navtest基准和CityWalker导航基准上达到最先进性能，验证了方法的泛化能力和效率。实际机器人部署进一步确认了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: Metis通过解耦视频生成和动作预测，解决了现有世界动作模型的效率和泛化问题，在保持训练-推理一致性的同时显著降低计算成本，为自动驾驶和城市导航提供了实用解决方案。

title: Scalable and Interpretable Representation Alignment with Ordinal Similarity
summary: Evaluating representation similarity is fundamental to representation learning. However, existing metrics suffer from significant limitations: they lack interpretability due to shifting baselines, lack robustness to outliers, and are computationally intractable for large datasets, forcing reliance on heuristic approximations. To address this, we develop an ordinal-similarity framework, instantiated by the Triplet (TSI) and Quadruplet (QSI) Similarity Indices, which measure alignment by quantifying the consistency of ordinal relationships. We theoretically demonstrate this formulation is inherently interpretable, robust to outliers, and computationally efficient. Finally, we establish a formal equivalence between TSI and local neighborhood alignment, measured by Mutual Nearest Neighbors. Empirically, we validate these properties and show that ordinal similarity offers a scalable approach to measuring alignment, enabling practitioners to better understand and design representations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个序数相似性框架（TSI和QSI），用于评估表示相似性，解决了现有方法缺乏可解释性、对异常值敏感和计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有表示相似性评估指标存在显著局限性：由于基准线变化导致缺乏可解释性，对异常值缺乏鲁棒性，以及在大数据集上计算不可行，迫使依赖启发式近似。
AI.method: 开发了序数相似性框架，通过实例化的三元组相似性指数（TSI）和四元组相似性指数（QSI）来测量表示对齐，通过量化序数关系的一致性来衡量对齐程度。
AI.result: 理论证明该框架具有内在可解释性、对异常值鲁棒且计算高效。建立了TSI与局部邻域对齐（通过互最近邻测量）的形式等价性。实证验证了这些特性，表明序数相似性为测量对齐提供了可扩展方法。
AI.conclusion: 序数相似性框架解决了现有表示相似性评估指标的局限性，使从业者能够更好地理解和设计表示学习模型。

title: Deep Residual Injection for Full-Spectrum Forensic Signal Perception in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been increasingly adopted in forensics for their robust semantic understanding. As AI-generated images become realistic, semantic-level inconsistencies alone are often insufficient for reliable detection. This motivates a critical question: whether MLLMs can achieve full-spectrum forensic signal perception, i.e., capturing low-level generator artifacts without sacrificing pre-trained semantic knowledge. We further perform a layer-wise analysis of forensic signal perception in MLLMs, showing that semantic information is primarily formed in the early-to-middle layers, whereas direct fine-tuning for artifact learning disrupts these semantic representations. Based on this insight, we propose Deep Visual Residual MLLM (Deep-VRM) to preserve early semantic processing while injecting artifact-specific visual signals as a residual path into an intermediate layer, where they are fused with semantic token representations and propagated through subsequent trainable layers. This enables later layers to jointly model semantic reasoning and signal-level forensic cues, and surprisingly, the model learns to adaptively leverage different levels of forensic signals depending on the input, achieving robust and generalizable detection performance. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art across most benchmarks. The code and data are available at https://github.com/KQL11/Deep-VRM.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Deep-VRM方法，通过残差路径将生成器伪影信号注入MLLM中间层，在保持语义知识的同时实现全谱系法医信号感知，从而提升AI生成图像检测性能。
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成图像越来越逼真，仅依赖语义级不一致性已不足以进行可靠检测。需要探索MLLM是否能实现全谱系法医信号感知，即在不牺牲预训练语义知识的前提下捕获低级生成器伪影。
AI.method: 提出Deep-VRM方法：1）层间分析发现语义信息主要形成于早中期层，而直接微调会破坏这些语义表示；2）在中间层注入伪影特定的视觉信号作为残差路径，与语义token表示融合；3）通过后续可训练层联合建模语义推理和信号级法医线索，模型能自适应利用不同级别的法医信号。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能，模型能根据输入自适应利用不同级别的法医信号，实现鲁棒且可泛化的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: Deep-VRM方法成功实现了全谱系法医信号感知，在保持MLLM语义理解能力的同时有效捕获生成器伪影，为AI生成图像检测提供了新思路。

title: Text region detection in historical astronomical diagrams
summary: Text detection is a crucial task in the analysis of historical documents. While datasets and benchmarks exist for text detection in manuscripts and maps, the study of text in mathematical diagrams has received little attention. To address this, we introduce a large-scale, diverse, open-access dataset of 948 historical astronomical diagrams containing 10,940 oriented polygonal text regions. Our dataset spans ten centuries (8th to 18th) and seven main linguistic traditions: Arabic and Persian (115), Chinese (332), Byzantine (233), Latin (185), Hebrew (48), and Sanskrit (35). It captures a wide range of diagram styles and textual content, from symbols to multi-line paragraphs. Each text instance is annotated with ordered polygons that precisely delineate text regions and encode the reading direction. In addition, we annotated the 2,293 regions in Latin diagrams with 20 class labels. We evaluated several strong baselines on our dataset, including TESTR, DeepSolo++, and Poly-DETR, a simple extension of DINO-DETR that we design to predict ordered polygon vertices. Poly-DETR achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MTHv2 and cBAD2019 benchmarks and provides a solid, simple baseline on our dataset. Code and dataset available online.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了首个大规模、多样化的历史天文图表文本检测数据集，包含948个图表和10,940个多边形文本区域，涵盖10个世纪和7种语言传统，并开发了Poly-DETR模型实现最先进的文本检测性能。
AI.motivation: 历史文档中的文本检测是重要任务，但现有研究主要关注手稿和地图，数学图表中的文本检测研究很少。为了填补这一空白，需要创建专门针对历史天文图表的文本检测数据集。
AI.method: 创建了包含948个历史天文图表的大规模数据集，涵盖10个世纪（8-18世纪）和7种语言传统。每个文本实例用有序多边形标注，精确划定文本区域并编码阅读方向。还开发了Poly-DETR模型，这是DINO-DETR的简单扩展，用于预测有序多边形顶点。
AI.result: 数据集包含10,940个定向多边形文本区域。Poly-DETR在MTHv2和cBAD2019基准测试中达到最先进的性能，并在新数据集上提供了坚实的基线结果。拉丁语图表中的2,293个区域被标注了20个类别标签。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为历史天文图表文本检测提供了首个大规模、多样化、开放访问的数据集，并通过Poly-DETR模型展示了其有效性，填补了该领域的研究空白，促进了历史文档分析的发展。

title: SiGnature: Explicit Motion Diffusion for Stylized Semantic Gesture
summary: While recent advances in co-speech gesture generation have achieved impressive rhythmic synchronization, synthesizing gestures that are both semantically meaningful and faithful to a speaker's unique non-verbal style remains an open challenge. Semantic gestures, such as iconic shapes or deictic pointing, are statistically sparse, making them difficult to learn effectively within standard generative models. We present SiGnature, a framework for Stylized and Semantic Gesture generation that reconciles precise semantic control with high-fidelity style preservation. Unlike prevalent methods that rely on entangled latent representations, SiGnature operates in an explicit joint-rotation space. This design enables our core contribution, Joint Motion Integration (JMI), a training-free inference mechanism capable of injecting any external motion sequence, particularly in-the-wild semantic gestures, directly into the diffusion process. JMI automatically identifies the specific ``active joints'' conveying a semantic action and injects them into the generation, while relying on the diffusion backbone to synthesize the remaining body dynamics, including posture and flow, in accordance with the pre-learned style of the target speaker. This allows for the plug-and-play integration of arbitrary motions, including complex semantic gestures, without retraining or introducing the ``Frankenstein'' artifacts typical of cut-and-paste methods. Extensive experiments and perceptual studies demonstrate that SiGnature offers superior semantic motion control while maintaining smooth and natural co-speech gesture generation and preserving the distinct characteristics of the speaker, thereby outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: SiGnature是一个能够生成既具有语义意义又保持说话者独特非语言风格的共语手势框架，通过联合运动整合机制实现精确的语义控制和高保真风格保留
AI.motivation: 当前共语手势生成方法在节奏同步方面表现良好，但难以同时生成语义意义明确且忠实于说话者独特非语言风格的手势。语义手势（如标志性形状或指示性指向）在统计上较为稀疏，难以在标准生成模型中有效学习。
AI.method: SiGnature在显式关节旋转空间中操作，核心贡献是联合运动整合（JMI）机制。JMI是一种无需训练的推理方法，能够将任何外部运动序列（特别是真实世界的语义手势）直接注入到扩散过程中。它自动识别传达语义动作的"活动关节"并注入到生成过程中，同时依赖扩散骨干网络根据目标说话者预先学习的风格合成剩余的身体动态。
AI.result: 广泛的实验和感知研究表明，SiGnature在保持平滑自然的共语手势生成和保留说话者独特特征的同时，提供了卓越的语义运动控制，优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SiGnature框架成功解决了语义手势生成中的关键挑战，通过JMI机制实现了任意运动（包括复杂语义手势）的即插即用集成，无需重新训练，避免了传统剪切粘贴方法产生的"弗兰肯斯坦"伪影。

title: High-Fidelity 4D Hand-Object Capture via Multi-View Spatiotemporal Tracking and Physics-Aware Gaussians
summary: The growing demand for high-fidelity 4D hand-object interaction (HOI) data in embodied AI and spatial computing is currently bottlenecked by the reliance on pre-scanned object templates and physical markers. While recent methods have demonstrated promising results in reconstructing 4D hand-object interaction from videos, they are highly sensitive to initial estimates of hand and object poses. Yet, estimating these poses from images is challenging, in particular under severe occlusion which is inherent in hand-object interaction scenarios. We propose a novel system for the robust and accurate reconstruction of hands and objects from synchronized and calibrated multi-view videos without requiring any templates or markers. Our system consists of two main components with key innovations: (1) a multi-view feed-forward transformer model that aggregates cross-view geometry and temporal cues to provide a reliable, metric-consistent initialization for both poses and dense object geometry, and (2) a hand-object physics-aware Gaussian-based optimization framework to refine the initial estimates, integrating tetrahedral constraints, collision refinement, and appearance decomposition to produce physically plausible and visually accurate reconstruction. Validated on public benchmarks and an extensive internal dataset, our pipeline achieves highly robust, artifact-free reconstruction, providing an efficient foundation for automated 4D asset generation. Our project page are available at https://zyshen021.github.io/HOSTPG/.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需模板或标记的鲁棒4D手物交互重建系统，通过多视图Transformer提供初始估计，再经物理感知高斯优化框架进行细化
AI.motivation: 当前4D手物交互数据生成受限于预扫描对象模板和物理标记，现有方法对初始姿态估计敏感且在遮挡严重时表现不佳
AI.method: 系统包含两个核心组件：1) 多视图前馈Transformer模型，聚合跨视图几何和时序线索提供可靠的度量一致初始化；2) 手物物理感知高斯优化框架，集成四面体约束、碰撞细化和外观分解进行细化
AI.result: 在公开基准和内部数据集上验证，实现了高度鲁棒、无伪影的重建，为自动化4D资产生成提供了高效基础
AI.conclusion: 提出的系统能够从同步校准的多视图视频中实现鲁棒准确的4D手物交互重建，无需任何模板或标记，为相关应用提供了有效解决方案

title: OmniOPSD: Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation for Affective Computing
summary: Reinforcement learning for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is often hindered by severe reward sparsity in complex reasoning tasks. This challenge is particularly pronounced in human-centered scenarios involving states, emotions, intentions, and behaviors, where heterogeneous multimodal signals and subjective human factors make high-quality chain-of-thought (CoT) annotations expensive and difficult to obtain. Although many multimodal datasets provide expert-annotated ground-truth labels, directly using these labels for supervised fine-tuning may encourage shortcut learning in multimodal perception and provides limited transparency for safety-critical human--AI interaction. To address these limitations, we propose OmniOPSD, a Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation framework that uses frontier-generated rationales as teacher-side privileged evidence rather than student imitation targets. OmniOPSD uses frontier-generated evidence-aware rationales only as training-time privileged evidence context for a local teacher. The student samples its own rollout from the original multimodal input, while the rationale-privileged teacher scores the same tokens and provides dense token-level supervision. Thus, the student learns on its own trajectory distribution without directly imitating frontier-model completions, and inference requires no labels, rationales, CoT annotations, or closed-source model access. Experiments on MER-UniBench show that OmniOPSD achieves state-of-the-art performance with an average score of $84.19$, and ablations further support the value of rationale-privileged teacher guidance.

AI.tldr: OmniOPSD提出了一种基于理性特权证据的强化学习框架，解决多模态大语言模型在复杂推理任务中的奖励稀疏问题，避免直接模仿前沿模型，实现了无标签、无理性标注的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在复杂推理任务中面临严重的奖励稀疏问题，特别是在涉及状态、情感、意图和行为的以人为中心的场景中。异构多模态信号和主观人为因素使得高质量思维链标注昂贵且难以获取。虽然现有数据集提供专家标注的真实标签，但直接用于监督微调可能鼓励多模态感知中的捷径学习，且对安全关键的人机交互透明度有限。
AI.method: OmniOPSD是一个理性特权在线策略自蒸馏框架，使用前沿模型生成的理性作为教师侧的特权证据而非学生模仿目标。该框架仅将前沿生成的证据感知理性作为训练时特权证据上下文提供给本地教师。学生从原始多模态输入中采样自己的轨迹，而理性特权教师对相同标记进行评分并提供密集的标记级监督。这样学生可以在自己的轨迹分布上学习，无需直接模仿前沿模型补全，推理时无需标签、理性、思维链标注或闭源模型访问。
AI.result: 在MER-UniBench上的实验表明，OmniOPSD实现了最先进的性能，平均得分为84.19，消融实验进一步支持了理性特权教师指导的价值。
AI.conclusion: OmniOPSD通过将前沿模型理性作为特权证据而非模仿目标，有效解决了多模态推理中的奖励稀疏问题，避免了捷径学习，提高了透明度，同时实现了无标注依赖的高性能推理。

title: Taylor-Calibrate: Principled Initialization for Hybrid Linear Attention Distillation
summary: Hybrid linear attention models offer an appealing path to faster long-context inference: they reduce the quadratic cost and KV-cache burden of full softmax attention while retaining much of the quality of Transformer models. A practical way to obtain such models is to convert a pretrained Transformer instead of pretraining a new architecture from scratch, but this conversion is still brittle. Simply copying the teacher attention projections into a Gated DeltaNet (GDN) student does not specify the new recurrent decay, write, and output-gating dynamics. As a result, the converted model often starts in a poor dynamical regime and must spend many distillation tokens repairing initialization rather than learning the remaining teacher behavior. We propose Taylor-Calibrate, a lightweight initialization method for hybrid GDN students. The method uses Taylor-guided teacher attention statistics to set the value projection, memory timescale, write gates, and output gate, then applies a short per-layer alignment step to match each converted layer to the teacher output. Across four teacher settings and three retained-layer policies, Taylor-Calibrate gives substantially stronger zero-shot students, with up to an 88x improvement in a representative ablation, and reaches matched recovery targets with 4.9x--9.2x fewer training tokens than naive conversion.

AI.tldr: 提出Taylor-Calibrate方法，通过泰勒指导的老师注意力统计来初始化混合线性注意力模型（Gated DeltaNet），显著改善从预训练Transformer转换的效果，减少训练token需求。
AI.motivation: 混合线性注意力模型能实现更快的长上下文推理，但将预训练Transformer转换为这种模型时存在初始化问题。简单的参数复制无法正确设置新的循环衰减、写入和输出门控动态，导致转换模型从较差的动态状态开始，需要大量蒸馏token来修复初始化而非学习老师行为。
AI.method: 提出Taylor-Calibrate轻量级初始化方法：1）使用泰勒指导的老师注意力统计来设置值投影、记忆时间尺度、写入门和输出门；2）应用短期的每层对齐步骤，使转换后的每层与老师输出匹配。
AI.result: 在四种老师设置和三种保留层策略下，Taylor-Calibrate显著提升了零样本学生的性能，代表性消融实验中性能提升高达88倍，且达到匹配恢复目标所需的训练token减少了4.9-9.2倍。
AI.conclusion: Taylor-Calibrate方法有效解决了混合线性注意力模型转换中的初始化问题，通过更好的初始动态设置大幅提升了转换效果和训练效率。

title: TurboGS: Accelerating 3D Gaussian Splatting via Error-Guided Sparse Pixel Sampling and Optimization
comment: Accepted by ICML2026. Project page: https://zhengdong.site/projects/TurboGS/
summary: Consumer-level applications require fast optimization of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with high-fidelity novel view rendering. However, existing 3DGS acceleration approaches still incur substantial computation on redundant pixels while sacrificing fine details. In this paper, we present TurboGS, an error-guided training framework that accelerates 3DGS by concentrating optimization on perceptually informative pixels. TurboGS is built upon four core components: (1) a tile-wise sparse pixel sampling, which, driven by multi-view reconstruction errors during training, prioritizes challenging regions and skips well-reconstructed ones to avoid redundant gradient computation; (2) a tile-wise structure-aware loss with sparse Normalized Cross-Correlation, which provides sparse yet effective supervision to preserve fine details and stabilize training; (3) an error-driven Gaussian density control strategy, which dynamically allocates model capacity and removes redundant primitives; and (4) a tailored hybrid optimizer that couples Hessian-informed updates with Adam moment damping to stabilize and improve convergence under sparse supervision. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that TurboGS can deliver on par or superior rendering quality within 100 seconds on a single RTX 5090 GPU card (up to 10x training speedup over vanilla 3DGS).

AI.tldr: TurboGS是一个通过感知信息像素聚焦优化来加速3D高斯泼溅训练的框架，在保持高质量渲染的同时实现10倍训练加速。
AI.motivation: 消费级应用需要快速优化3D高斯泼溅以实现高质量新视角渲染，但现有加速方法在冗余像素上仍消耗大量计算，同时牺牲了细节。
AI.method: 基于四个核心组件：1) 基于多视角重建误差的瓦片稀疏像素采样，优先处理困难区域；2) 瓦片结构感知损失与稀疏归一化互相关，提供有效监督；3) 误差驱动的高斯密度控制策略，动态分配模型容量；4) 定制混合优化器，结合Hessian信息更新与Adam动量阻尼。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，TurboGS在单张RTX 5090 GPU上100秒内达到相当或更优的渲染质量，相比原始3DGS实现高达10倍训练加速。
AI.conclusion: TurboGS通过聚焦感知信息像素的优化，在保持高质量渲染的同时显著加速3DGS训练，适用于消费级应用需求。

title: Autonomous End-to-End SOH Prediction Services for Battery Systems via Temporal-Contrastive Representation Learning
summary: Accurate state of health (SOH) estimation is a critical diagnostic service for lithium-ion battery management. However, reliance on labor-intensive manual feature engineering and opaque black-box models hinders scalable industrial deployment. To address this, we introduce TC-SOH: a modular, plug-and-play service architecture for autonomous, end-to-end SOH prediction. TC-SOH employs a temporal-contrastive mechanism and a cross-window prediction pretext task to extract degradation-relevant representations directly from raw operational data. To improve transparency, we connect model efficacy with representation diagnostics: visualization, sensitivity analysis, redundancy analysis, bidirectional probing, future-SOH probing, and temporal shuffling show that learned features overlap with selected expert descriptors while retaining additional SOH-relevant variation, and that ordered temporal context improves subsequent-SOH prediction. Across four public datasets, TC-SOH outperforms the considered physics-informed and data-driven baselines, reducing MAPE by 1.91 times and RMSE by 2.13 times.

AI.tldr: TC-SOH：一种用于锂离子电池健康状态（SOH）估计的模块化、即插即用服务架构，通过时序对比机制和跨窗口预测任务从原始数据中学习表征，在多个公开数据集上超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 当前SOH估计方法依赖人工特征工程和黑盒模型，阻碍了工业规模化部署，需要一种自主、端到端且透明的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出TC-SOH架构，使用时序对比机制和跨窗口预测前置任务，直接从原始运行数据中提取与退化相关的表征，并通过多种诊断方法提高模型透明度。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上，TC-SOH优于物理知识和数据驱动的基线方法，将MAPE降低1.91倍，RMSE降低2.13倍。
AI.conclusion: TC-SOH提供了一种可扩展、透明且高性能的SOH估计服务，能够自主学习退化表征并利用时序上下文提升预测性能，具有工业部署潜力。

title: GOOSE-M2F: Adapting Mask2Former for High-Fidelity, Long-Tailed Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation in Unstructured Outdoor Terrain
comment: This solution has got 3rd position at GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026
summary: We present GOOSE-M2F, a task-specific adaptation of Mask2Former for the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026. The GOOSE benchmark spans 64 fine-grained classes across unstructured outdoor terrain with a severely long-tailed distribution, where rare classes occupy fewer than 50 pixels per image. We extend the Swin-Large Mask2Former baseline with three targeted contributions: (1)200 Object Queries to eliminate representational saturation; (2)a Feature Refinement Module (FRM) combining ASPP-lite and CBAM dual-attention; and (3)an Auxiliary Supervision Head that delivers direct per-pixel gradients for rare classes. A multi-stage training strategy pairs Distribution-Balanced loss, Rare-Class Copy-Paste augmentation, dynamic IoU-aware re-weighting, and EMA. At inference, a dense sliding-window engine with 2D Gaussian kernel blending and 4-scale TTA adds +10.57\%. GOOSE-M2F achieves 70.08\% Official Composite mIoU (63.55\% fine, 76.61\% coarse), placing 3rd on the GOOSE 2D FGSS leaderboard. Code and trained models are publicly available at: \href{https://github.com/Aditya-Lingam-9000/GOOSE-M2F}{Github GOOSE-M2F Code} and \href{https://huggingface.co/XYZ9843/GOOSE-M2F}{Hugging Face GOOSE-M2F}.

AI.tldr: GOOSE-M2F是针对GOOSE 2D细粒度语义分割挑战的Mask2Former改进，通过增加查询数量、特征细化模块和辅助监督头，结合多阶段训练策略，在长尾分布数据集上取得70.08%的复合mIoU。
AI.motivation: 解决GOOSE基准测试中64个细粒度类别在非结构化户外地形上的严重长尾分布问题，特别是罕见类别（每张图像少于50像素）的分割挑战。
AI.method: 基于Swin-Large Mask2Former，增加200个对象查询消除表示饱和，添加特征细化模块（ASPP-lite和CBAM双注意力），引入辅助监督头提供罕见类别的逐像素梯度。采用多阶段训练策略，包括分布平衡损失、罕见类别复制粘贴增强、动态IoU感知重加权和EMA。
AI.result: 在GOOSE 2D FGSS排行榜上获得70.08%的官方复合mIoU（细粒度63.55%，粗粒度76.61%），排名第三。推理时使用密集滑动窗口引擎、2D高斯核混合和4尺度测试时增强，提升10.57%。
AI.conclusion: GOOSE-M2F通过针对长尾分布和细粒度分割的专门改进，在GOOSE基准测试中取得了有竞争力的性能，代码和模型已公开。

title: SDS-LoRA: Overcoming Anisotropic Gradient Scaling in Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables efficient adaptation of large pre-trained models to downstream tasks by parameterizing weight updates with low-rank matrices. In this paper, we investigate the limitations of the LoRA parameterization from a geometric perspective. Specifically, we show that when a full fine-tuning gradient is backpropagated to the low-rank matrices, it undergoes anisotropic scaling driven by their singular values. We argue that this phenomenon is undesirable because it distorts the full fine-tuning gradient by skewing it toward dominant singular directions while suppressing others. Our analyses demonstrate that anisotropic gradient scaling reduces the effective rank of the low-rank matrices' gradients and results in suboptimal alignment between the full fine-tuning gradient and its low-rank approximation in LoRA, thereby exacerbating the gap to full fine-tuning. To address these limitations, we propose a new low-rank parameterization, SDS-LoRA, which structurally decouples singular values from the backward pass. Our method ensures that the full fine-tuning gradient backpropagates only through the orthonormal bases of the low-rank matrices' subspaces, independent of their scales. Convergence analysis demonstrates that while LoRA's convergence rate degrades with the condition number of the low-rank matrices, SDS-LoRA remains independent of it. Experimental results across natural language and vision benchmarks show that SDS-LoRA improves loss convergence and reduces the gap to full fine-tuning, significantly enhancing adaptation performance.

AI.tldr: SDS-LoRA：一种新的低秩参数化方法，通过结构化解耦奇异值与反向传播，解决LoRA中梯度各向异性缩放问题，提升适应性能
AI.motivation: LoRA在参数化权重更新时，从几何角度存在局限性：完整微调梯度在低秩矩阵中反向传播时会经历各向异性缩放，这会导致梯度扭曲（偏向主导奇异方向而抑制其他方向），从而加剧与完整微调的差距
AI.method: 提出SDS-LoRA（结构化解耦奇异值的LoRA），通过结构化解耦奇异值与反向传播，确保完整微调梯度仅通过低秩矩阵子空间的正交基反向传播，而不受其尺度影响
AI.result: 收敛分析表明，LoRA的收敛速率会随低秩矩阵条件数恶化，而SDS-LoRA与之无关。在自然语言和视觉基准测试中，SDS-LoRA改善了损失收敛，减少了与完整微调的差距，显著提升了适应性能
AI.conclusion: SDS-LoRA通过解决LoRA中的梯度各向异性缩放问题，提供了一种更优的低秩参数化方法，能够更好地逼近完整微调性能，提高大模型下游任务适应效率

title: Learning Directional Semantic Transitions for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Analysis
summary: Chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation often requires longitudinal comparison to assess disease progression. Existing approaches typically rely on temporal feature fusion or inter-study discrepancy modeling, yet remain limited in capturing subtle progression semantics and overlook the inherently directional nature of disease trajectories. In this paper, we propose ProTrans, a novel vision-language pretraining framework that formulates disease progression as a directional semantic transition between paired CXR studies. ProTrans leverages radiology reports to anchor individual CXR representations within interpretable disease states, and introduces a learnable progression feature map to explicitly encode semantic shifts between states, aligned with report-derived progression descriptions. To enforce direction-aware perception, ProTrans incorporates a reversed temporal modeling process and imposes bidirectional reconstruction consistency across states and transitions, thereby disentangling directional semantics and promoting coherent trajectory modeling. Extensive experiments on longitudinal downstream tasks, including disease progression classification and progression captioning, demonstrate that ProTrans consistently outperforms existing methods, establishing a unified pretraining framework for longitudinal CXR understanding. https://github.com/RPIDIAL/ProTrans

AI.tldr: ProTrans是一个新颖的视觉语言预训练框架，将疾病进展建模为配对胸部X光研究之间的定向语义转换，通过放射学报告锚定疾病状态，并引入可学习的进展特征图来编码状态间的语义变化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在纵向比较胸部X光时，通常依赖时间特征融合或研究间差异建模，但难以捕捉细微的进展语义，且忽视了疾病轨迹固有的方向性特征。
AI.method: ProTrans利用放射学报告将单个胸部X光表示锚定在可解释的疾病状态中，引入可学习的进展特征图来编码状态间的语义变化，并与报告衍生的进展描述对齐。通过反向时间建模过程和双向重建一致性约束，实现方向感知的进展理解。
AI.result: 在纵向下游任务（包括疾病进展分类和进展描述生成）的广泛实验中，ProTrans始终优于现有方法，为纵向胸部X光理解建立了统一的预训练框架。
AI.conclusion: ProTrans通过将疾病进展建模为定向语义转换，并利用报告引导的状态表示和方向感知学习，显著提升了纵向胸部X光分析的能力，为医学影像理解提供了新的预训练范式。

title: SPRI: SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization for Data-Constrained MoE Upcycling
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models enable efficient scaling, but training them from scratch remains prohibitively expensive. MoE upcycling mitigates this cost by converting pretrained dense models into sparse MoE models. However, existing upcycling methods typically rely on large-scale continued training and often perform poorly under data-constrained supervised adaptation, due to either homogeneous experts or overly disruptive perturbations to pretrained parameters. In this setting, effective upcycling must leverage pretrained weight structure while introducing sufficient diversity among routed experts. To this end, we propose SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization (SPRI), which distributes SVD-partitioned residuals derived from pretrained feed-forward network (FFN) weights across routed experts, introducing controlled expert diversity grounded in pretrained spectral structure. We further introduce a two-stage training strategy to improve adaptation stability. We evaluate SPRI on multilingual speech-to-text translation, where limited supervised data challenges MoE upcycling and multiple target languages provide natural routing heterogeneity. On CoVoST2 across 15 En-to-XX directions, SPRI improves average BLEU and COMET over fully fine-tuned dense models by 2.58 and 3.32 points, respectively, and outperforms the prior best MoE upcycling baseline by 3.39 BLEU and 4.34 COMET points.

AI.tldr: SPRI是一种新的MoE上循环方法，通过SVD分解预训练密集模型的FFN权重，将残差分配到专家中，引入基于谱结构的受控专家多样性，并在数据受限的监督适应场景下显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的MoE上循环方法需要大规模持续训练，在数据受限的监督适应场景下表现不佳，主要原因是专家同质性或对预训练参数扰动过大。需要一种方法既能利用预训练权重结构，又能引入足够的专家多样性。
AI.method: 提出SVD分区残差初始化(SPRI)，将预训练FFN权重的SVD分解残差分布到路由专家中，引入基于预训练谱结构的受控专家多样性。同时采用两阶段训练策略提高适应稳定性。
AI.result: 在CoVoST2的15个英译方向多语言语音翻译任务上，SPRI相比完全微调的密集模型平均BLEU提升2.58分，COMET提升3.32分；相比之前最佳的MoE上循环基线提升3.39 BLEU和4.34 COMET分。
AI.conclusion: SPRI在数据受限的监督适应场景下有效解决了MoE上循环的挑战，通过利用预训练谱结构引入受控专家多样性，显著提升了多语言翻译性能。

title: You Don't Need Strong Assumptions: Visual Representation Learning via Temporal Differences
summary: Progress in AI has largely been driven by methods that assume less. As compute and data increase, approaches with weaker inductive biases generally outperform those with stronger assumptions. This is particularly characteristic of the field of Visual Representation Learning, where approaches have gone from being dominated by Supervised Learning, to Weakly Supervised Learning, to the now widespread success of Self-Supervised Learning without human labels. Yet, even modern Self-Supervised Learning approaches still depend on strong inductive biases such as augmentations, masking, or cropping. If this trend holds, even these remaining biases should become bottlenecks at scale -- and our experiments confirm this: the optimal strength of inductive biases decreases as data grows. This motivates the search for approaches that rely on fewer assumptions. To this end, we introduce Temporal Difference in Vision (TDV), a new paradigm for self-supervised learning from video that avoids existing inductive biases, relying instead on a causal assumption that the past causes the future. TDV functions by jointly training an image encoder and a motion encoder so that the current frame's representation plus the encoded motion equals the next frame's representation. Despite not leveraging any strong inductive biases, TDV matches state-of-the-art recipes on dense spatial tasks, laying the foundation for representation learning without strong assumptions.

AI.tldr: 论文提出TDV（Temporal Difference in Vision）新范式，通过视频时序差异进行自监督学习，避免传统强归纳偏置，仅依赖"过去导致未来"的因果假设，在密集空间任务上达到SOTA水平。
AI.motivation: 随着计算和数据增长，AI领域趋势显示弱归纳偏置方法优于强假设方法。当前自监督学习仍依赖数据增强、掩码等强偏置，这些可能成为规模化瓶颈。实验证实：数据量越大，最优归纳偏置强度越低，因此需要寻找依赖更少假设的方法。
AI.method: 提出TDV（Temporal Difference in Vision）范式：联合训练图像编码器和运动编码器，使当前帧表示+编码运动=下一帧表示。仅依赖"过去导致未来"的因果假设，避免传统数据增强、掩码、裁剪等强归纳偏置。
AI.result: TDV在不使用任何强归纳偏置的情况下，在密集空间任务上匹配当前最先进方法，为无强假设的表征学习奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: AI发展遵循"假设越少性能越好"的趋势，TDV成功验证了仅依赖基本因果假设的自监督学习可行性，为未来大规模视觉表征学习提供了新方向。

title: Privacy from Symmetry: Orthogonally Equivariant Transformers for LLM Inference
summary: Running large language models locally is often impractical, pushing inference on sensitive text to third-party providers. Split inference partially mitigates this by keeping tokens on the client and sending only hidden representations, but these representations can still be recovered via nearest-neighbor search against the public embedding table. We propose an orthogonal obfuscation procedure in which the client multiplies embeddings by a secret orthogonal matrix before transmission. To enable correct inference under arbitrary rotations, we introduce ConjFormer, a transformer variant that is exactly $\mathrm{O}(d)$-equivariant via a lightweight normalization change (scalar RMSNorm) together with blockwise orthogonal conjugation of all linear weights. As a result, the server performs the full forward pass entirely in the rotated basis and never observes unrotated hidden states. Experiments on GPT-2 and Llama 3.2 1B models fine-tuned on PubMed show that orthogonal obfuscation eliminates direct cosine nearest-neighbor inversion and reduces token recovery from over 35% top-10 to at most 1.3%, while increasing perplexity by only 0.4% after fine-tuning. These results indicate that enforcing symmetry at the architectural level can provide a practical defense for privacy-preserving LLM inference without noise injection or heavy cryptographic machinery.

AI.tldr: 提出ConjFormer架构，通过正交矩阵混淆隐藏表示，保护隐私LLM推理，无需噪声注入或复杂加密
AI.motivation: 本地运行大语言模型不切实际，但将敏感文本推理外包给第三方存在隐私风险。现有的分割推理方法虽然将token保留在客户端，但隐藏表示仍可通过最近邻搜索从公共嵌入表中恢复。
AI.method: 提出正交混淆方法：客户端在传输前将嵌入乘以秘密正交矩阵。引入ConjFormer，一种通过轻量级归一化变化（标量RMSNorm）和线性权重的块正交共轭实现精确O(d)-等变的Transformer变体，使服务器在旋转基中执行完整前向传播，从不观察未旋转的隐藏状态。
AI.result: 在GPT-2和Llama 3.2 1B模型（在PubMed上微调）上的实验表明，正交混淆消除了直接余弦最近邻反转，将token恢复率从超过35% top-10降低至最多1.3%，同时微调后困惑度仅增加0.4%。
AI.conclusion: 在架构层面强制对称性可以为隐私保护的LLM推理提供实用防御，无需噪声注入或重型加密机制。

title: VEPHand: View-Efficient Photometric Hand Performance Capture at Scale
summary: Robust, high-fidelity 3D hand capture, while fundamental to digital human creation, remains challenging with practical multi-view systems that balance rich photometry with the geometric ambiguities of reconstruction arising from limited viewpoint density. This paper presents an end-to-end pipeline for dynamic hand performance capture and registration, specifically designed for view-efficient setups ($\sim$20 views). We address key challenges with two primary innovations. First, to overcome reconstruction difficulties like limited view overlap and background clutter, our mask-free neural method robustly extracts detailed hand geometry and appearance from unmasked images using scene parameterization and scenario-specific density regularization. Second, addressing registration challenges such as accurately capturing non-linear skin deformations and ensuring plausible results during severe self-contact, we propose a physics-inspired framework. It aligns reconstructions to a personalized hand model by optimizing intrinsic volumetric offsets within its canonical tetrahedral mesh, alongside pose parameters. This approach, supported by robust losses and optimization, captures fine surface deformations, ensures plausible results under severe articulation and self-contact, and demonstrates strong tolerance to input noise. We demonstrate the scalability and robustness of our automated pipeline on an extensive dataset of over 12,000 sequences, from which we also derive a large-scale, high-quality synthetic 2D/3D hand dataset for training downstream tasks. This showcases its effectiveness for single hands, intricate two-hand interactions, and natural hand-object manipulations. Our method achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction fidelity in view-efficient, unmasked scenarios and highly accurate registration. Our project page are available at https://zyshen021.github.io/VEPHand/.

AI.tldr: 提出一个端到端动态手部性能捕捉与配准管道，专为约20个视角的高效多视角系统设计，通过神经重建和物理启发的配准框架解决视角稀疏、背景干扰等挑战。
AI.motivation: 实际多视角系统中，平衡丰富光度信息与视角密度不足导致的几何模糊性，实现鲁棒、高保真的3D手部捕捉仍具挑战。现有方法在视角稀疏、无掩码图像下难以获得准确重建和配准。
AI.method: 1) 无掩码神经重建方法：通过场景参数化和场景特定密度正则化，从无掩码图像中鲁棒提取手部几何与外观；2) 物理启发的配准框架：通过优化个性化手部模型规范四面体网格内的固有体积偏移和姿态参数，将重建结果对齐到个性化手部模型，使用鲁棒损失和优化策略。
AI.result: 在超过12,000个序列的大规模数据集上验证了管道的可扩展性和鲁棒性，并生成了大规模高质量合成2D/3D手部数据集。在单手、复杂双手交互和自然手-物体操作场景中均表现有效，在视角高效、无掩码场景下实现最先进的重建保真度和高精度配准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为视角稀疏的多视角系统提供了鲁棒的端到端手部性能捕捉解决方案，能够处理严重自接触和复杂变形，对输入噪声具有强容忍度，为下游任务提供了高质量训练数据。

title: Learning aligned EEG representations with subject-specific encoders
summary: Cross-subject EEG decoding promises more training data, but it also exposes neural networks to strong inter-subject distribution shifts. We study whether task supervision and architecture alone can learn subject-aligned representations. We replace a shared EEG encoder with subject-specific encoders followed by a common classifier, and compare this hybrid model with standard EEGNet, AttentionBaseNet, and CTNet baselines with Euclidean Alignment (EA) on four motor-imagery datasets. EA improves shared encoders by recentering subject covariances, but the hybrid encoder largely internalises this role: validation-loss curves and latent-distance analyses change little when EA is removed. Subject-specific heads increase class distinctiveness and place each subject close to its own latent manifold, improving most subjects while leaving a method-sensitive subset. These results support subject-specific encoders as a learned alignment mechanism for EEG decoding and identify head selection for unseen subjects as the remaining bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了跨被试EEG解码中，通过任务监督和架构设计学习被试对齐表征的可能性。研究发现被试特定编码器能够内部化对齐机制，减少对外部对齐方法（如欧几里得对齐）的依赖。
AI.motivation: 跨被试EEG解码虽然能提供更多训练数据，但面临强烈的被试间分布偏移问题。研究旨在探索仅通过任务监督和架构设计是否能学习到被试对齐的表征，减少对外部对齐方法的依赖。
AI.method: 将共享的EEG编码器替换为被试特定编码器加共享分类器的混合模型，并与标准EEGNet、AttentionBaseNet和CTNet基线（使用欧几里得对齐）在四个运动想象数据集上进行比较。
AI.result: 欧几里得对齐能改善共享编码器，但混合编码器很大程度上内部化了这一作用：移除EA后验证损失曲线和潜在距离分析变化不大。被试特定头部增加了类别的区分度，并将每个被试置于其自身的潜在流形附近，改善了大多数被试的性能，但留下一个对方法敏感的子集。
AI.conclusion: 被试特定编码器可作为EEG解码的学习对齐机制，但为未见被试选择合适头部仍是剩余瓶颈。这为跨被试EEG解码提供了一种新的架构解决方案。

title: CRIS: Cross-Plane Self-Supervised Isotropic Restoration for Anisotropic Volumetric Imaging Across Modalities
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, supplementary material included. Submitted to Medical Image Analysis
summary: Anisotropic volumetric acquisitions are common in clinical MRI and volume electron microscopy (vEM), where sparse through-plane sampling creates thick slices or sections that degrade orthogonal reformats and downstream analysis. We present CRIS, a cross-plane self-supervised framework for isotropic restoration without paired isotropic ground truth. CRIS casts 3D restoration as 2D stripe completion on orthogonal reformats of an isotropic grid: high-resolution in-plane slices are synthetically degraded and periodically masked for training, while at inference blank slices define the isotropic grid, two orthogonal reformats are restored, and predictions are fused by multi-view averaging. We evaluate CRIS on two MRI cohorts and two microscopy benchmarks up to 8x anisotropy. On brain MRI, CRIS achieves 32.921 +/- 0.436 dB PSNR and 0.9631 +/- 0.0027 SSIM, outperforming interpolation, SMORE4, SIMPLE, SA-INR, and ATME, and gives the best segmentation consistency (Dice 0.940 +/- 0.004, ASSD 0.245 +/- 0.014 mm, HD99 1.275 +/- 0.061 mm). On reference-free abdominal MRI, CRIS reduces FID/KID to 48.714/0.023. On vEM, CRIS outperforms interpolation, NIIV, and vEMINR, reaching 29.133 dB/0.834 3D PSNR/SSIM at 4x, 27.123 dB/0.734 on EPFL at 8x, and 21.915 dB/0.699 on noisy hemibrain data. In a robustness experiment, one variable-gap CRIS model evaluated across gap factors 3--7 and coronal, axial, and sagittal degradations maintained higher PSNR/SSIM than interpolation (36.36--31.14 dB and 0.977--0.932 vs. 33.07--27.85 dB and 0.951--0.853). These results support CRIS as a modality-flexible route to isotropic restoration without paired isotropic targets or configuration-specific retraining. Code is available at https://github.com/adi-hatav/CRIS.

AI.tldr: CRIS是一个跨平面自监督框架，用于各向异性体积数据的各向同性恢复，无需配对的各向同性真值数据，在MRI和电子显微镜数据上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 临床MRI和体积电子显微镜(vEM)中常见的各向异性采集导致厚切片或厚切面，这会降低正交重格式化图像的质量并影响下游分析。现有方法通常需要配对的各向同性真值数据，这在实践中难以获得。
AI.method: CRIS将3D恢复转化为各向同性网格正交重格式化图像上的2D条纹补全。在训练时，对高分辨率平面内切片进行合成降质和周期性掩码；在推理时，空白切片定义各向同性网格，恢复两个正交重格式化图像，并通过多视图平均融合预测结果。
AI.result: 在MRI数据上，CRIS达到32.921±0.436 dB PSNR和0.9631±0.0027 SSIM，优于插值、SMORE4、SIMPLE、SA-INR和ATME等方法，并给出最佳分割一致性。在vEM数据上，CRIS在4x各向异性时达到29.133 dB/0.834 3D PSNR/SSIM，在8x时达到27.123 dB/0.734，在噪声数据上达到21.915 dB/0.699。
AI.conclusion: CRIS提供了一种模态灵活的各向同性恢复方法，无需配对的各向同性目标或特定配置的重新训练，在多种各向异性程度和不同退化方向上均保持稳健性能。

title: BRICKS-WM: Building Reusability via Interface Composition Kinetics for Structured World Models
summary: Model-based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) has achieved remarkable success in continuous control by leveraging latent world models. However, prevailing approaches typically rely on monolithic latent dynamics, entangling environment dynamics into a coupled process. This coupling severely limits reusability: altering the agent necessitates retraining the entire world from scratch, even if the environment remains constant. To address this, we introduce BRICKS-WM (Building Reusability via Interface Composition Kinetics for Structured World Models), a framework for the modular assembly of structured world models. Driven by the insight that the physical world is composed of independent entities, we posit that global dynamics can be modeled as a composition of distinct dynamical modules interacting via latent interfaces. As a minimal instantiation, we factorize the latent state space into an actuated Agent module and an external Background module, bridged by a learned latent interface. Unlike prior object-centric methods that prioritize visual segmentation, BRICKS-WM enforces a functional separation in transition dynamics, ensuring that background dynamics remains agnostic to the agent's dynamics. Empirically, BRICKS-WM achieves control performance comparable to strong monolithic baselines when trained from scratch, and enables the reuse of frozen background dynamics across agents.

AI.tldr: BRICKS-WM是一个模块化世界模型框架，将环境动态分解为独立的模块，通过潜在接口交互，解决了传统MBRL中单体动态模型难以重用的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型强化学习使用单体潜在动态模型，将环境动态耦合在一起，导致改变智能体时需要重新训练整个世界模型，即使环境本身没有变化。这严重限制了模型的可重用性。
AI.method: 提出BRICKS-WM框架，将潜在状态空间分解为智能体模块和背景模块，通过学习的潜在接口连接。强调功能分离而非视觉分割，确保背景动态独立于智能体动态。
AI.result: 从零开始训练时，BRICKS-WM的控制性能与强大的单体基线模型相当。更重要的是，它能够实现冻结背景动态在不同智能体间的重用。
AI.conclusion: BRICKS-WM通过模块化设计解决了传统世界模型的可重用性问题，实现了环境动态与智能体动态的分离，为构建可组合的强化学习系统提供了新思路。

title: HadBalance: A Plug-and-Play Unified Global Geometric Prior Framework for Generalizable Biomedical Segmentation
comment: Provisionally accepted by the 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2026). 11 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
summary: Precise biomedical image segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis. Geometric cues (e.g., boundary, shape, and topology) can improve structural consistency, yet most are task-specific and lack a unified geometric foundation that generalizes across organs and modalities. We are motivated by the observation that several medical segmentation targets can be approximated as globally near-convex shapes. A convex region is one in which any two interior points can be connected by a line segment entirely contained within the region. In practice, medical targets may exhibit small local concavities or boundary irregularities; we refer to such globally convex-like shapes as near-convex. Motivated by this, we derive Hadwiger Shape Priors from Hadwiger's theorem as an interpretable global regularizer using three 2D measures: area A, perimeter P, and Euler characteristic chi, enabling transfer across organs and modalities. However, because medical datasets are shape-heterogeneous, enforcing near-convex priors uniformly can over-regularize non-convex anatomy with significant concavities, washing out concavities and fine details and degrading segmentation accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose Conflict-Aware Objective Balancing (CAOB), which integrates shape priors with segmentation in a gradient-aware manner. For each prior, CAOB removes only the gradient component that conflicts with segmentation while preserving the remaining aligned component, and adaptively regulates objective influences to prevent prior dominance. This enables stable use of shape priors on shape-heterogeneous data without erasing genuine concavities or fine structural details. We call this plug-and-play framework HadBalance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出HadBalance框架，通过Hadwiger形状先验和冲突感知目标平衡(CAOB)方法，在医学图像分割中利用全局近凸形状先验，同时避免过度正则化非凸解剖结构。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割需要精确的结构一致性，许多医学目标具有全局近凸形状特性。现有几何方法多为任务特定，缺乏跨器官和模态的统一几何基础。同时，医学数据形状异构，统一应用近凸先验会过度正则化非凸解剖结构，导致细节丢失。
AI.method: 1. 从Hadwiger定理推导Hadwiger形状先验，使用面积A、周长P和欧拉特征χ三个2D度量作为可解释的全局正则化器。2. 提出冲突感知目标平衡(CAOB)方法，以梯度感知方式集成形状先验与分割：移除与分割冲突的梯度分量，保留对齐分量，自适应调节目标影响防止先验主导。
AI.result: 提出的HadBalance框架能够在形状异构数据上稳定使用形状先验，不会消除真实的凹陷或精细结构细节，提高了医学图像分割的准确性。
AI.conclusion: HadBalance框架通过Hadwiger形状先验提供跨器官和模态的统一几何基础，结合CAOB方法自适应平衡形状先验与分割目标，在保持形状一致性的同时避免过度正则化，实现了更精确的医学图像分割。

title: daVinci-kernel: Co-Evolving Skill Selection, Summarization, and Utilization via RL for GPU Kernel Optimization
summary: GPU kernel optimization represents a paradigm where functional correctness is assumed and execution efficiency is the objective. We present daVinci-kernel, a reinforcement learning framework that couples skill discovery with skill exploitation through a dynamically evolving skill library. daVinci-kernel jointly trains three agents sharing one LLM backbone: a Skill Selection Agent that retrieves relevant techniques via BM25 and LLM reranking, a Policy Agent that generates multi-turn CUDA/Triton kernels conditioned on selected skills, and a Skill Summary Agent that distills successful rollouts into reusable skills. Candidate skills are added only after execution-based verification confirms reproducible speedups. All three agents share a single LLM backbone, are initialized via a structured SFT cold start on diversity-filtered data, and are then jointly optimized end-to-end with multi-turn REINFORCE and per-agent advantage estimation. On KernelBench, daVinci-kernel-14B achieves 37.2%, 70.6%, and 32.2% on Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 under the Fast$_1$ threshold, outperforming the strongest prior RL-trained model, Dr.Kernel-14B.

AI.tldr: daVinci-kernel是一个强化学习框架，通过动态演化的技能库结合技能发现与技能利用，用于GPU内核优化，在KernelBench上显著优于之前的RL训练模型。
AI.motivation: GPU内核优化通常假设功能正确性，主要目标是执行效率。现有方法在技能发现和利用方面存在不足，需要更智能的优化框架。
AI.method: 使用共享一个LLM骨干的三个智能体：技能选择智能体（通过BM25和LLM重排检索相关技术）、策略智能体（基于选定技能生成多轮CUDA/Triton内核）、技能总结智能体（将成功rollout提炼为可重用技能）。通过执行验证确认可复现加速后才添加候选技能。所有智能体通过结构化SFT冷启动初始化，然后通过多轮REINFORCE和每个智能体的优势估计进行端到端联合优化。
AI.result: 在KernelBench上，daVinci-kernel-14B在Level 1、Level 2和Level 3的Fast$_1$阈值下分别达到37.2%、70.6%和32.2%，优于之前最强的RL训练模型Dr.Kernel-14B。
AI.conclusion: daVinci-kernel通过动态技能库和共享LLM骨干的多智能体强化学习，在GPU内核优化方面取得了显著进展，展示了技能发现与利用的有效结合。

title: Mind the Gap: Diagnosing Constraint Discovery Failures in Text-in-Image Editing
summary: A key challenge in multimodal reasoning is determining which visual dependencies become relevant under a specific task, rather than merely recognizing visible content. We study this through edit-induced constraint discovery in text-in-image editing, a controlled diagnostic setting where a local text change can activate secondary consistency constraints: given a valid editing instruction and an image, can a model identify the secondary regions that must also change? Across 461 diagnostic cases, four MLLMs, and 19 constraint subtypes, models recover only 46% case-level macro recall under unguided prompting versus 94% when constraints are explicitly provided, suggesting that a substantial portion of the failure arises when models must decide which unstated dependencies to surface. Oracle-field decomposition shows that case-specific causal explanations are the most effective partial guidance (0.782 recall), above region names (0.610) or type labels (0.646), suggesting that edit-specific causal cues account for much of the oracle gain. A downstream experiment further shows that higher self-discovery recall does not necessarily improve task performance: unverified self-discovery introduces false positives that offset recall gains, motivating precision-aware constraint elicitation.

AI.tldr: 多模态推理中模型难以自主发现视觉依赖关系，在文本编辑任务中仅能恢复46%的约束，但提供明确约束时可达94%。因果解释是最有效的部分引导方式。
AI.motivation: 研究多模态推理中的关键挑战：模型如何确定特定任务下哪些视觉依赖关系变得相关，而不仅仅是识别可见内容。通过文本编辑中的约束发现来诊断这一问题。
AI.method: 使用文本编辑诱导的约束发现作为诊断设置，在461个诊断案例中测试4个MLLMs和19种约束子类型。比较无引导提示与提供明确约束的表现，并进行oracle-field分解分析不同引导方式的效果。
AI.result: 无引导提示下模型仅恢复46%的案例级宏观召回率，提供明确约束时达94%。因果解释是最有效的部分引导（0.782召回率），优于区域名称（0.610）或类型标签（0.646）。自我发现召回率的提高不一定改善任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 模型在自主发现未明示的视觉依赖关系方面存在显著困难，因果解释能有效引导模型。但自我发现可能引入误报，需要精确感知的约束提取方法。

title: Tail-Shape Estimation in LLM Evaluation Is Fragile: A Protocol for Diagnosing False Positives
comment: 9 pages of main paper, 4 figures and 4 tables in the main paper, more in the appendix
summary: Recent work motivates moving large language model (LLM) evaluation from mean-based to tail-aware metrics, including conditional value-at-risk and tail-index estimates of reward-model error. We ask whether the canonical extreme-value-theory tail-index parameter, which isolates how heavy a tail is from how large the tail mass is, adds discriminative information beyond the mean and a standard tail-magnitude statistic in LLM evaluation. We pre-register a protocol covering admissibility, goodness-of-fit, threshold-stability, and effect-size requirements for any positive tail-shape claim. The protocol is the contribution of this paper; the empirical study below is a demonstration of what its gates catch. Applied to a standard LLM toxicity-evaluation setup under two structurally different scorer families, the protocol catches three distinct modes of false positives that a naive analysis would have published, and rejects the headline tail-shape claim on both scorers. We conclude that tail-shape estimation in the LLM toxicity-evaluation setups we examined is more fragile than the recent literature suggests, and recommend the protocol as a starting point for tail-index claims in similar setups.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一套用于评估大语言模型（LLM）尾部形状（如尾指数）声称的预注册协议，并在毒性评估场景中应用该协议，发现尾部形状估计比现有文献认为的更脆弱，并识别出三种假阳性模式。
AI.motivation: 近期研究提倡将LLM评估从基于均值的方法转向尾部感知指标（如条件风险价值和尾指数估计）。然而，尾指数参数（衡量尾部的"厚重"程度）是否能在均值和标准尾部幅度统计量之外提供额外的判别信息尚不明确。论文旨在建立一套严谨的协议来验证尾部形状声称的有效性。
AI.method: 论文提出了一套预注册协议，包含四个核心要求：1) 可接受性要求（尾部形状参数必须提供超出均值和尾部幅度统计量的信息）；2) 拟合优度要求；3) 阈值稳定性要求；4) 效应大小要求。该协议被应用于标准的LLM毒性评估设置，使用两种结构不同的评分器家族进行验证。
AI.result: 在LLM毒性评估设置中，该协议捕获了三种不同的假阳性模式（这些模式在简单分析中会被误认为有效发现），并在两种评分器上都拒绝了主要的尾部形状声称。这表明尾部形状估计在研究的设置中比现有文献认为的更脆弱。
AI.conclusion: 尾部形状估计在LLM毒性评估设置中具有较高的脆弱性，需要更严谨的验证方法。论文提出的预注册协议为类似设置中的尾指数声称提供了一个可靠的起始点，有助于避免假阳性结果并提高研究的严谨性。

title: A Text Recognition Dataset from Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts
summary: In this work, we target Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) in low-resource scenarios, which arise from underrepresented languages, rare scripts, and degraded visual conditions typical of historical documents. We introduce SCAM (Sahidic Coptic Ancient Manuscripts), a new line-level dataset built from digitized ancient manuscripts written in the extinct Sahidic Coptic dialect. The dataset reflects a realistic and challenging setting, as it combines heterogeneous acquisition conditions across libraries with typical manuscript degradations such as ink fading, bleed-through, and material deterioration. In addition to visual complexity, SCAM poses significant linguistic challenges due to the scarcity of resources for Sahidic Coptic, its uncommon alphabet, and dialect-specific diacritics. To support research in low-resource HTR, we benchmark several state-of-the-art approaches based on different paradigms, highlighting their limitations and strengths in this setting. Our results underline the gap between current HTR performance on well-resourced modern scripts and historically grounded, low-resource scenarios, thus providing a reference point for future developments.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对低资源手写文本识别（HTR）场景，提出了一个名为SCAM的萨希迪科普特语古代手稿数据集，并评估了多种最先进的HTR方法在该数据集上的表现。
AI.motivation: 解决低资源手写文本识别问题，特别是针对代表性不足的语言、罕见文字和历史文档的视觉退化条件。萨希迪科普特语作为一种灭绝的方言，缺乏相关资源，为HTR研究提供了极具挑战性的场景。
AI.method: 构建了SCAM数据集，包含来自不同图书馆的数字化古代手稿，具有典型的墨迹褪色、渗透、材料退化等退化特征。使用多种最先进的HTR方法（基于不同范式）在该数据集上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 基准测试结果突显了当前HTR方法在资源充足现代文字与历史低资源场景之间的性能差距，为未来研究提供了参考基准。
AI.conclusion: SCAM数据集为低资源HTR研究提供了有价值的测试平台，揭示了当前方法在历史文档和罕见文字识别方面的局限性，需要进一步的技术发展来应对这些挑战。

title: Multi-Task Tennis Stroke Biomechanics Analysis Using MediaPipe Pose
summary: We built a multi-task pipeline for tennis stroke biomechanics from plain RGB video. On top of pose-based stroke recognition, it adds two new tasks, predicting shot direction and grading posture quality, plus a rule-based feedback layer that suggests coaching tips. Strokes are found automatically using a weighted joint velocity score, s(t) = 0.5 v_wrist + 0.3 m_elbow + 0.2 m_shoulder, removing the need for manual annotation. Pose comes from MediaPipe Pose Landmarker (33 landmarks, metric world coordinates), with each stroke turned into a 30-frame by 39-feature sequence for TennisTransformerGPU, a compact 564,103-parameter transformer (4 layers, 4 heads, d=128) with three parallel output heads. Trained on 1,281 labeled strokes from 7 pros and 1 amateur across 11 videos, it hits 83.7% stroke-type accuracy, 61.9% on direction, and 62.6% on posture under a random 80/20 split. The interesting test is cross-player: train on pros, evaluate on the amateur. Stroke type barely budges, 82.9%, a 0.8% drop. Direction prediction does not transfer; it just falls back to the majority class. An ablation shows why world coordinates matter so much here: switching to image-space landmarks tanks cross-player stroke-type accuracy from 83% to 47% and direction from 68% to 21%. Everything runs on Kaggle's free T4 GPU tier and is fully reproducible.

AI.tldr: 从普通RGB视频构建网球击球生物力学多任务分析系统，包含击球类型识别、击球方向预测和姿势质量评估，以及基于规则的教练反馈层
AI.motivation: 开发一个从普通RGB视频自动分析网球击球生物力学的系统，无需专业设备或手动标注，为教练和运动员提供可操作的反馈
AI.method: 使用加权关节速度评分自动检测击球，MediaPipe提取33个地标的世界坐标，转换为30帧×39特征序列，通过紧凑的Transformer模型（564,103参数）进行多任务学习
AI.result: 在随机80/20分割下达到83.7%击球类型准确率、61.9%方向准确率、62.6%姿势准确率；跨球员测试中击球类型仅下降0.8%，但方向预测无法迁移；世界坐标对性能至关重要
AI.conclusion: 提出的多任务管道能够从普通RGB视频有效分析网球击球生物力学，特别是世界坐标表示对跨球员泛化至关重要，系统在免费GPU上可完全复现

title: How Post-Training Shapes Biological Reasoning Models
summary: Scientific reasoning models for biology combine language models with foundation models trained on multimodal biological data, including DNA, RNA, and proteins. These models are built through post-training, yet how each stage shapes reasoning and generalization remains poorly understood. We study when post-training improves performance and when it induces over-specialization. Across genomics, transcriptomics, and proteins, we train and evaluate more than 100 biological reasoning models under controlled variation in backbone, continued pre-training (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL), measuring both in-domain (ID) and out-of-domain (OOD) performance. We find that each post-training stage reshapes generalization in a distinct way rather than contributing uniform gains. CPT improves downstream performance by aligning models with biological language. SFT consistently increases ID performance but causes OOD performance to peak early and decline as models fit the training distribution. RL, when applied to strong SFT checkpoints with aligned rewards, improves OOD performance and partially recovers generalization. These results show that biological reasoning does not improve monotonically with additional supervision or compute. Instead, performance depends on how training stages are composed. Under fixed post-training budgets, the strongest ID-OOD trade-off comes from brief SFT, larger RL allocations, and asymmetric adaptation capacity across stages.

AI.tldr: 生物推理模型的性能提升并非随训练阶段单调增长，而是取决于各训练阶段的组合方式。研究发现：持续预训练通过生物语言对齐提升下游性能；监督微调提高域内性能但导致域外性能早期达到峰值后下降；强化学习在强监督微调检查点基础上能提升域外性能并部分恢复泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 虽然科学推理模型通过后训练结合语言模型和多模态生物数据基础模型，但各训练阶段如何影响推理和泛化能力尚不明确。本研究旨在探究后训练何时提升性能、何时导致过度专业化，以优化生物推理模型的训练策略。
AI.method: 在基因组学、转录组学和蛋白质领域，训练和评估了100多个生物推理模型，控制变量包括骨干网络、持续预训练(CPT)、监督微调(SFT)和强化学习(RL)，同时测量域内(ID)和域外(OOD)性能。
AI.result: 各后训练阶段以不同方式重塑泛化能力：CPT通过生物语言对齐提升下游性能；SFT持续提高ID性能但导致OOD性能早期达到峰值后下降；RL在强SFT检查点基础上能提升OOD性能并部分恢复泛化能力。性能不随监督或计算资源单调增长，而是取决于训练阶段的组合方式。
AI.conclusion: 生物推理模型的性能提升并非单调过程，而是取决于训练阶段的组合。在固定后训练预算下，最佳ID-OOD权衡来自：简短的SFT、较大的RL分配，以及各阶段间的不对称适应能力。这为优化生物推理模型训练提供了重要指导。

title: Stringalign: Moving beyond summary statistics with a transparent Unicode-aware tool for evaluating automatic transcription models
summary: Comparing text strings is crucial when evaluating and understanding the performance of various text processing tasks such as document recognition and audio transcription. With an increasingly complex landscape of AI-based handwritten text recognition (HTR), optical character recognition (OCR) and automatic speech recognition (ASR) models, there is a need for tools that facilitate evaluation in a flexible and reproducible way. This paper presents Stringalign, a Python library designed to simplify the evaluation process for automatic transcription projects and facilitate transparent evaluation. Stringalign's tools to examine and visualise both the rate of errors and the types of errors a model makes, give insights into possible improvements and help inform model selection for a particular task. Widely used string comparison metrics, such as the character and word error rates (CER and WER), although useful, can be ambiguous due to varying definitions of what constitutes a character and a word. Stringalign addresses this challenge by ensuring all preprocessing (i.e. normalisation and tokenisation) is transparent and easily replicable, and by providing tools to move beyond summary statistics and analyse common model errors. Moreover, Stringalign adheres to FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, and Reusable) principles for research software while staying lightweight and easy to adapt into researchers existing workflows. In this paper, we discuss challenges with character and word level string comparisons and show through examples that where existing tools can yield opaque and sometimes confusing results, Stringalign provides an easy-to-use and unambiguous alternative.

AI.tldr: Stringalign是一个Python库，用于简化自动转录项目的评估，提供透明、可复现的字符串比较工具，支持字符和单词错误率计算及错误可视化分析。
AI.motivation: 随着基于AI的手写文本识别、光学字符识别和自动语音识别模型日益复杂，需要灵活、可复现的评估工具。现有字符串比较指标（如CER和WER）因字符和单词定义不统一而存在模糊性，且缺乏透明预处理和深入错误分析能力。
AI.method: 开发Stringalign Python库，提供透明、可复现的预处理（规范化和分词），支持字符和单词错误率计算，包含错误类型分析和可视化工具，遵循FAIR原则，轻量易集成到现有工作流。
AI.result: Stringalign解决了现有工具结果不透明、易混淆的问题，提供了易用、明确的字符串比较替代方案，能够深入分析模型错误模式，为模型改进和选择提供依据。
AI.conclusion: Stringalign是一个透明、可复现的字符串比较库，通过标准化预处理和深入错误分析，解决了自动转录评估中的模糊性问题，有助于提升模型评估的可靠性和可解释性。

title: Neural Bayesian Anomaly Mitigation: A Robust Loss that Doubles as an Unsupervised Contamination Classifier
summary: Engineered robust losses such as Huber, Student-$t$, and generalised cross-entropy make supervised models tolerant of contamination but cannot answer which observations are corrupted. We introduce Neural Bayesian Anomaly Mitigation (NBAM), a general-purpose drop-in loss derived from a Bayesian latent-switch mixture model: the marginal likelihood defines a robust supervised loss, and the associated posterior defines an unsupervised contamination classifier. Like Huber or Student-$t$, NBAM can replace the standard training loss in any supervised pipeline; unlike them, it additionally learns a structured contamination model and returns a calibrated per-sample contamination posterior. A learned input-dependent prior $π_φ(x)$ captures the spatial locality of contamination, so that samples near known corruptions are more likely to be flagged, while an Occam penalty emerges automatically and regularises against over-flagging. On CIFAR-10 with asymmetric label contamination, NBAM recovers the structure of the corruption process without supervision: the contamination posterior separates clean from corrupted samples, and the learned anomaly head identifies the direction of every label-flip pair. Alongside these capabilities, NBAM outperforms the four robust-loss baselines considered here at contamination rates 0.2-0.6.

AI.tldr: NBAM是一种基于贝叶斯隐变量混合模型的通用损失函数，既能实现鲁棒监督学习，又能无监督地检测数据污染，优于传统的Huber、Student-t等鲁棒损失函数。
AI.motivation: 传统鲁棒损失函数（如Huber、Student-t、广义交叉熵）虽然能容忍数据污染，但无法识别哪些样本被污染，需要一种既能鲁棒训练又能检测污染的方法。
AI.method: 提出神经贝叶斯异常缓解（NBAM），基于贝叶斯隐变量混合模型：边缘似然定义鲁棒监督损失，后验分布定义无监督污染分类器。学习输入相关的先验π_φ(x)捕捉污染的空间局部性，自动产生奥卡姆惩罚防止过度标记。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10非对称标签污染实验中，NBAM能无监督地恢复污染过程结构：污染后验能分离干净和污染样本，异常头部能识别所有标签翻转对的方向。在0.2-0.6污染率下，NBAM优于四种鲁棒损失基线。
AI.conclusion: NBAM是一种通用的即插即用损失函数，既能实现鲁棒监督学习，又能提供校准的样本级污染后验，优于传统鲁棒损失方法，具有实际应用价值。

title: The Third Challenge on Image Denoising at NTIRE 2026: Methods and Results
summary: This paper reports on the NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Image Denoising, specifically focusing on the high-noise regime ($σ= 50$). The competition investigates advanced neural architectures designed to restore high-fidelity details from images corrupted by additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN). Unlike constrained benchmarks, this track emphasizes peak quantitative performance, measured by Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR), without limitations on parameter count or computational overhead. By synthesizing contributions from 20 finalist teams out of 116 registrants, this report benchmarks the latest technical innovations and provides a comprehensive snapshot of the current state-of-the-art in unconstrained image restoration.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026图像去噪挑战赛报告，专注于高噪声水平（σ=50）下的图像恢复，评估无约束条件下（不计参数量和计算成本）的峰值PSNR性能，汇集了116个参赛团队中的20个决赛方案。
AI.motivation: 探索在高噪声水平下（σ=50的加性高斯白噪声）图像去噪的最新进展，通过竞赛形式推动无约束条件下（不考虑参数量和计算开销）的峰值性能研究，为图像恢复领域提供当前最先进技术的全面评估。
AI.method: 采用竞赛机制，收集116个注册团队的解决方案，最终分析20个决赛团队的神经网络架构。这些架构专注于从AWGN噪声中恢复高保真细节，评估标准为峰值信噪比（PSNR），不限制模型参数数量或计算复杂度。
AI.result: 报告汇集了20个决赛团队的技术创新，为高噪声图像去噪提供了当前最先进的性能基准。通过无约束条件下的PSNR评估，展示了各团队在峰值性能上的最新成果。
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026高噪声图像去噪挑战赛成功评估了当前无约束条件下图像恢复的最新技术水平，为研究社区提供了全面的性能基准和技术发展趋势的参考。

title: Assessing Reliability of Symbol Detection in Concept Bottleneck Models
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) are a relevant tool for explainable Artificial Intelligence because they make their predictions through human-interpretable symbols. However, high task accuracy does not guarantee that these symbols are detected faithfully: jointly trained CBMs may encode task-specific shortcuts in the bottleneck, making their explanations unreliable. In this paper, we study concept-detection reliability by swapping independently trained concept detectors and classification heads that share the same symbolic vocabulary. We use the resulting performance degradation, concept-level metrics, and symbol-wise uncertainty estimates to identify concepts that are especially prone to spurious firing. Finally, we propose a reliability-aware training strategy in which a shared concept detector is optimized with multiple classification heads and penalized for relying on globally or instance-wise unreliable symbols. On CUB-200-2011 with full concept supervision, detectors and heads are almost freely interchangeable (swap drop below one accuracy point, relative retention above $99\%$, and no concept detected below chance), whereas on a controlled synthetic task we show that, as the concept-supervision weight is reduced, models keep near-perfect task accuracy while swapped accuracy and agreement with the ground-truth concepts collapse to chance. Our reliability-aware training substantially mitigates this leakage, roughly doubling swap accuracy in the leaky regime.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）中概念检测的可靠性问题，发现联合训练的CBMs可能编码任务特定的捷径，导致解释不可靠。作者提出通过交换独立训练的概念检测器和分类头来评估可靠性，并提出可靠性感知的训练策略来缓解此问题。
AI.motivation: 概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）是解释性AI的重要工具，但高任务准确率并不能保证符号检测的可靠性。联合训练的CBMs可能在瓶颈层编码任务特定的捷径，导致解释不可靠。需要研究如何评估和提高概念检测的可靠性。
AI.method:
1. 通过交换独立训练的概念检测器和分类头来评估可靠性，使用性能下降、概念级指标和符号级不确定性估计来识别容易虚假触发的概念。
2. 提出可靠性感知的训练策略：优化共享概念检测器与多个分类头，惩罚依赖全局或实例级不可靠符号的行为。
AI.result:
1. 在CUB-200-2011数据集上，使用完整概念监督时，检测器和分类头几乎可以自由交换（性能下降低于1个准确率点，相对保留率高于99%，没有概念检测低于随机水平）。
2. 在受控合成任务中，随着概念监督权重的降低，模型保持接近完美的任务准确率，但交换准确率和与真实概念的一致性崩溃到随机水平。
3. 可靠性感知训练显著缓解了这种泄露，在泄露机制下使交换准确率大致翻倍。
AI.conclusion: 概念瓶颈模型在概念监督不足时容易出现概念检测不可靠的问题。通过交换检测器和分类头可以评估可靠性，而提出的可靠性感知训练策略能有效提高概念检测的可靠性，减少任务特定捷径的影响。

title: Trusting Right Predictions for Wrong Reasons: A LIME Based Analysis of Deep Learning Interpretability in Lung Cancer Diagnosis
summary: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer-related mortality, with approximately 2.5 million new cases and 1.8 million deaths annually, making reliable diagnosis a clinical priority. Although deep learning models have achieved strong performance in lung cancer classification, evaluation has largely focused on predictive accuracy, leaving their decision-making processes insufficiently examined. This study compares three architecturally distinct models: a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), a pretrained ResNet50, and a Vision Transformer (ViT), trained on the IQ-OTH/NCCD lung cancer CT dataset. Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) were applied to investigate model reasoning. In addition to standard performance metrics, a dual-correlation framework was introduced to measure both prediction agreement and explanation agreement across model pairs. All three models achieved strong classification performance, with ResNet50 attaining 98.61% accuracy, CNN 97.91%, and ViT 93.75%, while all achieved ROC-AUC scores of 0.99. Prediction correlations exceeded 0.99 across all model pairs, indicating highly consistent outputs. However, LIME explanation correlations remained below 0.26, revealing substantial differences in the image regions used to reach those predictions. Analysis of misclassified samples further identified a consistent spatial pattern: incorrect predictions were associated with attention outside the lung parenchyma, whereas correct predictions focused primarily within lung regions. These findings demonstrate that prediction agreement is a poor proxy for reasoning consistency, and that interpretability evaluation must be treated as an independent validation criterion alongside predictive performance in clinical AI systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了三种深度学习模型在肺癌CT图像分类中的表现，发现尽管预测准确率高度一致，但模型决策依据存在显著差异，强调在临床AI系统中需要将可解释性评估作为独立验证标准。
AI.motivation: 肺癌是癌症相关死亡的主要原因，每年有约250万新病例和180万死亡病例，可靠的诊断成为临床优先事项。虽然深度学习模型在肺癌分类中取得了良好性能，但评估主要关注预测准确性，对其决策过程缺乏充分研究。
AI.method: 研究比较了三种架构不同的模型：卷积神经网络（CNN）、预训练的ResNet50和视觉变换器（ViT），使用IQ-OTH/NCCD肺癌CT数据集进行训练。应用局部可解释模型无关解释（LIME）分析模型推理过程，并引入双相关框架来测量模型对之间的预测一致性和解释一致性。
AI.result: 所有三种模型都取得了强大的分类性能：ResNet50准确率98.61%，CNN 97.91%，ViT 93.75%，所有模型的ROC-AUC得分均为0.99。预测相关性在所有模型对中超过0.99，表明输出高度一致。但LIME解释相关性低于0.26，显示模型用于做出预测的图像区域存在显著差异。错误分类样本分析发现一致的空间模式：错误预测与肺实质外部的注意力相关，而正确预测主要关注肺区域内部。
AI.conclusion: 预测一致性不能代表推理一致性，在临床AI系统中，可解释性评估必须作为与预测性能并列的独立验证标准。模型可能使用不同的图像特征达到相似的预测结果，这对临床部署的可靠性提出了重要问题。

title: MIRAGE: Auditing Anti-Muslim Bias in Frontier LLMs Across Reasoning, Agentic, and Time-Coupled Conditions
summary: Five years after the discovery of persistent anti-Muslim bias in large language models, most evaluations remain confined to single-turn prompt completion, a setting that no longer reflects how frontier LLMs are deployed. We introduce \textbf{MIRAGE} (Muslim-Identity Reasoning and Agentic Generation Evaluation), a benchmark of 1{,}200 prompts spanning three deployment-realistic conditions: direct completion, chain-of-thought reasoning, and simulated agentic decision-making across content moderation, lending triage, refugee claim summarization, and hiring screens. Across six frontier models, we find that (i) chain-of-thought reasoning \emph{amplifies} rather than suppresses Muslim-violence associations by 12--34\% relative to direct completion, (ii) agentic decisions exhibit a 9--22 percentage-point asymmetry between Muslim and matched non-Muslim cases on identical evidence, and (iii) bias is sharply time-coupled to retrieved news context, increasing 18--27\% under recent-conflict retrieval. Existing prompt-based mitigations transfer poorly across our three conditions, suppressing direct-completion bias while leaving agentic asymmetry largely intact. We release MIRAGE and an open evaluation harness to support targeted mitigation research.

AI.tldr: MIRAGE基准测试评估前沿LLM在三种部署现实场景中对穆斯林身份的偏见：直接补全、思维链推理和模拟代理决策，发现思维链会放大偏见，代理决策存在不对称性，且偏见与新闻检索时间高度相关。
AI.motivation: 现有评估主要局限于单轮提示补全，无法反映前沿LLM的实际部署方式。需要开发更贴近实际应用场景的评估框架来检测LLM对穆斯林身份的偏见。
AI.method: 引入MIRAGE基准，包含1,200个提示，涵盖三种部署现实场景：直接补全、思维链推理、以及内容审核、贷款分流、难民申请总结和招聘筛选等领域的模拟代理决策。评估六个前沿模型。
AI.result: 1) 思维链推理相比直接补全会放大12-34%的穆斯林-暴力关联；2) 代理决策在相同证据下，穆斯林与非穆斯林案例存在9-22%的不对称性；3) 偏见与检索到的新闻背景时间高度相关，近期冲突检索下增加18-27%。现有缓解方法跨场景迁移效果差。
AI.conclusion: 需要针对不同部署场景开发专门的偏见缓解方法，现有方法在代理决策等复杂场景中效果有限。MIRAGE基准和开源评估工具支持针对性缓解研究。

title: PointDiffusion: Diffusion-Based Scene Completion in the Point Cloud Domain
summary: Reconstructing dense 3D scenes from sparse LiDAR point clouds is a fundamental challenge in autonomous driving, where latent diffusion models offer a promising solution. However, existing approaches rely on object-level autoencoders that collapse into unstable global representations at outdoor scale and suffer from ground truth data corrupted by odometry drift that systematically degrades supervision quality. Furthermore, multi-step diffusion inference incurs prohibitive latency for real-time deployment. We propose a novel multi-token Gaussian VAE with cross-attention pooling for stable scene-scale LiDAR compression, combined with an anchor-based ICP ground truth refinement pipeline that eliminates drift-induced noise from training supervision. Together, these components enable a scaffold-free single-step diffusion completion model that achieves an approximately 16x reduction in squared Chamfer distance on SemanticKITTI seq. 08 (0.396 m^2 to 0.024 m^2), surpasses LiDiff and ScoreLiDAR by 17-19% and 10-11%, respectively, and operates at 25-143x lower inference latency. Our results demonstrate that data quality dominates model design in this regime and that multi-token latent spaces provide a stable first stage for latent diffusion-based scene completion.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于稀疏LiDAR点云3D场景重建的新方法，通过多令牌高斯VAE和锚点ICP地面实况精炼，结合单步扩散补全模型，显著提升了重建质量和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在三个主要问题：1）基于对象级自编码器在室外尺度下会崩溃为不稳定全局表示；2）地面实况数据因里程计漂移而质量下降；3）多步扩散推理延迟过高，难以实时部署。
AI.method: 提出多令牌高斯VAE与交叉注意力池化用于稳定场景尺度LiDAR压缩，结合基于锚点的ICP地面实况精炼管道消除训练监督中的漂移噪声，最终构建无需支架的单步扩散补全模型。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI seq. 08上，平方Chamfer距离从0.396 m²降低到0.024 m²（约16倍提升），超越LiDiff和ScoreLiDAR分别17-19%和10-11%，推理延迟降低25-143倍。
AI.conclusion: 在该领域，数据质量对模型设计的影响占主导地位，多令牌潜在空间为基于潜在扩散的场景补全提供了稳定的第一阶段，实现了高质量、低延迟的稀疏LiDAR点云重建。

title: RepNet: Tackling spectral bias in deep neural networks via parameter reparameterization
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success in scientific computing, yet they often suffer from spectral bias in capturing oscillatory and multiscale behaviors. In this study, we investigate this limitation by examining the failure of shallow ReLU neural networks in fitting high-frequency functions. This observation identifies two important factors in resolving rapid oscillations: the initial slope scale and the distribution of partition points induced by the networks. Motivated by this analysis, we propose RepNet, a reparameterized DNN model for ReLU and tanh networks designed for high-frequency and multiscale problems. The key idea is to reparameterize the weights and biases in the first hidden layer, which enables effective control of the initial slope scale and provides an appropriate distribution of the initial partition points. Furthermore, treating the reparameterized weights and biases as trainable parameters allows the DNN to achieve adaptive frequency scaling during training. In addition, we derive quantitative estimates for the output and slope magnitudes of the reparameterized DNN to guide the initialization of the proposed method. Numerical experiments, including multiscale one- and four-dimensional function approximation, forward and inverse PDE problems in combination with physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), and operator learning, demonstrate that RepNet improves the predicted accuracy of vanilla DNNs in capturing highly oscillatory features with slightly additional computational cost. These results indicate that RepNet provides an effective and flexible approach for overcoming spectral bias and applying DNNs to multiscale problems.

AI.tldr: RepNet是一种通过重参数化第一隐藏层权重和偏置来克服深度神经网络频谱偏差的方法，专门用于处理高频和多尺度问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在科学计算中取得了显著成功，但在捕捉振荡和多尺度行为时存在频谱偏差。浅层ReLU网络无法拟合高频函数的问题，揭示了解决快速振荡的两个关键因素：初始斜率尺度和网络诱导的分区点分布。
AI.method: 提出RepNet，一种重参数化的DNN模型。关键思想是重参数化第一隐藏层的权重和偏置，这能够有效控制初始斜率尺度并提供适当分布的初始分区点。将重参数化的权重和偏置作为可训练参数，使DNN在训练过程中实现自适应频率缩放。还推导了重参数化DNN输出和斜率幅度的定量估计来指导初始化。
AI.result: 数值实验包括多尺度一维和四维函数逼近、结合物理信息神经网络的正向和逆向PDE问题，以及算子学习。结果表明，RepNet在略微增加计算成本的情况下，显著提高了普通DNN在捕捉高频振荡特征时的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: RepNet为克服频谱偏差并将DNN应用于多尺度问题提供了一种有效且灵活的方法。

title: Stepwise Token Selection for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: In multimodal large language models (MLLMs), inference cost is largely dominated by the visual token prefix rather than the language backbone, making token reduction a key factor for improving efficiency. Existing approaches typically assign independent importance scores to visual tokens and retain a fixed number of top-ranked tokens, implicitly assuming token independence and a uniform compression ratio across inputs. In this work, we reformulate visual token pruning as a sequential decision-making process. Specifically, we introduce a pointer-style selection mechanism that iteratively chooses informative tokens, conditioning each decision on previously selected ones, and dynamically determines when to stop via a learned termination action. This enables joint optimization of both the selected subset and its size. To enable end-to-end training under standard language modeling objectives, we design a differentiable relaxation based on a variance-preserving noise interpolation scheme, allowing gradients to propagate through the discrete selection process. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-v1.5-7B and Qwen2.5-VL-7B demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms fixed-ratio baselines across different compression levels. Under aggressive pruning that removes 88.9% of visual tokens, our method preserves 94.6% of the original accuracy while achieving a 1.88x speed-up in prefill latency.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的视觉token剪枝方法，将token选择重新定义为序列决策过程，通过指针式选择机制迭代选择信息丰富的token，并动态决定何时停止，从而联合优化选择子集及其大小。
AI.motivation: 在多模态大语言模型中，视觉token前缀占据了推理成本的主要部分，现有方法通常为视觉token分配独立的重要性分数并保留固定数量的top token，这隐含地假设了token独立性和跨输入的均匀压缩比。
AI.method: 提出将视觉token剪枝重新定义为序列决策过程，引入指针式选择机制迭代选择信息丰富的token，每个决策都以前面选择的token为条件，并通过学习终止动作动态决定何时停止。设计基于方差保持噪声插值方案的可微分松弛，使梯度能够通过离散选择过程传播，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-v1.5-7B和Qwen2.5-VL-7B上的实验表明，该方法在不同压缩级别上始终优于固定比例基线。在移除88.9%视觉token的激进剪枝下，该方法保持了94.6%的原始准确率，同时实现了1.88倍的预填充延迟加速。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种新的视觉token剪枝框架，通过序列决策过程实现token选择的联合优化，在保持模型性能的同时显著提高了多模态大语言模型的推理效率。

title: Tool-IQA: Augmenting Image Quality Assessment with Simple Tools
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have been increasingly adopted for Image Quality Assessment (IQA). However, current methods typically employ a static one-shot scoring paradigm, despite the fact that humans assess image quality through dynamic visual inspection, e.g., selectively adjusting views to verify details and subtle artifacts. Specifically, relying solely on a single-pass observation introduces two primary limitations: first, perceiving the image only at a global scale restricts the assessment of finer local details; second, the original intensity distribution of the image may overwhelm the visibility, leading to insufficient inspection of image quality. To address these issues, we propose Tool-IQA, shifting the assessment mechanism from passive scoring to a tool-augmented workflow. In particular, we equip VLMs with simple yet effective view tools: a Magnifier to inspect local details, and a Gamma Corrector to uncover visibility and hidden artifacts. The assessment follows a structured pipeline that consists of an initial observation with rubric notes, a tool-augmented in-depth inspection, and a final quantification for calibrated quality score. Furthermore, to ensure efficient and purposeful tool callings, we introduce a batch-aware training strategy to reward tool interactions that can yield positive contributions rather than simply encouraging usage. Experiments on a variety of IQA benchmarks demonstrate that, with effective tool calling and calibrated assessment, our proposed Tool-IQA significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models, e.g., it achieves a PLCC of 0.854 on the challenging CLIVE dataset.

AI.tldr: Tool-IQA：一种基于工具增强的视觉语言模型图像质量评估方法，通过放大镜和伽马校正器工具实现动态视觉检查，显著提升评估性能
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的图像质量评估方法通常采用静态的一次性评分范式，而人类评估图像质量是通过动态视觉检查（如选择性调整视图来验证细节和细微伪影）。仅依赖单次观察存在两个主要限制：1）仅在全局尺度感知图像会限制对更精细局部细节的评估；2）图像的原始强度分布可能压倒可见性，导致对图像质量的检查不足
AI.method: 提出Tool-IQA，将评估机制从被动评分转变为工具增强的工作流程。具体为视觉语言模型配备简单而有效的视图工具：放大镜用于检查局部细节，伽马校正器用于揭示可见性和隐藏的伪影。评估遵循结构化流程：初始观察与评分标准笔记、工具增强的深入检查、用于校准质量分数的最终量化。此外，引入批量感知训练策略，奖励能产生积极贡献的工具交互，而非简单鼓励使用
AI.result: 在各种IQA基准测试上的实验表明，通过有效的工具调用和校准评估，Tool-IQA显著优于现有最先进模型。例如，在具有挑战性的CLIVE数据集上实现了0.854的PLCC（皮尔逊线性相关系数）
AI.conclusion: Tool-IQA通过工具增强的视觉语言模型实现了更接近人类动态视觉检查的图像质量评估，解决了当前静态评分方法的局限性，在多个基准测试中展现出优越性能

title: VinQA: Visual Elements Interleaved Long-form Answer Generation for Real-World Multimodal Document QA
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Main paper: 5 figures, 4 tables; includes supplementary material
summary: Real-world documents combine text with tables, charts, photographs, and diagrams arranged in diverse layouts, yet existing research on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for document QA predominantly produces text-only responses, underutilizing these visual elements. We introduce VinQA, a dataset for long-form answer generation where cited visual elements are explicitly interleaved with their supporting text and grounded in relevant document pages. To support this task, we study two encoding methods for feeding raw document page images into an MLLM, along with their visual-element citation mechanisms: (1) Page Encoding, which directly encodes full-page images with bounding boxes of visual elements and treats these boxed regions as citable units; and (2) Modality Encoding, which parses each page to extract text and crop visual elements, encodes them separately, and uses these cropped elements as citable units. In our experiments, we propose M-GroSE, a multimodal evaluation framework extending GroUSE to assess answers along four dimensions: completeness, answer relevancy, faithfulness, and unanswerability. We additionally report Visual Source F1 to directly measure visual citation accuracy. Although proprietary frontier models still achieve the best overall scores on the VinQA test split, fine-tuning open Qwen2.5-VL models on the training split substantially improves their performance and narrows this gap. Modality Encoding is initially more robust for complex documents with long text, many visual elements, and diverse citation requirements. After training on VinQA, however, Page Encoding reaches a comparable level, competing effectively even without the explicit parsing used in Modality Encoding. Finally, Visual G-Eval, an MLLM-based judge, confirms that fine-tuned models insert visual elements at semantically appropriate positions with faithful supporting text.

AI.tldr: VinQA数据集专注于长文本答案生成，要求在答案中明确引用视觉元素并与支持性文本交织，同时将引用定位到相关文档页面。该研究比较了两种编码方法：页面编码和模态编码，并提出了M-GroSE多模态评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有文档QA研究主要产生纯文本响应，未能充分利用文档中的视觉元素（如图表、照片、图表）。真实世界文档通常包含多种视觉元素和多样化的布局，需要更好的多模态理解和引用机制。
AI.method: 提出了两种编码方法：1) 页面编码：直接编码完整页面图像，使用视觉元素的边界框作为可引用单元；2) 模态编码：解析页面提取文本和裁剪视觉元素，分别编码它们，使用裁剪元素作为可引用单元。使用M-GroSE评估框架（基于GroUSE扩展）评估四个维度：完整性、答案相关性、忠实性、不可回答性。
AI.result: 专有前沿模型在VinQA测试集上表现最佳，但对Qwen2.5-VL模型进行微调可显著提升性能并缩小差距。对于复杂文档，模态编码最初更稳健，但经过训练后，页面编码达到可比水平，即使没有显式解析也能有效竞争。Visual G-Eval确认微调模型能在语义适当时机插入视觉元素并提供忠实支持文本。
AI.conclusion: VinQA为长文本答案生成提供了有价值的数据集和基准，展示了多模态编码方法的有效性。经过训练，页面编码能够达到与模态编码相当的性能，为更简单的实现提供了可能性。该研究推动了文档理解中视觉元素的引用和整合能力。

title: SceneCraft: Interactive System for Image Editing via Scene Graph
summary: Recent advances in generative AI have enabled natural language-driven image editing, yet existing systems often fail in complex scenes with multiple interacting objects because they rely heavily on users crafting precise text prompts. To address the absence of structured control, we propose SceneCraft, a novel interactive framework that bridges user intent and model execution by representing images as editable scene graphs. Instead of guessing text prompts through trial and error, users interact directly with a visual graph to perform complex spatial and relational operations. These graph modifications are automatically translated into precise, context-aware editing prompts, effectively eliminating linguistic ambiguity. To ensure robust and diverse results, structured prompts are dispatched to multiple state-of-the-art generative models. Evaluations across diverse editing scenarios show that SceneCraft provides a more intuitive control mechanism, significantly reducing the cognitive burden of manual prompt engineering while generating outputs that users consistently rate as higher in quality and fidelity.

AI.tldr: SceneCraft是一个交互式图像编辑框架，通过将图像表示为可编辑的场景图，让用户直接操作视觉图来执行复杂的空间和关系操作，自动生成精确的上下文感知编辑提示，减少手动提示工程的认知负担。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自然语言的图像编辑系统在复杂多对象交互场景中表现不佳，因为它们过度依赖用户精心设计精确的文本提示，缺乏结构化控制机制。
AI.method: 提出SceneCraft框架：1) 将图像表示为可编辑的场景图；2) 用户直接与视觉图交互进行空间和关系操作；3) 自动将图修改转换为精确的上下文感知编辑提示；4) 将结构化提示分发给多个最先进的生成模型以确保鲁棒性和多样性。
AI.result: 在多样化编辑场景中的评估显示，SceneCraft提供了更直观的控制机制，显著减少了手动提示工程的认知负担，用户一致评价生成的输出在质量和保真度方面更高。
AI.conclusion: SceneCraft通过将图像表示为可编辑的场景图，在用户意图和模型执行之间架起桥梁，有效消除了语言歧义，为复杂图像编辑提供了更直观、高效的控制机制。

title: EdgeZSAD: Practical Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection on Edge Devices
summary: Industrial inspection needs zero-shot anomaly detection (ZSAD) that remains useful under edge deployment constraints. Recent methods often rely on ViT-L foundation backbones (~300M parameters), which exceed the memory and operator budget of typical embedded hardware. We study this regime through EdgeZSAD, a compact reference system built around a TinyViT-21M-512 backbone, an asymmetric global-local readout (EdgeGLR), and a reproducible source-side training recipe (Real-IAD-DR). We train a single checkpoint in a source-trained, target-unseen protocol and evaluate it across six industrial benchmarks.
